authors_text: Germán Kruszewski,Jos Rozen,Marc Dymetman
title: disco: a toolkit for Distributional Control of Generative Models
title_zh: disco：生成模型分布式控制的工具包
abstract: Pre-trained language models and other generative models have revolutionized NLP and beyond. However, these models tend to reproduce undesirable biases present in their training data. Also, they may overlook patterns that are important but challenging to capture. To address these limitations, researchers have introduced distributional control techniques. These techniques, not limited to language, allow controlling the prevalence (i.e., expectations) of any features of interest in the model's outputs. Despite their potential, the widespread adoption of these techniques has been hindered by the difficulty in adapting complex, disconnected code. Here, we present disco, an open-source Python library that brings these techniques to the broader public.
summary: Pre-trained language models and other generative models have revolutionized NLP and beyond. However, these models tend to reproduce undesirable biases present in their training data. Also, they may overlook patterns that are important but challenging to capture. To address these limitations, researchers have introduced distributional control techniques. These techniques, not limited to language, allow controlling the prevalence (i.e., expectations) of any features of interest in the model's outputs. Despite their potential, the widespread adoption of these techniques has been hindered by the difficulty in adapting complex, disconnected code. Here, we present disco, an open-source Python library that brings these techniques to the broader public.
abstract_zh: 预训练语言模型和其他生成模型已经彻底改变了 NLP 及其他领域。然而，这些模型往往会重现训练数据中存在的不良偏差。此外，他们可能会忽略重要但难以捕捉的模式。为了解决这些限制，研究人员引入了分布式控制技术。这些技术不仅限于语言，还允许控制模型输出中任何感兴趣特征的普遍性（即期望）。尽管它们具有潜力，但这些技术的广泛采用却因难以适应复杂、互不相关的代码而受到阻碍。在这里，我们介绍 disco，一个开源 Python 库，它将这些技术带给更广泛的公众。

AI.tldr: 介绍一个名为disco的开源工具包，用于实现生成模型的分布控制，以解决模型输出中的偏见和模式捕捉问题。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型存在再现训练数据偏见和忽略重要模式的问题，而分布控制技术因代码复杂难以普及，需开发易用的工具。
AI.method: 开发了一个开源Python库disco，提供统一接口和模块化设计，简化分布控制技术的实现和应用。
AI.result: 成功开发并发布了disco工具包，降低了分布控制技术的使用门槛，促进了其在生成模型中的应用。
AI.conclusion: disco工具包有效解决了分布控制技术的普及难题，为生成模型的可控性提供了实用解决方案。

authors_text: Ben Adlam,Jaehoon Lee,Shreyas Padhy,Zachary Nado,Jasper Snoek
title: Kernel Regression with Infinite-Width Neural Networks on Millions of Examples
title_zh: 在数百万个示例上使用无限宽度神经网络进行核回归
abstract: Neural kernels have drastically increased performance on diverse and nonstandard data modalities but require significantly more compute, which previously limited their application to smaller datasets. In this work, we address this by massively parallelizing their computation across many GPUs. We combine this with a distributed, preconditioned conjugate gradients algorithm to enable kernel regression at a large scale (i.e. up to five million examples). Using this approach, we study scaling laws of several neural kernels across many orders of magnitude for the CIFAR-5m dataset. Using data augmentation to expand the original CIFAR-10 training dataset by a factor of 20, we obtain a test accuracy of 91.2\% (SotA for a pure kernel method). Moreover, we explore neural kernels on other data modalities, obtaining results on protein and small molecule prediction tasks that are competitive with SotA methods.
summary: Neural kernels have drastically increased performance on diverse and nonstandard data modalities but require significantly more compute, which previously limited their application to smaller datasets. In this work, we address this by massively parallelizing their computation across many GPUs. We combine this with a distributed, preconditioned conjugate gradients algorithm to enable kernel regression at a large scale (i.e. up to five million examples). Using this approach, we study scaling laws of several neural kernels across many orders of magnitude for the CIFAR-5m dataset. Using data augmentation to expand the original CIFAR-10 training dataset by a factor of 20, we obtain a test accuracy of 91.2\% (SotA for a pure kernel method). Moreover, we explore neural kernels on other data modalities, obtaining results on protein and small molecule prediction tasks that are competitive with SotA methods.
abstract_zh: 神经内核极大地提高了在不同和非标准数据模式上的性能，但需要更多的计算，这之前限制了它们在较小数据集上的应用。在这项工作中，我们通过在许多 GPU 上大规模并行计算来解决这个问题。我们将其与分布式预条件共轭梯度算法相结合，以实现大规模核回归（即最多 500 万个示例）。使用这种方法，我们研究了 CIFAR-5m 数据集的多个神经核在多个数量级上的缩放定律。使用数据增强将原始 CIFAR-10 训练数据集扩展 20 倍，我们获得了 91.2% 的测试准确率（纯核方法的 SotA）。此外，我们还在其他数据模式上探索神经内核，获得了与 SotA 方法竞争的蛋白质和小分子预测任务的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用无限宽度神经网络的核回归方法，通过大规模并行计算处理数百万级数据集以提高性能。
AI.motivation: 神经核方法在非标准数据模态上表现优异，但高计算需求限制了其在大规模数据集的应用。
AI.method: 通过多GPU并行计算与分布式预处理共轭梯度算法实现大规模核回归，并利用数据增强扩展数据集。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-5m数据集上测试准确率达91.2%（纯核方法SotA），并在蛋白质及小分子预测任务中达到竞品水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效突破了神经核方法的计算瓶颈，验证了其在大规模数据及多模态任务中的应用潜力。

authors_text: Kazi Injamamul Haque,Zerrin Yumak
title: FaceXHuBERT: Text-less Speech-driven E(X)pressive 3D Facial Animation Synthesis Using Self-Supervised Speech Representation Learning
title_zh: FaceXHuBERT：使用自监督语音表示学习的无文本语音驱动的 E(X)pressive 3D 面部动画合成
abstract: This paper presents FaceXHuBERT, a text-less speech-driven 3D facial animation generation method that allows to capture personalized and subtle cues in speech (e.g. identity, emotion and hesitation). It is also very robust to background noise and can handle audio recorded in a variety of situations (e.g. multiple people speaking). Recent approaches employ end-to-end deep learning taking into account both audio and text as input to generate facial animation for the whole face. However, scarcity of publicly available expressive audio-3D facial animation datasets poses a major bottleneck. The resulting animations still have issues regarding accurate lip-synching, expressivity, person-specific information and generalizability. We effectively employ self-supervised pretrained HuBERT model in the training process that allows us to incorporate both lexical and non-lexical information in the audio without using a large lexicon. Additionally, guiding the training with a binary emotion condition and speaker identity distinguishes the tiniest subtle facial motion. We carried out extensive objective and subjective evaluation in comparison to ground-truth and state-of-the-art work. A perceptual user study demonstrates that our approach produces superior results with respect to the realism of the animation 78% of the time in comparison to the state-of-the-art. In addition, our method is 4 times faster eliminating the use of complex sequential models such as transformers. We strongly recommend watching the supplementary video before reading the paper. We also provide the implementation and evaluation codes with a GitHub repository link.
summary: This paper presents FaceXHuBERT, a text-less speech-driven 3D facial animation generation method that allows to capture personalized and subtle cues in speech (e.g. identity, emotion and hesitation). It is also very robust to background noise and can handle audio recorded in a variety of situations (e.g. multiple people speaking). Recent approaches employ end-to-end deep learning taking into account both audio and text as input to generate facial animation for the whole face. However, scarcity of publicly available expressive audio-3D facial animation datasets poses a major bottleneck. The resulting animations still have issues regarding accurate lip-synching, expressivity, person-specific information and generalizability. We effectively employ self-supervised pretrained HuBERT model in the training process that allows us to incorporate both lexical and non-lexical information in the audio without using a large lexicon. Additionally, guiding the training with a binary emotion condition and speaker identity distinguishes the tiniest subtle facial motion. We carried out extensive objective and subjective evaluation in comparison to ground-truth and state-of-the-art work. A perceptual user study demonstrates that our approach produces superior results with respect to the realism of the animation 78% of the time in comparison to the state-of-the-art. In addition, our method is 4 times faster eliminating the use of complex sequential models such as transformers. We strongly recommend watching the supplementary video before reading the paper. We also provide the implementation and evaluation codes with a GitHub repository link.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 FaceXHuBERT，这是一种无文本语音驱动的 3D 面部动画生成方法，可以捕获语音中的个性化和微妙线索（例如身份、情绪和犹豫）。它对背景噪音也非常鲁棒，可以处理在各种情况下录制的音频（例如多人讲话）。最近的方法采用端到端深度学习，考虑音频和文本作为输入来生成整个面部的面部动画。然而，公开可用的富有表现力的音频 3D 面部动画数据集的稀缺构成了一个主要瓶颈。由此产生的动画在准确的口型同步、表现力、特定于人的信息和普遍性方面仍然存在问题。我们在训练过程中有效地采用了自我监督的预训练 HuBERT 模型，使我们能够在不使用大型词典的情况下将词汇和非词汇信息合并到音频中。此外，用二元情感条件和说话者身份指导训练可以区分最细微的面部动作。与真实情况和最先进的工作进行比较，我们进行了广泛的客观和主观评估。一项感知用户研究表明，与最先进的技术相比，我们的方法在 78% 的时间里在动画的真实感方面产生了优异的结果。此外，我们的方法速度提高了 4 倍，无需使用复杂的序列模型（例如 Transformer）。我们强烈建议您在阅读本文之前观看补充视频。我们还提供带有 GitHub 存储库链接的实施和评估代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FaceXHuBERT，一种无需文本的语音驱动3D面部动画生成方法，通过自监督语音表征学习实现个性化和细微表情捕捉。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖音频与文本输入生成面部动画，但面临数据集稀缺、唇形同步不准确、表情表现力不足及泛化能力差等问题，且需复杂模型导致效率低下。
AI.method: 采用自监督预训练HuBERT模型提取语音中词汇与非词汇信息，结合二元情绪条件和说话人身份引导训练，避免使用Transformer等复杂序列模型以提升速度。
AI.result: 用户研究显示其动画真实感优于现有方法78%，生成速度提升4倍，且在多说话人和背景噪声场景下表现鲁棒，提供开源代码与评估工具。
AI.conclusion: FaceXHuBERT通过自监督学习有效解决数据与效率瓶颈，在表情细腻度与计算效率上取得显著进展，为多场景语音驱动动画提供实用方案。

motivation: 现有方法依赖音频与文本输入生成面部动画，但面临数据集稀缺、唇形同步不准确、表情表现力不足及泛化能力差等问题，且需复杂模型导致效率低下。
method: 采用自监督预训练HuBERT模型提取语音中词汇与非词汇信息，结合二元情绪条件和说话人身份引导训练，避免使用Transformer等复杂序列模型以提升速度。
result: 用户研究显示其动画真实感优于现有方法78%，生成速度提升4倍，且在多说话人和背景噪声场景下表现鲁棒，提供开源代码与评估工具。
conclusion: FaceXHuBERT通过自监督学习有效解决数据与效率瓶颈，在表情细腻度与计算效率上取得显著进展，为多场景语音驱动动画提供实用方案。
search_text: FaceXHuBERT: Text-less Speech-driven E(X)pressive 3D Facial Animation Synthesis Using Self-Supervised Speech Representation Learning FaceXHuBERT：使用自监督语音表示学习的无文本语音驱动的 E(X)pressive 3D 面部动画合成 This paper presents FaceXHuBERT, a text-less speech-driven 3D facial animation generation method that allows to capture personalized and subtle cues in speech (e.g. identity, emotion and hesitation). It is also very robust to background noise and can handle audio recorded in a variety of situations (e.g. multiple people speaking). Recent approaches employ end-to-end deep learning taking into account both audio and text as input to generate facial animation for the whole face. However, scarcity of publicly available expressive audio-3D facial animation datasets poses a major bottleneck. The resulting animations still have issues regarding accurate lip-synching, expressivity, person-specific information and generalizability. We effectively employ self-supervised pretrained HuBERT model in the training process that allows us to incorporate both lexical and non-lexical information in the audio without using a large lexicon. Additionally, guiding the training with a binary emotion condition and speaker identity distinguishes the tiniest subtle facial motion. We carried out extensive objective and subjective evaluation in comparison to ground-truth and state-of-the-art work. A perceptual user study demonstrates that our approach produces superior results with respect to the realism of the animation 78% of the time in comparison to the state-of-the-art. In addition, our method is 4 times faster eliminating the use of complex sequential models such as transformers. We strongly recommend watching the supplementary video before reading the paper. We also provide the implementation and evaluation codes with a GitHub repository link. 本文介绍了 FaceXHuBERT，这是一种无文本语音驱动的 3D 面部动画生成方法，可以捕获语音中的个性化和微妙线索（例如身份、情绪和犹豫）。它对背景噪音也非常鲁棒，可以处理在各种情况下录制的音频（例如多人讲话）。最近的方法采用端到端深度学习，考虑音频和文本作为输入来生成整个面部的面部动画。然而，公开可用的富有表现力的音频 3D 面部动画数据集的稀缺构成了一个主要瓶颈。由此产生的动画在准确的口型同步、表现力、特定于人的信息和普遍性方面仍然存在问题。我们在训练过程中有效地采用了自我监督的预训练 HuBERT 模型，使我们能够在不使用大型词典的情况下将词汇和非词汇信息合并到音频中。此外，用二元情感条件和说话者身份指导训练可以区分最细微的面部动作。与真实情况和最先进的工作进行比较，我们进行了广泛的客观和主观评估。一项感知用户研究表明，与最先进的技术相比，我们的方法在 78% 的时间里在动画的真实感方面产生了优异的结果。此外，我们的方法速度提高了 4 倍，无需使用复杂的序列模型（例如 Transformer）。我们强烈建议您在阅读本文之前观看补充视频。我们还提供带有 GitHub 存储库链接的实施和评估代码。 本文提出FaceXHuBERT，一种无需文本的语音驱动3D面部动画生成方法，通过自监督语音表征学习实现个性化和细微表情捕捉。 Kazi Injamamul Haque,Zerrin Yumak cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Anton Bernshteyn,Abhishek Dhawan
title: Fast algorithms for Vizing's theorem on bounded degree graphs
title_zh: 有界度图上维辛定理的快速算法
abstract: Vizing's theorem states that every graph $G$ of maximum degree $Δ$ can be properly edge-colored using $Δ+ 1$ colors. The fastest currently known $(Δ+1)$-edge-coloring algorithm for general graphs is due to Sinnamon and runs in time $O(m\sqrt{n})$, where $n :=|V(G)|$ and $m :=|E(G)|$. We investigate the case when $Δ$ is constant, i.e., $Δ= O(1)$. In this regime, the runtime of Sinnamon's algorithm is $O(n^{3/2})$, which can be improved to $O(n \log n)$, as shown by Gabow, Nishizeki, Kariv, Leven, and Terada. Here we give an algorithm whose running time is only $O(n)$, which is obviously best possible. Prior to this work, no linear-time $(Δ+1)$-edge-coloring algorithm was known for any $Δ\geq 4$. Using some of the same ideas, we also develop new algorithms for $(Δ+1)$-edge-coloring in the $\mathsf{LOCAL}$ model of distributed computation. Namely, when $Δ$ is constant, we design a deterministic $\mathsf{LOCAL}$ algorithm with running time $\tilde{O}(\log^5 n)$ and a randomized $\mathsf{LOCAL}$ algorithm with running time $O(\log ^2 n)$. Although our focus is on the constant $Δ$ regime, our results remain interesting for $Δ$ up to $\log^{o(1)} n$, since the dependence of their running time on $Δ$ is polynomial. The key new ingredient in our algorithms is a novel application of the entropy compression method.
summary: Vizing's theorem states that every graph $G$ of maximum degree $Δ$ can be properly edge-colored using $Δ+ 1$ colors. The fastest currently known $(Δ+1)$-edge-coloring algorithm for general graphs is due to Sinnamon and runs in time $O(m\sqrt{n})$, where $n :=|V(G)|$ and $m :=|E(G)|$. We investigate the case when $Δ$ is constant, i.e., $Δ= O(1)$. In this regime, the runtime of Sinnamon's algorithm is $O(n^{3/2})$, which can be improved to $O(n \log n)$, as shown by Gabow, Nishizeki, Kariv, Leven, and Terada. Here we give an algorithm whose running time is only $O(n)$, which is obviously best possible. Prior to this work, no linear-time $(Δ+1)$-edge-coloring algorithm was known for any $Δ\geq 4$. Using some of the same ideas, we also develop new algorithms for $(Δ+1)$-edge-coloring in the $\mathsf{LOCAL}$ model of distributed computation. Namely, when $Δ$ is constant, we design a deterministic $\mathsf{LOCAL}$ algorithm with running time $\tilde{O}(\log^5 n)$ and a randomized $\mathsf{LOCAL}$ algorithm with running time $O(\log ^2 n)$. Although our focus is on the constant $Δ$ regime, our results remain interesting for $Δ$ up to $\log^{o(1)} n$, since the dependence of their running time on $Δ$ is polynomial. The key new ingredient in our algorithms is a novel application of the entropy compression method.
abstract_zh: 维辛定理指出，最大度为 $Δ$ 的每个图 $G$ 都可以使用 $Δ+ 1$ 颜色进行正确的边缘着色。目前已知最快的通用图 $(Δ+1)$ 边缘着色算法由 Sinnamon 开发，运行时间为 $O(m\sqrt{n})$，其中 $n :=|V(G)|$ 和 $m :=|E(G)|$。我们研究 $Δ$ 恒定的情况，即 $Δ= O(1)$。在这种情况下，Sinnamon 算法的运行时间为 $O(n^{3/2})$，可以改进为 $O(n \log n)$，如 Gabow、Nishizeki、Kariv、Leven 和 Terada 所示。这里我们给出一个运行时间仅为$O(n)$的算法，这显然是最好的。在这项工作之前，对于任何 $Δ\geq 4$ 都没有已知的线性时间 $(Δ+1)$ 边缘着色算法。使用一些相同的想法，我们还在分布式计算的 $\mathsf{LOCAL}$ 模型中开发了 $(Δ+1)$-边缘着色的新算法。也就是说，当 $Δ$ 恒定时，我们设计运行时间为 $\tilde{O}(\log^5 n)$ 的确定性 $\mathsf{LOCAL}$ 算法和运行时间为 $O(\log ^2 n)$ 的随机 $\mathsf{LOCAL}$ 算法。尽管我们的重点是恒定的 $Δ$ 状态，但对于 $Δ$ 直至 $\log^{o(1)} n$，我们的结果仍然很有趣，因为它们的运行时间对 $Δ$ 的依赖性是多项式的。我们算法中的关键新成分是熵压缩方法的新颖应用。

AI.tldr: 针对有界度图，提出Vizing定理中(Δ+1)边染色的线性时间算法。
AI.motivation: 现有最快算法在常数Δ下运行时间为O(n^{3/2})或O(n log n)，尚未存在线性时间算法，且Δ≥4时无线性时间方案。
AI.method: 基于熵压缩方法的新应用，设计了线性时间的(Δ+1)边染色算法，并扩展到LOCAL模型中的分布式算法。
AI.result: 当Δ为常数时，给出O(n)时间的集中式算法；在LOCAL模型中给出确定性Õ(log⁵ n)和随机化O(log² n)的分布式算法。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现了常数Δ下的线性时间(Δ+1)边染色算法，达到最优时间复杂度，分布式算法也显著优于先前结果。

authors_text: Matouš Vrba,Viktor Walter,Václav Pritzl,Michal Pliska,Tomáš Báča,Vojtěch Spurný,Daniel Heřt,Martin Saska
title: On Onboard LiDAR-based Flying Object Detection
title_zh: 基于机载激光雷达的飞行物体检测
abstract: A new robust and accurate approach for the detection and localization of flying objects with the purpose of highly dynamic aerial interception and agile multi-robot interaction is presented in this paper. The approach is proposed for use on board of autonomous aerial vehicles equipped with a 3D LiDAR sensor. It relies on a novel 3D occupancy voxel mapping method for the target detection that provides high localization accuracy and robustness with respect to varying environments and appearance changes of the target. In combination with a proposed cluster-based multi-target tracker, sporadic false positives are suppressed, state estimation of the target is provided, and the detection latency is negligible. This makes the system suitable for tasks of agile multi-robot interaction, such as autonomous aerial interception or formation control where fast, precise, and robust relative localization of other robots is crucial. We evaluate the viability and performance of the system in simulated and real-world experiments which demonstrate that at a range of 20m, our system is capable of reliably detecting a micro-scale UAV with an almost 100% recall, 0.2m accuracy, and 20ms delay.
summary: A new robust and accurate approach for the detection and localization of flying objects with the purpose of highly dynamic aerial interception and agile multi-robot interaction is presented in this paper. The approach is proposed for use on board of autonomous aerial vehicles equipped with a 3D LiDAR sensor. It relies on a novel 3D occupancy voxel mapping method for the target detection that provides high localization accuracy and robustness with respect to varying environments and appearance changes of the target. In combination with a proposed cluster-based multi-target tracker, sporadic false positives are suppressed, state estimation of the target is provided, and the detection latency is negligible. This makes the system suitable for tasks of agile multi-robot interaction, such as autonomous aerial interception or formation control where fast, precise, and robust relative localization of other robots is crucial. We evaluate the viability and performance of the system in simulated and real-world experiments which demonstrate that at a range of 20m, our system is capable of reliably detecting a micro-scale UAV with an almost 100% recall, 0.2m accuracy, and 20ms delay.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的稳健且准确的飞行物体检测和定位方法，旨在实现高动态空中拦截和敏捷的多机器人交互。该方法建议用于配备 3D LiDAR 传感器的自动飞行器。它依靠一种新颖的 3D 占用体素映射方法进行目标检测，该方法针对不同的环境和目标的外观变化提供了高定位精度和鲁棒性。与所提出的基于集群的多目标跟踪器相结合，偶发的误报被抑制，提供了目标的状态估计，并且检测延迟可以忽略不计。这使得该系统适用于敏捷多机器人交互的任务，例如自主空中拦截或编队控制，其中其他机器人的快速、精确和稳健的相对定位至关重要。我们在模拟和现实实验中评估了系统的可行性和性能，结果表明，在 20m 范围内，我们的系统能够可靠地检测微型无人机，召回率几乎为 100%，准确度为 0.2m，延迟为 20ms。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机载LiDAR的飞行物体检测方法，用于实现高动态空中拦截和敏捷多机器人交互。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动态环境和目标外观变化下存在检测鲁棒性不足的问题，需开发高精度、低延迟的飞行物体定位系统以支持多机器人协同任务。
AI.method: 采用新型3D占用体素映射方法进行目标检测，结合基于聚类的多目标跟踪器，实现虚假警报抑制和实时状态估计。
AI.result: 在20米距离下可可靠检测微型无人机，召回率接近100%，定位精度0.2米，延迟仅20毫秒。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过高鲁棒性检测和低延迟特性，有效满足敏捷多机器人交互任务中对快速精准相对定位的需求。

In combination with a proposed cluster-based multi-target tracker, sporadic false positives are suppressed, state estimation of the target is provided, and the detection latency is negligible. This makes the system suitable for tasks of agile multi-robot interaction, such as autonomous aerial interception or formation control where fast, precise, and robust relative localization of other robots is crucial. We evaluate the viability and performance of the system in simulated and real-world experiments which demonstrate that at a range of 20m, our system is capable of reliably detecting a micro-scale UAV with an almost 100% recall, 0.2m accuracy, and 20ms delay. 本文提出了一种新的稳健且准确的飞行物体检测和定位方法，旨在实现高动态空中拦截和敏捷的多机器人交互。该方法建议用于配备 3D LiDAR 传感器的自动飞行器。它依靠一种新颖的 3D 占用体素映射方法进行目标检测，该方法针对不同的环境和目标的外观变化提供了高定位精度和鲁棒性。与所提出的基于集群的多目标跟踪器相结合，偶发的误报被抑制，提供了目标的状态估计，并且检测延迟可以忽略不计。这使得该系统适用于敏捷多机器人交互的任务，例如自主空中拦截或编队控制，其中其他机器人的快速、精确和稳健的相对定位至关重要。我们在模拟和现实实验中评估了系统的可行性和性能，结果表明，在 20m 范围内，我们的系统能够可靠地检测微型无人机，召回率几乎为 100%，准确度为 0.2m，延迟为 20ms。 本文提出了一种基于机载LiDAR的飞行物体检测方法，用于实现高动态空中拦截和敏捷多机器人交互。 Matouš Vrba,Viktor Walter,Václav Pritzl,Michal Pliska,Tomáš Báča,Vojtěch Spurný,Daniel Heřt,Martin Saska cs.RO

authors_text: Kazuaki Kashihara,Kuntal Kumar Pal,Chitta Baral,Robert P Trevino
title: Prompt-Based Learning for Thread Structure Prediction in Cybersecurity Forums
title_zh: 网络安全论坛中基于提示的线程结构预测学习
abstract: With recent trends indicating cyber crimes increasing in both frequency and cost, it is imperative to develop new methods that leverage data-rich hacker forums to assist in combating ever evolving cyber threats. Defining interactions within these forums is critical as it facilitates identifying highly skilled users, which can improve prediction of novel threats and future cyber attacks. We propose a method called Next Paragraph Prediction with Instructional Prompting (NPP-IP) to predict thread structures while grounded on the context around posts. This is the first time to apply an instructional prompting approach to the cybersecurity domain. We evaluate our NPP-IP with the Reddit dataset and Hacker Forums dataset that has posts and thread structures of real hacker forums' threads, and compare our method's performance with existing methods. The experimental evaluation shows that our proposed method can predict the thread structure significantly better than existing methods allowing for better social network prediction based on forum interactions.
summary: With recent trends indicating cyber crimes increasing in both frequency and cost, it is imperative to develop new methods that leverage data-rich hacker forums to assist in combating ever evolving cyber threats. Defining interactions within these forums is critical as it facilitates identifying highly skilled users, which can improve prediction of novel threats and future cyber attacks. We propose a method called Next Paragraph Prediction with Instructional Prompting (NPP-IP) to predict thread structures while grounded on the context around posts. This is the first time to apply an instructional prompting approach to the cybersecurity domain. We evaluate our NPP-IP with the Reddit dataset and Hacker Forums dataset that has posts and thread structures of real hacker forums' threads, and compare our method's performance with existing methods. The experimental evaluation shows that our proposed method can predict the thread structure significantly better than existing methods allowing for better social network prediction based on forum interactions.
abstract_zh: 最近的趋势表明网络犯罪的频率和成本都在增加，因此必须开发利用数据丰富的黑客论坛的新方法来协助应对不断变化的网络威胁。定义这些论坛内的交互至关重要，因为它有助于识别高技能用户，从而提高对新威胁和未来网络攻击的预测。我们提出了一种称为带有指令提示的下一段预测（NPP-IP）的方法来预测线程结构，同时基于帖子周围的上下文。这是首次将教学提示方法应用于网络安全领域。我们使用 Reddit 数据集和黑客论坛数据集评估我们的 NPP-IP，其中包含真实黑客论坛线程的帖子和线程结构，并将我们的方法的性能与现有方法进行比较。实验评估表明，我们提出的方法可以比现有方法更好地预测线程结构，从而可以更好地基于论坛交互进行社交网络预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于提示的学习方法预测网络安全论坛中的线程结构。
AI.motivation: 网络犯罪日益严重，需通过分析黑客论坛互动识别高技能用户以预测新型威胁。
AI.method: 提出Next Paragraph Prediction with Instructional Prompting (NPP-IP)方法，结合指令提示与上下文预测线程结构。
AI.result: 在Reddit和Hacker Forums数据集上显著优于现有方法，提升社会网络预测效果。
AI.conclusion: 首次将指令提示应用于网络安全领域，有效预测论坛线程结构有助于增强网络威胁预警能力。

authors_text: Feiming Chen,Hong Laura Lu,Arianna Simonetti
title: Practical Statistical Considerations for the Clinical Validation of AI/ML-enabled Medical Diagnostic Devices
title_zh: 支持 AI/ML 的医疗诊断设备临床验证的实际统计注意事项
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine-Learning (ML) models have been increasingly used in medical products, such as medical device software. General considerations on the statistical aspects for the evaluation of AI/ML-enabled medical diagnostic devices are discussed in this paper. We also provide relevant academic references and note good practices in addressing various statistical challenges in the clinical validation of AI/ML-enabled medical devices in the context of their intended use.
summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine-Learning (ML) models have been increasingly used in medical products, such as medical device software. General considerations on the statistical aspects for the evaluation of AI/ML-enabled medical diagnostic devices are discussed in this paper. We also provide relevant academic references and note good practices in addressing various statistical challenges in the clinical validation of AI/ML-enabled medical devices in the context of their intended use.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 和机器学习 (ML) 模型越来越多地应用于医疗设备软件等医疗产品中。本文讨论了评估支持人工智能/机器学习的医疗诊断设备的统计方面的一般考虑因素。我们还提供相关的学术参考资料，并指出在支持 AI/ML 的医疗设备在其预期用途的临床验证中解决各种统计挑战的良好实践。

AI.tldr: 本文讨论AI/ML医疗诊断设备临床验证中的统计考量，提供学术参考和实践建议。
AI.motivation: AI/ML在医疗设备中的应用增加，但缺乏针对其临床验证的统计方法指导，需解决验证过程中的挑战。
AI.method: 通过文献综述和案例分析，结合实际应用场景探讨统计方法，并总结最佳实践。
AI.result: 明确了临床验证中的统计挑战，提出了数据多样性、模型稳定性等关键考量因素及应对策略。
AI.conclusion: 统计方法对确保AI/ML医疗设备有效性至关重要，未来需进一步研究动态验证和监管框架。

authors_text: Shima Imani,Liang Du,Harsh Shrivastava
title: MathPrompter: Mathematical Reasoning using Large Language Models
title_zh: MathPrompter：使用大型语言模型进行数学推理
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have limited performance when solving arithmetic reasoning tasks and often provide incorrect answers. Unlike natural language understanding, math problems typically have a single correct answer, making the task of generating accurate solutions more challenging for LLMs. To the best of our knowledge, we are not aware of any LLMs that indicate their level of confidence in their responses which fuels a trust deficit in these models impeding their adoption. To address this deficiency, we propose `MathPrompter', a technique that improves performance of LLMs on arithmetic problems along with increased reliance in the predictions. MathPrompter uses the Zero-shot chain-of-thought prompting technique to generate multiple Algebraic expressions or Python functions to solve the same math problem in different ways and thereby raise the confidence level in the output results. This is in contrast to other prompt based CoT methods, where there is no check on the validity of the intermediate steps followed. Our technique improves over state-of-the-art on the MultiArith dataset ($78.7\%\rightarrow92.5\%$) evaluated using 175B parameter GPT-based LLM.
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have limited performance when solving arithmetic reasoning tasks and often provide incorrect answers. Unlike natural language understanding, math problems typically have a single correct answer, making the task of generating accurate solutions more challenging for LLMs. To the best of our knowledge, we are not aware of any LLMs that indicate their level of confidence in their responses which fuels a trust deficit in these models impeding their adoption. To address this deficiency, we propose `MathPrompter', a technique that improves performance of LLMs on arithmetic problems along with increased reliance in the predictions. MathPrompter uses the Zero-shot chain-of-thought prompting technique to generate multiple Algebraic expressions or Python functions to solve the same math problem in different ways and thereby raise the confidence level in the output results. This is in contrast to other prompt based CoT methods, where there is no check on the validity of the intermediate steps followed. Our technique improves over state-of-the-art on the MultiArith dataset ($78.7\%\rightarrow92.5\%$) evaluated using 175B parameter GPT-based LLM.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 在解决算术推理任务时性能有限，并且经常提供错误的答案。与自然语言理解不同，数学问题通常只有一个正确答案，这使得生成准确解决方案的任务对于法学硕士来说更具挑战性。据我们所知，我们不知道有任何法学硕士表明他们对自己的回答有信心，这加剧了这些模型的信任赤字，阻碍了它们的采用。为了解决这一缺陷，我们提出了“MathPrompter”，这是一种可以提高法学硕士在算术问题上的表现并增加对预测的依赖的技术。 MathPrompter 使用零样本思维链提示技术生成多个代数表达式或 Python 函数，以不同的方式解决同一数学问题，从而提高输出结果的置信度。这与其他基于提示的 CoT 方法形成对比，在其他方法中，不检查后续中间步骤的有效性。我们的技术比使用 175B 参数基于 GPT 的 LLM 评估的 MultiArith 数据集 ($78.7\%\rightarrow92.5\%$) 的最新技术有所改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MathPrompter方法，通过生成多种解题方式提升大语言模型在数学推理任务中的准确性和可信度。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在数学问题上常给出错误答案且缺乏置信度指标，导致信任度不足，亟需改进。
AI.method: 采用零样本链式思维提示技术，生成多个代数表达式或Python函数解决同一问题，验证中间步骤有效性。
AI.result: 在MultiArith数据集上，使用175B参数GPT模型将准确率从78.7%提升至92.5%。
AI.conclusion: MathPrompter通过多角度验证显著提升了模型数学推理能力，为实际应用提供了更可靠的解决方案。

MathPrompter uses the Zero-shot chain-of-thought prompting technique to generate multiple Algebraic expressions or Python functions to solve the same math problem in different ways and thereby raise the confidence level in the output results. This is in contrast to other prompt based CoT methods, where there is no check on the validity of the intermediate steps followed. Our technique improves over state-of-the-art on the MultiArith dataset ($78.7\%\rightarrow92.5\%$) evaluated using 175B parameter GPT-based LLM. 大型语言模型 (LLM) 在解决算术推理任务时性能有限，并且经常提供错误的答案。与自然语言理解不同，数学问题通常只有一个正确答案，这使得生成准确解决方案的任务对于法学硕士来说更具挑战性。据我们所知，我们不知道有任何法学硕士表明他们对自己的回答有信心，这加剧了这些模型的信任赤字，阻碍了它们的采用。为了解决这一缺陷，我们提出了“MathPrompter”，这是一种可以提高法学硕士在算术问题上的表现并增加对预测的依赖的技术。 MathPrompter 使用零样本思维链提示技术生成多个代数表达式或 Python 函数，以不同的方式解决同一数学问题，从而提高输出结果的置信度。这与其他基于提示的 CoT 方法形成对比，在其他方法中，不检查后续中间步骤的有效性。我们的技术比使用 175B 参数基于 GPT 的 LLM 评估的 MultiArith 数据集 ($78.7\%\rightarrow92.5\%$) 的最新技术有所改进。 本文提出MathPrompter方法，通过生成多种解题方式提升大语言模型在数学推理任务中的准确性和可信度。 Shima Imani,Liang Du,Harsh Shrivastava cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Jiaming Wang,Zhihao Du,Shiliang Zhang
title: TOLD: A Novel Two-Stage Overlap-Aware Framework for Speaker Diarization
title_zh: TOLD：一种新颖的两阶段重叠感知框架，用于说话人分类
abstract: Recently, end-to-end neural diarization (EEND) is introduced and achieves promising results in speaker-overlapped scenarios. In EEND, speaker diarization is formulated as a multi-label prediction problem, where speaker activities are estimated independently and their dependency are not well considered. To overcome these disadvantages, we employ the power set encoding to reformulate speaker diarization as a single-label classification problem and propose the overlap-aware EEND (EEND-OLA) model, in which speaker overlaps and dependency can be modeled explicitly. Inspired by the success of two-stage hybrid systems, we further propose a novel Two-stage OverLap-aware Diarization framework (TOLD) by involving a speaker overlap-aware post-processing (SOAP) model to iteratively refine the diarization results of EEND-OLA. Experimental results show that, compared with the original EEND, the proposed EEND-OLA achieves a 14.39% relative improvement in terms of diarization error rates (DER), and utilizing SOAP provides another 19.33% relative improvement. As a result, our method TOLD achieves a DER of 10.14% on the CALLHOME dataset, which is a new state-of-the-art result on this benchmark to the best of our knowledge.
summary: Recently, end-to-end neural diarization (EEND) is introduced and achieves promising results in speaker-overlapped scenarios. In EEND, speaker diarization is formulated as a multi-label prediction problem, where speaker activities are estimated independently and their dependency are not well considered. To overcome these disadvantages, we employ the power set encoding to reformulate speaker diarization as a single-label classification problem and propose the overlap-aware EEND (EEND-OLA) model, in which speaker overlaps and dependency can be modeled explicitly. Inspired by the success of two-stage hybrid systems, we further propose a novel Two-stage OverLap-aware Diarization framework (TOLD) by involving a speaker overlap-aware post-processing (SOAP) model to iteratively refine the diarization results of EEND-OLA. Experimental results show that, compared with the original EEND, the proposed EEND-OLA achieves a 14.39% relative improvement in terms of diarization error rates (DER), and utilizing SOAP provides another 19.33% relative improvement. As a result, our method TOLD achieves a DER of 10.14% on the CALLHOME dataset, which is a new state-of-the-art result on this benchmark to the best of our knowledge.
abstract_zh: 最近，端到端神经二值化（EEND）被引入，并在说话者重叠的场景中取得了可喜的结果。在 EEND 中，说话人二值化被表述为多标签预测问题，其中说话人活动是独立估计的，并且没有很好地考虑它们的依赖性。为了克服这些缺点，我们采用幂集编码将说话人二值化重新表述为单标签分类问题，并提出重叠感知 EEND (EEND-OLA) 模型，其中可以明确地对说话人重叠和依赖关系进行建模。受到两阶段混合系统成功的启发，我们进一步提出了一种新颖的两阶段 OverLap 感知二值化框架（TOLD），通过涉及说话者重叠感知后处理（SOAP）模型来迭代地细化 EEND-OLA 的二值化结果。实验结果表明，与原始EEND相比，所提出的EEND-OLA在分类错误率（DER）方面实现了14.39％的相对改进，并且利用SOAP又提供了19.33％的相对改进。结果，我们的方法 TOLD 在 CALLHOME 数据集上实现了 10.14% 的 DER，据我们所知，这是该基准测试的最新结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TOLD的两阶段重叠感知框架，用于改进说话人分割任务，通过显式建模说话人重叠和依赖关系以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端神经网络说话人分割方法（EEND）在处理重叠语音时未充分考虑说话人活动间的依赖关系，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 采用幂集编码将分割问题转化为单标签分类，提出重叠感知的EEND-OLA模型，并引入两阶段混合系统TOLD，结合重叠感知后处理模型SOAP迭代优化结果。
AI.result: 在CALLHOME数据集上，TOLD方法达到10.14%的分割错误率（DER），较原始EEND提升33.72%（14.39%+19.33%），刷新该基准数据集的最优结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模重叠关系和两阶段优化，TOLD框架有效解决了说话人分割中的重叠依赖问题，实现了当前最先进的分割性能。

search_text: TOLD: A Novel Two-Stage Overlap-Aware Framework for Speaker Diarization TOLD：一种新颖的两阶段重叠感知框架，用于说话人分类 Recently, end-to-end neural diarization (EEND) is introduced and achieves promising results in speaker-overlapped scenarios. To overcome these disadvantages, we employ the power set encoding to reformulate speaker diarization as a single-label classification problem and propose the overlap-aware EEND (EEND-OLA) model, in which speaker overlaps and dependency can be modeled explicitly. Experimental results show that, compared with the original EEND, the proposed EEND-OLA achieves a 14.39% relative improvement in terms of diarization error rates (DER), and utilizing SOAP provides another 19.33% relative improvement. authors_text: Navid Hashemi,Bardh Hoxha,Tomoya Yamaguchi,Danil Prokhorov,Geogios Fainekos,Jyotirmoy Deshmukh
title: A Neurosymbolic Approach to the Verification of Temporal Logic Properties of Learning enabled Control Systems
title_zh: 验证学习控制系统的时间逻辑特性的神经符号方法
abstract: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) has become a popular tool for expressing formal requirements of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS). The problem of verifying STL properties of neural network-controlled CPS remains a largely unexplored problem. In this paper, we present a model for the verification of Neural Network (NN) controllers for general STL specifications using a custom neural architecture where we map an STL formula into a feed-forward neural network with ReLU activation. In the case where both our plant model and the controller are ReLU-activated neural networks, we reduce the STL verification problem to reachability in ReLU neural networks. We also propose a new approach for neural network controllers with general activation functions; this approach is a sound and complete verification approach based on computing the Lipschitz constant of the closed-loop control system. We demonstrate the practical efficacy of our techniques on a number of examples of learning-enabled control systems.
summary: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) has become a popular tool for expressing formal requirements of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS). The problem of verifying STL properties of neural network-controlled CPS remains a largely unexplored problem. In this paper, we present a model for the verification of Neural Network (NN) controllers for general STL specifications using a custom neural architecture where we map an STL formula into a feed-forward neural network with ReLU activation. In the case where both our plant model and the controller are ReLU-activated neural networks, we reduce the STL verification problem to reachability in ReLU neural networks. We also propose a new approach for neural network controllers with general activation functions; this approach is a sound and complete verification approach based on computing the Lipschitz constant of the closed-loop control system. We demonstrate the practical efficacy of our techniques on a number of examples of learning-enabled control systems.
abstract_zh: 信号时态逻辑（STL）已成为表达网络物理系统（CPS）形式要求的流行工具。验证神经网络控制的 CPS 的 STL 属性的问题仍然是一个很大程度上未被探索的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一个使用自定义神经架构验证通用 STL 规范的神经网络 (NN) 控制器的模型，其中我们将 STL 公式映射到具有 ReLU 激活的前馈神经网络。在我们的对象模型和控制器都是 ReLU 激活的神经网络的情况下，我们将 STL 验证问题简化为 ReLU 神经网络中的可达性。我们还提出了一种具有通用激活函数的神经网络控制器的新方法；该方法是一种基于计算闭环控制系统Lipschitz常数的完善且完整的验证方法。我们在许多支持学习的控制系统示例中展示了我们的技术的实际功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经符号方法，用于验证学习驱动控制系统的信号时序逻辑（STL）属性。
AI.motivation: 神经网络控制的网络物理系统（CPS）的STL属性验证尚未被充分研究，现有方法难以处理复杂控制逻辑与神经网络的结合。
AI.method: 将STL公式映射为ReLU激活的前馈神经网络，并通过可达性分析验证；对于通用激活函数，基于闭环系统的Lipschitz常数提出完整验证方法。
AI.result: 在多个学习驱动控制系统的案例中验证了方法的有效性，展示了其在处理复杂控制逻辑时的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为神经网络控制器的STL属性验证提供了有效框架，兼顾了符号逻辑与神经网络的特性。

authors_text: Kiyanoush Nazari,Gabriele Gandolfi,Zeynab Talebpour,Vishnu Rajendran,Paolo Rocco,Amir Ghalamzan E.
title: Deep Functional Predictive Control for Strawberry Cluster Manipulation using Tactile Prediction
title_zh: 使用触觉预测对草莓簇进行深度功能预测控制
abstract: This paper introduces a novel approach to address the problem of Physical Robot Interaction (PRI) during robot pushing tasks. The approach uses a data-driven forward model based on tactile predictions to inform the controller about potential future movements of the object being pushed, such as a strawberry stem, using a robot tactile finger. The model is integrated into a Deep Functional Predictive Control (d-FPC) system to control the displacement of the stem on the tactile finger during pushes. Pushing an object with a robot finger along a desired trajectory in 3D is a highly nonlinear and complex physical robot interaction, especially when the object is not stably grasped. The proposed approach controls the stem movements on the tactile finger in a prediction horizon. The effectiveness of the proposed FPC is demonstrated in a series of tests involving a real robot pushing a strawberry in a cluster. The results indicate that the d-FPC controller can successfully control PRI in robotic manipulation tasks beyond the handling of strawberries. The proposed approach offers a promising direction for addressing the challenging PRI problem in robotic manipulation tasks. Future work will explore the generalisation of the approach to other objects and tasks.
summary: This paper introduces a novel approach to address the problem of Physical Robot Interaction (PRI) during robot pushing tasks. The approach uses a data-driven forward model based on tactile predictions to inform the controller about potential future movements of the object being pushed, such as a strawberry stem, using a robot tactile finger. The model is integrated into a Deep Functional Predictive Control (d-FPC) system to control the displacement of the stem on the tactile finger during pushes. Pushing an object with a robot finger along a desired trajectory in 3D is a highly nonlinear and complex physical robot interaction, especially when the object is not stably grasped. The proposed approach controls the stem movements on the tactile finger in a prediction horizon. The effectiveness of the proposed FPC is demonstrated in a series of tests involving a real robot pushing a strawberry in a cluster. The results indicate that the d-FPC controller can successfully control PRI in robotic manipulation tasks beyond the handling of strawberries. The proposed approach offers a promising direction for addressing the challenging PRI problem in robotic manipulation tasks. Future work will explore the generalisation of the approach to other objects and tasks.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种解决机器人推动任务期间的物理机器人交互（PRI）问题的新方法。该方法使用基于触觉预测的数据驱动前向模型，通过机器人触觉手指向控制器通报被推动物体（例如草莓茎）的未来潜在运动。该模型集成到深度功能预测控制 (d-FPC) 系统中，以控制推动过程中触觉手指上的杆的位移。用机器人手指沿着 3D 中的所需轨迹推动物体是一种高度非线性且复杂的物理机器人交互，特别是当物体无法稳定抓取时。所提出的方法控制预测范围内触觉手指上的茎运动。所提出的 FPC 的有效性在一系列测试中得到了证明，这些测试涉及一个真实的机器人在集群中推动草莓。结果表明，d-FPC 控制器可以在处理草莓之外的机器人操作任务中成功控制 PRI。所提出的方法为解决机器人操作任务中具有挑战性的 PRI 问题提供了一个有前途的方向。未来的工作将探索该方法对其他对象和任务的泛化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于触觉预测的深度功能预测控制方法，用于解决机器人在草莓簇操作中的物理交互问题。
AI.motivation: 在机器人推动任务中，当物体未被稳定抓取时，物理机器人交互（PRI）具有高度非线性和复杂性，传统方法难以有效控制。
AI.method: 通过构建基于触觉预测的数据驱动前向模型，结合深度功能预测控制（d-FPC）系统，预测物体未来运动并实时调整控制器参数。
AI.result: 实验表明，d-FPC控制器能有效控制草莓茎在触觉指尖上的位移，且方法可推广至其他物体和任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解决机器人操作中的PRI问题提供了新方向，未来将探索其在更广泛场景中的应用。

search_text: Deep Functional Predictive Control for Strawberry Cluster Manipulation using Tactile Prediction 使用触觉预测对草莓簇进行深度功能预测控制 This paper introduces a novel approach to address the problem of Physical Robot Interaction (PRI) during robot pushing tasks. The approach uses a data-driven forward model based on tactile predictions to inform the controller about potential future movements of the object being pushed, such as a strawberry stem, using a robot tactile finger. The model is integrated into a Deep Functional Predictive Control (d-FPC) system to control the displacement of the stem on the tactile finger during pushes. Pushing an object with a robot finger along a desired trajectory in 3D is a highly nonlinear and complex physical robot interaction, especially when the object is not stably grasped. The proposed approach controls the stem movements on the tactile finger in a prediction horizon. The effectiveness of the proposed FPC is demonstrated in a series of tests involving a real robot pushing a strawberry in a cluster. The results indicate that the d-FPC controller can successfully control PRI in robotic manipulation tasks beyond the handling of strawberries. The proposed approach offers a promising direction for addressing the challenging PRI problem in robotic manipulation tasks. Future work will explore the generalisation of the approach to other objects and tasks. 本文介绍了一种解决机器人推动任务期间的物理机器人交互（PRI）问题的新方法。该方法使用基于触觉预测的数据驱动前向模型，通过机器人触觉手指向控制器通报被推动物体（例如草莓茎）的未来潜在运动。该模型集成到深度功能预测控制 (d-FPC) 系统中，以控制推动过程中触觉手指上的杆的位移。用机器人手指沿着 3D 中的所需轨迹推动物体是一种高度非线性且复杂的物理机器人交互，特别是当物体无法稳定抓取时。所提出的方法控制预测范围内触觉手指上的茎运动。所提出的 FPC 的有效性在一系列测试中得到了证明，这些测试涉及一个真实的机器人在集群中推动草莓。结果表明，d-FPC 控制器可以在处理草莓之外的机器人操作任务中成功控制 PRI。所提出的方法为解决机器人操作任务中具有挑战性的 PRI 问题提供了一个有前途的方向。未来的工作将探索该方法对其他对象和任务的泛化。 本文提出了一种基于触觉预测的深度功能预测控制方法，用于解决机器人在草莓簇操作中的物理交互问题。 Kiyanoush Nazari,Gabriele Gandolfi,Zeynab Talebpour,Vishnu Rajendran,Paolo Rocco,Amir Ghalamzan E. cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Alessandro Basile,Riccardo Crupi,Michele Grasso,Alessandro Mercanti,Daniele Regoli,Simone Scarsi,Shuyi Yang,Andrea Cosentini
title: Disambiguation of Company names via Deep Recurrent Networks
title_zh: 通过深度循环网络消除公司名称歧义
comment: submitted to Elsevier. 26 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables
comments: submitted to Elsevier. 26 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables
abstract: Name Entity Disambiguation is the Natural Language Processing task of identifying textual records corresponding to the same Named Entity, i.e. real-world entities represented as a list of attributes (names, places, organisations, etc.). In this work, we face the task of disambiguating companies on the basis of their written names. We propose a Siamese LSTM Network approach to extract -- via supervised learning -- an embedding of company name strings in a (relatively) low dimensional vector space and use this representation to identify pairs of company names that actually represent the same company (i.e. the same Entity). Given that the manual labelling of string pairs is a rather onerous task, we analyse how an Active Learning approach to prioritise the samples to be labelled leads to a more efficient overall learning pipeline. With empirical investigations, we show that our proposed Siamese Network outperforms several benchmark approaches based on standard string matching algorithms when enough labelled data are available. Moreover, we show that Active Learning prioritisation is indeed helpful when labelling resources are limited, and let the learning models reach the out-of-sample performance saturation with less labelled data with respect to standard (random) data labelling approaches.
summary: Name Entity Disambiguation is the Natural Language Processing task of identifying textual records corresponding to the same Named Entity, i.e. real-world entities represented as a list of attributes (names, places, organisations, etc.). In this work, we face the task of disambiguating companies on the basis of their written names. We propose a Siamese LSTM Network approach to extract -- via supervised learning -- an embedding of company name strings in a (relatively) low dimensional vector space and use this representation to identify pairs of company names that actually represent the same company (i.e. the same Entity). Given that the manual labelling of string pairs is a rather onerous task, we analyse how an Active Learning approach to prioritise the samples to be labelled leads to a more efficient overall learning pipeline. With empirical investigations, we show that our proposed Siamese Network outperforms several benchmark approaches based on standard string matching algorithms when enough labelled data are available. Moreover, we show that Active Learning prioritisation is indeed helpful when labelling resources are limited, and let the learning models reach the out-of-sample performance saturation with less labelled data with respect to standard (random) data labelling approaches.
abstract_zh: 名称实体消歧是识别与同一命名实体对应的文本记录的自然语言处理任务，即表示为属性列表（名称、地点、组织等）的现实世界实体。在这项工作中，我们面临着根据公司的书面名称消除歧义的任务。我们提出了一种连体 LSTM 网络方法，通过监督学习来提取公司名称字符串在（相对）低维向量空间中的嵌入，并使用这种表示来识别实际上代表同一公司（即同一实体）的公司名称对。鉴于字符串对的手动标记是一项相当繁重的任务，我们分析了主动学习方法如何对要标记的样本进行优先级排序，从而实现更高效的整体学习流程。通过实证研究，我们表明，当有足够的标记数据可用时，我们提出的暹罗网络优于基于标准字符串匹配算法的几种基准方法。此外，我们表明，当标记资源有限时，主动学习优先级确实很有帮助，并且相对于标准（随机）数据标记方法，可以让学习模型以更少的标记数据达到样本外性能饱和。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度循环网络的公司名称消歧方法，通过孪生LSTM网络学习公司名称的嵌入表示，并结合主动学习策略优化标注效率。
AI.motivation: 公司名称消歧需处理大量文本数据，手动标注成本高昂，需探索高效的学习方法与标注策略以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 采用孪生LSTM网络进行监督学习，生成公司名称的低维嵌入表示；结合主动学习策略筛选关键样本，优化标注流程。
AI.result: 在充足标注数据下，孪生网络优于传统字符串匹配方法；主动学习策略在标注资源有限时显著提升模型性能饱和效率。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法结合主动学习能有效解决公司名称消歧问题，尤其在标注数据受限场景下具有显著优势。

authors_text: Wenli Zhang,Jiaheng Xie,Zhu Zhang,Xiang Liu
title: Depression Detection Using Digital Traces on Social Media: A Knowledge-aware Deep Learning Approach
title_zh: 使用社交媒体上的数字痕迹检测抑郁症：一种知识感知的深度学习方法
comment: Presented at INFORMS 2022 Data Science Workshop
comments: Presented at INFORMS 2022 Data Science Workshop
abstract: Depression is a common disease worldwide. It is difficult to diagnose and continues to be underdiagnosed. Because depressed patients constantly share their symptoms, major life events, and treatments on social media, researchers are turning to user-generated digital traces on social media for depression detection. Such methods have distinct advantages in combating depression because they can facilitate innovative approaches to fight depression and alleviate its social and economic burden. However, most existing studies lack effective means to incorporate established medical domain knowledge in depression detection or suffer from feature extraction difficulties that impede greater performance. Following the design science research paradigm, we propose a Deep Knowledge-aware Depression Detection (DKDD) framework to accurately detect social media users at risk of depression and explain the critical factors that contribute to such detection. Extensive empirical studies with real-world data demonstrate that, by incorporating domain knowledge, our method outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods. Our work has significant implications for IS research in knowledge-aware machine learning, digital traces utilization, and NLP research in IS. Practically, by providing early detection and explaining the critical factors, DKDD can supplement clinical depression screening and enable large-scale evaluations of a population's mental health status.
summary: Depression is a common disease worldwide. It is difficult to diagnose and continues to be underdiagnosed. Because depressed patients constantly share their symptoms, major life events, and treatments on social media, researchers are turning to user-generated digital traces on social media for depression detection. Such methods have distinct advantages in combating depression because they can facilitate innovative approaches to fight depression and alleviate its social and economic burden. However, most existing studies lack effective means to incorporate established medical domain knowledge in depression detection or suffer from feature extraction difficulties that impede greater performance. Following the design science research paradigm, we propose a Deep Knowledge-aware Depression Detection (DKDD) framework to accurately detect social media users at risk of depression and explain the critical factors that contribute to such detection. Extensive empirical studies with real-world data demonstrate that, by incorporating domain knowledge, our method outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods. Our work has significant implications for IS research in knowledge-aware machine learning, digital traces utilization, and NLP research in IS. Practically, by providing early detection and explaining the critical factors, DKDD can supplement clinical depression screening and enable large-scale evaluations of a population's mental health status.
abstract_zh: 抑郁症是世界范围内的一种常见疾病。该疾病很难诊断，而且诊断不足。由于抑郁症患者不断在社交媒体上分享他们的症状、重大生活事件和治疗方法，因此研究人员正在转向社交媒体上用户生成的数字痕迹来检测抑郁症。这些方法在对抗抑郁症方面具有明显的优势，因为它们可以促进对抗抑郁症的创新方法并减轻其社会和经济负担。然而，大多数现有研究缺乏有效的手段将现有的医学领域知识纳入抑郁症检测，或者存在特征提取困难，从而阻碍了更好的表现。遵循设计科学研究范式，我们提出了一种深度知识感知抑郁症检测（DKDD）框架，以准确检测有抑郁风险的社交媒体用户，并解释有助于这种检测的关键因素。对现实世界数据的广泛实证研究表明，通过结合领域知识，我们的方法优于现有的最先进方法。我们的工作对 IS 研究中的知识感知机器学习、数字痕迹利用和 NLP 研究具有重要意义。实际上，通过提供早期检测和解释关键因素，DKDD 可以补充临床抑郁症筛查，并能够对人群的心理健康状况进行大规模评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合医学领域知识的深度学习框架（DKDD），用于通过社交媒体上的数字痕迹检测抑郁症患者。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在抑郁症检测中缺乏有效整合医学领域知识，且特征提取困难，导致性能受限。社交媒体上的用户生成内容为抑郁症检测提供了新途径，但需解决知识融合与可解释性问题。
AI.method: 基于设计科学研究范式，构建Deep Knowledge-aware Depression Detection（DKDD）框架，通过整合医学领域知识（如症状、治疗术语）和社交媒体文本特征，提升检测准确性与可解释性。
AI.result: 实证研究表明，DKDD方法在真实数据集上优于现有最先进方法，有效识别高风险用户并解释关键影响因素。
AI.conclusion: DKDD框架为知识驱动的机器学习、数字痕迹分析及NLP研究提供了新方向，具有临床辅助筛查和大规模心理健康评估的实践价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合医学领域知识的深度学习框架（DKDD），用于通过社交媒体上的数字痕迹检测抑郁症患者。

search_text: Depression Detection Using Digital Traces on Social Media: A Knowledge-aware Deep Learning Approach 使用社交媒体上的数字痕迹检测抑郁症：一种知识感知的深度学习方法 Depression is a common disease worldwide. It is difficult to diagnose and continues to be underdiagnosed. Because depressed patients constantly share their symptoms, major life events, and treatments on social media, researchers are turning to user-generated digital traces on social media for depression detection. Such methods have distinct advantages in combating depression because they can facilitate innovative approaches to fight depression and alleviate its social and economic burden. However, most existing studies lack effective means to incorporate established medical domain knowledge in depression detection or suffer from feature extraction difficulties that impede greater performance. Following the design science research paradigm, we propose a Deep Knowledge-aware Depression Detection (DKDD) framework to accurately detect social media users at risk of depression and explain the critical factors that contribute to such detection. Extensive empirical studies with real-world data demonstrate that, by incorporating domain knowledge, our method outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods. Our work has significant implications for IS research in knowledge-aware machine learning, digital traces utilization, and NLP research in IS. Practically, by providing early detection and explaining the critical factors, DKDD can supplement clinical depression screening and enable large-scale evaluations of a population's mental health status. 抑郁症是世界范围内的一种常见疾病。该疾病很难诊断，而且诊断不足。由于抑郁症患者不断在社交媒体上分享他们的症状、重大生活事件和治疗方法，因此研究人员正在转向社交媒体上用户生成的数字痕迹来检测抑郁症。这些方法在对抗抑郁症方面具有明显的优势，因为它们可以促进对抗抑郁症的创新方法并减轻其社会和经济负担。然而，大多数现有研究缺乏有效的手段将现有的医学领域知识纳入抑郁症检测，或者存在特征提取困难，从而阻碍了更好的表现。遵循设计科学研究范式，我们提出了一种深度知识感知抑郁症检测（DKDD）框架，以准确检测有抑郁风险的社交媒体用户，并解释有助于这种检测的关键因素。对现实世界数据的广泛实证研究表明，通过结合领域知识，我们的方法优于现有的最先进方法。我们的工作对 IS 研究中的知识感知机器学习、数字痕迹利用和 NLP 研究具有重要意义。实际上，通过提供早期检测和解释关键因素，DKDD 可以补充临床抑郁症筛查，并能够对人群的心理健康状况进行大规模评估。 本文提出了一种结合医学领域知识的深度学习框架（DKDD），用于通过社交媒体上的数字痕迹检测抑郁症患者。 Wenli Zhang,Jiaheng Xie,Zhu Zhang,Xiang Liu cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.SI,stat.AP

authors_text: Ou Zheng,Mohamed Abdel-Aty,Dongdong Wang,Zijin Wang,Shengxuan Ding
title: ChatGPT is on the Horizon: Could a Large Language Model be Suitable for Intelligent Traffic Safety Research and Applications?
title_zh: ChatGPT即将到来：大型语言模型能否适合智能交通安全研究与应用？
comment: Submitted to Nature - Machine Intelligence (Revised and Extended)
comments: Submitted to Nature - Machine Intelligence (Revised and Extended)
abstract: ChatGPT embarks on a new era of artificial intelligence and will revolutionize the way we approach intelligent traffic safety systems. This paper begins with a brief introduction about the development of large language models (LLMs). Next, we exemplify using ChatGPT to address key traffic safety issues. Furthermore, we discuss the controversies surrounding LLMs, raise critical questions for their deployment, and provide our solutions. Moreover, we propose an idea of multi-modality representation learning for smarter traffic safety decision-making and open more questions for application improvement. We believe that LLM will both shape and potentially facilitate components of traffic safety research.
summary: ChatGPT embarks on a new era of artificial intelligence and will revolutionize the way we approach intelligent traffic safety systems. This paper begins with a brief introduction about the development of large language models (LLMs). Next, we exemplify using ChatGPT to address key traffic safety issues. Furthermore, we discuss the controversies surrounding LLMs, raise critical questions for their deployment, and provide our solutions. Moreover, we propose an idea of multi-modality representation learning for smarter traffic safety decision-making and open more questions for application improvement. We believe that LLM will both shape and potentially facilitate components of traffic safety research.
abstract_zh: ChatGPT 开启了人工智能的新时代，并将彻底改变我们处理智能交通安全系统的方式。本文首先简要介绍了大型语言模型（LLM）的发展。接下来我们举例说明如何使用ChatGPT来解决关键的交通安全问题。此外，我们讨论了围绕法学硕士的争议，提出了其部署的关键问题，并提供了我们的解决方案。此外，我们提出了一种用于更智能的交通安全决策的多模态表示学习的想法，并为应用程序改进提出了更多问题。我们相信法学硕士将塑造并潜在地促进交通安全研究的组成部分。

AI.tldr: 探讨大型语言模型（如ChatGPT）在智能交通安全研究与应用中的潜力与挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）的快速发展，其可能对智能交通安全系统产生革命性影响，但需明确其适用性及潜在问题。
AI.method: 通过案例分析展示ChatGPT解决交通安全问题的示例，讨论LLMs的争议与部署问题，并提出多模态表征学习方法以优化决策。
AI.result: 识别LLMs在交通安全中的应用潜力，揭示数据隐私、模型可靠性等挑战，并提出多模态学习框架以推动研究改进。
AI.conclusion: LLMs有望推动交通安全研究，但需解决技术与伦理问题，未来需结合多模态方法进一步探索其应用边界。

authors_text: Anchit Gupta,Wenhan Xiong,Yixin Nie,Ian Jones,Barlas Oğuz
title: 3DGen: Triplane Latent Diffusion for Textured Mesh Generation
title_zh: 3DGen：用于纹理网格生成的三平面潜在扩散
abstract: Latent diffusion models for image generation have crossed a quality threshold which enabled them to achieve mass adoption. Recently, a series of works have made advancements towards replicating this success in the 3D domain, introducing techniques such as point cloud VAE, triplane representation, neural implicit surfaces and differentiable rendering based training. We take another step along this direction, combining these developments in a two-step pipeline consisting of 1) a triplane VAE which can learn latent representations of textured meshes and 2) a conditional diffusion model which generates the triplane features. For the first time this architecture allows conditional and unconditional generation of high quality textured or untextured 3D meshes across multiple diverse categories in a few seconds on a single GPU. It outperforms previous work substantially on image-conditioned and unconditional generation on mesh quality as well as texture generation. Furthermore, we demonstrate the scalability of our model to large datasets for increased quality and diversity. We will release our code and trained models.
summary: Latent diffusion models for image generation have crossed a quality threshold which enabled them to achieve mass adoption. Recently, a series of works have made advancements towards replicating this success in the 3D domain, introducing techniques such as point cloud VAE, triplane representation, neural implicit surfaces and differentiable rendering based training. We take another step along this direction, combining these developments in a two-step pipeline consisting of 1) a triplane VAE which can learn latent representations of textured meshes and 2) a conditional diffusion model which generates the triplane features. For the first time this architecture allows conditional and unconditional generation of high quality textured or untextured 3D meshes across multiple diverse categories in a few seconds on a single GPU. It outperforms previous work substantially on image-conditioned and unconditional generation on mesh quality as well as texture generation. Furthermore, we demonstrate the scalability of our model to large datasets for increased quality and diversity. We will release our code and trained models.
abstract_zh: 用于图像生成的潜在扩散模型已经跨越了质量阈值，这使得它们能够实现大规模采用。最近，一系列工作在 3D 领域复制这一成功方面取得了进展，引入了点云 VAE、三平面表示、神经隐式曲面和基于可微渲染的训练等技术。我们沿着这个方向又迈出了一步，将这些进展结合到一个两步管道中，该管道由 1) 可以学习纹理网格的潜在表示的三平面 VAE 和 2) 生成三平面特征的条件扩​​散模型组成。该架构首次允许在单个 GPU 上在几秒钟内有条件和无条件地跨多个不同类别生成高质量纹理或无纹理 3D 网格。它在网格质量以及纹理生成的图像条件和无条件生成方面大大优于以前的工作。此外，我们还展示了我们的模型对大型数据集的可扩展性，以提高质量和多样性。我们将发布我们的代码和经过训练的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出3DGen方法，通过结合三平面VAE和条件扩散模型，实现高质量纹理化3D网格的快速生成。
AI.motivation: 尽管2D图像生成模型已取得显著进展，但3D领域仍面临生成质量与效率的挑战，需探索更高效的3D表示与生成方法。
AI.method: 采用两阶段流水线：1）三平面VAE学习纹理网格的潜在表示；2）条件扩散模型生成三平面特征，实现基于文本或图像的3D网格生成。
AI.result: 在多个类别中实现秒级高质量网格生成，纹理与结构质量优于现有方法，并通过大规模数据集验证了模型的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 3DGen为3D生成提供了高效且高质量的解决方案，未来可进一步优化细节精度与多模态输入支持。

authors_text: Hongsuk Choi,Hyeongjin Nam,Taeryung Lee,Gyeongsik Moon,Kyoung Mu Lee
title: Rethinking Self-Supervised Visual Representation Learning in Pre-training for 3D Human Pose and Shape Estimation
title_zh: 重新思考 3D 人体姿势和形状估计预训练中的自监督视觉表示学习
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2023, 18 pages including the appendix
comments: Accepted to ICLR 2023, 18 pages including the appendix
abstract: Recently, a few self-supervised representation learning (SSL) methods have outperformed the ImageNet classification pre-training for vision tasks such as object detection. However, its effects on 3D human body pose and shape estimation (3DHPSE) are open to question, whose target is fixed to a unique class, the human, and has an inherent task gap with SSL. We empirically study and analyze the effects of SSL and further compare it with other pre-training alternatives for 3DHPSE. The alternatives are 2D annotation-based pre-training and synthetic data pre-training, which share the motivation of SSL that aims to reduce the labeling cost. They have been widely utilized as a source of weak-supervision or fine-tuning, but have not been remarked as a pre-training source. SSL methods underperform the conventional ImageNet classification pre-training on multiple 3DHPSE benchmarks by 7.7% on average. In contrast, despite a much less amount of pre-training data, the 2D annotation-based pre-training improves accuracy on all benchmarks and shows faster convergence during fine-tuning. Our observations challenge the naive application of the current SSL pre-training to 3DHPSE and relight the value of other data types in the pre-training aspect.
summary: Recently, a few self-supervised representation learning (SSL) methods have outperformed the ImageNet classification pre-training for vision tasks such as object detection. However, its effects on 3D human body pose and shape estimation (3DHPSE) are open to question, whose target is fixed to a unique class, the human, and has an inherent task gap with SSL. We empirically study and analyze the effects of SSL and further compare it with other pre-training alternatives for 3DHPSE. The alternatives are 2D annotation-based pre-training and synthetic data pre-training, which share the motivation of SSL that aims to reduce the labeling cost. They have been widely utilized as a source of weak-supervision or fine-tuning, but have not been remarked as a pre-training source. SSL methods underperform the conventional ImageNet classification pre-training on multiple 3DHPSE benchmarks by 7.7% on average. In contrast, despite a much less amount of pre-training data, the 2D annotation-based pre-training improves accuracy on all benchmarks and shows faster convergence during fine-tuning. Our observations challenge the naive application of the current SSL pre-training to 3DHPSE and relight the value of other data types in the pre-training aspect.
abstract_zh: 最近，一些自监督表示学习（SSL）方法在物体检测等视觉任务中的性能优于 ImageNet 分类预训练。然而，它对 3D 人体姿势和形状估计 (3DHPSE) 的影响值得商榷，其目标固定为一个独特的类，即人类，并且与 SSL 存在固有的任务差距。我们实证研究和分析 SSL 的效果，并进一步将其与 3DHPSE 的其他预训练替代方案进行比较。替代方案是基于 2D 注释的预训练和合成数据预训练，它们与 SSL 的动机相同，旨在降低标签成本。它们已被广泛用作弱监督或微调的来源，但尚未被视为预训练来源。 SSL 方法在多个 3DHPSE 基准上的性能平均比传统 ImageNet 分类预训练低 7.7%。相比之下，尽管预训练数据量要少得多，但基于 2D 注释的预训练提高了所有基准的准确性，并在微调期间显示出更快的收敛速度。我们的观察结果挑战了当前 SSL 预训练在 3DHPSE 中的简单应用，并重新强调了其他数据类型在预训练方面的价值。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了自监督学习（SSL）在3D人体姿态和形状估计（3DHPSE）中的有效性，并与基于2D标注和合成数据的预训练方法进行对比。
AI.motivation: 尽管SSL在其他视觉任务中表现优异，但其在3DHPSE中的效果尚不明确，因为该任务目标固定为人类且与SSL存在任务差距，需重新审视预训练方法的选择。
AI.method: 通过实证研究比较SSL、基于2D标注的预训练和合成数据预训练在多个3DHPSE基准上的表现，并分析其在微调过程中的收敛速度。
AI.result: SSL在多个基准上平均落后于ImageNet分类预训练7.7%，而基于2D标注的预训练在数据量更少的情况下提升了所有基准的精度并加快了微调收敛。
AI.conclusion: 当前SSL预训练在3DHPSE中效果有限，需重新重视其他数据类型（如2D标注）在预训练中的价值，挑战了SSL的直接应用假设。

authors_text: Lingdong Kong,Youquan Liu,Runnan Chen,Yuexin Ma,Xinge Zhu,Yikang Li,Yuenan Hou,Yu Qiao,Ziwei Liu
title: Rethinking Range View Representation for LiDAR Segmentation
title_zh: 重新思考 LiDAR 分割的距离视图表示
comment: ICCV 2023; 24 pages, 10 figures, 14 tables; Webpage at https://ldkong.com/RangeFormer
comments: ICCV 2023; 24 pages, 10 figures, 14 tables; Webpage at https://ldkong.com/RangeFormer
abstract: LiDAR segmentation is crucial for autonomous driving perception. Recent trends favor point- or voxel-based methods as they often yield better performance than the traditional range view representation. In this work, we unveil several key factors in building powerful range view models. We observe that the "many-to-one" mapping, semantic incoherence, and shape deformation are possible impediments against effective learning from range view projections. We present RangeFormer -- a full-cycle framework comprising novel designs across network architecture, data augmentation, and post-processing -- that better handles the learning and processing of LiDAR point clouds from the range view. We further introduce a Scalable Training from Range view (STR) strategy that trains on arbitrary low-resolution 2D range images, while still maintaining satisfactory 3D segmentation accuracy. We show that, for the first time, a range view method is able to surpass the point, voxel, and multi-view fusion counterparts in the competing LiDAR semantic and panoptic segmentation benchmarks, i.e., SemanticKITTI, nuScenes, and ScribbleKITTI.
summary: LiDAR segmentation is crucial for autonomous driving perception. Recent trends favor point- or voxel-based methods as they often yield better performance than the traditional range view representation. In this work, we unveil several key factors in building powerful range view models. We observe that the "many-to-one" mapping, semantic incoherence, and shape deformation are possible impediments against effective learning from range view projections. We present RangeFormer -- a full-cycle framework comprising novel designs across network architecture, data augmentation, and post-processing -- that better handles the learning and processing of LiDAR point clouds from the range view. We further introduce a Scalable Training from Range view (STR) strategy that trains on arbitrary low-resolution 2D range images, while still maintaining satisfactory 3D segmentation accuracy. We show that, for the first time, a range view method is able to surpass the point, voxel, and multi-view fusion counterparts in the competing LiDAR semantic and panoptic segmentation benchmarks, i.e., SemanticKITTI, nuScenes, and ScribbleKITTI.
abstract_zh: 激光雷达分割对于自动驾驶感知至关重要。最近的趋势倾向于基于点或体素的方法，因为它们通常比传统的范围视图表示产生更好的性能。在这项工作中，我们揭示了构建强大的范围视图模型的几个关键因素。我们观察到“多对一”映射、语义不连贯和形状变形可能阻碍从范围视图投影中进行有效学习。我们提出了 RangeFormer——一个全周期框架，包括跨网络架构、数据增强和后处理的新颖设计——它可以更好地从距离角度处理 LiDAR 点云的学习和处理。我们进一步引入了可扩展的范围视图训练（STR）策略，该策略可以在任意低分辨率 2D 范围图像上进行训练，同时仍然保持令人满意的 3D 分割精度。我们首次证明，在竞争性 LiDAR 语义和全景分割基准（即 SemanticKITTI、nuScenes 和 ScribbleKITTI）中，范围视图方法能够超越点、体素和多视图融合方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的范围视图表示方法RangeFormer，用于提升LiDAR点云分割性能。
AI.motivation: 传统范围视图存在'多对一'映射、语义不一致和形状变形等问题，限制了其分割效果。
AI.method: 设计RangeFormer框架，包含网络架构优化、数据增强和后处理模块，并提出STR策略实现低分辨率图像训练。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI等基准测试中首次超越点云/体素/多视图融合方法，实现更优的语义和全景分割效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过架构创新和训练策略优化，范围视图方法在LiDAR分割任务中展现出强大竞争力。

authors_text: Pedro Quaresma,João Marcos,Walther Neuper
title: Proceedings 11th International Workshop on Theorem Proving Components for Educational Software
title_zh: 第 11 届教育软件定理证明组件国际研讨会论文集
abstract: The ThEdu series pursues the smooth transition from an intuitive way of doing mathematics at secondary school to a more formal approach to the subject in STEM education, while favouring software support for this transition by exploiting the power of theorem-proving technologies. What follows is a brief description of how the present volume contributes to this enterprise. The 11th International Workshop on Theorem Proving Components for Educational Software (ThEdu'22), was a satellite event of the 8th Federated Logic Conference (FLoC 2022), July 31-August 12, 2022, Haifa, Israel ThEdu'22 was a vibrant workshop, with two invited talk by Thierry Dana-Picard (Jerusalem College of Technology, Jerusalem, Israel) and Yoni Zohar (Bar Ilan University, Tel Aviv, Israel) and four contributions. An open call for papers was then issued, and attracted seven submissions. Those submissions have been accepted by our reviewers, who jointly produced at least three careful reports on each of the contributions. The resulting revised papers are collected in the present volume. The contributions in this volume are a faithful representation of the wide spectrum of ThEdu, ranging from those more focused on the automated deduction research, not losing track of the possible applications in an educational setting, to those focused on the applications, in educational settings, of automated deduction tools and methods. We, the volume editors, hope that this collection of papers will further promote the development of theorem-proving based software, and that it will allow to improve the mutual understanding between computer scientists, mathematicians and stakeholders in education. While this volume goes to press, the next edition of the ThEdu workshop is being prepared: ThEdu'23 will be a satellite event of the 29th international Conference on Automated Deduction (CADE 2023), July 1-4, 2023, Rome, Italy.

Those submissions have been accepted by our reviewers, who jointly produced at least three careful reports on each of the contributions. The resulting revised papers are collected in the present volume. The contributions in this volume are a faithful representation of the wide spectrum of ThEdu, ranging from those more focused on the automated deduction research, not losing track of the possible applications in an educational setting, to those focused on the applications, in educational settings, of automated deduction tools and methods. We, the volume editors, hope that this collection of papers will further promote the development of theorem-proving based software, and that it will allow to improve the mutual understanding between computer scientists, mathematicians and stakeholders in education. While this volume goes to press, the next edition of the ThEdu workshop is being prepared: ThEdu'23 will be a satellite event of the 29th international Conference on Automated Deduction (CADE 2023), July 1-4, 2023, Rome, Italy.
abstract_zh: ThEdu 系列追求从中学直观的数学方法到 STEM 教育中更正式的数学方法的平稳过渡，同时通过利用定理证明技术的力量来支持这种过渡的软件支持。以下是本卷如何对该企业做出贡献的简要描述。第 11 届教育软件定理证明组件国际研讨会 (ThEdu'22) 是第八届联邦逻辑会议 (FLoC 2022) 的卫星活动，于 2022 年 7 月 31 日至 8 月 12 日在以色列海法举行。ThEdu'22 是一次充满活力的研讨会，其中有两场由 Thierry Dana-Picard（以色列耶路撒冷理工学院）和 Yoni Zohar 邀请发表的演讲（以色列特拉维夫巴伊兰大学）和四份贡献。随后公开征集论文，共收到七份论文。这些提交的内容已被我们的审稿人接受，他们针对每项贡献共同制作了至少三份仔细的报告。由此产生的修订论文收集在本卷中。本书中的贡献忠实地代表了 ThEdu 的广泛领域，从那些更专注于自动演绎研究（同时关注教育环境中可能的应用）的人，到那些专注于自动演绎工具和方法在教育环境中应用的人。我们，卷的编辑，希望这本论文集能够进一步促进基于定理证明的软件的开发，并希望能够增进计算机科学家、数学家和教育利益相关者之间的相互理解。在本书付印期间，下一期 ThEdu 研讨会正在筹备中：ThEdu'23 将成为 2023 年 7 月 1-4 日在意大利罗马举行的第 29 届国际自动演绎会议 (CADE 2023) 的卫星活动。

AI.tldr: 本文集收录了第11届定理证明组件用于教育软件国际研讨会（ThEdu'22）的论文，旨在促进STEM教育中数学学习方式的正式化转型，并推动定理证明技术在教育软件中的应用。
AI.motivation: 通过软件支持实现从中学直观数学学习到大学阶段形式化方法的平滑过渡，同时加强计算机科学、数学与教育领域的协作。
AI.method: 组织卫星研讨会，征集并评审七篇投稿，最终收录四篇修订论文，涵盖自动推理研究及其教育应用两个方向。
AI.result: 出版包含四篇论文的论文集，展示定理证明技术在教育场景中的多样化应用，促进跨学科交流。
AI.conclusion: 期望通过论文集推动定理证明软件发展，增强领域间理解，并为后续研讨会（如ThEdu'23）奠定基础。

search_text: Proceedings 11th International Workshop on Theorem Proving Components for Educational Software 第 11 届教育软件定理证明组件国际研讨会论文集 The ThEdu series pursues the smooth transition from an intuitive way of doing mathematics at secondary school to a more formal approach to the subject in STEM education, while favouring software support for this transition by exploiting the power of theorem-proving technologies. What follows is a brief description of how the present volume contributes to this enterprise. The 11th International Workshop on Theorem Proving Components for Educational Software (ThEdu'22), was a satellite event of the 8th Federated Logic Conference (FLoC 2022), July 31-August 12, 2022, Haifa, Israel ThEdu'22 was a vibrant workshop, with two invited talk by Thierry Dana-Picard (Jerusalem College of Technology, Jerusalem, Israel) and Yoni Zohar (Bar Ilan University, Tel Aviv, Israel) and four contributions. An open call for papers was then issued, and attracted seven submissions. Those submissions have been accepted by our reviewers, who jointly produced at least three careful reports on each of the contributions. The resulting revised papers are collected in the present volume. The contributions in this volume are a faithful representation of the wide spectrum of ThEdu, ranging from those more focused on the automated deduction research, not losing track of the possible applications in an educational setting, to those focused on the applications, in educational settings, of automated deduction tools and methods. We, the volume editors, hope that this collection of papers will further promote the development of theorem-proving based software, and that it will allow to improve the mutual understanding between computer scientists, mathematicians and stakeholders in education. While this volume goes to press, the next edition of the ThEdu workshop is being prepared: ThEdu'23 will be a satellite event of the 29th international Conference on Automated Deduction (CADE 2023), July 1-4, 2023, Rome, Italy. authors_text: Tianze Yang,Yuhong Cao,Guillaume Sartoretti
title: Intent-based Deep Reinforcement Learning for Multi-agent Informative Path Planning
title_zh: 基于意图的深度强化学习，用于多智能体信息路径规划
comment: \c{opyright} 20XX IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. comments: \c{opyright} 20XX IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. abstract: In multi-agent informative path planning (MAIPP), agents must collectively construct a global belief map of an underlying distribution of interest (e.g., gas concentration, light intensity, or pollution levels) over a given domain, based on measurements taken along their trajectory. They must frequently replan their path to balance the exploration of new areas with the exploitation of known high-interest areas, to maximize information gain within a predefined budget. Traditional approaches rely on reactive path planning conditioned on other agents' predicted future actions. However, as the belief is continuously updated, the predicted actions may not match the executed actions, introducing noise and reducing performance. We propose a decentralized, deep reinforcement learning (DRL) approach using an attention-based neural network, where agents optimize long-term individual and cooperative objectives by sharing their intent, represented as a distribution of medium-/long-term future positions obtained from their own policy. Intent sharing enables agents to learn to claim or avoid broader areas, while the use of attention mechanisms allows them to identify useful portions of imperfect predictions, maximizing cooperation even based on imperfect information. Our experiments compare the performance of our approach, its variants, and high-quality baselines across various MAIPP scenarios. We finally demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach under limited communication ranges, towards deployments under realistic communication constraints.
summary: In multi-agent informative path planning (MAIPP), agents must collectively construct a global belief map of an underlying distribution of interest (e.g., gas concentration, light intensity, or pollution levels) over a given domain, based on measurements taken along their trajectory. They must frequently replan their path to balance the exploration of new areas with the exploitation of known high-interest areas, to maximize information gain within a predefined budget. Traditional approaches rely on reactive path planning conditioned on other agents' predicted future actions. However, as the belief is continuously updated, the predicted actions may not match the executed actions, introducing noise and reducing performance. We propose a decentralized, deep reinforcement learning (DRL) approach using an attention-based neural network, where agents optimize long-term individual and cooperative objectives by sharing their intent, represented as a distribution of medium-/long-term future positions obtained from their own policy. Intent sharing enables agents to learn to claim or avoid broader areas, while the use of attention mechanisms allows them to identify useful portions of imperfect predictions, maximizing cooperation even based on imperfect information. Our experiments compare the performance of our approach, its variants, and high-quality baselines across various MAIPP scenarios. We finally demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach under limited communication ranges, towards deployments under realistic communication constraints.
abstract_zh: 在多智能体信息路径规划（MAIPP）中，智能体必须根据沿其轨迹进行的测量，共同构建给定域上潜在兴趣分布（例如气体浓度、光强度或污染水平）的全局置信图。他们必须经常重新规划路径，以平衡新领域的探索与已知的高兴趣领域的开发，从而在预定预算内最大化信息增益。传统方法依赖于以其他智能体预测的未来行动为条件的反应性路径规划。然而，随着信念不断更新，预测的动作可能与执行的动作不匹配，从而引入噪声并降低性能。我们提出了一种使用基于注意力的神经网络的去中心化深度强化学习（DRL）方法，其中代理通过分享他们的意图来优化长期个人和合作目标，表示为从他们自己的政策中获得的中/长期未来位置的分布。意图共享使智能体能够学会声明或避开更广泛的区域，而注意力机制的使用使它们能够识别不完美预测的有用部分，即使基于不完美的信息也能最大化合作。我们的实验比较了我们的方法、其变体以及各种 MAIPP 场景中的高质量基线的性能。我们最终证明了我们的方法在有限通信范围下的有效性，以及在现实通信限制下的部署。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于意图的深度强化学习方法，用于多智能体信息路径规划，以在动态环境中优化全局信念地图构建。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖于其他智能体的预测动作进行反应式路径规划，但动态更新的信念导致预测与实际动作不一致，降低性能。
AI.method: 采用去中心化深度强化学习框架，结合注意力机制的神经网络，通过共享智能体的意图（中长期位置分布）实现协作优化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种多智能体场景中优于现有基线，尤其在通信受限条件下表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 意图共享与注意力机制有效提升多智能体在动态环境下的协作效率，适用于现实通信约束场景。

authors_text: Xintong Yang,Ze Ji,Jing Wu,Yu-kun Lai
title: Recent Advances of Deep Robotic Affordance Learning: A Reinforcement Learning Perspective
title_zh: 深度机器人可供性学习的最新进展：强化学习的视角
abstract: As a popular concept proposed in the field of psychology, affordance has been regarded as one of the important abilities that enable humans to understand and interact with the environment. Briefly, it captures the possibilities and effects of the actions of an agent applied to a specific object or, more generally, a part of the environment. This paper provides a short review of the recent developments of deep robotic affordance learning (DRAL), which aims to develop data-driven methods that use the concept of affordance to aid in robotic tasks. We first classify these papers from a reinforcement learning (RL) perspective, and draw connections between RL and affordances. The technical details of each category are discussed and their limitations identified. We further summarise them and identify future challenges from the aspects of observations, actions, affordance representation, data-collection and real-world deployment. A final remark is given at the end to propose a promising future direction of the RL-based affordance definition to include the predictions of arbitrary action consequences.
summary: As a popular concept proposed in the field of psychology, affordance has been regarded as one of the important abilities that enable humans to understand and interact with the environment. Briefly, it captures the possibilities and effects of the actions of an agent applied to a specific object or, more generally, a part of the environment. This paper provides a short review of the recent developments of deep robotic affordance learning (DRAL), which aims to develop data-driven methods that use the concept of affordance to aid in robotic tasks. We first classify these papers from a reinforcement learning (RL) perspective, and draw connections between RL and affordances. The technical details of each category are discussed and their limitations identified. We further summarise them and identify future challenges from the aspects of observations, actions, affordance representation, data-collection and real-world deployment. A final remark is given at the end to propose a promising future direction of the RL-based affordance definition to include the predictions of arbitrary action consequences.
abstract_zh: 作为心理学领域提出的一个热门概念，可供性被认为是人类理解环境并与环境互动的重要能力之一。简而言之，它捕获了应用于特定对象或更一般地环境的一部分的代理动作的可能性和效果。本文对深度机器人可供性学习 (DRAL) 的最新发展进行了简短回顾，旨在开发数据驱动的方法，利用可供性的概念来帮助完成机器人任务。我们首先从强化学习（RL）的角度对这些论文进行分类，并在 RL 和可供性之间建立联系。讨论了每个类别的技术细节并确定了它们的局限性。我们进一步总结它们，并从观察、行动、可供性表示、数据收集和现实世界部署等方面确定未来的挑战。最后给出了最后的评论，提出了基于强化学习的可供性定义的一个有前途的未来方向，其中包括对任意行动后果的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度机器人亲和力学习（DRAL）的最新进展，从强化学习（RL）的角度对相关研究进行了分类，并探讨了其技术细节、局限性及未来挑战。
AI.motivation: 亲和力概念在心理学中被提出，是人类理解与环境互动的重要能力。本文旨在通过数据驱动的方法，将亲和力概念应用于机器人任务，以提升其环境交互能力。
AI.method: 本文从强化学习的视角对深度机器人亲和力学习的研究进行了分类，分析了各类方法的技术细节，探讨了它们的局限性，并从观察、动作、亲和力表示、数据收集和实际部署等方面总结了未来挑战。
AI.result: 本文系统梳理了深度机器人亲和力学习的最新研究进展，明确了其与强化学习的联系，并指出了当前研究的不足及未来发展方向。
AI.conclusion: 未来的研究应更加关注基于强化学习的亲和力定义，以预测任意动作的后果，从而进一步提升机器人在复杂环境中的交互能力。
