search_text: Recent Advances of Deep Robotic Affordance Learning: A Reinforcement Learning Perspective 深度机器人可供性学习的最新进展：强化学习的视角 As a popular concept proposed in the field of psychology, affordance has been regarded as one of the important abilities that enable humans to understand and interact with the environment. Briefly, it captures the possibilities and effects of the actions of an agent applied to a specific object or, more generally, a part of the environment. This paper provides a short review of the recent developments of deep robotic affordance learning (DRAL), which aims to develop data-driven methods that use the concept of affordance to aid in robotic tasks. We first classify these papers from a reinforcement learning (RL) perspective, and draw connections between RL and affordances. The technical details of each category are discussed and their limitations identified. We further summarise them and identify future challenges from the aspects of observations, actions, affordance representation, data-collection and real-world deployment. A final remark is given at the end to propose a promising future direction of the RL-based affordance definition to include the predictions of arbitrary action consequences. 作为心理学领域提出的一个热门概念，可供性被认为是人类理解环境并与环境互动的重要能力之一。简而言之，它捕获了应用于特定对象或更一般地环境的一部分的代理动作的可能性和效果。本文对深度机器人可供性学习 (DRAL) 的最新发展进行了简短回顾，旨在开发数据驱动的方法，利用可供性的概念来帮助完成机器人任务。我们首先从强化学习（RL）的角度对这些论文进行分类，并在 RL 和可供性之间建立联系。讨论了每个类别的技术细节并确定了它们的局限性。我们进一步总结它们，并从观察、行动、可供性表示、数据收集和现实世界部署等方面确定未来的挑战。最后给出了最后的评论，提出了基于强化学习的可供性定义的一个有前途的未来方向，其中包括对任意行动后果的预测。 本文综述了深度机器人亲和力学习（DRAL）的最新进展，从强化学习（RL）的角度对相关研究进行了分类，并探讨了其技术细节、局限性及未来挑战。 Xintong Yang,Ze Ji,Jing Wu,Yu-kun Lai cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Tianyu Yu,Yangning Li,Jiaoyan Chen,Yinghui Li,Hai-Tao Zheng,Xi Chen,Qingbin Liu,Wenqiang Liu,Dongxiao Huang,Bei Wu,Yexin Wang
title: Knowledge-augmented Few-shot Visual Relation Detection
title_zh: 知识增强的小样本视觉关系检测
abstract: Visual Relation Detection (VRD) aims to detect relationships between objects for image understanding. Most existing VRD methods rely on thousands of training samples of each relationship to achieve satisfactory performance. Some recent papers tackle this problem by few-shot learning with elaborately designed pipelines and pre-trained word vectors. However, the performance of existing few-shot VRD models is severely hampered by the poor generalization capability, as they struggle to handle the vast semantic diversity of visual relationships. Nonetheless, humans have the ability to learn new relationships with just few examples based on their knowledge. Inspired by this, we devise a knowledge-augmented, few-shot VRD framework leveraging both textual knowledge and visual relation knowledge to improve the generalization ability of few-shot VRD. The textual knowledge and visual relation knowledge are acquired from a pre-trained language model and an automatically constructed visual relation knowledge graph, respectively. We extensively validate the effectiveness of our framework. Experiments conducted on three benchmarks from the commonly used Visual Genome dataset show that our performance surpasses existing state-of-the-art models with a large improvement.
summary: Visual Relation Detection (VRD) aims to detect relationships between objects for image understanding. Most existing VRD methods rely on thousands of training samples of each relationship to achieve satisfactory performance. Some recent papers tackle this problem by few-shot learning with elaborately designed pipelines and pre-trained word vectors. However, the performance of existing few-shot VRD models is severely hampered by the poor generalization capability, as they struggle to handle the vast semantic diversity of visual relationships. Nonetheless, humans have the ability to learn new relationships with just few examples based on their knowledge. Inspired by this, we devise a knowledge-augmented, few-shot VRD framework leveraging both textual knowledge and visual relation knowledge to improve the generalization ability of few-shot VRD. The textual knowledge and visual relation knowledge are acquired from a pre-trained language model and an automatically constructed visual relation knowledge graph, respectively. We extensively validate the effectiveness of our framework. Experiments conducted on three benchmarks from the commonly used Visual Genome dataset show that our performance surpasses existing state-of-the-art models with a large improvement.
abstract_zh: 视觉关系检测（VRD）旨在检测对象之间的关系以进行图像理解。大多数现有的 VRD 方法依赖于每种关系的数千个训练样本来获得令人满意的性能。最近的一些论文通过精心设计的管道和预训练的词向量进行几次学习来解决这个问题。然而，现有的少镜头 VRD 模型的性能因泛化能力差而受到严重阻碍，因为它们难以处理视觉关系的巨大语义多样性。尽管如此，人类有能力根据他们的知识仅通过几个例子来学习新的关系。受此启发，我们设计了一个知识增强的少镜头 VRD 框架，利用文本知识和视觉关系知识来提高少镜头 VRD 的泛化能力。文本知识和视觉关系知识分别从预先训练的语言模型和自动构建的视觉关系知识图谱中获取。我们广泛验证了我们框架的有效性。对常用视觉基因组数据集的三个基准进行的实验表明，我们的性能超越了现有的最先进模型，并取得了很大的进步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种知识增强的少样本视觉关系检测框架，通过结合文本知识和视觉关系知识提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本视觉关系检测方法因无法有效处理视觉关系的语义多样性而泛化能力不足，而人类能基于知识从少量样本中学习新关系。
AI.method: 融合预训练语言模型提取的文本知识与自动构建的视觉关系知识图谱，设计知识增强的少样本学习框架。
AI.result: 在Visual Genome数据集的三个基准测试中，性能显著超越现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 知识增强策略有效提升少样本视觉关系检测性能，未来可进一步探索多源知识融合方法。

authors_text: Yuming Sun,Jian Kang,Chinmay Haridas,Nicholas R. Mayne,Alexandra L. Potter,Chi-Fu Jeffrey Yang,David C. Christiani,Yi Li
title: Penalized Deep Partially Linear Cox Models with Application to CT Scans of Lung Cancer Patients
title_zh: 惩罚深度部分线性 Cox 模型在肺癌患者 CT 扫描中的应用
abstract: Lung cancer is a leading cause of cancer mortality globally, highlighting the importance of understanding its mortality risks to design effective patient-centered therapies. The National Lung Screening Trial (NLST) employed computed tomography texture analysis, which provides objective measurements of texture patterns on CT scans, to quantify the mortality risks of lung cancer patients. Partially linear Cox models have gained popularity for survival analysis by dissecting the hazard function into parametric and nonparametric components, allowing for the effective incorporation of both well-established risk factors (such as age and clinical variables) and emerging risk factors (e.g., image features) within a unified framework. However, when the dimension of parametric components exceeds the sample size, the task of model fitting becomes formidable, while nonparametric modeling grapples with the curse of dimensionality. We propose a novel Penalized Deep Partially Linear Cox Model (Penalized DPLC), which incorporates the SCAD penalty to select important texture features and employs a deep neural network to estimate the nonparametric component of the model. We prove the convergence and asymptotic properties of the estimator and compare it to other methods through extensive simulation studies, evaluating its performance in risk prediction and feature selection. The proposed method is applied to the NLST study dataset to uncover the effects of key clinical and imaging risk factors on patients' survival. Our findings provide valuable insights into the relationship between these factors and survival outcomes.
summary: Lung cancer is a leading cause of cancer mortality globally, highlighting the importance of understanding its mortality risks to design effective patient-centered therapies. The National Lung Screening Trial (NLST) employed computed tomography texture analysis, which provides objective measurements of texture patterns on CT scans, to quantify the mortality risks of lung cancer patients. Partially linear Cox models have gained popularity for survival analysis by dissecting the hazard function into parametric and nonparametric components, allowing for the effective incorporation of both well-established risk factors (such as age and clinical variables) and emerging risk factors (e.g., image features) within a unified framework. However, when the dimension of parametric components exceeds the sample size, the task of model fitting becomes formidable, while nonparametric modeling grapples with the curse of dimensionality. We propose a novel Penalized Deep Partially Linear Cox Model (Penalized DPLC), which incorporates the SCAD penalty to select important texture features and employs a deep neural network to estimate the nonparametric component of the model. We prove the convergence and asymptotic properties of the estimator and compare it to other methods through extensive simulation studies, evaluating its performance in risk prediction and feature selection. The proposed method is applied to the NLST study dataset to uncover the effects of key clinical and imaging risk factors on patients' survival. Our findings provide valuable insights into the relationship between these factors and survival outcomes.
abstract_zh: 肺癌是全球癌症死亡的主要原因，凸显了了解其死亡风险以设计有效的以患者为中心的治疗方法的重要性。国家肺部筛查试验 (NLST) 采用计算机断层扫描纹理分析，提供 CT 扫描纹理模式的客观测量，以量化肺癌患者的死亡风险。部分线性 Cox 模型通过将风险函数分解为参数和非参数部分，在生存分析中得到了普及，从而可以将既定的风险因素（例如年龄和临床变量）和新兴的风险因素（例如图像特征）有效地纳入统一的框架内。然而，当参数分量的维数超过样本大小时，模型拟合的任务就变得艰巨，而非参数建模则要解决维数灾难。我们提出了一种新颖的惩罚深度部分线性 Cox 模型（惩罚 DPLC），它结合了 SCAD 惩罚来选择重要的纹理特征，并采用深度神经网络来估计模型的非参数部分。我们证明了估计器的收敛性和渐近特性，并通过广泛的模拟研究将其与其他方法进行比较，评估其在风险预测和特征选择方面的性能。所提出的方法应用于 NLST 研究数据集，以揭示关键临床和影像学风险因素对患者生存的影响。我们的研究结果为这些因素与生存结果之间的关系提供了有价值的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种带惩罚的深度部分线性Cox模型（Penalized DPLC），用于分析肺癌患者的CT扫描数据，结合临床和影像学风险因素预测生存风险。
AI.motivation: 现有部分线性Cox模型在高维参数和非参数估计时面临计算困难与维度灾难问题，需开发更有效的模型整合临床变量与影像特征。
AI.method: 结合SCAD惩罚进行特征选择，利用深度神经网络估计非参数成分，并证明估计器的收敛性与渐近性质。
AI.result: 通过模拟研究验证方法有效性，应用于NLST数据集，揭示关键临床与影像风险因素对患者生存的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效整合高维临床与影像数据，提升肺癌患者生存风险预测与特征选择的准确性。

search_text: Penalized Deep Partially Linear Cox Models with Application to CT Scans of Lung Cancer Patients 惩罚深度部分线性 Cox 模型在肺癌患者 CT 扫描中的应用 Lung cancer is a leading cause of cancer mortality globally, highlighting the importance of understanding its mortality risks to design effective patient-centered therapies. The National Lung Screening Trial (NLST) employed computed tomography texture analysis, which provides objective measurements of texture patterns on CT scans, to quantify the mortality risks of lung cancer patients. Partially linear Cox models have gained popularity for survival analysis by dissecting the hazard function into parametric and nonparametric components, allowing for the effective incorporation of both well-established risk factors (such as age and clinical variables) and emerging risk factors (e.g., image features) within a unified framework. However, when the dimension of parametric components exceeds the sample size, the task of model fitting becomes formidable, while nonparametric modeling grapples with the curse of dimensionality. We propose a novel Penalized Deep Partially Linear Cox Model (Penalized DPLC), which incorporates the SCAD penalty to select important texture features and employs a deep neural network to estimate the nonparametric component of the model. We prove the convergence and asymptotic properties of the estimator and compare it to other methods through extensive simulation studies, evaluating its performance in risk prediction and feature selection. The proposed method is applied to the NLST study dataset to uncover the effects of key clinical and imaging risk factors on patients' survival. Our findings provide valuable insights into the relationship between these factors and survival outcomes. 肺癌是全球癌症死亡的主要原因，凸显了了解其死亡风险以设计有效的以患者为中心的治疗方法的重要性。国家肺部筛查试验 (NLST) 采用计算机断层扫描纹理分析，提供 CT 扫描纹理模式的客观测量，以量化肺癌患者的死亡风险。部分线性 Cox 模型通过将风险函数分解为参数和非参数部分，在生存分析中得到了普及，从而可以将既定的风险因素（例如年龄和临床变量）和新兴的风险因素（例如图像特征）有效地纳入统一的框架内。然而，当参数分量的维数超过样本大小时，模型拟合的任务就变得艰巨，而非参数建模则要解决维数灾难。我们提出了一种新颖的惩罚深度部分线性 Cox 模型（惩罚 DPLC），它结合了 SCAD 惩罚来选择重要的纹理特征，并采用深度神经网络来估计模型的非参数部分。我们证明了估计器的收敛性和渐近特性，并通过广泛的模拟研究将其与其他方法进行比较，评估其在风险预测和特征选择方面的性能。所提出的方法应用于 NLST 研究数据集，以揭示关键临床和影像学风险因素对患者生存的影响。我们的研究结果为这些因素与生存结果之间的关系提供了有价值的见解。 本文提出一种带惩罚的深度部分线性Cox模型（Penalized DPLC），用于分析肺癌患者的CT扫描数据，结合临床和影像学风险因素预测生存风险。 Yuming Sun,Jian Kang,Chinmay Haridas,Nicholas R. Mayne,Alexandra L. Potter,Chi-Fu Jeffrey Yang,David C. Christiani,Yi Li stat.ML,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Ruize Xu,Ruoxuan Feng,Shi-Xiong Zhang,Di Hu
title: MMCosine: Multi-Modal Cosine Loss Towards Balanced Audio-Visual Fine-Grained Learning
title_zh: MMCosine：平衡视听细粒度学习的多模态余弦损失
abstract: Audio-visual learning helps to comprehensively understand the world by fusing practical information from multiple modalities. However, recent studies show that the imbalanced optimization of uni-modal encoders in a joint-learning model is a bottleneck to enhancing the model's performance. We further find that the up-to-date imbalance-mitigating methods fail on some audio-visual fine-grained tasks, which have a higher demand for distinguishable feature distribution. Fueled by the success of cosine loss that builds hyperspherical feature spaces and achieves lower intra-class angular variability, this paper proposes Multi-Modal Cosine loss, MMCosine. It performs a modality-wise $L_2$ normalization to features and weights towards balanced and better multi-modal fine-grained learning. We demonstrate that our method can alleviate the imbalanced optimization from the perspective of weight norm and fully exploit the discriminability of the cosine metric. Extensive experiments prove the effectiveness of our method and the versatility with advanced multi-modal fusion strategies and up-to-date imbalance-mitigating methods.
summary: Audio-visual learning helps to comprehensively understand the world by fusing practical information from multiple modalities. However, recent studies show that the imbalanced optimization of uni-modal encoders in a joint-learning model is a bottleneck to enhancing the model's performance. We further find that the up-to-date imbalance-mitigating methods fail on some audio-visual fine-grained tasks, which have a higher demand for distinguishable feature distribution. Fueled by the success of cosine loss that builds hyperspherical feature spaces and achieves lower intra-class angular variability, this paper proposes Multi-Modal Cosine loss, MMCosine. It performs a modality-wise $L_2$ normalization to features and weights towards balanced and better multi-modal fine-grained learning. We demonstrate that our method can alleviate the imbalanced optimization from the perspective of weight norm and fully exploit the discriminability of the cosine metric. Extensive experiments prove the effectiveness of our method and the versatility with advanced multi-modal fusion strategies and up-to-date imbalance-mitigating methods.
abstract_zh: 视听学习通过融合多种方式的实用信息，有助于全面了解世界。然而，最近的研究表明，联合学习模型中单模态编码器的不平衡优化是提高模型性能的瓶颈。我们进一步发现，最新的不平衡缓解方法在一些视听细粒度任务上失败，这些任务对可区分的特征分布有更高的要求。在余弦损失成功构建超球面特征空间并实现较低的类内角度变异性的推动下，本文提出了多模态余弦损失，MMCosine。它对特征和权重执行模态 $L_2$ 标准化，以实现平衡和更好的多模态细粒度学习。我们证明我们的方法可以从权重范数的角度减轻不平衡优化，并充分利用余弦度量的可辨别性。大量的实验证明了我们的方法的有效性以及先进的多模态融合策略和最新的不平衡缓解方法的多功能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MMCosine多模态余弦损失函数，用于解决音频-视觉细粒度学习中单模态编码器优化不平衡的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联合学习模型存在单模态编码器优化不平衡问题，且最新不平衡缓解方法在细粒度任务中表现不足，需更高区分度的特征分布。
AI.method: 通过模态级L2归一化处理特征和权重，结合余弦损失构建超球面特征空间，降低类内角度差异以提升多模态细粒度学习的平衡性。
AI.result: 实验验证MMCosine有效缓解了优化不平衡问题，并兼容先进多模态融合策略与最新不平衡缓解方法，证明其广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: MMCosine通过模态归一化与余弦损失结合，显著提升多模态细粒度学习性能，为相关任务提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Nicola Rizzo,Massimo Equi,Tuukka Norri,Veli Mäkinen
title: Elastic Founder Graphs Improved and Enhanced
title_zh: Elastic Founder Graphs 得到改进和增强
comment: 47 pages, 10 figures. Extension of conference papers IWOCA 2022 (https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-06678-8_35 , preprint arXiv:2201.06492), CPM 2022 (https://doi.org/10.4230/LIPIcs.CPM.2022.19 ), and of some results from PhD dissertation projects of Massimo Equi (http://urn.fi/URN:ISBN:978-951-51-8217-3 ) and Tuukka Norri (http://urn.fi/URN:ISBN:978-951-51-8215-9 )
comments: 47 pages, 10 figures. Extension of conference papers IWOCA 2022 (https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-06678-8_35 , preprint arXiv:2201.06492), CPM 2022 (https://doi.org/10.4230/LIPIcs.CPM.2022.19 ), and of some results from PhD dissertation projects of Massimo Equi (http://urn.fi/URN:ISBN:978-951-51-8217-3 ) and Tuukka Norri (http://urn.fi/URN:ISBN:978-951-51-8215-9 )
abstract: Indexing labeled graphs for pattern matching is a central challenge of pangenomics. Equi et al. (Algorithmica, 2022) developed the Elastic Founder Graph ($\mathsf{EFG}$) representing an alignment of $m$ sequences of length $n$, drawn from alphabet $Σ$ plus the special gap character: the paths spell the original sequences or their recombination. By enforcing the semi-repeat-free property, the $\mathsf{EFG}$ admits a polynomial-space index for linear-time pattern matching, breaking through the conditional lower bounds on indexing labeled graphs (Equi et al., SOFSEM 2021). In this work we improve the space of the $\mathsf{EFG}$ index answering pattern matching queries in linear time, from linear in the length of all strings spelled by three consecutive node labels, to linear in the size of the edge labels. Then, we develop linear-time construction algorithms optimizing for different metrics: we improve the existing linearithmic construction algorithms to $O(mn)$, by solving the novel exclusive ancestor set problem on trees; we propose, for the simplified gapless setting, an $O(mn)$-time solution minimizing the maximum block height, that we generalize by substituting block height with prefix-aware height. Finally, to show the versatility of the framework, we develop a BWT-based $\mathsf{EFG}$ index and study how to encode and perform document listing queries on a set of paths of the graphs, reporting which paths present a given pattern as a substring. We propose the $\mathsf{EFG}$ framework as an improved and enhanced version of the framework for the gapless setting, along with construction methods that are valid in any setting concerned with the segmentation of aligned sequences.
summary: Indexing labeled graphs for pattern matching is a central challenge of pangenomics. Equi et al. (Algorithmica, 2022) developed the Elastic Founder Graph ($\mathsf{EFG}$) representing an alignment of $m$ sequences of length $n$, drawn from alphabet $Σ$ plus the special gap character: the paths spell the original sequences or their recombination. By enforcing the semi-repeat-free property, the $\mathsf{EFG}$ admits a polynomial-space index for linear-time pattern matching, breaking through the conditional lower bounds on indexing labeled graphs (Equi et al., SOFSEM 2021). In this work we improve the space of the $\mathsf{EFG}$ index answering pattern matching queries in linear time, from linear in the length of all strings spelled by three consecutive node labels, to linear in the size of the edge labels. Then, we develop linear-time construction algorithms optimizing for different metrics: we improve the existing linearithmic construction algorithms to $O(mn)$, by solving the novel exclusive ancestor set problem on trees; we propose, for the simplified gapless setting, an $O(mn)$-time solution minimizing the maximum block height, that we generalize by substituting block height with prefix-aware height. Finally, to show the versatility of the framework, we develop a BWT-based $\mathsf{EFG}$ index and study how to encode and perform document listing queries on a set of paths of the graphs, reporting which paths present a given pattern as a substring. We propose the $\mathsf{EFG}$ framework as an improved and enhanced version of the framework for the gapless setting, along with construction methods that are valid in any setting concerned with the segmentation of aligned sequences.
abstract_zh: 索引标记图以进行模式匹配是泛基因组学的核心挑战。等人。 （Algorithmica，2022）开发了弹性创始人图（$\mathsf{EFG}$），表示长度为 $n$ 的 $m$ 序列的对齐，从字母表 $Σ$ 加上特殊的间隙字符绘制：路径拼写原始序列或其重组。通过强制执行半无重复属性，$\mathsf{EFG}$ 允许使用多项式空间索引进行线性时间模式匹配，突破了索引标记图的条件下限（Equi et al., SOFSEM 2021）。在这项工作中，我们改进了在线性时间内回答模式匹配查询的 $\mathsf{EFG}$ 索引的空间，从三个连续节点标签拼写的所有字符串的长度呈线性，到边缘标签的大小呈线性。然后，我们开发针对不同指标进行优化的线性时间构造算法：通过解决树上新颖的排他祖先集问题，将现有的线性算术构造算法改进为$O(mn)$；对于简化的无间隙设置，我们提出了一种最小化最大块高度的 $O(mn)$ 时间解决方案，我们通过用前缀感知高度替换块高度来概括该解决方案。最后，为了展示该框架的多功能性，我们开发了一个基于 BWT 的 $\mathsf{EFG}$ 索引，并研究如何在一组图的路径上编码和执行文档列表查询，报告哪些路径将给定模式呈现为子字符串。我们提出 $\mathsf{EFG}$ 框架作为无间隙设置框架的改进和增强版本，以及在任何与对齐序列分割有关的设置中有效的构造方法。

AI.tldr: 本文改进并增强弹性创始图（EFG）框架，优化其空间复杂度和构建算法，以提升泛基因组中标签图的模式匹配效率。
AI.motivation: 现有EFG的索引空间复杂度与三个连续节点标签的字符串长度成线性关系，存在冗余。需通过降低空间开销并优化构建算法，突破条件下界，提升实际应用效率。
AI.method: 将空间复杂度从三节点标签字符串长度线性降至边标签规模；解决树结构中的独占祖先集问题，提出O(mn)时间构建算法；引入前缀感知高度优化分块策略；开发基于BWT的EFG索引以支持路径文档检索。
AI.result: 实现线性时间模式匹配的更优空间索引，构建算法时间复杂度优化至O(mn)，提出适用于无间隙场景及通用序列分割场景的框架扩展方案。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的EFG框架在空间效率、构建速度及功能扩展性上均有提升，为泛基因组分析提供了更高效的图索引解决方案。

ai_content.result: 实现线性时间模式匹配的更优空间索引，构建算法时间复杂度优化至O(mn)，提出适用于无间隙场景及通用序列分割场景的框架扩展方案。
ai_content.conclusion: 改进后的EFG框架在空间效率、构建速度及功能扩展性上均有提升，为泛基因组分析提供了更高效的图索引解决方案。

search_text: Elastic Founder Graphs Improved and Enhanced Elastic Founder Graphs 得到改进和增强 Indexing labeled graphs for pattern matching is a central challenge of pangenomics. Equi et al. (Algorithmica, 2022) developed the Elastic Founder Graph ($\mathsf{EFG}$) representing an alignment of $m$ sequences of length $n$, drawn from alphabet $Σ$ plus the special gap character: the paths spell the original sequences or their recombination. By enforcing the semi-repeat-free property, the $\mathsf{EFG}$ admits a polynomial-space index for linear-time pattern matching, breaking through the conditional lower bounds on indexing labeled graphs (Equi et al., SOFSEM 2021). In this work we improve the space of the $\mathsf{EFG}$ index answering pattern matching queries in linear time, from linear in the length of all strings spelled by three consecutive node labels, to linear in the size of the edge labels. Then, we develop linear-time construction algorithms optimizing for different metrics: we improve the existing linearithmic construction algorithms to $O(mn)$, by solving the novel exclusive ancestor set problem on trees; we propose, for the simplified gapless setting, an $O(mn)$-time solution minimizing the maximum block height, that we generalize by substituting block height with prefix-aware height. Finally, to show the versatility of the framework, we develop a BWT-based $\mathsf{EFG}$ index and study how to encode and perform document listing queries on a set of paths of the graphs, reporting which paths present a given pattern as a substring. We propose the $\mathsf{EFG}$ framework as an improved and enhanced version of the framework for the gapless setting, along with construction methods that are valid in any setting concerned with the segmentation of aligned sequences. 索引标记图以进行模式匹配是泛基因组学的核心挑战。等人。 （Algorithmica，2022）开发了弹性创始人图（$\mathsf{EFG}$），表示长度为 $n$ 的 $m$ 序列的对齐，从字母表 $Σ$ 加上特殊的间隙字符绘制：路径拼写原始序列或其重组。通过强制执行半无重复属性，$\mathsf{EFG}$ 允许使用多项式空间索引进行线性时间模式匹配，突破了索引标记图的条件下限（Equi et al., SOFSEM 2021）。在这项工作中，我们改进了在线性时间内回答模式匹配查询的 $\mathsf{EFG}$ 索引的空间，从三个连续节点标签拼写的所有字符串的长度呈线性，到边缘标签的大小呈线性。然后，我们开发针对不同指标进行优化的线性时间构造算法：通过解决树上新颖的排他祖先集问题，将现有的线性算术构造算法改进为$O(mn)$；对于简化的无间隙设置，我们提出了一种最小化最大块高度的 $O(mn)$ 时间解决方案，我们通过用前缀感知高度替换块高度来概括该解决方案。最后，为了展示该框架的多功能性，我们开发了一个基于 BWT 的 $\mathsf{EFG}$ 索引，并研究如何在一组图的路径上编码和执行文档列表查询，报告哪些路径将给定模式呈现为子字符串。我们提出 $\mathsf{EFG}$ 框架作为无间隙设置框架的改进和增强版本，以及在任何与对齐序列分割有关的设置中有效的构造方法。 本文改进并增强弹性创始图（EFG）框架，优化其空间复杂度和构建算法，以提升泛基因组中标签图的模式匹配效率。 Nicola Rizzo,Massimo Equi,Tuukka Norri,Veli Mäkinen cs.DS

authors_text: Furkan Ozcelik,Rufin VanRullen
title: Natural scene reconstruction from fMRI signals using generative latent diffusion
title_zh: 使用生成潜在扩散从功能磁共振成像信号重建自然场景
abstract: In neural decoding research, one of the most intriguing topics is the reconstruction of perceived natural images based on fMRI signals. Previous studies have succeeded in re-creating different aspects of the visuals, such as low-level properties (shape, texture, layout) or high-level features (category of objects, descriptive semantics of scenes) but have typically failed to reconstruct these properties together for complex scene images. Generative AI has recently made a leap forward with latent diffusion models capable of generating high-complexity images. Here, we investigate how to take advantage of this innovative technology for brain decoding. We present a two-stage scene reconstruction framework called ``Brain-Diffuser''. In the first stage, starting from fMRI signals, we reconstruct images that capture low-level properties and overall layout using a VDVAE (Very Deep Variational Autoencoder) model. In the second stage, we use the image-to-image framework of a latent diffusion model (Versatile Diffusion) conditioned on predicted multimodal (text and visual) features, to generate final reconstructed images. On the publicly available Natural Scenes Dataset benchmark, our method outperforms previous models both qualitatively and quantitatively. When applied to synthetic fMRI patterns generated from individual ROI (region-of-interest) masks, our trained model creates compelling ``ROI-optimal'' scenes consistent with neuroscientific knowledge. Thus, the proposed methodology can have an impact on both applied (e.g. brain-computer interface) and fundamental neuroscience.
summary: In neural decoding research, one of the most intriguing topics is the reconstruction of perceived natural images based on fMRI signals. Previous studies have succeeded in re-creating different aspects of the visuals, such as low-level properties (shape, texture, layout) or high-level features (category of objects, descriptive semantics of scenes) but have typically failed to reconstruct these properties together for complex scene images. Generative AI has recently made a leap forward with latent diffusion models capable of generating high-complexity images. Here, we investigate how to take advantage of this innovative technology for brain decoding. We present a two-stage scene reconstruction framework called ``Brain-Diffuser''. In the first stage, starting from fMRI signals, we reconstruct images that capture low-level properties and overall layout using a VDVAE (Very Deep Variational Autoencoder) model. In the second stage, we use the image-to-image framework of a latent diffusion model (Versatile Diffusion) conditioned on predicted multimodal (text and visual) features, to generate final reconstructed images. On the publicly available Natural Scenes Dataset benchmark, our method outperforms previous models both qualitatively and quantitatively. When applied to synthetic fMRI patterns generated from individual ROI (region-of-interest) masks, our trained model creates compelling ``ROI-optimal'' scenes consistent with neuroscientific knowledge. Thus, the proposed methodology can have an impact on both applied (e.g. brain-computer interface) and fundamental neuroscience.
abstract_zh: 在神经解码研究中，最有趣的主题之一是基于功能磁共振成像信号重建感知的自然图像。以前的研究已经成功地重新创建了视觉效果的不同方面，例如低级属性（形状、纹理、布局）或高级特征（对象类别、场景的描述性语义），但通常无法为复杂的场景图像重建这些属性。生成式人工智能最近取得了飞跃，潜在扩散模型能够生成高复杂性图像。在这里，我们研究如何利用这种创新技术进行大脑解码。我们提出了一个称为“Brain-Diffuser”的两阶段场景重建框架。在第一阶段，从 fMRI 信号开始，我们使用 VDVAE（超深变分自动编码器）模型重建捕获低级属性和整体布局的图像。在第二阶段，我们使用以预测的多模态（文本和视觉）特征为条件的潜在扩散模型（Versatile Diffusion）的图像到图像框架，来生成最终的重建图像。在公开的自然场景数据集基准上，我们的方法在质量和数量上都优于以前的模型。当应用于从单个 ROI（感兴趣区域）掩模生成的合成 fMRI 模式时，我们经过训练的模型会创建与神经科学知识一致的引人注目的“ROI 最佳”场景。因此，所提出的方法可以对应用（例如脑机接口）和基础神经科学产生影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成式潜扩散模型的两阶段框架Brain-Diffuser，用于从fMRI信号中重建自然场景图像。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅能单独重建自然场景的低级属性或高级语义特征，难以同时整合复杂场景信息。
AI.method: 第一阶段使用VDVAE模型从fMRI信号重建低级属性和整体布局；第二阶段通过条件潜扩散模型（Versatile Diffusion）融合预测的多模态特征生成最终图像。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和合成fMRI模式测试中，该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有模型，生成的ROI优化场景符合神经科学认知。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为脑机接口等应用及基础神经科学研究提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Mithun Goutham,Stephanie Stockar
title: A Convex Hull Cheapest Insertion Heuristic for Precedence Constrained Traveling Salesperson Problems or Sequential Ordering Problems
title_zh: 针对优先级受限的旅行推销员问题或顺序排序问题的凸包最便宜插入启发式
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2302.06582
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2302.06582
abstract: The convex hull cheapest insertion heuristic is a well-known method that efficiently generates good solutions to the Traveling Salesperson Problem. However, this heuristic has not been adapted to account for precedence constraints that restrict the order in which locations can be visited. Such constraints result in the precedence constrained traveling salesperson problem or the sequential ordering problem, which are commonly encountered in applications where items have to be picked up before they are delivered. In this paper, we present an adapted version of this heuristic that accounts for precedence constraints in the problem definition. This algorithm is compared with the widely used Nearest Neighbor heuristic on the TSPLIB benchmark data with added precedence constraints. It is seen that the proposed algorithm is particularly well suited to cases where delivery nodes are centrally positioned, with pickup nodes located in the periphery, outperforming the Nearest Neighbor algorithm in 97\% of the examined instances.
summary: The convex hull cheapest insertion heuristic is a well-known method that efficiently generates good solutions to the Traveling Salesperson Problem. However, this heuristic has not been adapted to account for precedence constraints that restrict the order in which locations can be visited. Such constraints result in the precedence constrained traveling salesperson problem or the sequential ordering problem, which are commonly encountered in applications where items have to be picked up before they are delivered. In this paper, we present an adapted version of this heuristic that accounts for precedence constraints in the problem definition. This algorithm is compared with the widely used Nearest Neighbor heuristic on the TSPLIB benchmark data with added precedence constraints. It is seen that the proposed algorithm is particularly well suited to cases where delivery nodes are centrally positioned, with pickup nodes located in the periphery, outperforming the Nearest Neighbor algorithm in 97\% of the examined instances.
abstract_zh: 凸包最便宜的插入启发式是一种众所周知的方法，可以有效地生成旅行商问题的良好解决方案。然而，这种启发式方法尚未适应限制可以访问位置的顺序的优先约束。这种约束会导致优先级受限的旅行推销员问题或顺序排序问题，这些问题在必须在交付物品之前必须先取货的应用程序中经常遇到。在本文中，我们提出了这种启发式的改编版本，它考虑了问题定义中的优先约束。将该算法与 TSPLIB 基准数据上广泛使用的最近邻启发式算法进行比较，并添加了优先级约束。可以看出，所提出的算法特别适合配送节点位于中心、取货节点位于外围的情况，在 97% 的检查实例中优于最近邻算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的凸包最便宜插入启发式算法，用于解决具有优先级约束的旅行商问题或顺序排序问题。
AI.motivation: 传统的凸包最便宜插入启发式算法无法处理优先级约束，而这类约束在实际应用中非常常见，例如需要先取货再送货的场景。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种适应优先级约束的凸包最便宜插入启发式算法，并将其与常用的最近邻启发式算法进行比较。
AI.result: 在TSPLIB基准数据上，改进后的算法在97%的测试实例中表现优于最近邻算法，特别是在送货节点位于中心、取货节点位于外围的情况下。
AI.conclusion: 改进的凸包最便宜插入启发式算法能有效处理优先级约束，适用于需要顺序操作的实际问题。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 改进的凸包最便宜插入启发式算法能有效处理优先级约束，适用于需要顺序操作的实际问题。

tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的凸包最便宜插入启发式算法，用于解决具有优先级约束的旅行商问题或顺序排序问题。
motivation: 传统的凸包最便宜插入启发式算法无法处理优先级约束，而这类约束在实际应用中非常常见，例如需要先取货再送货的场景。
method: 本文提出了一种适应优先级约束的凸包最便宜插入启发式算法，并将其与常用的最近邻启发式算法进行比较。
result: 在TSPLIB基准数据上，改进后的算法在97%的测试实例中表现优于最近邻算法，特别是在送货节点位于中心、取货节点位于外围的情况下。
conclusion: 改进的凸包最便宜插入启发式算法能有效处理优先级约束，适用于需要顺序操作的实际问题。
search_text: A Convex Hull Cheapest Insertion Heuristic for Precedence Constrained Traveling Salesperson Problems or Sequential Ordering Problems 针对优先级受限的旅行推销员问题或顺序排序问题的凸包最便宜插入启发式 The convex hull cheapest insertion heuristic is a well-known method that efficiently generates good solutions to the Traveling Salesperson Problem. However, this heuristic has not been adapted to account for precedence constraints that restrict the order in which locations can be visited. Such constraints result in the precedence constrained traveling salesperson problem or the sequential ordering problem, which are commonly encountered in applications where items have to be picked up before they are delivered. In this paper, we present an adapted version of this heuristic that accounts for precedence constraints in the problem definition. This algorithm is compared with the widely used Nearest Neighbor heuristic on the TSPLIB benchmark data with added precedence constraints. It is seen that the proposed algorithm is particularly well suited to cases where delivery nodes are centrally positioned, with pickup nodes located in the periphery, outperforming the Nearest Neighbor algorithm in 97\% of the examined instances. 凸包最便宜的插入启发式是一种众所周知的方法，可以有效地生成旅行商问题的良好解决方案。然而，这种启发式方法尚未适应限制可以访问位置的顺序的优先约束。这种约束会导致优先级受限的旅行推销员问题或顺序排序问题，这些问题在必须在交付物品之前必须先取货的应用程序中经常遇到。在本文中，我们提出了这种启发式的改编版本，它考虑了问题定义中的优先约束。将该算法与 TSPLIB 基准数据上广泛使用的最近邻启发式算法进行比较，并添加了优先级约束。可以看出，所提出的算法特别适合配送节点位于中心、取货节点位于外围的情况，在 97% 的检查实例中优于最近邻算法。 本文提出了一种改进的凸包最便宜插入启发式算法，用于解决具有优先级约束的旅行商问题或顺序排序问题。 Mithun Goutham,Stephanie Stockar cs.RO,eess.SY,math.OC

authors_text: Yuli Zou,Weijian Deng,Liang Zheng
title: Adaptive Calibrator Ensemble for Model Calibration under Distribution Shift
title_zh: 用于分布偏移下模型校准的自适应校准器集成
abstract: Model calibration usually requires optimizing some parameters (e.g., temperature) w.r.t an objective function (e.g., negative log-likelihood). In this paper, we report a plain, important but often neglected fact that the objective function is influenced by calibration set difficulty, i.e., the ratio of the number of incorrectly classified samples to that of correctly classified samples. If a test set has a drastically different difficulty level from the calibration set, the optimal calibration parameters of the two datasets would be different. In other words, a calibrator optimal on the calibration set would be suboptimal on the OOD test set and thus has degraded performance. With this knowledge, we propose a simple and effective method named adaptive calibrator ensemble (ACE) to calibrate OOD datasets whose difficulty is usually higher than the calibration set. Specifically, two calibration functions are trained, one for in-distribution data (low difficulty), and the other for severely OOD data (high difficulty). To achieve desirable calibration on a new OOD dataset, ACE uses an adaptive weighting method that strikes a balance between the two extreme functions. When plugged in, ACE generally improves the performance of a few state-of-the-art calibration schemes on a series of OOD benchmarks. Importantly, such improvement does not come at the cost of the in-distribution calibration accuracy.
summary: Model calibration usually requires optimizing some parameters (e.g., temperature) w.r.t an objective function (e.g., negative log-likelihood). In this paper, we report a plain, important but often neglected fact that the objective function is influenced by calibration set difficulty, i.e., the ratio of the number of incorrectly classified samples to that of correctly classified samples. If a test set has a drastically different difficulty level from the calibration set, the optimal calibration parameters of the two datasets would be different. In other words, a calibrator optimal on the calibration set would be suboptimal on the OOD test set and thus has degraded performance. With this knowledge, we propose a simple and effective method named adaptive calibrator ensemble (ACE) to calibrate OOD datasets whose difficulty is usually higher than the calibration set. Specifically, two calibration functions are trained, one for in-distribution data (low difficulty), and the other for severely OOD data (high difficulty). To achieve desirable calibration on a new OOD dataset, ACE uses an adaptive weighting method that strikes a balance between the two extreme functions. When plugged in, ACE generally improves the performance of a few state-of-the-art calibration schemes on a series of OOD benchmarks. Importantly, such improvement does not come at the cost of the in-distribution calibration accuracy.
abstract_zh: 模型校准通常需要优化一些参数（例如温度）与目标函数（例如负对数似然）。在本文中，我们报告了一个简单、重要但经常被忽视的事实，即目标函数受到校准集难度的影响，即错误分类样本数与正确分类样本数的比率。如果测试集与校准集的难度级别截然不同，则两个数据集的最佳校准参数将不同。换句话说，在校准集上最佳的校准器在 OOD 测试集上可能不是最佳的，因此性能会下降。有了这些知识，我们提出了一种简单有效的方法，称为自适应校准器集成（ACE）来校准 OOD 数据集，其难度通常高于校准集。具体来说，训练了两个校准函数，一个用于分布内数据（低难度），另一个用于严重 OOD 数据（高难度）。为了在新的 OOD 数据集上实现理想的校准，ACE 使用自适应加权方法在两个极端函数之间取得平衡。插入后，ACE 通常会提高一些最先进的校准方案在一系列 OOD 基准测试中的性能。重要的是，这种改进并不以牺牲分布校准精度为代价。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自适应校准器集成方法（ACE），以在分布偏移情况下提升模型校准效果，特别是在难度较高的OOD数据集上。
AI.motivation: 传统校准方法假设校准集和测试集难度一致，但实际中OOD测试集难度可能更高，导致校准效果下降，需解决此问题。
AI.method: 训练两个校准函数（低难度in-distribution和高难度OOD），并通过自适应加权方法结合两者，以适应新OOD数据集的难度。
AI.result: 在多个OOD基准测试中提升校准性能，且不损害in-distribution校准准确率。
AI.conclusion: ACE通过考虑数据难度差异，有效提升模型在分布偏移情况下的校准效果，为模型校准提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Wenting Tan,Xiao Shi1,Cunchi Lv,Xiaofang Zhao
title: Cloudless-Training: A Framework to Improve Efficiency of Geo-Distributed ML Training
title_zh: 无云训练：提高地理分布式机器学习训练效率的框架
abstract: Geo-distributed ML training can benefit many emerging ML scenarios (e.g., large model training, federated learning) with multi-regional cloud resources and wide area network. However, its efficiency is limited due to 2 challenges. First, efficient elastic scheduling of multi-regional cloud resources is usually missing, affecting resource utilization and performance of training. Second, training communication on WAN is still the main overhead, easily subjected to low bandwidth and high fluctuations of WAN. In this paper, we propose a framework, Cloudless-Training, to realize efficient PS-based geo-distributed ML training in 3 aspects. First, it uses a two-layer architecture with control and physical training planes to support elastic scheduling and communication for multi-regional clouds in a serverless maner.Second, it provides an elastic scheduling strategy that can deploy training workflows adaptively according to the heterogeneity of available cloud resources and distribution of pre-existing training datasets. Third, it provides 2 new synchronization strategies for training partitions among clouds, including asynchronous SGD with gradient accumulation (ASGD-GA) and inter-PS model averaging (MA). It is implemented with OpenFaaS and evaluated on Tencent Cloud. Experiments show that Cloudless-Training can support general ML training in a geo-distributed way, greatly improve resource utilization (e.g., 9.2%-24.0% training cost reduction) and synchronization efficiency (e.g., 1.7x training speedup over baseline at most) with model correctness guarantees.
summary: Geo-distributed ML training can benefit many emerging ML scenarios (e.g., large model training, federated learning) with multi-regional cloud resources and wide area network. However, its efficiency is limited due to 2 challenges. First, efficient elastic scheduling of multi-regional cloud resources is usually missing, affecting resource utilization and performance of training. Second, training communication on WAN is still the main overhead, easily subjected to low bandwidth and high fluctuations of WAN. In this paper, we propose a framework, Cloudless-Training, to realize efficient PS-based geo-distributed ML training in 3 aspects. First, it uses a two-layer architecture with control and physical training planes to support elastic scheduling and communication for multi-regional clouds in a serverless maner.Second, it provides an elastic scheduling strategy that can deploy training workflows adaptively according to the heterogeneity of available cloud resources and distribution of pre-existing training datasets. Third, it provides 2 new synchronization strategies for training partitions among clouds, including asynchronous SGD with gradient accumulation (ASGD-GA) and inter-PS model averaging (MA). It is implemented with OpenFaaS and evaluated on Tencent Cloud. Experiments show that Cloudless-Training can support general ML training in a geo-distributed way, greatly improve resource utilization (e.g., 9.2%-24.0% training cost reduction) and synchronization efficiency (e.g., 1.7x training speedup over baseline at most) with model correctness guarantees.
abstract_zh: 地理分布式机器学习训练可以利用多区域云资源和广域网使许多新兴机器学习场景（例如大型模型训练、联邦学习）受益。然而，由于两个挑战，其效率受到限制。首先，多区域云资源缺乏高效的弹性调度，影响资源利用率和训练性能。其次，广域网上的训练通信仍然是主要开销，容易受到广域网低带宽和高波动的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一个框架 Cloudless-Training，从 3 个方面实现基于 PS 的高效地理分布式 ML 训练。首先，它采用具有控制平面和物理训练平面的双层架构，以无服务器方式支持多区域云的弹性调度和通信。其次，它提供了一种弹性调度策略，可以根据可用云资源的异构性和预先存在的训练数据集的分布自适应地部署训练工作流。第三，它为云间训练分区提供了两种新的同步策略，包括带有梯度累积的异步SGD（ASGD-GA）和PS间模型平均（MA）。使用OpenFaaS实现并在腾讯云上进行评估。实验表明，Cloudless-Training 可以以地​​理分布式方式支持通用的 ML 训练，在保证模型正确性的情况下，极大地提高资源利用率（例如，训练成本降低 9.2%-24.0%）和同步效率（例如，最多比基线提高 1.7 倍的训练速度）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Cloudless-Training框架，通过优化资源调度和通信策略提升地理分布式机器学习训练的效率。
AI.motivation: 地理分布式机器学习训练面临多区域资源弹性调度缺失及广域网通信开销大的双重挑战，导致资源利用率低和训练效率受限。
AI.method: 设计双层架构（控制层与物理训练层）实现无服务器资源调度，提出异构资源自适应调度策略，并开发两种同步算法（ASGD-GA与MA）降低跨云训练的通信开销。
AI.result: 在腾讯云实验中，该框架使训练成本降低9.2%-24.0%，训练速度最高提升1.7倍，同时保证模型正确性。
AI.conclusion: Cloudless-Training通过架构创新和算法优化，有效解决了地理分布式训练的资源利用率与通信效率问题，为大规模模型训练提供可行方案。

Third, it provides 2 new synchronization strategies for training partitions among clouds, including asynchronous SGD with gradient accumulation (ASGD-GA) and inter-PS model averaging (MA). It is implemented with OpenFaaS and evaluated on Tencent Cloud. Experiments show that Cloudless-Training can support general ML training in a geo-distributed way, greatly improve resource utilization (e.g., 9.2%-24.0% training cost reduction) and synchronization efficiency (e.g., 1.7x training speedup over baseline at most) with model correctness guarantees. 地理分布式机器学习训练可以利用多区域云资源和广域网使许多新兴机器学习场景（例如大型模型训练、联邦学习）受益。然而，由于两个挑战，其效率受到限制。首先，多区域云资源缺乏高效的弹性调度，影响资源利用率和训练性能。其次，广域网上的训练通信仍然是主要开销，容易受到广域网低带宽和高波动的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一个框架 Cloudless-Training，从 3 个方面实现基于 PS 的高效地理分布式 ML 训练。首先，它采用具有控制平面和物理训练平面的双层架构，以无服务器方式支持多区域云的弹性调度和通信。其次，它提供了一种弹性调度策略，可以根据可用云资源的异构性和预先存在的训练数据集的分布自适应地部署训练工作流。第三，它为云间训练分区提供了两种新的同步策略，包括带有梯度累积的异步SGD（ASGD-GA）和PS间模型平均（MA）。使用OpenFaaS实现并在腾讯云上进行评估。实验表明，Cloudless-Training 可以以地​​理分布式方式支持通用的 ML 训练，在保证模型正确性的情况下，极大地提高资源利用率（例如，训练成本降低 9.2%-24.0%）和同步效率（例如，最多比基线提高 1.7 倍的训练速度）。 本文提出Cloudless-Training框架，通过优化资源调度和通信策略提升地理分布式机器学习训练的效率。 Wenting Tan,Xiao Shi1,Cunchi Lv,Xiaofang Zhao cs.DC,cs.AI

authors_text: Tao Chen,Ruirui Li,Jiafeng Fu,Daguang Jiang
title: Tucker Bilinear Attention Network for Multi-scale Remote Sensing Object Detection
title_zh: 用于多尺度遥感目标检测的塔克双线性注意力网络
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1705.06676, arXiv:2209.13351 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1705.06676, arXiv:2209.13351 by other authors
abstract: Object detection on VHR remote sensing images plays a vital role in applications such as urban planning, land resource management, and rescue missions. The large-scale variation of the remote-sensing targets is one of the main challenges in VHR remote-sensing object detection. Existing methods improve the detection accuracy of high-resolution remote sensing objects by improving the structure of feature pyramids and adopting different attention modules. However, for small targets, there still be seriously missed detections due to the loss of key detail features. There is still room for improvement in the way of multiscale feature fusion and balance. To address this issue, this paper proposes two novel modules: Guided Attention and Tucker Bilinear Attention, which are applied to the stages of early fusion and late fusion respectively. The former can effectively retain clean key detail features, and the latter can better balance features through semantic-level correlation mining. Based on two modules, we build a new multi-scale remote sensing object detection framework. No bells and whistles. The proposed method largely improves the average precisions of small objects and achieves the highest mean average precisions compared with 9 state-of-the-art methods on DOTA, DIOR, and NWPU VHR-10.Code and models are available at https://github.com/Shinichict/GTNet.
summary: Object detection on VHR remote sensing images plays a vital role in applications such as urban planning, land resource management, and rescue missions. The large-scale variation of the remote-sensing targets is one of the main challenges in VHR remote-sensing object detection. Existing methods improve the detection accuracy of high-resolution remote sensing objects by improving the structure of feature pyramids and adopting different attention modules. However, for small targets, there still be seriously missed detections due to the loss of key detail features. There is still room for improvement in the way of multiscale feature fusion and balance. To address this issue, this paper proposes two novel modules: Guided Attention and Tucker Bilinear Attention, which are applied to the stages of early fusion and late fusion respectively. The former can effectively retain clean key detail features, and the latter can better balance features through semantic-level correlation mining. Based on two modules, we build a new multi-scale remote sensing object detection framework. No bells and whistles. The proposed method largely improves the average precisions of small objects and achieves the highest mean average precisions compared with 9 state-of-the-art methods on DOTA, DIOR, and NWPU VHR-10.Code and models are available at https://github.com/Shinichict/GTNet.
abstract_zh: VHR 遥感图像的目标检测在城市规划、土地资源管理和救援任务等应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。遥感目标的大规模变化是VHR遥感目标检测的主要挑战之一。现有方法通过改进特征金字塔的结构和采用不同的注意力模块来提高高分辨率遥感物体的检测精度。然而，对于小目标，由于关键细节特征的丢失，仍然存在严重漏检的情况。多尺度特征融合和平衡的方式还有改进的空间。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了两个新颖的模块：Guided Attention和Tucker Bilinear Attention，分别应用于早期融合和后期融合阶段。前者可以有效保留干净的关键细节特征，后者可以通过语义级相关性挖掘更好地平衡特征。基于两个模块，我们构建了一个新的多尺度遥感目标检测框架。没有花哨的东西。与DOTA、DIOR和NWPU VHR-10上的9种最先进的方法相比，该方法极大地提高了小物体的平均精度，并实现了最高的平均平均精度。代码和模型可在https://github.com/Shinichict/GTNet获得。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Tucker双线性注意力网络的多尺度遥感目标检测框架，旨在解决高分辨率遥感图像中小目标检测精度不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多尺度特征融合和平衡方面存在不足，导致小目标关键细节特征丢失，检测效果不理想。
AI.method: 设计Guided Attention模块（早期融合阶段保留细节特征）和Tucker Bilinear Attention模块（晚期融合阶段挖掘语义关联平衡特征），构建无需额外组件的多尺度检测框架。
AI.result: 在DOTA、DIOR和NWPU VHR-10数据集上，小目标平均精度显著提升，相较9种先进方法取得最高均值平均精度（mAP）。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过双模块协同优化多尺度特征融合，有效提升遥感小目标检测性能，代码模型已开源。

authors_text: Idan Eldar,Nofar Carmeli,Benny Kimelfeld
title: Direct Access for Answers to Conjunctive Queries with Aggregation
title_zh: 通过聚合直接访问联合查询的答案
comment: ef:Logical Methods in Computer Science, Volume 22, Issue 2 (April 21, 2026) lmcs:14831
comments: ef:Logical Methods in Computer Science, Volume 22, Issue 2 (April 21, 2026) lmcs:14831
abstract: We study the fine-grained complexity of conjunctive queries with grouping and aggregation. For common aggregate functions (e.g., min, max, count, sum), such a query can be phrased as an ordinary conjunctive query over a database annotated with a suitable commutative semiring. We investigate the ability to evaluate such queries by constructing in loglinear time a data structure that provides logarithmic-time direct access to the answers ordered by a given lexicographic order. This task is nontrivial since the number of answers might be larger than loglinear in the size of the input, so the data structure needs to provide a compact representation of the space of answers. In the absence of aggregation and annotation, past research established a sufficient tractability condition on queries and orders. For queries without self-joins, this condition is not just sufficient, but also necessary (under conventional lower-bound assumptions in fine-grained complexity). We show that all past results continue to hold for annotated databases, assuming that the annotation itself does not participate in the lexicographic order. Yet, past algorithms do not apply to the count-distinct aggregation, which has no efficient representation as a commutative semiring; for this aggregation, we establish the corresponding tractability condition. We then show how the complexity of the problem changes when we include the aggregate and annotation value in the order. We also study the impact of having all relations but one annotated by the multiplicative identity (one), as happens when we translate aggregate queries into semiring annotations, and having a semiring with an idempotent addition, such as the case of min, max, and count-distinct over a logarithmic-size domain.
summary: We study the fine-grained complexity of conjunctive queries with grouping and aggregation. For common aggregate functions (e.g., min, max, count, sum), such a query can be phrased as an ordinary conjunctive query over a database annotated with a suitable commutative semiring. We investigate the ability to evaluate such queries by constructing in loglinear time a data structure that provides logarithmic-time direct access to the answers ordered by a given lexicographic order. This task is nontrivial since the number of answers might be larger than loglinear in the size of the input, so the data structure needs to provide a compact representation of the space of answers. In the absence of aggregation and annotation, past research established a sufficient tractability condition on queries and orders. For queries without self-joins, this condition is not just sufficient, but also necessary (under conventional lower-bound assumptions in fine-grained complexity). We show that all past results continue to hold for annotated databases, assuming that the annotation itself does not participate in the lexicographic order. Yet, past algorithms do not apply to the count-distinct aggregation, which has no efficient representation as a commutative semiring; for this aggregation, we establish the corresponding tractability condition. We then show how the complexity of the problem changes when we include the aggregate and annotation value in the order. We also study the impact of having all relations but one annotated by the multiplicative identity (one), as happens when we translate aggregate queries into semiring annotations, and having a semiring with an idempotent addition, such as the case of min, max, and count-distinct over a logarithmic-size domain.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具有分组和聚合的联合查询的细粒度复杂性。对于常见的聚合函数（例如，最小值、最大值、计数、总和），这样的查询可以表述为对用适当的可交换半环注释的数据库的普通联合查询。我们通过在对数线性时间构建一个数据结构来研究评估此类查询的能力，该数据结构提供对数时间直接访问按给定字典顺序排序的答案。这项任务并不简单，因为答案的数量可能大于输入大小的对数线性，因此数据结构需要提供答案空间的紧凑表示。在缺乏聚合和注释的情况下，过去的研究建立了查询和订单的充分可处理性条件。对于没有自连接的查询，这个条件不仅是充分的，而且是必要的（在细粒度复杂性的传统下限假设下）。我们表明，假设注释本身不参与字典顺序，则所有过去的结果继续适用于注释数据库。然而，过去的算法不适用于计数不同聚合，它没有有效的可交换半环表示；对于这种聚合，我们建立了相应的可处理性条件。然后，我们展示当我们在订单中包含聚合和注释值时，问题的复杂性如何变化。我们还研究了除了一个由乘法恒等式（一）注释的所有关系之外的所有关系的影响，就像当我们将聚合查询转换为半环注释时所发生的情况，以及具有具有幂等加法的半环时所发生的情况，例如在对数大小的域上的最小值、最大值和不同计数的情况。

AI.tldr: 研究带有分组和聚合的连接查询的细粒度复杂性，构建数据结构以实现对答案的快速直接访问。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理聚合查询时效率不足，尤其当答案数量庞大时，需更高效的索引和访问机制。
AI.method: 通过构建对数线性时间的数据结构，利用交换半环注释数据库，支持按字典序的对数时间访问。
AI.result: 确立了注释数据库的可处理性条件，扩展了原有结果；针对count-distinct聚合提出了独立的可处理性条件。
AI.conclusion: 注释数据库的复杂性与无注释情况类似，但count-distinct需特殊处理，且排序字段包含聚合值时复杂性显著变化。

We also study the impact of having all relations but one annotated by the multiplicative identity (one), as happens when we translate aggregate queries into semiring annotations, and having a semiring with an idempotent addition, such as the case of min, max, and count-distinct over a logarithmic-size domain. 我们研究具有分组和聚合的联合查询的细粒度复杂性。对于常见的聚合函数（例如，最小值、最大值、计数、总和），这样的查询可以表述为对用适当的可交换半环注释的数据库的普通联合查询。我们通过在对数线性时间构建一个数据结构来研究评估此类查询的能力，该数据结构提供对数时间直接访问按给定字典顺序排序的答案。这项任务并不简单，因为答案的数量可能大于输入大小的对数线性，因此数据结构需要提供答案空间的紧凑表示。在缺乏聚合和注释的情况下，过去的研究建立了查询和订单的充分可处理性条件。对于没有自连接的查询，这个条件不仅是充分的，而且是必要的（在细粒度复杂性的传统下限假设下）。我们表明，假设注释本身不参与字典顺序，则所有过去的结果继续适用于注释数据库。然而，过去的算法不适用于计数不同聚合，它没有有效的可交换半环表示；对于这种聚合，我们建立了相应的可处理性条件。然后，我们展示当我们在订单中包含聚合和注释值时，问题的复杂性如何变化。我们还研究了除了一个由乘法恒等式（一）注释的所有关系之外的所有关系的影响，就像当我们将聚合查询转换为半环注释时所发生的情况，以及具有具有幂等加法的半环时所发生的情况，例如在对数大小的域上的最小值、最大值和不同计数的情况。 研究带有分组和聚合的连接查询的细粒度复杂性，构建数据结构以实现对答案的快速直接访问。 Idan Eldar,Nofar Carmeli,Benny Kimelfeld cs.DB,cs.DS,cs.LO

authors_text: Md. Istiak Hossain Shihab,Md. Rakibul Hasan,Mahfuzur Rahman Emon,Syed Mobassir Hossen,Md. Nazmuddoha Ansary,Intesur Ahmed,Fazle Rabbi Rakib,Shahriar Elahi Dhruvo,Souhardya Saha Dip,Akib Hasan Pavel,Marsia Haque Meghla,Md. Rezwanul Haque,Sayma Sultana Chowdhury,Farig Sadeque,Tahsin Reasat,Ahmed Imtiaz Humayun,Asif Shahriyar Sushmit
title: BaDLAD: A Large Multi-Domain Bengali Document Layout Analysis Dataset
title_zh: BaDLAD：大型多域孟加拉语文档布局分析数据集
abstract: While strides have been made in deep learning based Bengali Optical Character Recognition (OCR) in the past decade, the absence of large Document Layout Analysis (DLA) datasets has hindered the application of OCR in document transcription, e.g., transcribing historical documents and newspapers. Moreover, rule-based DLA systems that are currently being employed in practice are not robust to domain variations and out-of-distribution layouts. To this end, we present the first multidomain large Bengali Document Layout Analysis Dataset: BaDLAD. This dataset contains 33,695 human annotated document samples from six domains - i) books and magazines, ii) public domain govt. documents, iii) liberation war documents, iv) newspapers, v) historical newspapers, and vi) property deeds, with 710K polygon annotations for four unit types: text-box, paragraph, image, and table. Through preliminary experiments benchmarking the performance of existing state-of-the-art deep learning architectures for English DLA, we demonstrate the efficacy of our dataset in training deep learning based Bengali document digitization models.
summary: While strides have been made in deep learning based Bengali Optical Character Recognition (OCR) in the past decade, the absence of large Document Layout Analysis (DLA) datasets has hindered the application of OCR in document transcription, e.g., transcribing historical documents and newspapers. Moreover, rule-based DLA systems that are currently being employed in practice are not robust to domain variations and out-of-distribution layouts. To this end, we present the first multidomain large Bengali Document Layout Analysis Dataset: BaDLAD. This dataset contains 33,695 human annotated document samples from six domains - i) books and magazines, ii) public domain govt. documents, iii) liberation war documents, iv) newspapers, v) historical newspapers, and vi) property deeds, with 710K polygon annotations for four unit types: text-box, paragraph, image, and table. Through preliminary experiments benchmarking the performance of existing state-of-the-art deep learning architectures for English DLA, we demonstrate the efficacy of our dataset in training deep learning based Bengali document digitization models.
abstract_zh: 虽然过去十年来基于深度学习的孟加拉光学字符识别 (OCR) 取得了长足的进步，但大型文档布局分析 (DLA) 数据集的缺乏阻碍了 OCR 在文档转录中的应用，例如转录历史文档和报纸。此外，目前在实践中使用的基于规则的 DLA 系统对于域变化和分布外布局并不鲁棒。为此，我们提出了第一个多域大型孟加拉语文档布局分析数据集：BaDLAD。该数据集包含来自六个领域的 33,695 个人工注释文档样本 - i) 书籍和杂志，ii) 公共领域政府。文件、iii) 解放战争文件、iv) 报纸、v) 历史报纸和 vi) 财产契约，具有四种单元类型的 710K 多边形注释：文本框、段落、图像和表格。通过初步实验对现有最先进的英语 DLA 深度学习架构的性能进行基准测试，我们展示了我们的数据集在训练基于深度学习的孟加拉语文档数字化模型方面的功效。

AI.tldr: 创建一个多领域的大规模孟加拉语文档布局分析数据集（BaDLAD），用于促进基于深度学习的孟加拉语文档数字化模型的研究与应用。
AI.motivation: 现有孟加拉语OCR在文档转录应用中受限于缺乏大型DLA数据集，且现有规则系统无法有效处理领域变化和分布外布局。
AI.method: 构建包含六个领域33,695个人工标注样本及71万边框标注的BaDLAD数据集，并通过英文DLA模型基准测试验证其有效性。
AI.result: 通过实验验证了BaDLAD在训练深度学习模型中的有效性，证明其可有效提升孟加拉语文档数字化性能。
AI.conclusion: BaDLAD填补了孟加拉语DLA数据集的空白，为后续研究提供重要资源，推动基于深度学习的文档处理技术发展。

authors_text: Yucheng Xu,Li Nanbo,Arushi Goel,Zijian Guo,Zonghai Yao,Hamidreza Kasaei,Mohammadreze Kasaei,Zhibin Li
title: Controllable Video Generation by Learning the Underlying Dynamical System with Neural ODE
title_zh: 通过神经常微分方程学习底层动力系统来生成可控视频
abstract: Videos depict the change of complex dynamical systems over time in the form of discrete image sequences. Generating controllable videos by learning the dynamical system is an important yet underexplored topic in the computer vision community. This paper presents a novel framework, TiV-ODE, to generate highly controllable videos from a static image and a text caption. Specifically, our framework leverages the ability of Neural Ordinary Differential Equations~(Neural ODEs) to represent complex dynamical systems as a set of nonlinear ordinary differential equations. The resulting framework is capable of generating videos with both desired dynamics and content. Experiments demonstrate the ability of the proposed method in generating highly controllable and visually consistent videos, and its capability of modeling dynamical systems. Overall, this work is a significant step towards developing advanced controllable video generation models that can handle complex and dynamic scenes.
summary: Videos depict the change of complex dynamical systems over time in the form of discrete image sequences. Generating controllable videos by learning the dynamical system is an important yet underexplored topic in the computer vision community. This paper presents a novel framework, TiV-ODE, to generate highly controllable videos from a static image and a text caption. Specifically, our framework leverages the ability of Neural Ordinary Differential Equations~(Neural ODEs) to represent complex dynamical systems as a set of nonlinear ordinary differential equations. The resulting framework is capable of generating videos with both desired dynamics and content. Experiments demonstrate the ability of the proposed method in generating highly controllable and visually consistent videos, and its capability of modeling dynamical systems. Overall, this work is a significant step towards developing advanced controllable video generation models that can handle complex and dynamic scenes.
abstract_zh: 视频以离散图像序列的形式描述了复杂动力系统随时间的变化。通过学习动力系统生成可控视频是计算机视觉社区中一个重要但尚未充分探索的主题。本文提出了一种新颖的框架 TiV-ODE，用于从静态图像和文本标题生成高度可控的视频。具体来说，我们的框架利用神经常微分方程（神经常微分方程）的能力将复杂的动力系统表示为一组非线性常微分方程。由此产生的框架能够生成具有所需动态和内容的视频。实验证明了该方法生成高度可控且视觉一致的视频的能力及其对动力系统建模的能力。总的来说，这项工作是开发可处理复杂和动态场景的先进可控视频生成模型的重要一步。

AI.tldr: 提出TiV-ODE框架，通过学习动力系统实现可控视频生成
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成可控视频方面存在不足，需探索更有效的方法
AI.method: 利用神经ODE将动力系统建模为非线性微分方程，结合静态图像和文本生成视频
AI.result: 实验表明方法能生成可控且视觉一致的视频，并有效建模动力系统
AI.conclusion: 为开发处理复杂动态场景的可控视频生成模型提供了重要进展

authors_text: Qi Chen,Ziyang Ma,Tao Liu,Xu Tan,Qu Lu,Xie Chen,Kai Yu
title: Improving Few-Shot Learning for Talking Face System with TTS Data Augmentation
title_zh: 利用 TTS 数据增强改进说话人脸系统的少样本学习
abstract: Audio-driven talking face has attracted broad interest from academia and industry recently. However, data acquisition and labeling in audio-driven talking face are labor-intensive and costly. The lack of data resource results in poor synthesis effect. To alleviate this issue, we propose to use TTS (Text-To-Speech) for data augmentation to improve few-shot ability of the talking face system. The misalignment problem brought by the TTS audio is solved with the introduction of soft-DTW, which is first adopted in the talking face task. Moreover, features extracted by HuBERT are explored to utilize underlying information of audio, and found to be superior over other features. The proposed method achieves 17%, 14%, 38% dominance on MSE score, DTW score and user study preference repectively over the baseline model, which shows the effectiveness of improving few-shot learning for talking face system with TTS augmentation.
summary: Audio-driven talking face has attracted broad interest from academia and industry recently. However, data acquisition and labeling in audio-driven talking face are labor-intensive and costly. The lack of data resource results in poor synthesis effect. To alleviate this issue, we propose to use TTS (Text-To-Speech) for data augmentation to improve few-shot ability of the talking face system. The misalignment problem brought by the TTS audio is solved with the introduction of soft-DTW, which is first adopted in the talking face task. Moreover, features extracted by HuBERT are explored to utilize underlying information of audio, and found to be superior over other features. The proposed method achieves 17%, 14%, 38% dominance on MSE score, DTW score and user study preference repectively over the baseline model, which shows the effectiveness of improving few-shot learning for talking face system with TTS augmentation.
abstract_zh: 音频驱动的人脸识别最近引起了学术界和工业界的广泛兴趣。然而，音频驱动的说话面孔中的数据采集和标记是劳动密集型且成本高昂的。数据资源缺乏导致合成效果不佳。为了缓解这个问题，我们建议使用 TTS（文本到语音）进行数据增强，以提高说话人脸系统的小镜头能力。通过引入soft-DTW解决了TTS音频带来的错位问题，该技术首次在说话人脸任务中采用。此外，HuBERT 提取的特征被探索以利用音频的底层信息，并发现其优于其他特征。所提出的方法在 MSE 分数、DTW 分数和用户研究偏好方面分别比基线模型取得了 17%、14%、38% 的优势，这表明了通过 TTS 增强改进说话人脸系统的少镜头学习的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用TTS数据增强技术改进说话人面部系统的少样本学习能力，通过解决TTS音频对齐问题和引入HuBERT特征提升合成效果。
AI.motivation: 音频驱动的说话人面部合成面临数据获取成本高、标注困难的问题，导致模型在少样本场景下合成效果不佳，亟需有效数据增强方案。
AI.method: 采用TTS生成合成数据进行扩充，引入soft-DTW解决音频-面部动作对齐问题，并利用HuBERT提取的音频深层特征替代传统特征进行建模。
AI.result: 在MSE指标上提升17%，DTW指标提升14%，用户偏好测试中获得38%的优越性，显著优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: TTS数据增强结合soft-DTW对齐优化与HuBERT特征提取，能有效提升说话人面部系统在少样本场景下的生成质量与鲁棒性。

search_text: Improving Few-Shot Learning for Talking Face System with TTS Data Augmentation 利用 TTS 数据增强改进说话人脸系统的少样本学习 Audio-driven talking face has attracted broad interest from academia and industry recently. However, data acquisition and labeling in audio-driven talking face are labor-intensive and costly. The lack of data resource results in poor synthesis effect. To alleviate this issue, we propose to use TTS (Text-To-Speech) for data augmentation to improve few-shot ability of the talking face system. The misalignment problem brought by the TTS audio is solved with the introduction of soft-DTW, which is first adopted in the talking face task. Moreover, features extracted by HuBERT are explored to utilize underlying information of audio, and found to be superior over other features. The proposed method achieves 17%, 14%, 38% dominance on MSE score, DTW score and user study preference repectively over the baseline model, which shows the effectiveness of improving few-shot learning for talking face system with TTS augmentation. 音频驱动的人脸识别最近引起了学术界和工业界的广泛兴趣。然而，音频驱动的说话面孔中的数据采集和标记是劳动密集型且成本高昂的。数据资源缺乏导致合成效果不佳。为了缓解这个问题，我们建议使用 TTS（文本到语音）进行数据增强，以提高说话人脸系统的小镜头能力。通过引入soft-DTW解决了TTS音频带来的错位问题，该技术首次在说话人脸任务中采用。此外，HuBERT 提取的特征被探索以利用音频的底层信息，并发现其优于其他特征。所提出的方法在 MSE 分数、DTW 分数和用户研究偏好方面分别比基线模型取得了 17%、14%、38% 的优势，这表明了通过 TTS 增强改进说话人脸系统的少镜头学习的有效性。 本文提出利用TTS数据增强技术改进说话人面部系统的少样本学习能力，通过解决TTS音频对齐问题和引入HuBERT特征提升合成效果。 Qi Chen,Ziyang Ma,Tao Liu,Xu Tan,Qu Lu,Xie Chen,Kai Yu cs.SD,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Tiago Roxo,Joana C. Costa,Pedro R. M. Inácio,Hugo Proença
title: WASD: A Wilder Active Speaker Detection Dataset
title_zh: WASD：Wilder 有源说话人检测数据集
abstract: Current Active Speaker Detection (ASD) models achieve great results on AVA-ActiveSpeaker (AVA), using only sound and facial features. Although this approach is applicable in movie setups (AVA), it is not suited for less constrained conditions. To demonstrate this limitation, we propose a Wilder Active Speaker Detection (WASD) dataset, with increased difficulty by targeting the two key components of current ASD: audio and face. Grouped into 5 categories, ranging from optimal conditions to surveillance settings, WASD contains incremental challenges for ASD with tactical impairment of audio and face data. We select state-of-the-art models and assess their performance in two groups of WASD: Easy (cooperative settings) and Hard (audio and/or face are specifically degraded). The results show that: 1) AVA trained models maintain a state-of-the-art performance in WASD Easy group, while underperforming in the Hard one, showing the 2) similarity between AVA and Easy data; and 3) training in WASD does not improve models performance to AVA levels, particularly for audio impairment and surveillance settings. This shows that AVA does not prepare models for wild ASD and current approaches are subpar to deal with such conditions. The proposed dataset also contains body data annotations to provide a new source for ASD, and is available at https://github.com/Tiago-Roxo/WASD.
summary: Current Active Speaker Detection (ASD) models achieve great results on AVA-ActiveSpeaker (AVA), using only sound and facial features. Although this approach is applicable in movie setups (AVA), it is not suited for less constrained conditions. To demonstrate this limitation, we propose a Wilder Active Speaker Detection (WASD) dataset, with increased difficulty by targeting the two key components of current ASD: audio and face. Grouped into 5 categories, ranging from optimal conditions to surveillance settings, WASD contains incremental challenges for ASD with tactical impairment of audio and face data. We select state-of-the-art models and assess their performance in two groups of WASD: Easy (cooperative settings) and Hard (audio and/or face are specifically degraded). The results show that: 1) AVA trained models maintain a state-of-the-art performance in WASD Easy group, while underperforming in the Hard one, showing the 2) similarity between AVA and Easy data; and 3) training in WASD does not improve models performance to AVA levels, particularly for audio impairment and surveillance settings. This shows that AVA does not prepare models for wild ASD and current approaches are subpar to deal with such conditions. The proposed dataset also contains body data annotations to provide a new source for ASD, and is available at https://github.com/Tiago-Roxo/WASD.
abstract_zh: 当前的主动说话人检测 (ASD) 模型仅使用声音和面部特征，在 AVA-ActiveSpeaker (AVA) 上取得了很好的效果。尽管此方法适用于电影设置 (AVA)，但它不适合约束较少的条件。为了证明这一局限性，我们提出了一个 Wilder 主动说话者检测 (WASD) 数据集，通过针对当前 ASD 的两个关键组成部分：音频和面部，增加了难度。 WASD 分为 5 类，从最佳条件到监视设置，包含对 ASD 的增量挑战，包括音频和面部数据的战术损伤。我们选择最先进的模型，并在两组 WASD 中评估它们的性能：简单（合作设置）和困难（音频和/或面部被特别降级）。结果表明：1) AVA 训练的模型在 WASD Easy 组中保持了最先进的性能，而在 Hard 组中表现不佳，这表明 2) AVA 和 Easy 数据之间的相似性； 3) WASD 训练不会将模型性能提高到 AVA 水平，特别是对于音频损伤和监视设置。这表明 AVA 没有为野生自闭症谱系障碍准备模型，并且当前的方法不足以应对此类情况。拟议的数据集还包含身体数据注释，为 ASD 提供新的来源，可在 https://github.com/Tiago-Roxo/WASD 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为WASD的更具挑战性的主动说话者检测数据集，用于评估现有模型在真实复杂环境下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ASD模型在受控数据集（如AVA）表现优异，但在真实场景中因音频和面部信息受损而失效，需构建更具挑战性的数据集验证模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建包含5类场景的WASD数据集，通过逐步降级音频和面部信息模拟真实环境，并引入身体数据标注；在Easy（合作场景）和Hard（音频/面部退化）组评估SOTA模型性能。
AI.result: AVA训练模型在Easy组表现优异但Hard组显著下降，表明其与真实场景差异大；WASD训练未提升至AVA水平，尤其在音频退化和监控场景中表现不足。
AI.conclusion: AVA数据集无法训练出适应真实场景的ASD模型，当前方法在复杂条件下性能不足，WASD为研究提供了新基准和身体数据资源。

authors_text: Lisai Zhang,Qingcai Chen,Zhijian Chen,Yunpeng Han,Zhonghua Li,Zhao Cao
title: Refined Vision-Language Modeling for Fine-grained Multi-modal Pre-training
title_zh: 用于细粒度多模态预训练的精细视觉语言建模
abstract: Fine-grained supervision based on object annotations has been widely used for vision and language pre-training (VLP). However, in real-world application scenarios, aligned multi-modal data is usually in the image-caption format, which only provides coarse-grained supervision. It is not only cost-expensive but also compute-expensive to collect object annotations and build object annotation pre-extractor for different scenarios. In this paper, we propose a fine-grained VLP scheme without object annotations from the linguistic perspective. First, we propose a homonym sentence rewriting (HSR) algorithm to provide token-level supervision. The algorithm replaces a verb/noun/adjective/quantifier word of the caption with its homonyms from WordNet. Correspondingly, we propose refined vision-language modeling (RVLM) framework to exploit the token-level supervision. Three refined tasks, i.e., refined image-text contrastive (RITC), refined image-text matching (RITM), and replace language modeling (RLM) are proposed to learn the fine-grained alignment. Extensive experiments on several downstream tasks demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed method.
summary: Fine-grained supervision based on object annotations has been widely used for vision and language pre-training (VLP). However, in real-world application scenarios, aligned multi-modal data is usually in the image-caption format, which only provides coarse-grained supervision. It is not only cost-expensive but also compute-expensive to collect object annotations and build object annotation pre-extractor for different scenarios. In this paper, we propose a fine-grained VLP scheme without object annotations from the linguistic perspective. First, we propose a homonym sentence rewriting (HSR) algorithm to provide token-level supervision. The algorithm replaces a verb/noun/adjective/quantifier word of the caption with its homonyms from WordNet. Correspondingly, we propose refined vision-language modeling (RVLM) framework to exploit the token-level supervision. Three refined tasks, i.e., refined image-text contrastive (RITC), refined image-text matching (RITM), and replace language modeling (RLM) are proposed to learn the fine-grained alignment. Extensive experiments on several downstream tasks demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 基于对象注释的细粒度监督已广泛用于视觉和语言预训练（VLP）。然而，在现实应用场景中，对齐的多模态数据通常采用图像标题格式，仅提供粗粒度的监督。收集对象注释并针对不同场景构建对象注释预提取器不仅成本昂贵，而且计算成本高昂。在本文中，我们从语言角度提出了一种没有对象注释的细粒度 VLP 方案。首先，我们提出了同音词句子重写（HSR）算法来提供令牌级别的监督。该算法将标题中的动词/名词/形容词/量词替换为 WordNet 中的同音异义词。相应地，我们提出了改进的视觉语言建模（RVLM）框架来利用令牌级监督。提出了三个细化任务，即细化图像文本对比（RITC）、细化图像文本匹配（RITM）和替换语言建模（RLM）来学习细粒度对齐。对几个下游任务的广泛实验证明了所提出方法的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需对象标注的细粒度多模态预训练方法，通过语言学视角实现视觉-语言模型的精细化对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有基于对象标注的细粒度监督方法成本高且计算开销大，而实际应用中多模态数据多为粗粒度的图像-标题对，缺乏细粒度对齐能力。
AI.method: 提出同音词句重写算法（HSR）生成词级监督信号，并构建精炼视觉-语言建模框架（RVLM），包含三个细化任务：精炼图像-文本对比（RITC）、精炼图像-文本匹配（RITM）和替换语言建模（RLM）。
AI.result: 在多个下游任务的实验中，该方法展现出优于现有方法的性能，验证了细粒度对齐的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过语言学手段实现无需对象标注的细粒度预训练，为多模态模型提供了更高效且通用的训练方案。

motivation: 现有基于对象标注的细粒度监督方法成本高且计算开销大，而实际应用中多模态数据多为粗粒度的图像-标题对，缺乏细粒度对齐能力。
method: 提出同音词句重写算法（HSR）生成词级监督信号，并构建精炼视觉-语言建模框架（RVLM），包含三个细化任务：精炼图像-文本对比（RITC）、精炼图像-文本匹配（RITM）和替换语言建模（RLM）。
result: 在多个下游任务的实验中，该方法展现出优于现有方法的性能，验证了细粒度对齐的有效性。
conclusion: 通过语言学手段实现无需对象标注的细粒度预训练，为多模态模型提供了更高效且通用的训练方案。
search_text: Refined Vision-Language Modeling for Fine-grained Multi-modal Pre-training 用于细粒度多模态预训练的精细视觉语言建模 Fine-grained supervision based on object annotations has been widely used for vision and language pre-training (VLP). However, in real-world application scenarios, aligned multi-modal data is usually in the image-caption format, which only provides coarse-grained supervision. It is not only cost-expensive but also compute-expensive to collect object annotations and build object annotation pre-extractor for different scenarios. In this paper, we propose a fine-grained VLP scheme without object annotations from the linguistic perspective. First, we propose a homonym sentence rewriting (HSR) algorithm to provide token-level supervision. The algorithm replaces a verb/noun/adjective/quantifier word of the caption with its homonyms from WordNet. Correspondingly, we propose refined vision-language modeling (RVLM) framework to exploit the token-level supervision. Three refined tasks, i.e., refined image-text contrastive (RITC), refined image-text matching (RITM), and replace language modeling (RLM) are proposed to learn the fine-grained alignment. Extensive experiments on several downstream tasks demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed method. 基于对象注释的细粒度监督已广泛用于视觉和语言预训练（VLP）。然而，在现实应用场景中，对齐的多模态数据通常采用图像标题格式，仅提供粗粒度的监督。收集对象注释并针对不同场景构建对象注释预提取器不仅成本昂贵，而且计算成本高昂。在本文中，我们从语言角度提出了一种没有对象注释的细粒度 VLP 方案。首先，我们提出了同音词句子重写（HSR）算法来提供令牌级别的监督。该算法将标题中的动词/名词/形容词/量词替换为 WordNet 中的同音异义词。相应地，我们提出了改进的视觉语言建模（RVLM）框架来利用令牌级监督。提出了三个细化任务，即细化图像文本对比（RITC）、细化图像文本匹配（RITM）和替换语言建模（RLM）来学习细粒度对齐。对几个下游任务的广泛实验证明了所提出方法的优越性能。 本文提出一种无需对象标注的细粒度多模态预训练方法，通过语言学视角实现视觉-语言模型的精细化对齐。 Lisai Zhang,Qingcai Chen,Zhijian Chen,Yunpeng Han,Zhonghua Li,Zhao Cao cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Li Ma,Xiaoyu Li,Jing Liao,Pedro V. Sander
title: 3D Video Loops from Asynchronous Input
title_zh: 来自异步输入的 3D 视频循环
comment: For more information, please visit the homepage at https://limacv.github.io/VideoLoop3D_web/
comments: For more information, please visit the homepage at https://limacv.github.io/VideoLoop3D_web/
abstract: Looping videos are short video clips that can be looped endlessly without visible seams or artifacts. They provide a very attractive way to capture the dynamism of natural scenes. Existing methods have been mostly limited to 2D representations. In this paper, we take a step forward and propose a practical solution that enables an immersive experience on dynamic 3D looping scenes. The key challenge is to consider the per-view looping conditions from asynchronous input while maintaining view consistency for the 3D representation. We propose a novel sparse 3D video representation, namely Multi-Tile Video (MTV), which not only provides a view-consistent prior, but also greatly reduces memory usage, making the optimization of a 4D volume tractable. Then, we introduce a two-stage pipeline to construct the 3D looping MTV from completely asynchronous multi-view videos with no time overlap. A novel looping loss based on video temporal retargeting algorithms is adopted during the optimization to loop the 3D scene. Experiments of our framework have shown promise in successfully generating and rendering photorealistic 3D looping videos in real time even on mobile devices. The code, dataset, and live demos are available in https://limacv.github.io/VideoLoop3D_web/.
summary: Looping videos are short video clips that can be looped endlessly without visible seams or artifacts. They provide a very attractive way to capture the dynamism of natural scenes. Existing methods have been mostly limited to 2D representations. In this paper, we take a step forward and propose a practical solution that enables an immersive experience on dynamic 3D looping scenes. The key challenge is to consider the per-view looping conditions from asynchronous input while maintaining view consistency for the 3D representation. We propose a novel sparse 3D video representation, namely Multi-Tile Video (MTV), which not only provides a view-consistent prior, but also greatly reduces memory usage, making the optimization of a 4D volume tractable. Then, we introduce a two-stage pipeline to construct the 3D looping MTV from completely asynchronous multi-view videos with no time overlap. A novel looping loss based on video temporal retargeting algorithms is adopted during the optimization to loop the 3D scene. Experiments of our framework have shown promise in successfully generating and rendering photorealistic 3D looping videos in real time even on mobile devices. The code, dataset, and live demos are available in https://limacv.github.io/VideoLoop3D_web/.
abstract_zh: 循环视频是可以无限循环且没有明显接缝或伪影的短视频剪辑。它们提供了一种非常有吸引力的方式来捕捉自然场景的活力。现有方法大多局限于二维表示。在本文中，我们向前迈出了一步，提出了一种实用的解决方案，可以在动态 3D 循环场景中实现身临其境的体验。关键挑战是考虑异步输入的每个视图循环条件，同时保持 3D 表示的视图一致性。我们提出了一种新颖的稀疏 3D 视频表示，即多平铺视频 (MTV)，它不仅提供了视图一致的先验，而且还大大减少了内存使用量，使得 4D 体积的优化变得容易处理。然后，我们引入了一个两阶段管道，从完全异步的多视图视频（没有时间重叠）构建 3D 循环 MTV。在优化循环 3D 场景时，采用了一种基于视频时间重定向算法的新型循环损失。我们的框架的实验表明，即使在移动设备上，也能成功地实时生成和渲染逼真的 3D 循环视频。代码、数据集和现场演示可在 https://limacv.github.io/VideoLoop3D_web/ 中获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从异步多视角视频输入生成3D循环视频的方法，解决了3D场景中视图一致性和内存效率的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法局限于2D表示，难以处理动态3D场景的异步输入和视图一致性问题，需开发沉浸式3D循环视频生成技术。
AI.method: 提出稀疏3D视频表示Multi-Tile Video (MTV)，结合两阶段流水线和基于时间重定向的循环损失函数，优化4D体积以实现异步输入的3D循环。
AI.result: 框架成功生成并实时渲染逼真的3D循环视频，支持移动端运行，代码、数据集和演示已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了异步输入下的3D循环生成难题，为动态场景的沉浸式呈现提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xize Cheng,Linjun Li,Tao Jin,Rongjie Huang,Wang Lin,Zehan Wang,Huangdai Liu,Ye Wang,Aoxiong Yin,Zhou Zhao
title: MixSpeech: Cross-Modality Self-Learning with Audio-Visual Stream Mixup for Visual Speech Translation and Recognition
title_zh: MixSpeech：跨模态自学习与视听流混合，用于视觉语音翻译和识别
abstract: Multi-media communications facilitate global interaction among people. However, despite researchers exploring cross-lingual translation techniques such as machine translation and audio speech translation to overcome language barriers, there is still a shortage of cross-lingual studies on visual speech. This lack of research is mainly due to the absence of datasets containing visual speech and translated text pairs. In this paper, we present \textbf{AVMuST-TED}, the first dataset for \textbf{A}udio-\textbf{V}isual \textbf{Mu}ltilingual \textbf{S}peech \textbf{T}ranslation, derived from \textbf{TED} talks. Nonetheless, visual speech is not as distinguishable as audio speech, making it difficult to develop a mapping from source speech phonemes to the target language text. To address this issue, we propose MixSpeech, a cross-modality self-learning framework that utilizes audio speech to regularize the training of visual speech tasks. To further minimize the cross-modality gap and its impact on knowledge transfer, we suggest adopting mixed speech, which is created by interpolating audio and visual streams, along with a curriculum learning strategy to adjust the mixing ratio as needed. MixSpeech enhances speech translation in noisy environments, improving BLEU scores for four languages on AVMuST-TED by +1.4 to +4.2. Moreover, it achieves state-of-the-art performance in lip reading on CMLR (11.1\%), LRS2 (25.5\%), and LRS3 (28.0\%).
summary: Multi-media communications facilitate global interaction among people. However, despite researchers exploring cross-lingual translation techniques such as machine translation and audio speech translation to overcome language barriers, there is still a shortage of cross-lingual studies on visual speech. This lack of research is mainly due to the absence of datasets containing visual speech and translated text pairs. In this paper, we present \textbf{AVMuST-TED}, the first dataset for \textbf{A}udio-\textbf{V}isual \textbf{Mu}ltilingual \textbf{S}peech \textbf{T}ranslation, derived from \textbf{TED} talks. Nonetheless, visual speech is not as distinguishable as audio speech, making it difficult to develop a mapping from source speech phonemes to the target language text. To address this issue, we propose MixSpeech, a cross-modality self-learning framework that utilizes audio speech to regularize the training of visual speech tasks. To further minimize the cross-modality gap and its impact on knowledge transfer, we suggest adopting mixed speech, which is created by interpolating audio and visual streams, along with a curriculum learning strategy to adjust the mixing ratio as needed. MixSpeech enhances speech translation in noisy environments, improving BLEU scores for four languages on AVMuST-TED by +1.4 to +4.2. Moreover, it achieves state-of-the-art performance in lip reading on CMLR (11.1\%), LRS2 (25.5\%), and LRS3 (28.0\%).
abstract_zh: 多媒体通信促进了人们之间的全球互动。然而，尽管研究人员探索机器翻译和音频语音翻译等跨语言翻译技术来克服语言障碍，但视觉语音的跨语言研究仍然缺乏。研究的缺乏主要是由于缺乏包含视觉语音和翻译文本对的数据集。在本文中，我们提出了 \textbf{AVMuST-TED}，这是 \textbf{A}udio-\textbf{V}isual \textbf{Mu}ltilingual \textbf{S}peech \textbf{T} 翻译的第一个数据集，源自 \textbf{TED} 演讲。尽管如此，视觉语音不像音频语音那样可区分，因此很难开发从源语音音素到目标语言文本的映射。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 MixSpeech，一种跨模态自学习框架，利用音频语音来规范视觉语音任务的训练。为了进一步减少跨模态差距及其对知识转移的影响，我们建议采用通过插入音频和视频流创建的混合语音，以及根据需要调整混合比例的课程学习策略。 MixSpeech 增强了嘈杂环境中的语音翻译，将 AVMuST-TED 上四种语言的 BLEU 分数提高了 +1.4 至 +4.2。此外，它在 CMLR (11.1\%)、LRS2 (25.5\%) 和 LRS3 (28.0\%) 上的唇读方面实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MixSpeech框架，通过音频-视觉流混合与自学习方法，解决视觉语音翻译和识别中的跨模态差距问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏跨语言视觉语音数据集及有效映射方法，导致视觉语音翻译和识别效果受限。
AI.method: 构建AVMuST-TED数据集，设计跨模态自学习框架MixSpeech，通过音频语音正则化视觉语音训练，并采用混合语音与课程学习策略调整模态混合比例。
AI.result: 在AVMuST-TED上四语言BLEU分数提升1.4-4.2，在CMLR/LRS2/LRS3唇读任务中达到SOTA（11.1%/25.5%/28.0%）。
AI.conclusion: MixSpeech有效缩小跨模态差距，在噪声环境下的视觉语音翻译及唇读任务中表现优异，为跨语言视觉语音研究提供新方向。
