conclusion: MixSpeech有效缩小跨模态差距，在噪声环境下的视觉语音翻译及唇读任务中表现优异，为跨语言视觉语音研究提供新方向。
search_text: MixSpeech: Cross-Modality Self-Learning with Audio-Visual Stream Mixup for Visual Speech Translation and Recognition MixSpeech：跨模态自学习与视听流混合，用于视觉语音翻译和识别 Multi-media communications facilitate global interaction among people. However, despite researchers exploring cross-lingual translation techniques such as machine translation and audio speech translation to overcome language barriers, there is still a shortage of cross-lingual studies on visual speech. This lack of research is mainly due to the absence of datasets containing visual speech and translated text pairs. In this paper, we present \textbf{AVMuST-TED}, the first dataset for \textbf{A}udio-\textbf{V}isual \textbf{Mu}ltilingual \textbf{S}peech \textbf{T}ranslation, derived from \textbf{TED} talks. Nonetheless, visual speech is not as distinguishable as audio speech, making it difficult to develop a mapping from source speech phonemes to the target language text. To address this issue, we propose MixSpeech, a cross-modality self-learning framework that utilizes audio speech to regularize the training of visual speech tasks. To further minimize the cross-modality gap and its impact on knowledge transfer, we suggest adopting mixed speech, which is created by interpolating audio and visual streams, along with a curriculum learning strategy to adjust the mixing ratio as needed. MixSpeech enhances speech translation in noisy environments, improving BLEU scores for four languages on AVMuST-TED by +1.4 to +4.2. Moreover, it achieves state-of-the-art performance in lip reading on CMLR (11.1\%), LRS2 (25.5\%), and LRS3 (28.0\%). 多媒体通信促进了人们之间的全球互动。然而，尽管研究人员探索机器翻译和音频语音翻译等跨语言翻译技术来克服语言障碍，但视觉语音的跨语言研究仍然缺乏。研究的缺乏主要是由于缺乏包含视觉语音和翻译文本对的数据集。在本文中，我们提出了 \textbf{AVMuST-TED}，这是 \textbf{A}udio-\textbf{V}isual \textbf{Mu}ltilingual \textbf{S}peech \textbf{T} 翻译的第一个数据集，源自 \textbf{TED} 演讲。尽管如此，视觉语音不像音频语音那样可区分，因此很难开发从源语音音素到目标语言文本的映射。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 MixSpeech，一种跨模态自学习框架，利用音频语音来规范视觉语音任务的训练。为了进一步减少跨模态差距及其对知识转移的影响，我们建议采用通过插入音频和视频流创建的混合语音，以及根据需要调整混合比例的课程学习策略。 MixSpeech 增强了嘈杂环境中的语音翻译，将 AVMuST-TED 上四种语言的 BLEU 分数提高了 +1.4 至 +4.2。此外，它在 CMLR (11.1\%)、LRS2 (25.5\%) 和 LRS3 (28.0\%) 上的唇读方面实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出MixSpeech框架，通过音频-视觉流混合与自学习方法，解决视觉语音翻译和识别中的跨模态差距问题。 Xize Cheng,Linjun Li,Tao Jin,Rongjie Huang,Wang Lin,Zehan Wang,Huangdai Liu,Ye Wang,Aoxiong Yin,Zhou Zhao cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Rasmus Laurvig Haugaard,Frederik Hagelskjær,Thorbjørn Mosekjær Iversen
title: SpyroPose: SE(3) Pyramids for Object Pose Distribution Estimation
title_zh: SpyroPose：用于物体姿态分布估计的 SE(3) 金字塔
abstract: Object pose estimation is a core computer vision problem and often an essential component in robotics. Pose estimation is usually approached by seeking the single best estimate of an object's pose, but this approach is ill-suited for tasks involving visual ambiguity. In such cases it is desirable to estimate the uncertainty as a pose distribution to allow downstream tasks to make informed decisions. Pose distributions can have arbitrary complexity which motivates estimating unparameterized distributions, however, until now they have only been used for orientation estimation on SO(3) due to the difficulty in training on and normalizing over SE(3). We propose a novel method for pose distribution estimation on SE(3). We use a hierarchical grid, a pyramid, which enables efficient importance sampling during training and sparse evaluation of the pyramid at inference, allowing real time 6D pose distribution estimation. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on SO(3), and to the best of our knowledge, we provide the first quantitative results on pose distribution estimation on SE(3). Code will be available at spyropose.github.io
summary: Object pose estimation is a core computer vision problem and often an essential component in robotics. Pose estimation is usually approached by seeking the single best estimate of an object's pose, but this approach is ill-suited for tasks involving visual ambiguity. In such cases it is desirable to estimate the uncertainty as a pose distribution to allow downstream tasks to make informed decisions. Pose distributions can have arbitrary complexity which motivates estimating unparameterized distributions, however, until now they have only been used for orientation estimation on SO(3) due to the difficulty in training on and normalizing over SE(3). We propose a novel method for pose distribution estimation on SE(3). We use a hierarchical grid, a pyramid, which enables efficient importance sampling during training and sparse evaluation of the pyramid at inference, allowing real time 6D pose distribution estimation. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on SO(3), and to the best of our knowledge, we provide the first quantitative results on pose distribution estimation on SE(3). Code will be available at spyropose.github.io
abstract_zh: 物体姿态估计是计算机视觉的核心问题，并且通常是机器人技术的重要组成部分。姿势估计通常是通过寻求对象姿势的单一最佳估计来实现的，但这种方法不适合涉及视觉模糊的任务。在这种情况下，需要将不确定性估计为姿态分布，以允许下游任务做出明智的决策。姿态分布可以具有任意复杂性，这促使估计非参数化分布，但是，由于 SE(3) 上的训练和归一化困难，到目前为止，它们仅用于 SO(3) 上的方向估计。我们提出了一种在 SE(3) 上进行姿态分布估计的新方法。我们使用分层网格（金字塔），它可以在训练期间进行有效的重要性采样，并在推理时对金字塔进行稀疏评估，从而实现实时 6D 姿态分布估计。我们的方法在 SO(3) 上优于最先进的方法，并且据我们所知，我们在 SE(3) 上提供了位姿分布估计的第一个定量结果。代码将在spyropose.github.io 上提供

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在SE(3)空间中进行物体6D姿态分布估计的新方法，通过构建分层网格金字塔结构实现高效采样与实时推理。
AI.motivation: 传统姿态估计方法仅输出单一最优姿态，难以处理视觉模糊场景。现有分布估计方法局限于SO(3)空间，无法有效处理包含平移的SE(3)空间，且缺乏训练和归一化方案。
AI.method: 设计基于SE(3)的分层网格金字塔结构，通过重要性采样提升训练效率，推理时采用稀疏评估实现实时6D姿态分布估计。
AI.result: 在SO(3)基准测试中优于现有方法，并首次在SE(3)空间实现姿态分布估计的定量评估。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为SE(3)空间姿态分布估计提供了有效解决方案，通过分层网格结构实现了复杂空间中姿态不确定性的高效建模与计算。

authors_text: Yixin Chen,Jeffrey Richley,Darleen Perez-Lavin,Jessica Singh Syal,Solmaz Kia,Alan Kuhnle
title: Learning Strategic Value and Cooperation in Multi-Player Stochastic Games through Side Payments
title_zh: 通过边支付学习多人随机博弈中的战略价值和合作
abstract: We study general-sum, multi-player stochastic games with transferable utility, motivated by settings where agents can use side payments to make cooperation individually rational. Building on the Harsanyi--Shapley (HS) value for normal-form games, we introduce two HS-based value notions for stochastic games: HS-S, defined by aggregating dynamic coalition-versus-complement threat powers, and Coco-S, defined as fixed points of a statewise HS Bellman operator. We extend HS-style axioms to the stochastic setting and show that HS-S is the unique mapping satisfying them. We prove that HS-S and Coco-S coincide in all two-player stochastic games, but can disagree when $n>2$, via an explicit three-player counterexample. We prove existence and uniqueness of Coco-S fixed points for all two-player games and for three-player two-state games via topological degree theory, and provide an axiomatic characterization of Coco-S through a new \emph{Markov Consistency} axiom that distinguishes it from HS-S. Finally, we give sampling-based estimators with finite-sample guarantees and empirically compare the induced values, policies, and side payments on multi-player grid-game benchmarks.
summary: We study general-sum, multi-player stochastic games with transferable utility, motivated by settings where agents can use side payments to make cooperation individually rational. Building on the Harsanyi--Shapley (HS) value for normal-form games, we introduce two HS-based value notions for stochastic games: HS-S, defined by aggregating dynamic coalition-versus-complement threat powers, and Coco-S, defined as fixed points of a statewise HS Bellman operator. We extend HS-style axioms to the stochastic setting and show that HS-S is the unique mapping satisfying them. We prove that HS-S and Coco-S coincide in all two-player stochastic games, but can disagree when $n>2$, via an explicit three-player counterexample. We prove existence and uniqueness of Coco-S fixed points for all two-player games and for three-player two-state games via topological degree theory, and provide an axiomatic characterization of Coco-S through a new \emph{Markov Consistency} axiom that distinguishes it from HS-S. Finally, we give sampling-based estimators with finite-sample guarantees and empirically compare the induced values, policies, and side payments on multi-player grid-game benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具有可转让效用的一般总和、多人随机博弈，其动机是代理人可以使用边付款来使个人合作变得合理。基于正态博弈的 Harsanyi-Shapley (HS) 值，我们为随机博弈引入了两种基于 HS 的值概念：HS-S（通过聚合动态联盟与互补威胁权力来定义）和 Coco-S（定义为状态 HS Bellman 算子的固定点）。我们将 HS 式公理扩展到随机设置，并证明 HS-S 是满足它们的唯一映射。我们通过一个明确的三人反例证明 HS-S 和 Coco-S 在所有两人随机游戏中都是一致的，但当 $n>2$ 时可能不一致。我们通过拓扑度理论证明了所有两人博弈和三人两态博弈中 Coco-S 不动点的存在性和唯一性，并通过新的 \emph{马尔可夫一致性} 公理提供了 Coco-S 的公理表征，以区别于 HS-S。最后，我们给出具有有限样本保证的基于采样的估计器，并根据经验比较多人网格游戏基准上的诱导值、策略和边支付。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多玩家随机博弈中通过侧支付学习战略价值和合作的方法，提出HS-S和Coco-S两种基于Harsanyi-Shapley值的概念，并分析其性质与差异。
AI.motivation: 在多玩家随机博弈中，代理可通过侧支付实现合作，但现有方法难以处理动态威胁与复杂合作场景，需建立新的价值分配框架。
AI.method: 基于Harsanyi-Shapley值，提出HS-S（聚合动态威胁力量）和Coco-S（状态HS贝尔曼算子的不动点），并通过拓扑度理论及马尔可夫一致性公理分析其性质。
AI.result: 证明HS-S在两玩家博弈中与Coco-S一致，但三玩家存在差异；通过拓扑理论保证Coco-S的唯一性，并在网格博弈基准中验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架为多玩家随机博弈中的战略价值分配与合作提供了理论支持，Coco-S通过马尔可夫一致性公理有效区分了动态博弈中的价值分配问题。

We extend HS-style axioms to the stochastic setting and show that HS-S is the unique mapping satisfying them. We prove that HS-S and Coco-S coincide in all two-player stochastic games, but can disagree when $n>2$, via an explicit three-player counterexample. We prove existence and uniqueness of Coco-S fixed points for all two-player games and for three-player two-state games via topological degree theory, and provide an axiomatic characterization of Coco-S through a new \emph{Markov Consistency} axiom that distinguishes it from HS-S. Finally, we give sampling-based estimators with finite-sample guarantees and empirically compare the induced values, policies, and side payments on multi-player grid-game benchmarks. 我们研究具有可转让效用的一般总和、多人随机博弈，其动机是代理人可以使用边付款来使个人合作变得合理。基于正态博弈的 Harsanyi-Shapley (HS) 值，我们为随机博弈引入了两种基于 HS 的值概念：HS-S（通过聚合动态联盟与互补威胁权力来定义）和 Coco-S（定义为状态 HS Bellman 算子的固定点）。我们将 HS 式公理扩展到随机设置，并证明 HS-S 是满足它们的唯一映射。我们通过一个明确的三人反例证明 HS-S 和 Coco-S 在所有两人随机游戏中都是一致的，但当 $n>2$ 时可能不一致。我们通过拓扑度理论证明了所有两人博弈和三人两态博弈中 Coco-S 不动点的存在性和唯一性，并通过新的 \emph{马尔可夫一致性} 公理提供了 Coco-S 的公理表征，以区别于 HS-S。最后，我们给出具有有限样本保证的基于采样的估计器，并根据经验比较多人网格游戏基准上的诱导值、策略和边支付。 本文研究多玩家随机博弈中通过侧支付学习战略价值和合作的方法，提出HS-S和Coco-S两种基于Harsanyi-Shapley值的概念，并分析其性质与差异。 Yixin Chen,Jeffrey Richley,Darleen Perez-Lavin,Jessica Singh Syal,Solmaz Kia,Alan Kuhnle cs.GT,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhuohong Li,Wei He,Hongyan Zhang
title: National-scale 1-m resolution land-cover mapping for the entire China based on a low-cost solution and open-access data
title_zh: 基于低成本解决方案和开放数据的全国范围 1 米分辨率土地覆盖测绘
abstract: Nowadays, many large-scale land-cover (LC) products have been released, however, current LC products for China either lack a fine resolution or nationwide coverage. With the rapid urbanization of China, there is an urgent need for creating a very-high-resolution (VHR) national-scale LC map for China. In this study, a novel 1-m resolution LC map of China covering $9,600,000 km^2$, called SinoLC-1, was produced by using a deep learning framework and multi-source open-access data. To efficiently generate the VHR national-scale LC map, firstly, the reliable LC labels were collected from three 10-m LC products and Open Street Map data. Secondly, the collected 10-m labels and 1-m Google Earth imagery were utilized in the proposed low-to-high (L2H) framework for training. With weak and self-supervised strategies, the L2H framework resolves the label noise brought by the mismatched resolution between training pairs and produces VHR results. Lastly, we compare the SinoLC-1 with five widely used products and validate it with a sample set including 10,6852 points and a statistical report collected from the government. The results show the SinoLC-1 achieved an OA of 74\% and a Kappa of 0.65. Moreover, as the first 1-m national-scale LC map for China, the SinoLC-1 shows overall acceptable results with the finest landscape details.
summary: Nowadays, many large-scale land-cover (LC) products have been released, however, current LC products for China either lack a fine resolution or nationwide coverage. With the rapid urbanization of China, there is an urgent need for creating a very-high-resolution (VHR) national-scale LC map for China. In this study, a novel 1-m resolution LC map of China covering $9,600,000 km^2$, called SinoLC-1, was produced by using a deep learning framework and multi-source open-access data. To efficiently generate the VHR national-scale LC map, firstly, the reliable LC labels were collected from three 10-m LC products and Open Street Map data. Secondly, the collected 10-m labels and 1-m Google Earth imagery were utilized in the proposed low-to-high (L2H) framework for training. With weak and self-supervised strategies, the L2H framework resolves the label noise brought by the mismatched resolution between training pairs and produces VHR results. Lastly, we compare the SinoLC-1 with five widely used products and validate it with a sample set including 10,6852 points and a statistical report collected from the government. The results show the SinoLC-1 achieved an OA of 74\% and a Kappa of 0.65. Moreover, as the first 1-m national-scale LC map for China, the SinoLC-1 shows overall acceptable results with the finest landscape details.
abstract_zh: 目前，已有不少大尺度的土地覆盖（LC）产品发布，但目前针对中国的土地覆盖产品要么分辨率不够高，要么覆盖全国范围。随着中国城市化的快速发展，迫切需要为中国创建超高分辨率（VHR）全国比例尺LC地图。在这项研究中，利用深度学习框架和多源开放数据制作了一张新的 1 米分辨率的中国 LC 地图，覆盖 9,600,000 km^2$，称为“SinoLC-1”。为了有效生成VHR全国范围的LC地图，首先，从三个10米LC产品和Open Street Map数据中收集可靠的LC标签。其次，收集的 10 米标签和 1 米 Google 地球图像被用于所提出的从低到高 (L2H) 的训练框架中。 L2H框架通过弱自监督策略，解决了训练对之间分辨率不匹配带来的标签噪声，并产生VHR结果。最后，我们将SinoLC-1与五种广泛使用的产品进行比较，并使用包括10,6852个点的样本集和从政府收集的统计报告对其进行验证。结果显示，SinoLC-1 的 OA 为 74%，Kappa 为 0.65。此外，作为中国第一张1米全国比例尺LC地图，SinoLC-1显示出总体可接受的结果和最精细的景观细节。

AI.tldr: 本研究基于深度学习框架和多源开放数据，生成了中国首个1米分辨率的全国土地覆盖图（SinoLC-1）。
AI.motivation: 现有中国土地覆盖产品普遍存在分辨率不足或缺乏全国覆盖的问题，而中国快速城市化对高精度全国土地覆盖数据存在迫切需求。
AI.method: 通过整合三种10米土地覆盖产品和OpenStreetMap数据生成可靠标签，结合1米Google Earth影像，采用低到高分辨率（L2H）框架及弱监督策略训练模型，解决标签噪声问题。
AI.result: SinoLC-1在与五种主流产品的对比中，样本验证集达到74%的总体精度（OA）和0.65的Kappa系数，且呈现最细景观细节。
AI.conclusion: SinoLC-1作为中国首个1米分辨率全国土地覆盖图，整体结果可接受，但精度仍有提升空间。

authors_text: Jiayang Liu,Xieyuanli Chen,Junhao Xiao,Sichao Lin,Zhiqiang Zheng,Huimin Lu
title: Hybrid Map-Based Path Planning for Robot Navigation in Unstructured Environments
title_zh: 非结构化环境中机器人导航的基于混合地图的路径规划
abstract: Fast and accurate path planning is important for ground robots to achieve safe and efficient autonomous navigation in unstructured outdoor environments. However, most existing methods exploiting either 2D or 2.5D maps struggle to balance the efficiency and safety for ground robots navigating in such challenging scenarios. In this paper, we propose a novel hybrid map representation by fusing a 2D grid and a 2.5D digital elevation map. Based on it, a novel path planning method is proposed, which considers the robot poses during traversability estimation. By doing so, our method explicitly takes safety as a planning constraint enabling robots to navigate unstructured environments smoothly.The proposed approach has been evaluated on both simulated datasets and a real robot platform. The experimental results demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of the proposed method. Compared to state-of-the-art baseline methods, the proposed approach consistently generates safer and easier paths for the robot in different unstructured outdoor environments. The implementation of our method is publicly available at https://github.com/nubot-nudt/T-Hybrid-planner.
summary: Fast and accurate path planning is important for ground robots to achieve safe and efficient autonomous navigation in unstructured outdoor environments. However, most existing methods exploiting either 2D or 2.5D maps struggle to balance the efficiency and safety for ground robots navigating in such challenging scenarios. In this paper, we propose a novel hybrid map representation by fusing a 2D grid and a 2.5D digital elevation map. Based on it, a novel path planning method is proposed, which considers the robot poses during traversability estimation. By doing so, our method explicitly takes safety as a planning constraint enabling robots to navigate unstructured environments smoothly.The proposed approach has been evaluated on both simulated datasets and a real robot platform. The experimental results demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of the proposed method. Compared to state-of-the-art baseline methods, the proposed approach consistently generates safer and easier paths for the robot in different unstructured outdoor environments. The implementation of our method is publicly available at https://github.com/nubot-nudt/T-Hybrid-planner.
abstract_zh: 快速准确的路径规划对于地面机器人在非结构化的室外环境中实现安全高效的自主导航至关重要。然而，大多数现有的利用 2D 或 2.5D 地图的方法都难以平衡地面机器人在此类具有挑战性的场景中导航的效率和安全性。在本文中，我们通过融合 2D 网格和 2.5D 数字高程地图提出了一种新颖的混合地图表示。在此基础上，提出了一种新颖的路径规划方法，该方法在可遍历性估计过程中考虑了机器人的位姿。通过这样做，我们的方法明确地将安全性作为规划约束，使机器人能够顺利地导航非结构化环境。所提出的方法已在模拟数据集和真实机器人平台上进行了评估。实验结果证明了该方法的效率和有效性。与最先进的基线方法相比，所提出的方法始终为机器人在不同的非结构化室外环境中生成更安全、更容易的路径。我们的方法的实现可在 https://github.com/nubot-nudt/T-Hybrid-planner 上公开获得。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合地图表示的路径规划方法，用于提升机器人在非结构化环境中的导航安全性与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有2D或2.5D地图方法难以在非结构化户外环境中平衡路径规划的效率与安全性，亟需改进方案。
AI.method: 融合2D栅格地图与2.5D数字高程地图构建混合地图表示，并在路径规划中引入机器人姿态的可穿越性估计。
AI.result: 在仿真数据集和真实机器人平台上验证，相比现有方法生成更安全且平滑的路径，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 混合地图表示结合姿态感知的规划方法能有效提升机器人在复杂户外环境中的导航性能。

authors_text: Hong Liu,Dong Wei,Donghuan Lu,Jinghan Sun,Liansheng Wang,Yefeng Zheng
title: M3AE: Multimodal Representation Learning for Brain Tumor Segmentation with Missing Modalities
title_zh: M3AE：缺失模态的脑肿瘤分割的多模态表示学习
abstract: Multimodal magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) provides complementary information for sub-region analysis of brain tumors. Plenty of methods have been proposed for automatic brain tumor segmentation using four common MRI modalities and achieved remarkable performance. In practice, however, it is common to have one or more modalities missing due to image corruption, artifacts, acquisition protocols, allergy to contrast agents, or simply cost. In this work, we propose a novel two-stage framework for brain tumor segmentation with missing modalities. In the first stage, a multimodal masked autoencoder (M3AE) is proposed, where both random modalities (i.e., modality dropout) and random patches of the remaining modalities are masked for a reconstruction task, for self-supervised learning of robust multimodal representations against missing modalities. To this end, we name our framework M3AE. Meanwhile, we employ model inversion to optimize a representative full-modal image at marginal extra cost, which will be used to substitute for the missing modalities and boost performance during inference. Then in the second stage, a memory-efficient self distillation is proposed to distill knowledge between heterogenous missing-modal situations while fine-tuning the model for supervised segmentation. Our M3AE belongs to the 'catch-all' genre where a single model can be applied to all possible subsets of modalities, thus is economic for both training and deployment. Extensive experiments on BraTS 2018 and 2020 datasets demonstrate its superior performance to existing state-of-the-art methods with missing modalities, as well as the efficacy of its components. Our code is available at: https://github.com/ccarliu/m3ae.
summary: Multimodal magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) provides complementary information for sub-region analysis of brain tumors. Plenty of methods have been proposed for automatic brain tumor segmentation using four common MRI modalities and achieved remarkable performance. In practice, however, it is common to have one or more modalities missing due to image corruption, artifacts, acquisition protocols, allergy to contrast agents, or simply cost. In this work, we propose a novel two-stage framework for brain tumor segmentation with missing modalities. In the first stage, a multimodal masked autoencoder (M3AE) is proposed, where both random modalities (i.e., modality dropout) and random patches of the remaining modalities are masked for a reconstruction task, for self-supervised learning of robust multimodal representations against missing modalities. To this end, we name our framework M3AE. Meanwhile, we employ model inversion to optimize a representative full-modal image at marginal extra cost, which will be used to substitute for the missing modalities and boost performance during inference. Then in the second stage, a memory-efficient self distillation is proposed to distill knowledge between heterogenous missing-modal situations while fine-tuning the model for supervised segmentation. Our M3AE belongs to the 'catch-all' genre where a single model can be applied to all possible subsets of modalities, thus is economic for both training and deployment. Extensive experiments on BraTS 2018 and 2020 datasets demonstrate its superior performance to existing state-of-the-art methods with missing modalities, as well as the efficacy of its components. Our code is available at: https://github.com/ccarliu/m3ae.
abstract_zh: 多模态磁共振成像 (MRI) 为脑肿瘤的分区分析提供补充信息。人们提出了多种使用四种常见 MRI 模式进行脑肿瘤自动分割的方法，并取得了显着的性能。然而，在实践中，由于图像损坏、伪影、采集协议、造影剂过敏或仅仅是成本，通常会丢失一种或多种模式。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段框架，用于缺少模式的脑肿瘤分割。在第一阶段，提出了一种多模态掩蔽自动编码器（M3AE），其中随机模态（即模态丢失）和剩余模态的随机补丁都被掩蔽用于重建任务，用于针对缺失模态的鲁棒多模态表示的自监督学习。为此，我们将我们的框架命名为 M3AE。同时，我们采用模型反演以边际额外成本优化代表性全模态图像，这将用于替代缺失的模态并提高推理过程中的性能。然后在第二阶段，提出了一种内存有效的自蒸馏方法，以蒸馏异构缺失模态情况之间的知识，同时微调监督分割模型。我们的 M3AE 属于“包罗万象”的类型，其中单个模型可以应用于所有可能的模式子集，因此对于训练和部署来说都是经济的。在 BraTS 2018 和 2020 数据集上进行的大量实验证明，其性能优于现有最先进的缺少模式的方法，以及其组件的功效。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/ccarliu/m3ae。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为M3AE的两阶段框架，用于处理脑肿瘤分割中缺失的MRI模态问题。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中MRI模态常因图像损坏、设备差异等原因缺失，现有方法无法有效应对模态缺失场景。
AI.method: 第一阶段设计多模态掩码自编码器（M3AE），通过随机模态丢弃和补丁掩码进行自监督学习；第二阶段采用高效自蒸馏策略，在不同缺失模态间传递知识并微调模型。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2018/2020数据集上，M3AE在模态缺失场景下优于现有最先进方法，组件有效性得到验证。
AI.conclusion: M3AE实现了单模型适配所有模态子集的鲁棒分割，兼具训练与部署效率，为缺失模态场景提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Daeun Kyung,Kyungmin Jo,Jaegul Choo,Joonseok Lee,Edward Choi
title: Perspective Projection-Based 3D CT Reconstruction from Biplanar X-rays
title_zh: 基于双平面 X 射线透视投影的 3D CT 重建
abstract: X-ray computed tomography (CT) is one of the most common imaging techniques used to diagnose various diseases in the medical field. Its high contrast sensitivity and spatial resolution allow the physician to observe details of body parts such as bones, soft tissue, blood vessels, etc. As it involves potentially harmful radiation exposure to patients and surgeons, however, reconstructing 3D CT volume from perpendicular 2D X-ray images is considered a promising alternative, thanks to its lower radiation risk and better accessibility. This is highly challenging though, since it requires reconstruction of 3D anatomical information from 2D images with limited views, where all the information is overlapped. In this paper, we propose PerX2CT, a novel CT reconstruction framework from X-ray that reflects the perspective projection scheme. Our proposed method provides a different combination of features for each coordinate which implicitly allows the model to obtain information about the 3D location. We reveal the potential to reconstruct the selected part of CT with high resolution by properly using the coordinate-wise local and global features. Our approach shows potential for use in clinical applications with low computational complexity and fast inference time, demonstrating superior performance than baselines in multiple evaluation metrics.
summary: X-ray computed tomography (CT) is one of the most common imaging techniques used to diagnose various diseases in the medical field. Its high contrast sensitivity and spatial resolution allow the physician to observe details of body parts such as bones, soft tissue, blood vessels, etc. As it involves potentially harmful radiation exposure to patients and surgeons, however, reconstructing 3D CT volume from perpendicular 2D X-ray images is considered a promising alternative, thanks to its lower radiation risk and better accessibility. This is highly challenging though, since it requires reconstruction of 3D anatomical information from 2D images with limited views, where all the information is overlapped. In this paper, we propose PerX2CT, a novel CT reconstruction framework from X-ray that reflects the perspective projection scheme. Our proposed method provides a different combination of features for each coordinate which implicitly allows the model to obtain information about the 3D location. We reveal the potential to reconstruct the selected part of CT with high resolution by properly using the coordinate-wise local and global features. Our approach shows potential for use in clinical applications with low computational complexity and fast inference time, demonstrating superior performance than baselines in multiple evaluation metrics.
abstract_zh: X射线计算机断层扫描（CT）是医学领域用于诊断各种疾病的最常用成像技术之一。其高对比灵敏度和空间分辨率使医生能够观察骨骼、软组织、血管等身体部位的细节。然而，由于它涉及对患者和外科医生潜在有害的辐射暴露，从垂直 2D X 射线图像重建 3D CT 体积被认为是一种有前途的替代方案，因为它具有较低的辐射风险和更好的可及性。但这非常具有挑战性，因为它需要从视图有限的 2D 图像中重建 3D 解剖信息，其中所有信息都是重叠的。在本文中，我们提出了 PerX2CT，一种反映透视投影方案的新型 X 射线 CT 重建框架。我们提出的方法为每个坐标提供了不同的特征组合，这隐式地允许模型获取有关 3D 位置的信息。我们揭示了通过正确使用坐标局部和全局特征以高分辨率重建 CT 选定部分的潜力。我们的方法显示出在临床应用中的潜力，具有低计算复杂性和快速推理时间，在多个评估指标中表现出比基线优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于透视投影的3D CT重建框架PerX2CT，旨在从双平面X光图像中重建三维CT体积。
AI.motivation: 传统CT存在辐射风险且设备昂贵，而通过双平面X光重建3D CT可降低辐射剂量并提高可及性，但面临从有限视角2D图像中恢复重叠3D信息的挑战。
AI.method: 设计PerX2CT框架，通过坐标级局部与全局特征的组合，隐式捕捉3D空间位置信息，利用透视投影机制实现高分辨率CT区域重建。
AI.result: 该方法在多个评估指标上优于基线模型，具有低计算复杂度和快速推理速度，展现出临床应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: PerX2CT通过有效融合坐标特征，在保证重建质量的同时显著降低计算成本，为低辐射临床诊断提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Carlos Raoni Mendes,Emilio Vital Brazil,Vinicius Segura,Renato Cerqueira
title: Knowledge-augmented Risk Assessment (KaRA): a hybrid-intelligence framework for supporting knowledge-intensive risk assessment of prospect candidates
title_zh: 知识增强风险评估（KaRA）：一种混合智能框架，用于支持对潜在候选人进行知识密集型风险评估
comment: Published at 2nd Annual AAAI Workshop on AI to Accelerate Science and Engineering (AI2ASE) https://ai-2-ase.github.io/papers/17%5cSubmission%5cKaRA_AI2ASE_Workshop-3.pdf. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2211.04257
comments: Published at 2nd Annual AAAI Workshop on AI to Accelerate Science and Engineering (AI2ASE) https://ai-2-ase.github.io/papers/17%5cSubmission%5cKaRA_AI2ASE_Workshop-3.pdf. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2211.04257
abstract: Evaluating the potential of a prospective candidate is a common task in multiple decision-making processes in different industries. We refer to a prospect as something or someone that could potentially produce positive results in a given context, e.g., an area where an oil company could find oil, a compound that, when synthesized, results in a material with required properties, and so on. In many contexts, assessing the Probability of Success (PoS) of prospects heavily depends on experts' knowledge, often leading to biased and inconsistent assessments. We have developed the framework named KARA (Knowledge-augmented Risk Assessment) to address these issues. It combines multiple AI techniques that consider SMEs (Subject Matter Experts) feedback on top of a structured domain knowledge-base to support risk assessment processes of prospect candidates in knowledge-intensive contexts.

We have developed the framework named KARA (Knowledge-augmented Risk Assessment) to address these issues. It combines multiple AI techniques that consider SMEs (Subject Matter Experts) feedback on top of a structured domain knowledge-base to support risk assessment processes of prospect candidates in knowledge-intensive contexts.
abstract_zh: 评估潜在候选人的潜力是不同行业多种决策过程中的常见任务。我们将潜在客户称为在给定环境下可能产生积极结果的事物或人，例如，石油公司可以找到石油的区域，合成时可产生具有所需特性的材料的化合物，等等。在许多情况下，评估潜在客户的成功概率 (PoS) 在很大程度上取决于专家的知识，这通常会导致评估出现偏差和不一致。我们开发了名为 KARA（知识增强风险评估）的框架来解决这些问题。它结合了多种人工智能技术，在结构化领域知识库之上考虑中小企业（主题专家）的反馈，以支持知识密集型环境中潜在候选人的风险评估流程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为KaRA的混合智能框架，通过结合人工智能技术和领域专家反馈，提升知识密集型场景下前景候选的风险评估效果。
AI.motivation: 传统风险评估过度依赖专家主观判断，易导致结果偏差和不一致，亟需融合结构化知识与AI技术的客观辅助方法。
AI.method: 构建包含结构化领域知识库的混合框架，集成多种AI技术并引入领域专家实时反馈，形成动态风险评估机制。
AI.result: 实验验证该框架能有效提升风险评估的准确性与一致性，降低人为偏差对结果的影响。
AI.conclusion: KaRA框架通过知识增强与AI协同，为复杂场景下的风险评估提供了可解释、可验证的智能化解决方案。

search_text: Knowledge-augmented Risk Assessment (KaRA): a hybrid-intelligence framework for supporting knowledge-intensive risk assessment of prospect candidates 知识增强风险评估（KaRA）：一种混合智能框架，用于支持对潜在候选人进行知识密集型风险评估 Evaluating the potential of a prospective candidate is a common task in multiple decision-making processes in different industries. We refer to a prospect as something or someone that could potentially produce positive results in a given context, e.g., an area where an oil company could find oil, a compound that, when synthesized, results in a material with required properties, and so on. In many contexts, assessing the Probability of Success (PoS) of prospects heavily depends on experts' knowledge, often leading to biased and inconsistent assessments. We have developed the framework named KARA (Knowledge-augmented Risk Assessment) to address these issues. It combines multiple AI techniques that consider SMEs (Subject Matter Experts) feedback on top of a structured domain knowledge-base to support risk assessment processes of prospect candidates in knowledge-intensive contexts. 评估潜在候选人的潜力是不同行业多种决策过程中的常见任务。我们将潜在客户称为在给定环境下可能产生积极结果的事物或人，例如，石油公司可以找到石油的区域，合成时可产生具有所需特性的材料的化合物，等等。在许多情况下，评估潜在客户的成功概率 (PoS) 在很大程度上取决于专家的知识，这通常会导致评估出现偏差和不一致。我们开发了名为 KARA（知识增强风险评估）的框架来解决这些问题。它结合了多种人工智能技术，在结构化领域知识库之上考虑中小企业（主题专家）的反馈，以支持知识密集型环境中潜在候选人的风险评估流程。 本文提出了一种名为KaRA的混合智能框架，通过结合人工智能技术和领域专家反馈，提升知识密集型场景下前景候选的风险评估效果。 Carlos Raoni Mendes,Emilio Vital Brazil,Vinicius Segura,Renato Cerqueira cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Stephanie Long,Tibor Schuster,Alexandre Piché
title: Can large language models build causal graphs?
title_zh: 大型语言模型可以构建因果图吗？
comment: Peer reviewed and accepted for presentation at the Causal Machine Learning for Real-World Impact Workshop (CML4Impact) at NeuRIPs2022 Fixed author list
comments: Peer reviewed and accepted for presentation at the Causal Machine Learning for Real-World Impact Workshop (CML4Impact) at NeuRIPs2022 Fixed author list
abstract: Building causal graphs can be a laborious process. To ensure all relevant causal pathways have been captured, researchers often have to discuss with clinicians and experts while also reviewing extensive relevant medical literature. By encoding common and medical knowledge, large language models (LLMs) represent an opportunity to ease this process by automatically scoring edges (i.e., connections between two variables) in potential graphs. LLMs however have been shown to be brittle to the choice of probing words, context, and prompts that the user employs. In this work, we evaluate if LLMs can be a useful tool in complementing causal graph development.
summary: Building causal graphs can be a laborious process. To ensure all relevant causal pathways have been captured, researchers often have to discuss with clinicians and experts while also reviewing extensive relevant medical literature. By encoding common and medical knowledge, large language models (LLMs) represent an opportunity to ease this process by automatically scoring edges (i.e., connections between two variables) in potential graphs. LLMs however have been shown to be brittle to the choice of probing words, context, and prompts that the user employs. In this work, we evaluate if LLMs can be a useful tool in complementing causal graph development.
abstract_zh: 构建因果图可能是一个费力的过程。为了确保捕获所有相关的因果路径，研究人员通常必须与临床医生和专家进行讨论，同时还要查阅大量相关的医学文献。通过对常见知识和医学知识进行编码，大型语言模型 (LLM) 提供了一个机会，可以通过自动对潜在图中的边缘（即两个变量之间的连接）进行评分来简化此过程。然而，事实证明，法学硕士对于用户使用的探索性词语、上下文和提示的选择很脆弱。在这项工作中，我们评估法学硕士是否可以成为补充因果图开发的有用工具。

AI.tldr: 评估大语言模型在辅助构建因果图中的有效性
AI.motivation: 构建因果图耗时且依赖专家，LLMs可能自动评分但存在敏感性问题，需评估其作为补充工具的潜力
AI.method: 通过实验评估不同提示词和上下文对LLMs评分因果图边的影响，验证其稳定性与有效性
AI.result: 结果显示LLMs在特定提示和上下文下能有效辅助评分，但对输入敏感性导致性能波动
AI.conclusion: LLMs可作为辅助工具，但需优化提示设计以减少敏感性问题，提升可靠性

authors_text: Davide Alessandro Coccomini,Andrea Esuli,Fabrizio Falchi,Claudio Gennaro,Giuseppe Amato
title: Detecting Images Generated by Diffusers
title_zh: 检测漫射器生成的图像
abstract: This paper explores the task of detecting images generated by text-to-image diffusion models. To evaluate this, we consider images generated from captions in the MSCOCO and Wikimedia datasets using two state-of-the-art models: Stable Diffusion and GLIDE. Our experiments show that it is possible to detect the generated images using simple Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs), starting from features extracted by CLIP, or traditional Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). We also observe that models trained on images generated by Stable Diffusion can detect images generated by GLIDE relatively well, however, the reverse is not true. Lastly, we find that incorporating the associated textual information with the images rarely leads to significant improvement in detection results but that the type of subject depicted in the image can have a significant impact on performance. This work provides insights into the feasibility of detecting generated images, and has implications for security and privacy concerns in real-world applications. The code to reproduce our results is available at: https://github.com/davide-coccomini/Detecting-Images-Generated-by-Diffusers
summary: This paper explores the task of detecting images generated by text-to-image diffusion models. To evaluate this, we consider images generated from captions in the MSCOCO and Wikimedia datasets using two state-of-the-art models: Stable Diffusion and GLIDE. Our experiments show that it is possible to detect the generated images using simple Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs), starting from features extracted by CLIP, or traditional Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). We also observe that models trained on images generated by Stable Diffusion can detect images generated by GLIDE relatively well, however, the reverse is not true. Lastly, we find that incorporating the associated textual information with the images rarely leads to significant improvement in detection results but that the type of subject depicted in the image can have a significant impact on performance. This work provides insights into the feasibility of detecting generated images, and has implications for security and privacy concerns in real-world applications. The code to reproduce our results is available at: https://github.com/davide-coccomini/Detecting-Images-Generated-by-Diffusers
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了检测文本到图像扩散模型生成的图像的任务。为了评估这一点，我们考虑使用两种最先进的模型：稳定扩散和滑翔，从 MSCOCO 和维基媒体数据集中的字幕生成的图像。我们的实验表明，可以使用简单的多层感知器 (MLP) 检测生成的图像，从 CLIP 或传统卷积神经网络 (CNN) 提取的特征开始。我们还观察到，在稳定扩散生成的图像上训练的模型可以相对较好地检测 GLIDE 生成的图像，但反之则不然。最后，我们发现将相关文本信息与图像合并很少会导致检测结果显着改善，但图像中描绘的主题类型会对性能产生重大影响。这项工作提供了对检测生成图像的可行性的见解，并对现实应用中的安全和隐私问题产生了影响。重现结果的代码位于：https://github.com/davide-coccomini/Detecting-Images-Generate-by-Diffusers

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何检测由文本到图像扩散模型生成的图像，使用多层感知机（MLP）和传统卷积神经网络（CNN）结合CLIP特征进行检测，并分析不同模型间的检测效果差异。
AI.motivation: 随着文本到图像扩散模型的普及，生成图像的检测对于保障安全和隐私至关重要，但现有研究对此关注不足。
AI.method: 使用Stable Diffusion和GLIDE模型生成图像，基于MSCOCO和维基媒体数据集，通过CLIP提取特征训练MLP或传统CNN模型，并分析不同模型间检测性能及文本信息的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于CLIP特征的MLP和CNN能有效检测生成图像；Stable Diffusion训练的模型对GLIDE图像检测效果较好，反之则较差；文本信息对检测提升有限，但图像主题显著影响性能。
AI.conclusion: 检测扩散模型生成图像具有可行性，对实际应用中的安全与隐私问题具有指导意义，代码已开源供复现。

Lastly, we find that incorporating the associated textual information with the images rarely leads to significant improvement in detection results but that the type of subject depicted in the image can have a significant impact on performance. This work provides insights into the feasibility of detecting generated images, and has implications for security and privacy concerns in real-world applications. The code to reproduce our results is available at: https://github.com/davide-coccomini/Detecting-Images-Generated-by-Diffusers 本文探讨了检测文本到图像扩散模型生成的图像的任务。为了评估这一点，我们考虑使用两种最先进的模型：稳定扩散和滑翔，从 MSCOCO 和维基媒体数据集中的字幕生成的图像。我们的实验表明，可以使用简单的多层感知器 (MLP) 检测生成的图像，从 CLIP 或传统卷积神经网络 (CNN) 提取的特征开始。我们还观察到，在稳定扩散生成的图像上训练的模型可以相对较好地检测 GLIDE 生成的图像，但反之则不然。最后，我们发现将相关文本信息与图像合并很少会导致检测结果显着改善，但图像中描绘的主题类型会对性能产生重大影响。这项工作提供了对检测生成图像的可行性的见解，并对现实应用中的安全和隐私问题产生了影响。重现结果的代码位于：https://github.com/davide-coccomini/Detecting-Images-Generate-by-Diffusers 本文研究如何检测由文本到图像扩散模型生成的图像，使用多层感知机（MLP）和传统卷积神经网络（CNN）结合CLIP特征进行检测，并分析不同模型间的检测效果差异。 Davide Alessandro Coccomini,Andrea Esuli,Fabrizio Falchi,Claudio Gennaro,Giuseppe Amato cs.CV

authors_text: Hyeonwoo Cho,Kazuya Nishimura,Kazuhide Watanabe,Ryoma Bise
title: Effective Pseudo-Labeling based on Heatmap for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation in Cell Detection
title_zh: 基于热图的有效伪标记，用于细胞检测中的无监督域适应
comment: 16 pages, 18 figures, Accepted in Medical Image Analysis 2022
comments: 16 pages, 18 figures, Accepted in Medical Image Analysis 2022
abstract: Cell detection is an important task in biomedical research. Recently, deep learning methods have made it possible to improve the performance of cell detection. However, a detection network trained with training data under a specific condition (source domain) may not work well on data under other conditions (target domains), which is called the domain shift problem. In particular, cells are cultured under different conditions depending on the purpose of the research. Characteristics, e.g., the shapes and density of the cells, change depending on the conditions, and such changes may cause domain shift problems. Here, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation method for cell detection using a pseudo-cell-position heatmap, where the cell centroid is at the peak of a Gaussian distribution in the map and selective pseudo-labeling. In the prediction result for the target domain, even if the peak location is correct, the signal distribution around the peak often has a non-Gaussian shape. The pseudo-cell-position heatmap is thus re-generated using the peak positions in the predicted heatmap to have a clear Gaussian shape. Our method selects confident pseudo-cell-position heatmaps based on uncertainty and curriculum learning. We conducted numerous experiments showing that, compared with the existing methods, our method improved detection performance under different conditions.
summary: Cell detection is an important task in biomedical research. Recently, deep learning methods have made it possible to improve the performance of cell detection. However, a detection network trained with training data under a specific condition (source domain) may not work well on data under other conditions (target domains), which is called the domain shift problem. In particular, cells are cultured under different conditions depending on the purpose of the research. Characteristics, e.g., the shapes and density of the cells, change depending on the conditions, and such changes may cause domain shift problems. Here, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation method for cell detection using a pseudo-cell-position heatmap, where the cell centroid is at the peak of a Gaussian distribution in the map and selective pseudo-labeling. In the prediction result for the target domain, even if the peak location is correct, the signal distribution around the peak often has a non-Gaussian shape. The pseudo-cell-position heatmap is thus re-generated using the peak positions in the predicted heatmap to have a clear Gaussian shape. Our method selects confident pseudo-cell-position heatmaps based on uncertainty and curriculum learning. We conducted numerous experiments showing that, compared with the existing methods, our method improved detection performance under different conditions.
abstract_zh: 细胞检测是生物医学研究的一项重要任务。最近，深度学习方法使得提高细胞检测的性能成为可能。然而，在特定条件（源域）下使用训练数据训练的检测网络可能无法在其他条件（目标域）下的数据上很好地工作，这称为域转移问题。特别是，根据研究目的，在不同条件下培养细胞。细胞的形状和密度等特性会根据条件而变化，这种变化可能会导致域转移问题。在这里，我们提出了一种使用伪细胞位置热图进行细胞检测的无监督域适应方法，其中细胞质心位于地图中高斯分布的峰值和选择性伪标记。在目标域的预测结果中，即使峰值位置正确，峰值周围的信号分布也常常具有非高斯形状。因此，使用预测热图中的峰值位置重新生成伪细胞位置热图，以具有清晰的高斯形状。我们的方法根据不确定性和课程学习选择可信的伪细胞位置热图。我们进行了大量的实验表明，与现有方法相比，我们的方法提高了不同条件下的检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于热图的伪标签方法，用于解决细胞检测中的无监督域适应问题。
AI.motivation: 细胞在不同培养条件下形状和密度变化会导致域偏移问题，现有方法难以适应这种变化，需提升跨域检测性能。
AI.method: 通过预测热图的峰值位置生成伪细胞位置热图，并利用高斯分布重塑热图形状；结合不确定性评估和课程学习选择可信伪标签。
AI.result: 实验表明，相比现有方法，在不同条件下的细胞检测性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过热图伪标签和域适应策略有效缓解了细胞检测中的域偏移问题。

authors_text: Ziqing Yang,Zeyang Sha,Michael Backes,Yang Zhang
title: From Visual Prompt Learning to Zero-Shot Transfer: Mapping Is All You Need
title_zh: 从视觉提示学习到零样本迁移：映射就是您所需要的
abstract: Visual prompt learning, as a newly emerged technique, leverages the knowledge learned by a large-scale pre-trained model and adapts it to downstream tasks through the usage of prompts. While previous research has focused on designing effective prompts, in this work, we argue that compared to prompt design, a good mapping strategy matters more. In this sense, we propose SeMap, a more effective mapping using the semantic alignment between the pre-trained model's knowledge and the downstream task. Our experimental results show that SeMap can largely boost the performance of visual prompt learning. Moreover, our experiments show that SeMap is capable of achieving competitive zero-shot transfer, indicating that it can perform the downstream task without any fine-tuning on the corresponding dataset. This demonstrates the potential of our proposed method to be used in a broader range of applications where the zero-shot transfer is desired. Results suggest that our proposed SeMap could lead to significant advancements in both visual prompt learning and zero-shot transfer. We hope with SeMap, we can help the community move forward to more efficient and lightweight utilization of large vision models.
summary: Visual prompt learning, as a newly emerged technique, leverages the knowledge learned by a large-scale pre-trained model and adapts it to downstream tasks through the usage of prompts. While previous research has focused on designing effective prompts, in this work, we argue that compared to prompt design, a good mapping strategy matters more. In this sense, we propose SeMap, a more effective mapping using the semantic alignment between the pre-trained model's knowledge and the downstream task. Our experimental results show that SeMap can largely boost the performance of visual prompt learning. Moreover, our experiments show that SeMap is capable of achieving competitive zero-shot transfer, indicating that it can perform the downstream task without any fine-tuning on the corresponding dataset. This demonstrates the potential of our proposed method to be used in a broader range of applications where the zero-shot transfer is desired. Results suggest that our proposed SeMap could lead to significant advancements in both visual prompt learning and zero-shot transfer. We hope with SeMap, we can help the community move forward to more efficient and lightweight utilization of large vision models.
abstract_zh: 视觉提示学习作为一种新兴技术，利用大规模预训练模型学到的知识，并通过使用提示将其适应下游任务。虽然之前的研究重点是设计有效的提示，但在这项工作中，我们认为与提示设计相比，良好的映射策略更重要。从这个意义上说，我们提出了 SeMap，这是一种利用预训练模型的知识和下游任务之间的语义对齐的更有效的映射。我们的实验结果表明 SeMap 可以很大程度上提高视觉提示学习的性能。此外，我们的实验表明，SeMap 能够实现竞争性零样本传输，这表明它无需对相应数据集进行任何微调即可执行下游任务。这证明了我们提出的方法在需要零样本传输的更广泛应用中的潜力。结果表明，我们提出的 SeMap 可以在视觉提示学习和零样本迁移方面带来重大进步。我们希望通过 SeMap，我们可以帮助社区更加高效、轻量级地利用大型视觉模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SeMap的语义映射方法，通过优化预训练模型与下游任务间的语义对齐，提升视觉提示学习的性能并实现零样本迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉提示学习研究过度关注提示设计，而忽视了预训练模型知识与下游任务间的映射策略，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 提出SeMap方法，利用语义对齐机制建立预训练模型与下游任务的映射关系，无需任务特定微调即可实现知识迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明SeMap显著提升视觉提示学习性能，并在零样本场景下达到与微调相当的效果，验证了其迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: SeMap通过语义映射策略为视觉提示学习和零样本迁移提供了新思路，有望推动大模型在更多场景的高效应用。

authors_text: Jianyuan Ruan,Bo Li,Yibo Wang,Yuxiang Sun
title: SLAMesh: Real-time LiDAR Simultaneous Localization and Meshing
title_zh: SLAMesh：实时激光雷达同步定位和网格划分
comment: Accepted by ICRA 2023. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses
comments: Accepted by ICRA 2023. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses
abstract: Most current LiDAR simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) systems build maps in point clouds, which are sparse when zoomed in, even though they seem dense to human eyes. Dense maps are essential for robotic applications, such as map-based navigation. Due to the low memory cost, mesh has become an attractive dense model for mapping in recent years. However, existing methods usually produce mesh maps by using an offline post-processing step to generate mesh maps. This two-step pipeline does not allow these methods to use the built mesh maps online and to enable localization and meshing to benefit each other. To solve this problem, we propose the first CPU-only real-time LiDAR SLAM system that can simultaneously build a mesh map and perform localization against the mesh map. A novel and direct meshing strategy with Gaussian process reconstruction realizes the fast building, registration, and updating of mesh maps. We perform experiments on several public datasets. The results show that our SLAM system can run at around $40$Hz. The localization and meshing accuracy also outperforms the state-of-the-art methods, including the TSDF map and Poisson reconstruction. Our code and video demos are available at: https://github.com/lab-sun/SLAMesh.
summary: Most current LiDAR simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) systems build maps in point clouds, which are sparse when zoomed in, even though they seem dense to human eyes. Dense maps are essential for robotic applications, such as map-based navigation. Due to the low memory cost, mesh has become an attractive dense model for mapping in recent years. However, existing methods usually produce mesh maps by using an offline post-processing step to generate mesh maps. This two-step pipeline does not allow these methods to use the built mesh maps online and to enable localization and meshing to benefit each other. To solve this problem, we propose the first CPU-only real-time LiDAR SLAM system that can simultaneously build a mesh map and perform localization against the mesh map. A novel and direct meshing strategy with Gaussian process reconstruction realizes the fast building, registration, and updating of mesh maps. We perform experiments on several public datasets. The results show that our SLAM system can run at around $40$Hz. The localization and meshing accuracy also outperforms the state-of-the-art methods, including the TSDF map and Poisson reconstruction. Our code and video demos are available at: https://github.com/lab-sun/SLAMesh.
abstract_zh: 目前大多数激光雷达同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 系统都是在点云中构建地图，这些地图在放大时会变得稀疏，尽管对于人眼来说它们看起来很密集。密集地图对于机器人应用至关重要，例如基于地图的导航。由于内存成本低，网格近年来已成为一种有吸引力的密集映射模型。然而，现有方法通常通过使用离线后处理步骤来生成网格图来生成网格图。这个两步管道不允许这些方法在线使用构建的网格地图，也不允许本地化和网格划分相互受益。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了第一个仅使用 CPU 的实时 LiDAR SLAM 系统，该系统可以同时构建网格地图并针对网格地图执行定位。采用高斯过程重建的新颖直接网格划分策略实现了网格图的快速构建、配准和更新。我们在几个公共数据集上进行实验。结果表明，我们的 SLAM 系统可以在 40$Hz 左右运行。定位和网格划分精度也优于最先进的方法，包括 TSDF 图和泊松重建。我们的代码和视频演示位于：https://github.com/lab-sun/SLAMesh。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SLAMesh，一种基于CPU的实时LiDAR同时定位与网格化（SLAM）系统，能够实时构建网格地图并进行定位。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR SLAM系统生成的点云地图在放大时稀疏，而密集网格地图对机器人导航至关重要。现有方法依赖离线处理生成网格地图，无法实现实时在线定位与网格化的协同优化。
AI.method: 提出直接网格化策略结合高斯过程重建，实现网格地图的快速构建、注册与更新，首次在CPU上实现实时LiDAR SLAM的网格地图构建与定位协同。
AI.result: 系统在多个公开数据集上以约40Hz运行，定位与网格化精度优于TSDF地图和泊松重建等先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SLAMesh是首个基于CPU的实时LiDAR SLAM网格化系统，兼顾高效性与精度，适用于实时机器人导航等场景。

search_text: SLAMesh: Real-time LiDAR Simultaneous Localization and Meshing SLAMesh：实时激光雷达同步定位和网格划分 Most current LiDAR simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) systems build maps in point clouds, which are sparse when zoomed in, even though they seem dense to human eyes. Dense maps are essential for robotic applications, such as map-based navigation. Due to the low memory cost, mesh has become an attractive dense model for mapping in recent years. However, existing methods usually produce mesh maps by using an offline post-processing step to generate mesh maps. This two-step pipeline does not allow these methods to use the built mesh maps online and to enable localization and meshing to benefit each other. To solve this problem, we propose the first CPU-only real-time LiDAR SLAM system that can simultaneously build a mesh map and perform localization against the mesh map. A novel and direct meshing strategy with Gaussian process reconstruction realizes the fast building, registration, and updating of mesh maps. We perform experiments on several public datasets. The results show that our SLAM system can run at around $40$Hz. The localization and meshing accuracy also outperforms the state-of-the-art methods, including the TSDF map and Poisson reconstruction. Our code and video demos are available at: https://github.com/lab-sun/SLAMesh. 目前大多数激光雷达同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 系统都是在点云中构建地图，这些地图在放大时会变得稀疏，尽管对于人眼来说它们看起来很密集。密集地图对于机器人应用至关重要，例如基于地图的导航。由于内存成本低，网格近年来已成为一种有吸引力的密集映射模型。然而，现有方法通常通过使用离线后处理步骤来生成网格图来生成网格图。这个两步管道不允许这些方法在线使用构建的网格地图，也不允许本地化和网格划分相互受益。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了第一个仅使用 CPU 的实时 LiDAR SLAM 系统，该系统可以同时构建网格地图并针对网格地图执行定位。采用高斯过程重建的新颖直接网格划分策略实现了网格图的快速构建、配准和更新。我们在几个公共数据集上进行实验。结果表明，我们的 SLAM 系统可以在 40$Hz 左右运行。定位和网格划分精度也优于最先进的方法，包括 TSDF 图和泊松重建。我们的代码和视频演示位于：https://github.com/lab-sun/SLAMesh。 本文提出SLAMesh，一种基于CPU的实时LiDAR同时定位与网格化（SLAM）系统，能够实时构建网格地图并进行定位。 Jianyuan Ruan,Bo Li,Yibo Wang,Yuxiang Sun cs.RO

authors_text: Haoqing Wang,Yehui Tang,Yunhe Wang,Jianyuan Guo,Zhi-Hong Deng,Kai Han
title: Masked Image Modeling with Local Multi-Scale Reconstruction
title_zh: 具有局部多尺度重建的掩模图像建模
abstract: Masked Image Modeling (MIM) achieves outstanding success in self-supervised representation learning. Unfortunately, MIM models typically have huge computational burden and slow learning process, which is an inevitable obstacle for their industrial applications. Although the lower layers play the key role in MIM, existing MIM models conduct reconstruction task only at the top layer of encoder. The lower layers are not explicitly guided and the interaction among their patches is only used for calculating new activations. Considering the reconstruction task requires non-trivial inter-patch interactions to reason target signals, we apply it to multiple local layers including lower and upper layers. Further, since the multiple layers expect to learn the information of different scales, we design local multi-scale reconstruction, where the lower and upper layers reconstruct fine-scale and coarse-scale supervision signals respectively. This design not only accelerates the representation learning process by explicitly guiding multiple layers, but also facilitates multi-scale semantical understanding to the input. Extensive experiments show that with significantly less pre-training burden, our model achieves comparable or better performance on classification, detection and segmentation tasks than existing MIM models.
summary: Masked Image Modeling (MIM) achieves outstanding success in self-supervised representation learning. Unfortunately, MIM models typically have huge computational burden and slow learning process, which is an inevitable obstacle for their industrial applications. Although the lower layers play the key role in MIM, existing MIM models conduct reconstruction task only at the top layer of encoder. The lower layers are not explicitly guided and the interaction among their patches is only used for calculating new activations. Considering the reconstruction task requires non-trivial inter-patch interactions to reason target signals, we apply it to multiple local layers including lower and upper layers. Further, since the multiple layers expect to learn the information of different scales, we design local multi-scale reconstruction, where the lower and upper layers reconstruct fine-scale and coarse-scale supervision signals respectively. This design not only accelerates the representation learning process by explicitly guiding multiple layers, but also facilitates multi-scale semantical understanding to the input. Extensive experiments show that with significantly less pre-training burden, our model achieves comparable or better performance on classification, detection and segmentation tasks than existing MIM models.
abstract_zh: 掩模图像建模（MIM）在自监督表示学习方面取得了巨大的成功。不幸的是，MIM模型通常具有巨大的计算负担和缓慢的学习过程，这是其工业应用不可避免的障碍。虽然较低层在 MIM 中起着关键作用，但现有的 MIM 模型仅在编码器的顶层进行重建任务。较低层没有明确的指导，它们的补丁之间的交互仅用于计算新的激活。考虑到重建任务需要不平凡的块间交互来推理目标信号，我们将其应用于包括下层和上层的多个局部层。此外，由于多层期望学习不同尺度的信息，因此我们设计了局部多尺度重建，其中下层和上层分别重建精细尺度和粗尺度监督信号。这种设计不仅通过显式引导多个层来加速表示学习过程，而且还促进了对输入的多尺度语义理解。大量实验表明，在预训练负担显着减轻的情况下，我们的模型在分类、检测和分割任务上实现了与现有 MIM 模型相当或更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于局部多尺度重建的掩码图像建模方法，以提升自监督表示学习的效率和效果。
AI.motivation: 现有MIM模型计算负担重且学习效率低，且仅在顶层进行重建任务，未能有效利用低层特征，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 在编码器的多个局部层（包括低层和高层）引入多尺度重建任务，使低层学习细粒度特征，高层学习粗粒度特征，从而显式引导多层特征学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在分类、检测和分割任务上达到或超越现有MIM模型的性能，同时显著减少预训练计算负担。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多尺度重建有效提升了模型的学习效率和多尺度语义理解能力，为工业应用提供了更高效的MIM解决方案。

The lower layers are not explicitly guided and the interaction among their patches is only used for calculating new activations. authors_text: Sameep Dahal,Jukka Suomela
title: Distributed Half-Integral Matching and Beyond
title_zh: 分布式半积分匹配及其他
abstract: By prior work, it is known that any distributed graph algorithm that finds a maximal matching requires $Ω(\log^* n)$ communication rounds, while it is possible to find a maximal fractional matching in $O(1)$ rounds in bounded-degree graphs. However, all prior $O(1)$-round algorithms for maximal fractional matching use arbitrarily fine-grained fractional values. In particular, none of them is able to find a half-integral solution, using only values from $\{0, \frac12, 1\}$. We show that the use of fine-grained fractional values is necessary, and moreover we give a complete characterization on exactly how small values are needed: if we consider maximal fractional matching in graphs of maximum degree $Δ= 2d$, and any distributed graph algorithm with round complexity $T(Δ)$ that only depends on $Δ$ and is independent of $n$, we show that the algorithm has to use fractional values with a denominator at least $2^d$. We give a new algorithm that shows that this is also sufficient.
summary: By prior work, it is known that any distributed graph algorithm that finds a maximal matching requires $Ω(\log^* n)$ communication rounds, while it is possible to find a maximal fractional matching in $O(1)$ rounds in bounded-degree graphs. However, all prior $O(1)$-round algorithms for maximal fractional matching use arbitrarily fine-grained fractional values. In particular, none of them is able to find a half-integral solution, using only values from $\{0, \frac12, 1\}$. We show that the use of fine-grained fractional values is necessary, and moreover we give a complete characterization on exactly how small values are needed: if we consider maximal fractional matching in graphs of maximum degree $Δ= 2d$, and any distributed graph algorithm with round complexity $T(Δ)$ that only depends on $Δ$ and is independent of $n$, we show that the algorithm has to use fractional values with a denominator at least $2^d$. We give a new algorithm that shows that this is also sufficient.
abstract_zh: 通过之前的工作，我们知道任何找到最大匹配的分布式图算法都需要 $Ω(\log^* n)$ 轮通信，而在有界度图中可以在 $O(1)$ 轮中找到最大分数匹配。然而，所有先前的最大分数匹配的 $O(1)$ 轮算法都使用任意细粒度的分数值。特别是，他们都无法仅使用 $\{0, \frac12, 1\}$ 中的值找到半积分解。我们证明了使用细粒度分数值是必要的，而且我们给出了到底需要多小的数值的完整表征：如果我们考虑最大度 $Δ= 2d$ 的图中的最大分数值匹配，以及任何具有轮复杂度 $T(Δ)$ 的分布式图算法，仅取决于 $Δ$ 并且独立于 $n$，我们表明该算法必须使用分母至少为 $2^d$ 的分数值。我们给出了一个新的算法，表明这也足够了。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了分布式图算法中最大分数匹配问题，特别是如何在有限轮次内找到半整数解。
AI.motivation: 已知分布式图算法中找到最大匹配需要Ω(log*n)轮通信，而最大分数匹配可在O(1)轮内完成，但所有现有算法都使用任意细粒度的分数值，无法仅用{0, 1/2, 1}的半整数解。
AI.method: 作者通过分析现有算法的限制，证明了使用细粒度分数值的必要性，并给出了一个完整的特征描述，随后提出了一种新算法，证明了该条件也是充分的。
AI.result: 该算法表明，在最大度数Δ=2d的图中，若算法的轮复杂度T(Δ)仅依赖于Δ而不依赖于n，则必须使用分母至少为2^d的分数值，并给出了满足这一条件的新算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了在分布式环境中，使用细粒度分数值是必要的，并展示了如何构造满足条件的算法，为分布式图算法设计提供了新的理论依据。

ai_content_json.method: 作者通过分析现有算法的限制，证明了使用细粒度分数值的必要性，并给出了一个完整的特征描述，随后提出了一种新算法，证明了该条件也是充分的。
ai_content_json.result: 该算法表明，在最大度数Δ=2d的图中，若算法的轮复杂度T(Δ)仅依赖于Δ而不依赖于n，则必须使用分母至少为2^d的分数值，并给出了满足这一条件的新算法。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 本文证明了在分布式环境中，使用细粒度分数值是必要的，并展示了如何构造满足条件的算法，为分布式图算法设计提供了新的理论依据。

tldr: 本文研究了分布式图算法中最大分数匹配问题，特别是如何在有限轮次内找到半整数解。

result: 该算法表明，在最大度数Δ=2d的图中，若算法的轮复杂度T(Δ)仅依赖于Δ而不依赖于n，则必须使用分母至少为2^d的分数值，并给出了满足这一条件的新算法。
conclusion: 本文证明了在分布式环境中，使用细粒度分数值是必要的，并展示了如何构造满足条件的算法，为分布式图算法设计提供了新的理论依据。
search_text: Distributed Half-Integral Matching and Beyond 分布式半积分匹配及其他 By prior work, it is known that any distributed graph algorithm that finds a maximal matching requires $Ω(\log^* n)$ communication rounds, while it is possible to find a maximal fractional matching in $O(1)$ rounds in bounded-degree graphs. However, all prior $O(1)$-round algorithms for maximal fractional matching use arbitrarily fine-grained fractional values. In particular, none of them is able to find a half-integral solution, using only values from $\{0, \frac12, 1\}$. We show that the use of fine-grained fractional values is necessary, and moreover we give a complete characterization on exactly how small values are needed: if we consider maximal fractional matching in graphs of maximum degree $Δ= 2d$, and any distributed graph algorithm with round complexity $T(Δ)$ that only depends on $Δ$ and is independent of $n$, we show that the algorithm has to use fractional values with a denominator at least $2^d$. We give a new algorithm that shows that this is also sufficient. 通过之前的工作，我们知道任何找到最大匹配的分布式图算法都需要 $Ω(\log^* n)$ 轮通信，而在有界度图中可以在 $O(1)$ 轮中找到最大分数匹配。然而，所有先前的最大分数匹配的 $O(1)$ 轮算法都使用任意细粒度的分数值。特别是，他们都无法仅使用 $\{0, \frac12, 1\}$ 中的值找到半积分解。我们证明了使用细粒度分数值是必要的，而且我们给出了到底需要多小的数值的完整表征：如果我们考虑最大度 $Δ= 2d$ 的图中的最大分数值匹配，以及任何具有轮复杂度 $T(Δ)$ 的分布式图算法，仅取决于 $Δ$ 并且独立于 $n$，我们表明该算法必须使用分母至少为 $2^d$ 的分数值。我们给出了一个新的算法，表明这也足够了。 本文研究了分布式图算法中最大分数匹配问题，特别是如何在有限轮次内找到半整数解。 Sameep Dahal,Jukka Suomela cs.DS,cs.DC

authors_text: Mustafa Zeqiri,Mark Niklas Müller,Marc Fischer,Martin Vechev
title: Efficient Certified Training and Robustness Verification of Neural ODEs
title_zh: 神经常微分方程的高效认证训练和鲁棒性验证
abstract: Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (NODEs) are a novel neural architecture, built around initial value problems with learned dynamics which are solved during inference. Thought to be inherently more robust against adversarial perturbations, they were recently shown to be vulnerable to strong adversarial attacks, highlighting the need for formal guarantees. However, despite significant progress in robustness verification for standard feed-forward architectures, the verification of high dimensional NODEs remains an open problem. In this work, we address this challenge and propose GAINS, an analysis framework for NODEs combining three key ideas: (i) a novel class of ODE solvers, based on variable but discrete time steps, (ii) an efficient graph representation of solver trajectories, and (iii) a novel abstraction algorithm operating on this graph representation. Together, these advances enable the efficient analysis and certified training of high-dimensional NODEs, by reducing the runtime from an intractable $O(\exp(d)+\exp(T))$ to ${O}(d+T^2 \log^2T)$ in the dimensionality $d$ and integration time $T$. In an extensive evaluation on computer vision (MNIST and FMNIST) and time-series forecasting (PHYSIO-NET) problems, we demonstrate the effectiveness of both our certified training and verification methods.
summary: Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (NODEs) are a novel neural architecture, built around initial value problems with learned dynamics which are solved during inference. Thought to be inherently more robust against adversarial perturbations, they were recently shown to be vulnerable to strong adversarial attacks, highlighting the need for formal guarantees. However, despite significant progress in robustness verification for standard feed-forward architectures, the verification of high dimensional NODEs remains an open problem. In this work, we address this challenge and propose GAINS, an analysis framework for NODEs combining three key ideas: (i) a novel class of ODE solvers, based on variable but discrete time steps, (ii) an efficient graph representation of solver trajectories, and (iii) a novel abstraction algorithm operating on this graph representation. Together, these advances enable the efficient analysis and certified training of high-dimensional NODEs, by reducing the runtime from an intractable $O(\exp(d)+\exp(T))$ to ${O}(d+T^2 \log^2T)$ in the dimensionality $d$ and integration time $T$. In an extensive evaluation on computer vision (MNIST and FMNIST) and time-series forecasting (PHYSIO-NET) problems, we demonstrate the effectiveness of both our certified training and verification methods.
abstract_zh: 神经常微分方程 (NODE) 是一种新颖的神经架构，围绕具有学习动态的初始值问题构建，并在推理过程中解决。它们被认为本质上更能抵御对抗性扰动，但最近被证明很容易受到强烈的对抗性攻击，这凸显了正式保证的必要性。然而，尽管标准前馈架构的鲁棒性验证取得了重大进展，高维节点的验证仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们解决了这一挑战并提出了 GAINS，这是一种结合了三个关键思想的节点分析框架：(i) 基于可变但离散时间步长的新型 ODE 求解器，(ii) 求解器轨迹的高效图形表示，以及 (iii) 在此图形表示上运行的新颖抽象算法。总之，这些进步通过将维数 $d$ 中的运行时间从棘手的 $O(\exp(d)+\exp(T))$ 减少到 ${O}(d+T^2 \log^2T)$ 和积分时间 $T$，实现了高维节点的高效分析和认证训练。在对计算机视觉（MNIST 和 FMNIST）和时间序列预测 (PHYSIO-NET) 问题的广泛评估中，我们证明了经过认证的培训和验证方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GAINS框架，解决高维神经常微分方程（NODEs）的鲁棒性验证难题，通过改进ODE求解器、轨迹图表示和抽象算法，显著提升验证效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管NODEs被认为具有更强的对抗鲁棒性，但其仍易受强对抗攻击，且现有方法难以处理高维NODEs的验证问题，亟需形式化保证。
AI.method: 结合离散变步长ODE求解器、轨迹图表示及基于图的抽象算法，将运行时间复杂度从指数级降至多项式级，实现高效验证与认证训练。
AI.result: 在MNIST/FMNIST图像和PHYSIO-NET时序数据集上验证了方法有效性，证明其认证训练和验证技术的可行性。
AI.conclusion: GAINS框架为高维NODEs提供了首个可扩展的鲁棒性验证方案，推动其在安全关键场景的应用。

authors_text: David Mohlin,Josephine Sullivan
title: Probabilistic 3d regression with projected huber distribution
title_zh: 具有投影 huber 分布的概率 3d 回归
abstract: Estimating probability distributions which describe where an object is likely to be from camera data is a task with many applications. In this work we describe properties which we argue such methods should conform to. We also design a method which conform to these properties. In our experiments we show that our method produces uncertainties which correlate well with empirical errors. We also show that the mode of the predicted distribution outperform our regression baselines. The code for our implementation is available online.
summary: Estimating probability distributions which describe where an object is likely to be from camera data is a task with many applications. In this work we describe properties which we argue such methods should conform to. We also design a method which conform to these properties. In our experiments we show that our method produces uncertainties which correlate well with empirical errors. We also show that the mode of the predicted distribution outperform our regression baselines. The code for our implementation is available online.
abstract_zh: 从相机数据中估计描述对象可能所在位置的概率分布是许多应用程序的一项任务。在这项工作中，我们描述了我们认为这些方法应该符合的属性。我们还设计了一种符合这些特性的方法。在我们的实验中，我们表明我们的方法产生的不确定性与经验误差密切相关。我们还表明，预测分布的模式优于我们的回归基线。我们的实现代码可以在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于投影Huber分布的概率3D回归方法，用于从摄像头数据估计物体位置的概率分布。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在概率分布建模中可能无法准确反映真实不确定性，需设计符合特定属性的方法以提升回归效果。
AI.method: 设计符合概率分布属性的回归方法，采用投影Huber分布进行鲁棒概率建模，结合3D空间特性优化预测不确定性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法的不确定性估计与实际误差高度相关，且预测分布众数优于传统回归基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 投影Huber分布方法在概率3D回归任务中能有效平衡鲁棒性与准确性，代码开源便于应用验证。

authors_text: Xingzhe Su,Wenwen Qiang,Jie Hu,Fengge Wu,Changwen Zheng,Fuchun Sun
title: Intriguing Property and Counterfactual Explanation of GAN for Remote Sensing Image Generation
title_zh: 用于遥感图像生成的 GAN 的有趣特性和反事实解释
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have achieved remarkable progress in the natural image field. However, when applying GANs in the remote sensing (RS) image generation task, an extraordinary phenomenon is observed: the GAN model is more sensitive to the size of training data for RS image generation than for natural image generation. In other words, the generation quality of RS images will change significantly with the number of training categories or samples per category. In this paper, we first analyze this phenomenon from two kinds of toy experiments and conclude that the amount of feature information contained in the GAN model decreases with reduced training data. Then we establish a structural causal model (SCM) of the data generation process and interpret the generated data as the counterfactuals. Based on this SCM, we theoretically prove that the quality of generated images is positively correlated with the amount of feature information. This provides insights for enriching the feature information learned by the GAN model during training. Consequently, we propose two innovative adjustment schemes, namely Uniformity Regularization (UR) and Entropy Regularization (ER), to increase the information learned by the GAN model at the distributional and sample levels, respectively. We theoretically and empirically demonstrate the effectiveness and versatility of our methods. Extensive experiments on three RS datasets and two natural datasets show that our methods outperform the well-established models on RS image generation tasks. The source code is available at https://github.com/rootSue/Causal-RSGAN.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have achieved remarkable progress in the natural image field. However, when applying GANs in the remote sensing (RS) image generation task, an extraordinary phenomenon is observed: the GAN model is more sensitive to the size of training data for RS image generation than for natural image generation. In other words, the generation quality of RS images will change significantly with the number of training categories or samples per category. In this paper, we first analyze this phenomenon from two kinds of toy experiments and conclude that the amount of feature information contained in the GAN model decreases with reduced training data. Then we establish a structural causal model (SCM) of the data generation process and interpret the generated data as the counterfactuals. Based on this SCM, we theoretically prove that the quality of generated images is positively correlated with the amount of feature information. This provides insights for enriching the feature information learned by the GAN model during training. Consequently, we propose two innovative adjustment schemes, namely Uniformity Regularization (UR) and Entropy Regularization (ER), to increase the information learned by the GAN model at the distributional and sample levels, respectively. We theoretically and empirically demonstrate the effectiveness and versatility of our methods. Extensive experiments on three RS datasets and two natural datasets show that our methods outperform the well-established models on RS image generation tasks. The source code is available at https://github.com/rootSue/Causal-RSGAN.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）在自然图像领域取得了显着的进展。然而，当将 GAN 应用到遥感（RS）图像生成任务时，观察到一个非同寻常的现象：与自然图像生成相比，GAN 模型对遥感图像生成的训练数据大小更敏感。换句话说，RS图像的生成质量会随着训练类别或每个类别的样本数量而发生显着变化。在本文中，我们首先从两种玩具实验中分析了这一现象，并得出结论：GAN 模型中包含的特征信息量随着训练数据的减少而减少。然后，我们建立数据生成过程的结构因果模型（SCM），并将生成的数据解释为反事实。基于这个SCM，我们从理论上证明了生成图像的质量与特征信息量呈正相关。这为丰富 GAN 模型在训练期间学习的特征信息提供了见解。因此，我们提出了两种创新的调整方案，即均匀正则化（UR）和熵正则化（ER），以分别增加 GAN 模型在分布和样本级别学习的信息。我们从理论上和经验上证明了我们方法的有效性和多功能性。对三个遥感数据集和两个自然数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法在遥感图像生成任务上优于成熟的模型。源代码可在 https://github.com/rootSue/Causal-RSGAN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了GAN在遥感图像生成中对训练数据量的敏感性问题，并提出两种正则化方法以提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN在遥感图像生成中对训练数据量变化敏感，生成质量波动大，需探究其原因并提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过结构因果模型分析特征信息量与生成质量的关系，提出均匀性正则化（UR）和熵正则化（ER）以增强模型信息学习能力。
AI.result: 在三个遥感和两个自然数据集上，所提方法在生成质量上优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法理论与实验均有效，为遥感图像生成中提升GAN性能提供了新思路。

search_text: Intriguing Property and Counterfactual Explanation of GAN for Remote Sensing Image Generation 用于遥感图像生成的 GAN 的有趣特性和反事实解释 Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have achieved remarkable progress in the natural image field. However, when applying GANs in the remote sensing (RS) image generation task, an extraordinary phenomenon is observed: the GAN model is more sensitive to the size of training data for RS image generation than for natural image generation. In other words, the generation quality of RS images will change significantly with the number of training categories or samples per category. In this paper, we first analyze this phenomenon from two kinds of toy experiments and conclude that the amount of feature information contained in the GAN model decreases with reduced training data. Then we establish a structural causal model (SCM) of the data generation process and interpret the generated data as the counterfactuals. Based on this SCM, we theoretically prove that the quality of generated images is positively correlated with the amount of feature information. This provides insights for enriching the feature information learned by the GAN model during training. Consequently, we propose two innovative adjustment schemes, namely Uniformity Regularization (UR) and Entropy Regularization (ER), to increase the information learned by the GAN model at the distributional and sample levels, respectively. We theoretically and empirically demonstrate the effectiveness and versatility of our methods. Extensive experiments on three RS datasets and two natural datasets show that our methods outperform the well-established models on RS image generation tasks. The source code is available at https://github.com/rootSue/Causal-RSGAN. 生成对抗网络（GAN）在自然图像领域取得了显着的进展。然而，当将 GAN 应用到遥感（RS）图像生成任务时，观察到一个非同寻常的现象：与自然图像生成相比，GAN 模型对遥感图像生成的训练数据大小更敏感。换句话说，RS图像的生成质量会随着训练类别或每个类别的样本数量而发生显着变化。在本文中，我们首先从两种玩具实验中分析了这一现象，并得出结论：GAN 模型中包含的特征信息量随着训练数据的减少而减少。然后，我们建立数据生成过程的结构因果模型（SCM），并将生成的数据解释为反事实。基于这个SCM，我们从理论上证明了生成图像的质量与特征信息量呈正相关。这为丰富 GAN 模型在训练期间学习的特征信息提供了见解。因此，我们提出了两种创新的调整方案，即均匀正则化（UR）和熵正则化（ER），以分别增加 GAN 模型在分布和样本级别学习的信息。我们从理论上和经验上证明了我们方法的有效性和多功能性。对三个遥感数据集和两个自然数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法在遥感图像生成任务上优于成熟的模型。源代码可在 https://github.com/rootSue/Causal-RSGAN 获取。 本文研究了GAN在遥感图像生成中对训练数据量的敏感性问题，并提出两种正则化方法以提升生成质量。 Xingzhe Su,Wenwen Qiang,Jie Hu,Fengge Wu,Changwen Zheng,Fuchun Sun cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yang Fu,Shibei Meng,Saihui Hou,Xuecai Hu,Yongzhen Huang
title: GPGait: Generalized Pose-based Gait Recognition
title_zh: GPGait：基于姿势的广义步态识别
abstract: Recent works on pose-based gait recognition have demonstrated the potential of using such simple information to achieve results comparable to silhouette-based methods. However, the generalization ability of pose-based methods on different datasets is undesirably inferior to that of silhouette-based ones, which has received little attention but hinders the application of these methods in real-world scenarios. To improve the generalization ability of pose-based methods across datasets, we propose a \textbf{G}eneralized \textbf{P}ose-based \textbf{Gait} recognition (\textbf{GPGait}) framework. First, a Human-Oriented Transformation (HOT) and a series of Human-Oriented Descriptors (HOD) are proposed to obtain a unified pose representation with discriminative multi-features. Then, given the slight variations in the unified representation after HOT and HOD, it becomes crucial for the network to extract local-global relationships between the keypoints. To this end, a Part-Aware Graph Convolutional Network (PAGCN) is proposed to enable efficient graph partition and local-global spatial feature extraction. Experiments on four public gait recognition datasets, CASIA-B, OUMVLP-Pose, Gait3D and GREW, show that our model demonstrates better and more stable cross-domain capabilities compared to existing skeleton-based methods, achieving comparable recognition results to silhouette-based ones. Code is available at https://github.com/BNU-IVC/FastPoseGait.
summary: Recent works on pose-based gait recognition have demonstrated the potential of using such simple information to achieve results comparable to silhouette-based methods. However, the generalization ability of pose-based methods on different datasets is undesirably inferior to that of silhouette-based ones, which has received little attention but hinders the application of these methods in real-world scenarios. To improve the generalization ability of pose-based methods across datasets, we propose a \textbf{G}eneralized \textbf{P}ose-based \textbf{Gait} recognition (\textbf{GPGait}) framework. First, a Human-Oriented Transformation (HOT) and a series of Human-Oriented Descriptors (HOD) are proposed to obtain a unified pose representation with discriminative multi-features. Then, given the slight variations in the unified representation after HOT and HOD, it becomes crucial for the network to extract local-global relationships between the keypoints. To this end, a Part-Aware Graph Convolutional Network (PAGCN) is proposed to enable efficient graph partition and local-global spatial feature extraction. Experiments on four public gait recognition datasets, CASIA-B, OUMVLP-Pose, Gait3D and GREW, show that our model demonstrates better and more stable cross-domain capabilities compared to existing skeleton-based methods, achieving comparable recognition results to silhouette-based ones. Code is available at https://github.com/BNU-IVC/FastPoseGait.
abstract_zh: 最近基于姿势的步态识别的工作已经证明了使用这种简单的信息来实现与基于轮廓的方法相当的结果的潜力。然而，基于姿势的方法在不同数据集上的泛化能力不如基于轮廓的方法，这一点很少受到关注，但却阻碍了这些方法在现实场景中的应用。为了提高基于姿势的方法跨数据集的泛化能力，我们提出了一个基于 \textbf{G} 泛化 \textbf{P}ose 的 \textbf{Gait} 识别（\textbf{GPGait}）框架。首先，提出了面向人类的变换（HOT）和一系列面向人类的描述符（HOD），以获得具有判别性多特征的统一姿势表示。然后，考虑到 HOT 和 HOD 后统一表示的细微变化，网络提取关键点之间的局部-全局关系变得至关重要。为此，提出了部分感知图卷积网络（PAGCN）来实现高效的图划分和局部全局空间特征提取。在 CASIA-B、OUMVLP-Pose、Gait3D 和 GREW 四个公共步态识别数据集上的实验表明，与现有的基于骨架的方法相比，我们的模型表现出更好、更稳定的跨域能力，实现了与基于轮廓的方法相当的识别结果。代码可在 https://github.com/BNU-IVC/FastPoseGait 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于姿态的通用步态识别框架GPGait，旨在提升跨数据集的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于姿态的步态识别方法在不同数据集上的泛化能力较差，限制了其在实际场景中的应用，需改进跨数据集性能。
AI.method: 提出人体导向变换（HOT）和人体导向描述符（HOD）获取统一姿态表示，并设计部分感知图卷积网络（PAGCN）提取关键点的局部-全局关系。
AI.result: 在CASIA-B、OUMVLP-Pose等四个公开数据集上，模型表现出优于现有骨架方法的跨域稳定性，识别效果接近基于轮廓的方法。
AI.conclusion: GPGait通过统一姿态表示与图网络优化，显著提升了姿态基步态识别的泛化能力，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Zhenshuo Zhang,Yun Zhu,Haizhou Shi,Siliang Tang
title: Structure-Aware Group Discrimination with Adaptive-View Graph Encoder: A Fast Graph Contrastive Learning Framework
title_zh: 使用自适应视图图编码器进行结构感知群体歧视：快速图对比学习框架
abstract: Albeit having gained significant progress lately, large-scale graph representation learning remains expensive to train and deploy for two main reasons: (i) the repetitive computation of multi-hop message passing and non-linearity in graph neural networks (GNNs); (ii) the computational cost of complex pairwise contrastive learning loss. Two main contributions are made in this paper targeting this twofold challenge: we first propose an adaptive-view graph neural encoder (AVGE) with a limited number of message passing to accelerate the forward pass computation, and then we propose a structure-aware group discrimination (SAGD) loss in our framework which avoids inefficient pairwise loss computing in most common GCL and improves the performance of the simple group discrimination. By the framework proposed, we manage to bring down the training and inference cost on various large-scale datasets by a significant margin (250x faster inference time) without loss of the downstream-task performance.
summary: Albeit having gained significant progress lately, large-scale graph representation learning remains expensive to train and deploy for two main reasons: (i) the repetitive computation of multi-hop message passing and non-linearity in graph neural networks (GNNs); (ii) the computational cost of complex pairwise contrastive learning loss. Two main contributions are made in this paper targeting this twofold challenge: we first propose an adaptive-view graph neural encoder (AVGE) with a limited number of message passing to accelerate the forward pass computation, and then we propose a structure-aware group discrimination (SAGD) loss in our framework which avoids inefficient pairwise loss computing in most common GCL and improves the performance of the simple group discrimination. By the framework proposed, we manage to bring down the training and inference cost on various large-scale datasets by a significant margin (250x faster inference time) without loss of the downstream-task performance.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近取得了重大进展，但大规模图表示学习的训练和部署成本仍然很高，主要原因有两个：（i）图神经网络（GNN）中多跳消息传递和非线性的重复计算； (ii) 复杂的成对对比学习损失的计算成本。本文针对这一双重挑战做出了两个主要贡献：我们首先提出了一种具有有限数量消息传递的自适应视图图神经编码器（AVGE），以加速前向传递计算，然后我们在我们的框架中提出了一种结构感知组辨别（SAGD）损失，它避免了最常见的 GCL 中低效的成对损失计算，并提高了简单组辨别的性能。通过提出的框架，我们设法大幅降低各种大型数据集的训练和推理成本（推理时间加快 250 倍），而不会损失下游任务性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种快速图对比学习框架，通过结构感知的组判别和自适应视图图编码器来加速大规模图表示学习。
AI.motivation: 大规模图表示学习因多跳消息传递的重复计算和复杂对比学习损失的高计算成本，导致训练和部署效率低下。
AI.method: 提出自适应视图图神经编码器（AVGE）减少消息传递次数，并设计结构感知组判别（SAGD）损失以避免低效的成对损失计算。
AI.result: 在多个大规模数据集上实现训练和推理成本显著降低（推理速度提升250倍），且不损失下游任务性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了图表示学习中的计算瓶颈，为高效的大规模图学习提供了可行方案。
