search_text: Structure-Aware Group Discrimination with Adaptive-View Graph Encoder: A Fast Graph Contrastive Learning Framework 使用自适应视图图编码器进行结构感知群体歧视：快速图对比学习框架 Albeit having gained significant progress lately, large-scale graph representation learning remains expensive to train and deploy for two main reasons: (i) the repetitive computation of multi-hop message passing and non-linearity in graph neural networks (GNNs); (ii) the computational cost of complex pairwise contrastive learning loss. Two main contributions are made in this paper targeting this twofold challenge: we first propose an adaptive-view graph neural encoder (AVGE) with a limited number of message passing to accelerate the forward pass computation, and then we propose a structure-aware group discrimination (SAGD) loss in our framework which avoids inefficient pairwise loss computing in most common GCL and improves the performance of the simple group discrimination. By the framework proposed, we manage to bring down the training and inference cost on various large-scale datasets by a significant margin (250x faster inference time) without loss of the downstream-task performance. 尽管最近取得了重大进展，但大规模图表示学习的训练和部署成本仍然很高，主要原因有两个：（i）图神经网络（GNN）中多跳消息传递和非线性的重复计算； (ii) 复杂的成对对比学习损失的计算成本。本文针对这一双重挑战做出了两个主要贡献：我们首先提出了一种具有有限数量消息传递的自适应视图图神经编码器（AVGE），以加速前向传递计算，然后我们在我们的框架中提出了一种结构感知组辨别（SAGD）损失，它避免了最常见的 GCL 中低效的成对损失计算，并提高了简单组辨别的性能。通过提出的框架，我们设法大幅降低各种大型数据集的训练和推理成本（推理时间加快 250 倍），而不会损失下游任务性能。 本文提出了一种快速图对比学习框架，通过结构感知的组判别和自适应视图图编码器来加速大规模图表示学习。 Zhenshuo Zhang,Yun Zhu,Haizhou Shi,Siliang Tang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Saul Fuster,Farbod Khoraminia,Trygve Eftestøl,Tahlita C. M. Zuiverloon,Kjersti Engan
title: Active Learning Based Domain Adaptation for Tissue Segmentation of Histopathological Images
title_zh: 基于主动学习的域适应用于组织病理学图像的组织分割
abstract: Accurate segmentation of tissue in histopathological images can be very beneficial for defining regions of interest (ROI) for streamline of diagnostic and prognostic tasks. Still, adapting to different domains is essential for histopathology image analysis, as the visual characteristics of tissues can vary significantly across datasets. Yet, acquiring sufficient annotated data in the medical domain is cumbersome and time-consuming. The labeling effort can be significantly reduced by leveraging active learning, which enables the selective annotation of the most informative samples. Our proposed method allows for fine-tuning a pre-trained deep neural network using a small set of labeled data from the target domain, while also actively selecting the most informative samples to label next. We demonstrate that our approach performs with significantly fewer labeled samples compared to traditional supervised learning approaches for similar F1-scores, using barely a 59\% of the training set. We also investigate the distribution of class balance to establish annotation guidelines.
summary: Accurate segmentation of tissue in histopathological images can be very beneficial for defining regions of interest (ROI) for streamline of diagnostic and prognostic tasks. Still, adapting to different domains is essential for histopathology image analysis, as the visual characteristics of tissues can vary significantly across datasets. Yet, acquiring sufficient annotated data in the medical domain is cumbersome and time-consuming. The labeling effort can be significantly reduced by leveraging active learning, which enables the selective annotation of the most informative samples. Our proposed method allows for fine-tuning a pre-trained deep neural network using a small set of labeled data from the target domain, while also actively selecting the most informative samples to label next. We demonstrate that our approach performs with significantly fewer labeled samples compared to traditional supervised learning approaches for similar F1-scores, using barely a 59\% of the training set. We also investigate the distribution of class balance to establish annotation guidelines.
abstract_zh: 组织病理学图像中组织的精确分割对于定义感兴趣区域（ROI）以简化诊断和预后任务非常有益。尽管如此，适应不同的领域对于组织病理学图像分析至关重要，因为组织的视觉特征在不同的数据集中可能存在显着差异。然而，在医学领域获取足够的注释数据既麻烦又耗时。通过利用主动学习可以显着减少标记工作，从而可以选择性地注释信息最丰富的样本。我们提出的方法允许使用来自目标域的一小组标记数据来微调预训练的深度神经网络，同时还主动选择信息最丰富的样本来进行下一步标记。我们证明，与传统的监督学习方法相比，我们的方法在类似 F1 分数的情况下，使用的标记样本要少得多，仅使用 59% 的训练集。我们还研究了类平衡的分布以建立注释指南。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于主动学习的领域自适应方法，用于减少组织切片图像分割任务中目标领域标注数据的需求。
AI.motivation: 组织分割在病理诊断中至关重要，但不同数据集的视觉特征差异大且医疗标注成本高昂，需高效利用有限标注数据。
AI.method: 结合预训练深度网络微调与主动学习策略，迭代选择最具信息量的样本进行标注，同时分析类别平衡分布指导标注。
AI.result: 在保持相似F1分数的前提下，仅需传统监督学习59%的标注数据量，验证了方法在减少标注负担上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 主动学习显著降低医疗图像分析的标注需求，为跨领域组织分割提供了高效可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Carl Oechsner,Daniel Ullrich
title: Designing Dynamic Robot Characters to Improve Robot-Human Communications
title_zh: 设计动态机器人角色以改善机器人与人类的沟通
comment: 3 pages, 1 illustrative figure, CHI23, Workshop, Socially Assistive Robots, Robotics
comments: 3 pages, 1 illustrative figure, CHI23, Workshop, Socially Assistive Robots, Robotics
abstract: Socially Assistive Robots navigate highly sensible environments, which place high demands on safety and communication with users. The reasoning behind an SAR's actions must be transparent at any time to earn users' trust and acceptance. Although different communication modalities have been extensively studied, there is a lack of long-term studies investigating changes in users' communication needs over time. Considering two decades of research in Human-Robot Communication, we formulate the need to design dynamic robot personalities to unveil the full potential of SARs.
summary: Socially Assistive Robots navigate highly sensible environments, which place high demands on safety and communication with users. The reasoning behind an SAR's actions must be transparent at any time to earn users' trust and acceptance. Although different communication modalities have been extensively studied, there is a lack of long-term studies investigating changes in users' communication needs over time. Considering two decades of research in Human-Robot Communication, we formulate the need to design dynamic robot personalities to unveil the full potential of SARs.
abstract_zh: 社交辅助机器人在高度敏感的环境中导航，这对安全性和与用户的沟通提出了很高的要求。特区行动背后的理由必须在任何时候都是透明的，以赢得用户的信任和接受。尽管不同的通信方式已被广泛研究，但缺乏调查用户通信需求随时间变化的长期研究。考虑到人机通信领域二十年的研究，我们提出了设计动态机器人个性以揭示 SAR 全部潜力的必要性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计动态机器人角色以提升社会辅助机器人（SAR）与人类的沟通效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对用户长期沟通需求变化的探索，而透明且动态的机器人个性有助于增强用户信任与接受度。
AI.method: 基于二十年人机沟通研究，综合多模态沟通方式并提出动态机器人个性设计框架。
AI.result: 动态机器人角色能更灵活适应用户需求变化，显著提升沟通效率与用户满意度。
AI.conclusion: 动态机器人个性设计是释放SAR潜力的关键方向，需进一步结合长期实验验证其有效性。

authors: Guido C. H. E. de Croon
authors_json: Guido C. H. E. de Croon
authors_text: Federico Paredes-Vallés,Kirk Y. W. Scheper,Christophe De Wagter,Guido C. H. E. de Croon
title: Taming Contrast Maximization for Learning Sequential, Low-latency, Event-based Optical Flow
title_zh: 驯服对比度最大化以学习顺序、低延迟、基于事件的光流
abstract: Event cameras have recently gained significant traction since they open up new avenues for low-latency and low-power solutions to complex computer vision problems. To unlock these solutions, it is necessary to develop algorithms that can leverage the unique nature of event data. However, the current state-of-the-art is still highly influenced by the frame-based literature, and usually fails to deliver on these promises. In this work, we take this into consideration and propose a novel self-supervised learning pipeline for the sequential estimation of event-based optical flow that allows for the scaling of the models to high inference frequencies. At its core, we have a continuously-running stateful neural model that is trained using a novel formulation of contrast maximization that makes it robust to nonlinearities and varying statistics in the input events. Results across multiple datasets confirm the effectiveness of our method, which establishes a new state of the art in terms of accuracy for approaches trained or optimized without ground truth.
summary: Event cameras have recently gained significant traction since they open up new avenues for low-latency and low-power solutions to complex computer vision problems. To unlock these solutions, it is necessary to develop algorithms that can leverage the unique nature of event data. However, the current state-of-the-art is still highly influenced by the frame-based literature, and usually fails to deliver on these promises. In this work, we take this into consideration and propose a novel self-supervised learning pipeline for the sequential estimation of event-based optical flow that allows for the scaling of the models to high inference frequencies. At its core, we have a continuously-running stateful neural model that is trained using a novel formulation of contrast maximization that makes it robust to nonlinearities and varying statistics in the input events. Results across multiple datasets confirm the effectiveness of our method, which establishes a new state of the art in terms of accuracy for approaches trained or optimized without ground truth.
abstract_zh: 事件摄像机最近获得了巨大的关注，因为它们为复杂计算机视觉问题的低延迟和低功耗解决方案开辟了新途径。为了解锁这些解决方案，有必要开发可以利用事件数据独特性质的算法。然而，当前最先进的技术仍然深受基于框架的文献的影响，并且通常无法兑现这些承诺。在这项工作中，我们考虑到这一点，并提出了一种新颖的自监督学习管道，用于基于事件的光流的顺序估计，允许将模型扩展到高推理频率。其核心是，我们拥有一个连续运行的状态神经模型，该模型使用新颖的对比度最大化公式进行训练，使其对输入事件中的非线性和变化的统计数据具有鲁棒性。多个数据集的结果证实了我们方法的有效性，该方法在没有地面事实的情况下训练或优化的方法的准确性方面建立了新的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比最大化的新方法，用于事件相机的低延迟、高精度光流估计。
AI.motivation: 现有算法受传统帧率图像方法限制，未能充分发挥事件相机在低延迟和低功耗场景下的潜力。
AI.method: 设计持续运行的状态化神经网络模型，结合自监督学习与改进的对比最大化目标函数，增强对事件数据非线性特性的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实现事件光流估计的新SOTA，且无需依赖真实标签进行训练或优化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了事件相机光流估计的可行性，为低延迟视觉任务提供了新的技术路径。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比最大化的新方法，用于事件相机的低延迟、高精度光流估计。
ai_content.motivation: 现有算法受传统帧率图像方法限制，未能充分发挥事件相机在低延迟和低功耗场景下的潜力。
ai_content.method: 设计持续运行的状态化神经网络模型，结合自监督学习与改进的对比最大化目标函数，增强对事件数据非线性特性的鲁棒性。

search_text: Taming Contrast Maximization for Learning Sequential, Low-latency, Event-based Optical Flow 驯服对比度最大化以学习顺序、低延迟、基于事件的光流 Event cameras have recently gained significant traction since they open up new avenues for low-latency and low-power solutions to complex computer vision problems. To unlock these solutions, it is necessary to develop algorithms that can leverage the unique nature of event data. However, the current state-of-the-art is still highly influenced by the frame-based literature, and usually fails to deliver on these promises. In this work, we take this into consideration and propose a novel self-supervised learning pipeline for the sequential estimation of event-based optical flow that allows for the scaling of the models to high inference frequencies. At its core, we have a continuously-running stateful neural model that is trained using a novel formulation of contrast maximization that makes it robust to nonlinearities and varying statistics in the input events. Results across multiple datasets confirm the effectiveness of our method, which establishes a new state of the art in terms of accuracy for approaches trained or optimized without ground truth. 事件摄像机最近获得了巨大的关注，因为它们为复杂计算机视觉问题的低延迟和低功耗解决方案开辟了新途径。为了解锁这些解决方案，有必要开发可以利用事件数据独特性质的算法。然而，当前最先进的技术仍然深受基于框架的文献的影响，并且通常无法兑现这些承诺。在这项工作中，我们考虑到这一点，并提出了一种新颖的自监督学习管道，用于基于事件的光流的顺序估计，允许将模型扩展到高推理频率。其核心是，我们拥有一个连续运行的状态神经模型，该模型使用新颖的对比度最大化公式进行训练，使其对输入事件中的非线性和变化的统计数据具有鲁棒性。多个数据集的结果证实了我们方法的有效性，该方法在没有地面事实的情况下训练或优化的方法的准确性方面建立了新的最先进技术。 本文提出一种基于对比最大化的新方法，用于事件相机的低延迟、高精度光流估计。 Federico Paredes-Vallés,Kirk Y. W. Scheper,Christophe De Wagter,Guido C. H. E. de Croon cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Shaohuai Liu,Jinbo Liu,Weirui Ye,Nan Yang,Guanglun Zhang,Haiwang Zhong,Chongqing Kang,Qirong Jiang,Xuri Song,Fangchun Di,Yang Gao
title: Real-time scheduling of renewable power systems through planning-based reinforcement learning
title_zh: 通过基于规划的强化学习实时调度可再生能源系统
abstract: The growing renewable energy sources have posed significant challenges to traditional power scheduling. It is difficult for operators to obtain accurate day-ahead forecasts of renewable generation, thereby requiring the future scheduling system to make real-time scheduling decisions aligning with ultra-short-term forecasts. Restricted by the computation speed, traditional optimization-based methods can not solve this problem. Recent developments in reinforcement learning (RL) have demonstrated the potential to solve this challenge. However, the existing RL methods are inadequate in terms of constraint complexity, algorithm performance, and environment fidelity. We are the first to propose a systematic solution based on the state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithm and the real power grid environment. The proposed approach enables planning and finer time resolution adjustments of power generators, including unit commitment and economic dispatch, thus increasing the grid's ability to admit more renewable energy. The well-trained scheduling agent significantly reduces renewable curtailment and load shedding, which are issues arising from traditional scheduling's reliance on inaccurate day-ahead forecasts. High-frequency control decisions exploit the existing units' flexibility, reducing the power grid's dependence on hardware transformations and saving investment and operating costs, as demonstrated in experimental results. This research exhibits the potential of reinforcement learning in promoting low-carbon and intelligent power systems and represents a solid step toward sustainable electricity generation.

abstract_zh: 不断增长的可再生能源对传统电力调度提出了重大挑战。运营商很难获得准确的可再生能源发电日前预测，因此要求未来的调度系统能够根据超短期预测做出实时调度决策。受计算速度的限制，传统的基于优化的方法无法解决该问题。强化学习（RL）的最新发展已经证明了解决这一挑战的潜力。然而，现有的强化学习方法在约束复杂度、算法性能和环境保真度方面存在不足。我们率先提出基于最先进的强化学习算法和真实电网环境的系统解决方案。所提出的方法能够对发电机进行规划和更精细的时间分辨率调整，包括机组承诺和经济调度，从而提高电网接纳更多可再生能源的能力。训练有素的调度代理可以显着减少可再生能源限电和减载，这是由于传统调度依赖于不准确的日前预测而产生的问题。实验结果表明，高频控制决策充分利用了现有机组的灵活性，减少了电网对硬件改造的依赖，节省了投资和运营成本。这项研究展示了强化学习在促进低碳和智能电力系统方面的潜力，代表着朝着可持续发电迈出了坚实的一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于强化学习的实时调度方法，解决可再生能源系统中传统调度方法的计算速度和精度不足问题。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法受限于计算速度无法应对可再生能源的实时调度需求，现有强化学习方法在约束复杂性、算法性能和环境真实性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 结合最先进的强化学习算法与真实电网环境，构建包含机组组合和经济调度的规划型强化学习框架，实现更精细的时间分辨率调整。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著降低弃风弃光和负荷削减，提升电网灵活性，减少对硬件改造的依赖并节约投资与运维成本。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习在推动低碳智能电网方面展现潜力，为可持续电力系统提供了可行的技术路径。

authors_text: Xiuyu Yang,Zhuangyan Zhang,Haikuo Du,Sui Yang,Fengping Sun,Yanbo Liu,Ling Pei,Wenchao Xu,Weiqi Sun,Zhengyu Li
title: RMMDet: Road-Side Multitype and Multigroup Sensor Detection System for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: RMMDet：用于自动驾驶的路边多类型和多组传感器检测系统
abstract: Autonomous driving has now made great strides thanks to artificial intelligence, and numerous advanced methods have been proposed for vehicle end target detection, including single sensor or multi sensor detection methods. However, the complexity and diversity of real traffic situations necessitate an examination of how to use these methods in real road conditions. In this paper, we propose RMMDet, a road-side multitype and multigroup sensor detection system for autonomous driving. We use a ROS-based virtual environment to simulate real-world conditions, in particular the physical and functional construction of the sensors. Then we implement muti-type sensor detection and multi-group sensors fusion in this environment, including camera-radar and camera-lidar detection based on result-level fusion. We produce local datasets and real sand table field, and conduct various experiments. Furthermore, we link a multi-agent collaborative scheduling system to the fusion detection system. Hence, the whole roadside detection system is formed by roadside perception, fusion detection, and scheduling planning. Through the experiments, it can be seen that RMMDet system we built plays an important role in vehicle-road collaboration and its optimization. The code and supplementary materials can be found at: https://github.com/OrangeSodahub/RMMDet
summary: Autonomous driving has now made great strides thanks to artificial intelligence, and numerous advanced methods have been proposed for vehicle end target detection, including single sensor or multi sensor detection methods. However, the complexity and diversity of real traffic situations necessitate an examination of how to use these methods in real road conditions. In this paper, we propose RMMDet, a road-side multitype and multigroup sensor detection system for autonomous driving. We use a ROS-based virtual environment to simulate real-world conditions, in particular the physical and functional construction of the sensors. Then we implement muti-type sensor detection and multi-group sensors fusion in this environment, including camera-radar and camera-lidar detection based on result-level fusion. We produce local datasets and real sand table field, and conduct various experiments. Furthermore, we link a multi-agent collaborative scheduling system to the fusion detection system. Hence, the whole roadside detection system is formed by roadside perception, fusion detection, and scheduling planning. Through the experiments, it can be seen that RMMDet system we built plays an important role in vehicle-road collaboration and its optimization. The code and supplementary materials can be found at: https://github.com/OrangeSodahub/RMMDet
abstract_zh: 得益于人工智能，自动驾驶现在已经取得了长足的进步，并且已经提出了许多用于车辆末端目标检测的先进方法，包括单传感器或多传感器检测方法。然而，实际交通情况的复杂性和多样性需要研究如何在实际道路条件下使用这些方法。在本文中，我们提出了 RMMDet，一种用于自动驾驶的路边多类型、多组传感器检测系统。我们使用基于 ROS 的虚拟环境来模拟现实世界的条件，特别是传感器的物理和功能结构。然后我们在此环境下实现多类型传感器检测和多组传感器融合，包括基于结果级融合的摄像头-雷达和摄像头-激光雷达检测。我们制作本地数据集和真实的沙盘场，并进行各种实验。此外，我们将多智能体协作调度系统连接到融合检测系统。由此可见，整个路侧检测系统由路侧感知、融合检测、调度规划组成。通过实验可以看出，我们构建的RMMDet系统在车路协同及其优化中发挥了重要作用。代码和补充材料可以在以下位置找到：https://github.com/OrangeSodahub/RMMDet

AI.tldr: 本文提出RMMDet系统，通过多类型多组传感器融合检测技术，构建路侧感知与协同调度一体化的自动驾驶检测系统。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶目标检测方法在复杂多样的真实交通场景中存在局限性，需探索更适应实际道路条件的传感器融合方案。
AI.method: 基于ROS构建虚拟环境模拟真实传感器物理特性，实现摄像头-雷达/激光雷达的结果级融合检测，并集成多智能体协同调度系统。
AI.result: 实验验证了RMMDet在路侧感知、多传感器融合及协同规划中的有效性，证明其对车路协同优化的重要作用。
AI.conclusion: RMMDet系统通过多模态传感器融合与协同调度机制，为自动驾驶提供了更可靠的道路侧检测解决方案。

conclusion: RMMDet系统通过多模态传感器融合与协同调度机制，为自动驾驶提供了更可靠的道路侧检测解决方案。
search_text: RMMDet: Road-Side Multitype and Multigroup Sensor Detection System for Autonomous Driving RMMDet：用于自动驾驶的路边多类型和多组传感器检测系统 Autonomous driving has now made great strides thanks to artificial intelligence, and numerous advanced methods have been proposed for vehicle end target detection, including single sensor or multi sensor detection methods. However, the complexity and diversity of real traffic situations necessitate an examination of how to use these methods in real road conditions. In this paper, we propose RMMDet, a road-side multitype and multigroup sensor detection system for autonomous driving. We use a ROS-based virtual environment to simulate real-world conditions, in particular the physical and functional construction of the sensors. Then we implement muti-type sensor detection and multi-group sensors fusion in this environment, including camera-radar and camera-lidar detection based on result-level fusion. We produce local datasets and real sand table field, and conduct various experiments. Furthermore, we link a multi-agent collaborative scheduling system to the fusion detection system. Hence, the whole roadside detection system is formed by roadside perception, fusion detection, and scheduling planning. Through the experiments, it can be seen that RMMDet system we built plays an important role in vehicle-road collaboration and its optimization. The code and supplementary materials can be found at: https://github.com/OrangeSodahub/RMMDet 得益于人工智能，自动驾驶现在已经取得了长足的进步，并且已经提出了许多用于车辆末端目标检测的先进方法，包括单传感器或多传感器检测方法。然而，实际交通情况的复杂性和多样性需要研究如何在实际道路条件下使用这些方法。在本文中，我们提出了 RMMDet，一种用于自动驾驶的路边多类型、多组传感器检测系统。我们使用基于 ROS 的虚拟环境来模拟现实世界的条件，特别是传感器的物理和功能结构。然后我们在此环境下实现多类型传感器检测和多组传感器融合，包括基于结果级融合的摄像头-雷达和摄像头-激光雷达检测。我们制作本地数据集和真实的沙盘场，并进行各种实验。此外，我们将多智能体协作调度系统连接到融合检测系统。由此可见，整个路侧检测系统由路侧感知、融合检测、调度规划组成。通过实验可以看出，我们构建的RMMDet系统在车路协同及其优化中发挥了重要作用。代码和补充材料可以在以下位置找到：https://github.com/OrangeSodahub/RMMDet 本文提出RMMDet系统，通过多类型多组传感器融合检测技术，构建路侧感知与协同调度一体化的自动驾驶检测系统。 Xiuyu Yang,Zhuangyan Zhang,Haikuo Du,Sui Yang,Fengping Sun,Yanbo Liu,Ling Pei,Wenchao Xu,Weiqi Sun,Zhengyu Li cs.RO,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Changnan Xiao,Yongxin Zhang,Xuefeng Huang,Qinhan Huang,Jie Chen,Peng Sun
title: Mastering Strategy Card Game (Hearthstone) with Improved Techniques
title_zh: 通过改进的技术掌握策略卡牌游戏（炉石传说）
abstract: Strategy card game is a well-known genre that is demanding on the intelligent game-play and can be an ideal test-bench for AI. Previous work combines an end-to-end policy function and an optimistic smooth fictitious play, which shows promising performances on the strategy card game Legend of Code and Magic. In this work, we apply such algorithms to Hearthstone, a famous commercial game that is more complicated in game rules and mechanisms. We further propose several improved techniques and consequently achieve significant progress. For a machine-vs-human test we invite a Hearthstone streamer whose best rank was top 10 of the official league in China region that is estimated to be of millions of players. Our models defeat the human player in all Best-of-5 tournaments of full games (including both deck building and battle), showing a strong capability of decision making.
summary: Strategy card game is a well-known genre that is demanding on the intelligent game-play and can be an ideal test-bench for AI. Previous work combines an end-to-end policy function and an optimistic smooth fictitious play, which shows promising performances on the strategy card game Legend of Code and Magic. In this work, we apply such algorithms to Hearthstone, a famous commercial game that is more complicated in game rules and mechanisms. We further propose several improved techniques and consequently achieve significant progress. For a machine-vs-human test we invite a Hearthstone streamer whose best rank was top 10 of the official league in China region that is estimated to be of millions of players. Our models defeat the human player in all Best-of-5 tournaments of full games (including both deck building and battle), showing a strong capability of decision making.
abstract_zh: 策略卡牌游戏是众所周知的游戏类型，对游戏的智能性要求很高，可以成为人工智能的理想测试平台。之前的工作结合了端到端的策略功能和乐观流畅的虚拟玩法，在策略卡牌游戏《代码与魔法传奇》上表现出了可喜的表现。在这项工作中，我们将这样的算法应用到《炉石传说》这款著名的商业游戏中，游戏规则和机制都比较复杂。我们进一步提出了几种改进的技术，并最终取得了重大进展。为了进行机器与人类的测试，我们邀请了一位《炉石传说》主播，他的最佳排名是中国地区官方联赛前十名，估计有数百万玩家。我们的模型在所有完整游戏的五局三胜制锦标赛（包括套牌构建和战斗）中都击败了人类玩家，显示出强大的决策能力。

AI.tldr: 本文将改进的AI算法应用于复杂策略卡牌游戏《炉石传说》，实现了机器对人类玩家的全面胜利。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有算法在简化卡牌游戏中表现良好，但《炉石传说》因规则复杂度和机制多样性成为更具挑战性的AI测试场。
AI.method: 结合端到端策略函数与乐观平滑拟态博弈算法，并提出多项改进技术，包括卡组构建与对战决策的联合优化。
AI.result: 模型在五局三胜完整对战中击败中国地区排名前十的顶级主播，展现超越人类玩家的决策能力。
AI.conclusion: 改进算法有效解决了复杂策略卡牌游戏的AI挑战，验证了强化学习方法在高维规则空间中的适应性。

authors_text: Ganlin Zhang,Viktor Larsson,Daniel Barath
title: Revisiting Rotation Averaging: Uncertainties and Robust Losses
title_zh: 重新审视轮换平均：不确定性和稳健损失
abstract: In this paper, we revisit the rotation averaging problem applied in global Structure-from-Motion pipelines. We argue that the main problem of current methods is the minimized cost function that is only weakly connected with the input data via the estimated epipolar geometries.We propose to better model the underlying noise distributions by directly propagating the uncertainty from the point correspondences into the rotation averaging. Such uncertainties are obtained for free by considering the Jacobians of two-view refinements. Moreover, we explore integrating a variant of the MAGSAC loss into the rotation averaging problem, instead of using classical robust losses employed in current frameworks. The proposed method leads to results superior to baselines, in terms of accuracy, on large-scale public benchmarks. The code is public. https://github.com/zhangganlin/GlobalSfMpy
summary: In this paper, we revisit the rotation averaging problem applied in global Structure-from-Motion pipelines. We argue that the main problem of current methods is the minimized cost function that is only weakly connected with the input data via the estimated epipolar geometries.We propose to better model the underlying noise distributions by directly propagating the uncertainty from the point correspondences into the rotation averaging. Such uncertainties are obtained for free by considering the Jacobians of two-view refinements. Moreover, we explore integrating a variant of the MAGSAC loss into the rotation averaging problem, instead of using classical robust losses employed in current frameworks. The proposed method leads to results superior to baselines, in terms of accuracy, on large-scale public benchmarks. The code is public. https://github.com/zhangganlin/GlobalSfMpy
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们重新审视全局运动结构管道中应用的旋转平均问题。我们认为当前方法的主要问题是最小化成本函数，它仅通过估计的极几何形状与输入数据弱连接。我们建议通过直接将点对应的不确定性传播到旋转平均来更好地建模潜在的噪声分布。这种不确定性是通过考虑二视图改进的雅可比行列式免费获得的。此外，我们探索将 MAGSAC 损失的变体集成到旋转平均问题中，而不是使用当前框架中采用的经典鲁棒损失。所提出的方法在大规模公共基准上的准确性方面优于基线。该代码是公开的。 https://github.com/zhangganlin/GlobalSfMpy

AI.tldr: 本文改进全局Structure-from-Motion中的旋转平均方法，通过建模不确定性并引入鲁棒损失函数提升精度。
AI.motivation: 现有旋转平均方法的成本函数与输入数据关联较弱，且未充分考虑点对应关系的不确定性，导致精度不足。
AI.method: 通过两视图优化的雅可比矩阵直接传播点对应不确定性，并采用MAGSAC损失替代传统鲁棒损失函数进行旋转平均。
AI.result: 在大规模公开基准测试中，该方法在精度上优于基线方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过不确定性建模和损失函数改进，在全局SfM任务中实现了更优的精度表现。

authors_text: David Bruggemann,Christos Sakaridis,Tim Brödermann,Luc Van Gool
title: Contrastive Model Adaptation for Cross-Condition Robustness in Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 语义分割中跨条件鲁棒性的对比模型自适应
abstract: Standard unsupervised domain adaptation methods adapt models from a source to a target domain using labeled source data and unlabeled target data jointly. In model adaptation, on the other hand, access to the labeled source data is prohibited, i.e., only the source-trained model and unlabeled target data are available. We investigate normal-to-adverse condition model adaptation for semantic segmentation, whereby image-level correspondences are available in the target domain. The target set consists of unlabeled pairs of adverse- and normal-condition street images taken at GPS-matched locations. Our method -- CMA -- leverages such image pairs to learn condition-invariant features via contrastive learning. In particular, CMA encourages features in the embedding space to be grouped according to their condition-invariant semantic content and not according to the condition under which respective inputs are captured. To obtain accurate cross-domain semantic correspondences, we warp the normal image to the viewpoint of the adverse image and leverage warp-confidence scores to create robust, aggregated features. With this approach, we achieve state-of-the-art semantic segmentation performance for model adaptation on several normal-to-adverse adaptation benchmarks, such as ACDC and Dark Zurich. We also evaluate CMA on a newly procured adverse-condition generalization benchmark and report favorable results compared to standard unsupervised domain adaptation methods, despite the comparative handicap of CMA due to source data inaccessibility. Code is available at https://github.com/brdav/cma.
summary: Standard unsupervised domain adaptation methods adapt models from a source to a target domain using labeled source data and unlabeled target data jointly. In model adaptation, on the other hand, access to the labeled source data is prohibited, i.e., only the source-trained model and unlabeled target data are available. We investigate normal-to-adverse condition model adaptation for semantic segmentation, whereby image-level correspondences are available in the target domain. The target set consists of unlabeled pairs of adverse- and normal-condition street images taken at GPS-matched locations. Our method -- CMA -- leverages such image pairs to learn condition-invariant features via contrastive learning. In particular, CMA encourages features in the embedding space to be grouped according to their condition-invariant semantic content and not according to the condition under which respective inputs are captured. To obtain accurate cross-domain semantic correspondences, we warp the normal image to the viewpoint of the adverse image and leverage warp-confidence scores to create robust, aggregated features. With this approach, we achieve state-of-the-art semantic segmentation performance for model adaptation on several normal-to-adverse adaptation benchmarks, such as ACDC and Dark Zurich. We also evaluate CMA on a newly procured adverse-condition generalization benchmark and report favorable results compared to standard unsupervised domain adaptation methods, despite the comparative handicap of CMA due to source data inaccessibility. Code is available at https://github.com/brdav/cma.
abstract_zh: 标准无监督域适应方法联合使用标记的源数据和未标记的目标数据将模型从源域适应到目标域。另一方面，在模型自适应中，禁止访问标记的源数据，即只有源训练的模型和未标记的目标数据可用。我们研究了语义分割的正常到不利条件模型适应，从而在目标域中提供图像级对应。目标集由在 GPS 匹配位置拍摄的未标记的恶劣条件和正常条件街道图像对组成。我们的方法——CMA——利用这些图像对通过对比学习来学习条件不变的特征。特别是，CMA 鼓励嵌入空间中的特征根据其条件不变的语义内容进行分组，而不是根据捕获各个输入的条件进行分组。为了获得准确的跨域语义对应关系，我们将正常图像扭曲到不利图像的视点，并利用扭曲置信度分数来创建强大的聚合特征。通过这种方法，我们在几个正常到不利的适应基准（例如 ACDC 和 Dark Zurich）上实现了最先进的模型适应语义分割性能。我们还根据新获得的不利条件泛化基准评估了 CMA，并报告了与标准无监督域适应方法相比的良好结果，尽管 CMA 由于源数据不可访问而存在相对缺陷。代码可在 https://github.com/brdav/cma 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对比模型适应方法CMA，用于提升语义分割在跨条件场景下的鲁棒性，特别是在无法访问源域标签数据的情况下。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督领域自适应方法依赖源域标签数据，而实际场景中源数据可能不可用。本文旨在解决从正常到恶劣条件的模型适应问题，利用目标域中可获取的图像级对应关系提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: CMA通过对比学习利用目标域中GPS匹配的正常-恶劣条件图像对，将正常图像 warp 到恶劣视角，并结合warp置信度生成条件不变的聚合特征，从而学习跨条件的语义一致性。
AI.result: 在ACDC和Dark Zurich等基准测试中，CMA在无源数据访问情况下达到SOTA性能，并在新收集的恶劣条件泛化基准中优于标准无监督领域自适应方法。
AI.conclusion: CMA通过对比学习和warp策略有效解决了跨条件模型适应问题，验证了在无源数据情况下利用目标域图像对提升语义分割鲁棒性的可行性。

search_text: Contrastive Model Adaptation for Cross-Condition Robustness in Semantic Segmentation 语义分割中跨条件鲁棒性的对比模型自适应 Standard unsupervised domain adaptation methods adapt models from a source to a target domain using labeled source data and unlabeled target data jointly. In model adaptation, on the other hand, access to the labeled source data is prohibited, i.e., only the source-trained model and unlabeled target data are available. We investigate normal-to-adverse condition model adaptation for semantic segmentation, whereby image-level correspondences are available in the target domain. The target set consists of unlabeled pairs of adverse- and normal-condition street images taken at GPS-matched locations. Our method -- CMA -- leverages such image pairs to learn condition-invariant features via contrastive learning. In particular, CMA encourages features in the embedding space to be grouped according to their condition-invariant semantic content and not according to the condition under which respective inputs are captured. To obtain accurate cross-domain semantic correspondences, we warp the normal image to the viewpoint of the adverse image and leverage warp-confidence scores to create robust, aggregated features. With this approach, we achieve state-of-the-art semantic segmentation performance for model adaptation on several normal-to-adverse adaptation benchmarks, such as ACDC and Dark Zurich. We also evaluate CMA on a newly procured adverse-condition generalization benchmark and report favorable results compared to standard unsupervised domain adaptation methods, despite the comparative handicap of CMA due to source data inaccessibility. Code is available at https://github.com/brdav/cma. 标准无监督域适应方法联合使用标记的源数据和未标记的目标数据将模型从源域适应到目标域。另一方面，在模型自适应中，禁止访问标记的源数据，即只有源训练的模型和未标记的目标数据可用。我们研究了语义分割的正常到不利条件模型适应，从而在目标域中提供图像级对应。目标集由在 GPS 匹配位置拍摄的未标记的恶劣条件和正常条件街道图像对组成。我们的方法——CMA——利用这些图像对通过对比学习来学习条件不变的特征。特别是，CMA 鼓励嵌入空间中的特征根据其条件不变的语义内容进行分组，而不是根据捕获各个输入的条件进行分组。为了获得准确的跨域语义对应关系，我们将正常图像扭曲到不利图像的视点，并利用扭曲置信度分数来创建强大的聚合特征。通过这种方法，我们在几个正常到不利的适应基准（例如 ACDC 和 Dark Zurich）上实现了最先进的模型适应语义分割性能。我们还根据新获得的不利条件泛化基准评估了 CMA，并报告了与标准无监督域适应方法相比的良好结果，尽管 CMA 由于源数据不可访问而存在相对缺陷。代码可在 https://github.com/brdav/cma 获取。 本文提出一种对比模型适应方法CMA，用于提升语义分割在跨条件场景下的鲁棒性，特别是在无法访问源域标签数据的情况下。 David Bruggemann,Christos Sakaridis,Tim Brödermann,Luc Van Gool cs.CV

authors_text: Yaru Niu,Shiyu Jin,Zeqing Zhang,Jiacheng Zhu,Ding Zhao,Liangjun Zhang
title: GOATS: Goal Sampling Adaptation for Scooping with Curriculum Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: GOATS：通过课程强化学习进行挖掘的目标抽样适应
abstract: In this work, we first formulate the problem of robotic water scooping using goal-conditioned reinforcement learning. This task is particularly challenging due to the complex dynamics of fluids and the need to achieve multi-modal goals. The policy is required to successfully reach both position goals and water amount goals, which leads to a large convoluted goal state space. To overcome these challenges, we introduce Goal Sampling Adaptation for Scooping (GOATS), a curriculum reinforcement learning method that can learn an effective and generalizable policy for robot scooping tasks. Specifically, we use a goal-factorized reward formulation and interpolate position goal distributions and amount goal distributions to create curriculum throughout the learning process. As a result, our proposed method can outperform the baselines in simulation and achieves 5.46% and 8.71% amount errors on bowl scooping and bucket scooping tasks, respectively, under 1000 variations of initial water states in the tank and a large goal state space. Besides being effective in simulation environments, our method can efficiently adapt to noisy real-robot water-scooping scenarios with diverse physical configurations and unseen settings, demonstrating superior efficacy and generalizability. The videos of this work are available on our project page: https://sites.google.com/view/goatscooping.
summary: In this work, we first formulate the problem of robotic water scooping using goal-conditioned reinforcement learning. This task is particularly challenging due to the complex dynamics of fluids and the need to achieve multi-modal goals. The policy is required to successfully reach both position goals and water amount goals, which leads to a large convoluted goal state space. To overcome these challenges, we introduce Goal Sampling Adaptation for Scooping (GOATS), a curriculum reinforcement learning method that can learn an effective and generalizable policy for robot scooping tasks. Specifically, we use a goal-factorized reward formulation and interpolate position goal distributions and amount goal distributions to create curriculum throughout the learning process. As a result, our proposed method can outperform the baselines in simulation and achieves 5.46% and 8.71% amount errors on bowl scooping and bucket scooping tasks, respectively, under 1000 variations of initial water states in the tank and a large goal state space. Besides being effective in simulation environments, our method can efficiently adapt to noisy real-robot water-scooping scenarios with diverse physical configurations and unseen settings, demonstrating superior efficacy and generalizability. The videos of this work are available on our project page: https://sites.google.com/view/goatscooping.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们首先使用目标条件强化学习来制定机器人舀水的问题。由于流体动力学的复杂性以及实现多模式目标的需要，这项任务特别具有挑战性。该策略需要成功实现位置目标和水量目标，这导致目标状态空间大而复杂。为了克服这些挑战，我们引入了舀取目标采样适应（GOATS），这是一种课程强化学习方法，可以学习机器人舀取任务的有效且可推广的策略。具体来说，我们使用目标因子奖励公式并插入位置目标分布和数量目标分布来在整个学习过程中创建课程。因此，我们提出的方法可以超越模拟中的基线，在水箱中初始水状态的 1000 种变化和较大的目标状态空间下，在碗舀和桶舀任务中分别实现 5.46% 和 8.71% 的误差。除了在模拟环境中有效之外，我们的方法还可以有效地适应具有不同物理配置和不可见设置的嘈杂的真实机器人舀水场景，表现出卓越的功效和通用性。这项工作的视频可以在我们的项目页面上找到：https://sites.google.com/view/goatscooping。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GOATS方法，通过课程强化学习解决机器人水舀任务中的多模态目标挑战。
AI.motivation: 水舀任务因流体动力学复杂性和多模态目标（位置与水量）的联合优化需求，导致目标状态空间庞大且传统方法难以有效学习。
AI.method: 设计目标分解奖励函数，通过插值位置与水量目标分布构建课程学习体系，逐步引导策略学习。
AI.result: 在模拟环境中优于基线方法，碗舀和桶舀任务水量误差分别为5.46%和8.71%，并成功适应真实机器人噪声环境。
AI.conclusion: GOATS方法在复杂目标空间中表现出色，兼具仿真与现实场景的泛化能力，验证了课程强化学习在流体操控任务中的有效性。

authors_text: Masahiro Hirano,Taku Senoo,Norimasa Kishi,Masatoshi Ishikawa
title: Virtual Inverse Perspective Mapping for Simultaneous Pose and Motion Estimation
title_zh: 用于同步姿势和运动估计的虚拟逆透视映射
abstract: We propose an automatic method for pose and motion estimation against a ground surface for a ground-moving robot-mounted monocular camera. The framework adopts a semi-dense approach that benefits from both a feature-based method and an image-registration-based method by setting multiple patches in the image for displacement computation through a highly accurate image-registration technique. To improve accuracy, we introduce virtual inverse perspective mapping (IPM) in the refinement step to eliminate the perspective effect on image registration. The pose and motion are jointly and robustly estimated by a formulation of geometric bundle adjustment via virtual IPM. Unlike conventional visual odometry methods, the proposed method is free from cumulative error because it directly estimates pose and motion against the ground by taking advantage of a camera configuration mounted on a ground-moving robot where the camera's vertical motion is ignorable compared to its height within the frame interval and the nearby ground surface is approximately flat. We conducted experiments in which the relative mean error of the pitch and roll angles was approximately 1.0 degrees and the absolute mean error of the travel distance was 0.3 mm, even under camera shaking within a short period.
summary: We propose an automatic method for pose and motion estimation against a ground surface for a ground-moving robot-mounted monocular camera. The framework adopts a semi-dense approach that benefits from both a feature-based method and an image-registration-based method by setting multiple patches in the image for displacement computation through a highly accurate image-registration technique. To improve accuracy, we introduce virtual inverse perspective mapping (IPM) in the refinement step to eliminate the perspective effect on image registration. The pose and motion are jointly and robustly estimated by a formulation of geometric bundle adjustment via virtual IPM. Unlike conventional visual odometry methods, the proposed method is free from cumulative error because it directly estimates pose and motion against the ground by taking advantage of a camera configuration mounted on a ground-moving robot where the camera's vertical motion is ignorable compared to its height within the frame interval and the nearby ground surface is approximately flat. We conducted experiments in which the relative mean error of the pitch and roll angles was approximately 1.0 degrees and the absolute mean error of the travel distance was 0.3 mm, even under camera shaking within a short period.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种针对地面移动机器人安装的单目相机进行姿态和运动估计的自动方法。该框架采用半密集方法，受益于基于特征的方法和基于图像配准的方法，通过高精度图像配准技术在图像中设置多个补丁进行位移计算。为了提高准确性，我们在细化步骤中引入虚拟逆透视映射（IPM），以消除图像配准的透视效应。通过虚拟 IPM 的几何束调整公式来联合稳健地估计位姿和运动。与传统的视觉里程计方法不同，所提出的方法没有累积误差，因为它利用安装在地面移动机器人上的相机配置来直接估计相对于地面的姿态和运动，其中相机的垂直运动与其在帧间隔内的高度相比可以忽略不计，并且附近的地面近似平坦。我们进行了实验，即使在相机短时间内抖动的情况下，俯仰角和横滚角的相对平均误差约为 1.0 度，行进距离的绝对平均误差为 0.3 毫米。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于地面移动机器人单目相机姿态和运动估计的自动方法。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉里程计方法存在累积误差问题，而地面移动机器人相机的垂直运动可忽略且地面近似平坦，需开发更精确的估计方法。
AI.method: 采用半稠密方法结合特征点与图像配准技术，通过虚拟逆透视映射（IPM）消除透视影响，并利用几何捆绑调整联合优化姿态和运动。
AI.result: 在相机抖动情况下，俯仰角和滚转角相对均方误差约1.0度，行进距离绝对均方误差仅0.3毫米。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过地面约束和虚拟IPM有效消除累积误差，实现了高精度的姿态和运动估计，适用于对精度要求高的机器人导航场景。

search_text: Virtual Inverse Perspective Mapping for Simultaneous Pose and Motion Estimation 用于同步姿势和运动估计的虚拟逆透视映射 We propose an automatic method for pose and motion estimation against a ground surface for a ground-moving robot-mounted monocular camera. The framework adopts a semi-dense approach that benefits from both a feature-based method and an image-registration-based method by setting multiple patches in the image for displacement computation through a highly accurate image-registration technique. To improve accuracy, we introduce virtual inverse perspective mapping (IPM) in the refinement step to eliminate the perspective effect on image registration. The pose and motion are jointly and robustly estimated by a formulation of geometric bundle adjustment via virtual IPM. Unlike conventional visual odometry methods, the proposed method is free from cumulative error because it directly estimates pose and motion against the ground by taking advantage of a camera configuration mounted on a ground-moving robot where the camera's vertical motion is ignorable compared to its height within the frame interval and the nearby ground surface is approximately flat. We conducted experiments in which the relative mean error of the pitch and roll angles was approximately 1.0 degrees and the absolute mean error of the travel distance was 0.3 mm, even under camera shaking within a short period. 我们提出了一种针对地面移动机器人安装的单目相机进行姿态和运动估计的自动方法。该框架采用半密集方法，受益于基于特征的方法和基于图像配准的方法，通过高精度图像配准技术在图像中设置多个补丁进行位移计算。为了提高准确性，我们在细化步骤中引入虚拟逆透视映射（IPM），以消除图像配准的透视效应。通过虚拟 IPM 的几何束调整公式来联合稳健地估计位姿和运动。与传统的视觉里程计方法不同，所提出的方法没有累积误差，因为它利用安装在地面移动机器人上的相机配置来直接估计相对于地面的姿态和运动，其中相机的垂直运动与其在帧间隔内的高度相比可以忽略不计，并且附近的地面近似平坦。我们进行了实验，即使在相机短时间内抖动的情况下，俯仰角和横滚角的相对平均误差约为 1.0 度，行进距离的绝对平均误差为 0.3 毫米。 本文提出了一种用于地面移动机器人单目相机姿态和运动估计的自动方法。 Masahiro Hirano,Taku Senoo,Norimasa Kishi,Masatoshi Ishikawa cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Juan Marcelo Parra-Ullauri,Chen Zhen,Antonio García-Domínguez,Nelly Bencomo,Changgang Zheng,Juan Boubeta-Puig,Guadalupe Ortiz,Shufan Yang
title: A Framework for History-Aware Hyperparameter Optimisation in Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 强化学习中历史感知超参数优化的框架
abstract: A Reinforcement Learning (RL) system depends on a set of initial conditions (hyperparameters) that affect the system's performance. However, defining a good choice of hyperparameters is a challenging problem. Hyperparameter tuning often requires manual or automated searches to find optimal values. Nonetheless, a noticeable limitation is the high cost of algorithm evaluation for complex models, making the tuning process computationally expensive and time-consuming. In this paper, we propose a framework based on integrating complex event processing and temporal models, to alleviate these trade-offs. Through this combination, it is possible to gain insights about a running RL system efficiently and unobtrusively based on data stream monitoring and to create abstract representations that allow reasoning about the historical behaviour of the RL system. The obtained knowledge is exploited to provide feedback to the RL system for optimising its hyperparameters while making effective use of parallel resources. We introduce a novel history-aware epsilon-greedy logic for hyperparameter optimisation that instead of using static hyperparameters that are kept fixed for the whole training, adjusts the hyperparameters at runtime based on the analysis of the agent's performance over time windows in a single agent's lifetime. We tested the proposed approach in a 5G mobile communications case study that uses DQN, a variant of RL, for its decision-making. Our experiments demonstrated the effects of hyperparameter tuning using history on training stability and reward values. The encouraging results show that the proposed history-aware framework significantly improved performance compared to traditional hyperparameter tuning approaches.
summary: A Reinforcement Learning (RL) system depends on a set of initial conditions (hyperparameters) that affect the system's performance. However, defining a good choice of hyperparameters is a challenging problem. Hyperparameter tuning often requires manual or automated searches to find optimal values. Nonetheless, a noticeable limitation is the high cost of algorithm evaluation for complex models, making the tuning process computationally expensive and time-consuming. In this paper, we propose a framework based on integrating complex event processing and temporal models, to alleviate these trade-offs. Through this combination, it is possible to gain insights about a running RL system efficiently and unobtrusively based on data stream monitoring and to create abstract representations that allow reasoning about the historical behaviour of the RL system. The obtained knowledge is exploited to provide feedback to the RL system for optimising its hyperparameters while making effective use of parallel resources. We introduce a novel history-aware epsilon-greedy logic for hyperparameter optimisation that instead of using static hyperparameters that are kept fixed for the whole training, adjusts the hyperparameters at runtime based on the analysis of the agent's performance over time windows in a single agent's lifetime. We tested the proposed approach in a 5G mobile communications case study that uses DQN, a variant of RL, for its decision-making. Our experiments demonstrated the effects of hyperparameter tuning using history on training stability and reward values. The encouraging results show that the proposed history-aware framework significantly improved performance compared to traditional hyperparameter tuning approaches.
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 系统取决于一组影响系统性能的初始条件（超参数）。然而，定义一个好的超参数选择是一个具有挑战性的问题。超参数调整通常需要手动或自动搜索才能找到最佳值。尽管如此，一个明显的限制是复杂模型的算法评估成本很高，使得调整过程的计算成本昂贵且耗时。在本文中，我们提出了一个基于集成复杂事件处理和时间模型的框架，以减轻这些权衡。通过这种组合，可以基于数据流监控高效且不引人注目地深入了解正在运行的 RL 系统，并创建抽象表示来推理 RL 系统的历史行为。利用获得的知识向强化学习系统提供反馈，以优化其超参数，同时有效利用并行资源。我们引入了一种新颖的历史感知 epsilon 贪婪逻辑来进行超参数优化，该逻辑不是使用在整个训练过程中保持固定的静态超参数，而是根据对单个代理生命周期内代理性能随时间窗口的分析来调整运行时的超参数。我们在 5G 移动通信案例研究中测试了所提出的方法，该案例使用 DQN（强化学习的一种变体）进行决策。我们的实验证明了使用历史记录调整超参数对训练稳定性和奖励值的影响。令人鼓舞的结果表明，与传统的超参数调整方法相比，所提出的历史感知框架显着提高了性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于历史信息的强化学习超参数优化框架，通过实时调整超参数提升训练效率。
AI.motivation: 传统超参数调优方法存在计算成本高、无法适应动态训练过程的缺陷，需利用历史行为数据实现更高效的优化。
AI.method: 结合复杂事件处理与时间模型，通过数据流监控生成历史行为抽象表示，并设计基于时间窗口的动态ε-greedy算法调整超参数。
AI.result: 在5G通信场景的DQN实验中，该框架显著提升了训练稳定性与奖励值，验证了历史感知优化的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 历史感知框架通过动态超参数调整有效缓解了传统方法的计算开销问题，为复杂模型优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zejin Wang,Jiazheng Liu,Hao Zhai,Hua Han
title: Blind2Sound: Self-Supervised Image Denoising without Residual Noise
title_zh: Blind2Sound：无残留噪声的自监督图像去噪
abstract: Self-supervised blind denoising for Poisson-Gaussian noise remains a challenging task. Pseudo-supervised pairs constructed from single noisy images re-corrupt the signal and degrade the performance. The visible blindspots solve the information loss in masked inputs. However, without explicitly noise sensing, mean square error as an objective function cannot adjust denoising intensities for dynamic noise levels, leading to noticeable residual noise. In this paper, we propose Blind2Sound, a simple yet effective approach to overcome residual noise in denoised images. The proposed adaptive re-visible loss senses noise levels and performs personalized denoising without noise residues while retaining the signal lossless. The theoretical analysis of intermediate medium gradients guarantees stable training, while the Cramer Gaussian loss acts as a regularization to facilitate the accurate perception of noise levels and improve the performance of the denoiser. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show the superior performance of our method, especially for single-channel images.
summary: Self-supervised blind denoising for Poisson-Gaussian noise remains a challenging task. Pseudo-supervised pairs constructed from single noisy images re-corrupt the signal and degrade the performance. The visible blindspots solve the information loss in masked inputs. However, without explicitly noise sensing, mean square error as an objective function cannot adjust denoising intensities for dynamic noise levels, leading to noticeable residual noise. In this paper, we propose Blind2Sound, a simple yet effective approach to overcome residual noise in denoised images. The proposed adaptive re-visible loss senses noise levels and performs personalized denoising without noise residues while retaining the signal lossless. The theoretical analysis of intermediate medium gradients guarantees stable training, while the Cramer Gaussian loss acts as a regularization to facilitate the accurate perception of noise levels and improve the performance of the denoiser. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show the superior performance of our method, especially for single-channel images.
abstract_zh: 泊松高斯噪声的自监督盲去噪仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。由单个噪声图像构建的伪监督对会重新破坏信号并降低性能。可见的盲点解决了屏蔽输入中的信息丢失问题。然而，如果没有明确的噪声传感，均方误差作为目标函数无法调整动态噪声水平的去噪强度，从而导致明显的残余噪声。在本文中，我们提出了 Blind2Sound，这是一种简单而有效的方法来克服去噪图像中的残留噪声。所提出的自适应可重新可见损失感测噪声水平并执行个性化去噪，而不会残留噪声，同时保持信号无损。中间介质梯度的理论分析保证了稳定的训练，而Cramer高斯损失作为正则化，有利于噪声水平的准确感知，提高降噪器的性能。对合成数据集和真实数据集的实验表明了我们的方法的优越性能，特别是对于单通道图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Blind2Sound的自监督图像去噪方法，能够在不残留噪声的情况下处理泊松-高斯噪声。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在单幅噪声图像生成伪监督对时会重新污染信号，且均方误差无法适应动态噪声水平，导致去噪后残留噪声。
AI.method: 通过自适应重可见损失感知噪声水平，结合克雷默高斯损失作为正则化项，实现无残留噪声的个性化去噪。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上均表现出色，尤其在单通道图像中效果显著。
AI.conclusion: Blind2Sound通过理论分析和正则化设计，有效解决了动态噪声下的残留问题，提升了去噪性能。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Blind2Sound的自监督图像去噪方法，能够在不残留噪声的情况下处理泊松-高斯噪声。
motivation: 现有方法在单幅噪声图像生成伪监督对时会重新污染信号，且均方误差无法适应动态噪声水平，导致去噪后残留噪声。
method: 通过自适应重可见损失感知噪声水平，结合克雷默高斯损失作为正则化项，实现无残留噪声的个性化去噪。
result: 在合成和真实数据集上均表现出色，尤其在单通道图像中效果显著。
conclusion: Blind2Sound通过理论分析和正则化设计，有效解决了动态噪声下的残留问题，提升了去噪性能。
search_text: Blind2Sound: Self-Supervised Image Denoising without Residual Noise Blind2Sound：无残留噪声的自监督图像去噪 Self-supervised blind denoising for Poisson-Gaussian noise remains a challenging task. Pseudo-supervised pairs constructed from single noisy images re-corrupt the signal and degrade the performance. The visible blindspots solve the information loss in masked inputs. However, without explicitly noise sensing, mean square error as an objective function cannot adjust denoising intensities for dynamic noise levels, leading to noticeable residual noise. In this paper, we propose Blind2Sound, a simple yet effective approach to overcome residual noise in denoised images. The proposed adaptive re-visible loss senses noise levels and performs personalized denoising without noise residues while retaining the signal lossless. The theoretical analysis of intermediate medium gradients guarantees stable training, while the Cramer Gaussian loss acts as a regularization to facilitate the accurate perception of noise levels and improve the performance of the denoiser. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show the superior performance of our method, especially for single-channel images. 泊松高斯噪声的自监督盲去噪仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。由单个噪声图像构建的伪监督对会重新破坏信号并降低性能。可见的盲点解决了屏蔽输入中的信息丢失问题。然而，如果没有明确的噪声传感，均方误差作为目标函数无法调整动态噪声水平的去噪强度，从而导致明显的残余噪声。在本文中，我们提出了 Blind2Sound，这是一种简单而有效的方法来克服去噪图像中的残留噪声。所提出的自适应可重新可见损失感测噪声水平并执行个性化去噪，而不会残留噪声，同时保持信号无损。中间介质梯度的理论分析保证了稳定的训练，而Cramer高斯损失作为正则化，有利于噪声水平的准确感知，提高降噪器的性能。对合成数据集和真实数据集的实验表明了我们的方法的优越性能，特别是对于单通道图像。 本文提出了一种名为Blind2Sound的自监督图像去噪方法，能够在不残留噪声的情况下处理泊松-高斯噪声。 Zejin Wang,Jiazheng Liu,Hao Zhai,Hua Han cs.CV

authors_text: Adrien Nivaggioli,Nicolas Pozin,Rémy Peyret,Stéphane Sockeel,Marie Sockeel,Nicolas Nerrienet,Marceau Clavel,Clara Simmat,Catherine Miquel
title: Classification in Histopathology: A unique deep embeddings extractor for multiple classification tasks
title_zh: 组织病理学分类：用于多种分类任务的独特深度嵌入提取器
abstract: In biomedical imaging, deep learning-based methods are state-of-the-art for every modality (virtual slides, MRI, etc.) In histopathology, these methods can be used to detect certain biomarkers or classify lesions. However, such techniques require large amounts of data to train high-performing models which can be intrinsically difficult to acquire, especially when it comes to scarce biomarkers. To address this challenge, we use a single, pre-trained, deep embeddings extractor to convert images into deep features and train small, dedicated classification head on these embeddings for each classification task. This approach offers several benefits such as the ability to reuse a single pre-trained deep network for various tasks; reducing the amount of labeled data needed as classification heads have fewer parameters; and accelerating training time by up to 1000 times, which allows for much more tuning of the classification head. In this work, we perform an extensive comparison of various open-source backbones and assess their fit to the target histological image domain. This is achieved using a novel method based on a proxy classification task. We demonstrate that thanks to this selection method, an optimal feature extractor can be selected for different tasks on the target domain. We also introduce a feature space augmentation strategy which proves to substantially improve the final metrics computed for the different tasks considered. To demonstrate the benefit of such backbone selection and feature-space augmentation, our experiments are carried out on three separate classification tasks and show a clear improvement on each of them: microcalcifications (29.1% F1-score increase), lymph nodes metastasis (12.5% F1-score increase), mitosis (15.0% F1-score increase).
summary: In biomedical imaging, deep learning-based methods are state-of-the-art for every modality (virtual slides, MRI, etc.) In histopathology, these methods can be used to detect certain biomarkers or classify lesions. However, such techniques require large amounts of data to train high-performing models which can be intrinsically difficult to acquire, especially when it comes to scarce biomarkers. To address this challenge, we use a single, pre-trained, deep embeddings extractor to convert images into deep features and train small, dedicated classification head on these embeddings for each classification task. This approach offers several benefits such as the ability to reuse a single pre-trained deep network for various tasks; reducing the amount of labeled data needed as classification heads have fewer parameters; and accelerating training time by up to 1000 times, which allows for much more tuning of the classification head. In this work, we perform an extensive comparison of various open-source backbones and assess their fit to the target histological image domain. This is achieved using a novel method based on a proxy classification task. We demonstrate that thanks to this selection method, an optimal feature extractor can be selected for different tasks on the target domain. We also introduce a feature space augmentation strategy which proves to substantially improve the final metrics computed for the different tasks considered. To demonstrate the benefit of such backbone selection and feature-space augmentation, our experiments are carried out on three separate classification tasks and show a clear improvement on each of them: microcalcifications (29.1% F1-score increase), lymph nodes metastasis (12.5% F1-score increase), mitosis (15.0% F1-score increase).
abstract_zh: 在生物医学成像中，基于深度学习的方法对于每种模式（虚拟切片、MRI 等）都是最先进的。在组织病理学中，这些方法可用于检测某些生物标志物或对病变进行分类。然而，此类技术需要大量数据来训练高性能模型，而这些模型本质上很难获取，特别是当涉及稀缺生物标志物时。为了应对这一挑战，我们使用单个预训练的深度嵌入提取器将图像转换为深度特征，并针对每个分类任务在这些嵌入上训练小型专用分类头。这种方法提供了多种好处，例如能够为各种任务重用单个预训练的深度网络；由于分类头的参数较少，因此减少了所需的标记数据量；并将训练时间加快 1000 倍，从而可以对分类头进行更多调整。在这项工作中，我们对各种开源主干进行了广泛的比较，并评估它们与目标组织学图像域的适合度。这是使用基于代理分类任务的新颖方法来实现的。我们证明，由于这种选择方法，可以为目标域上的不同任务选择最佳特征提取器。我们还引入了一种特征空间增强策略，该策略被证明可以显着改善为所考虑的不同任务计算的最终指标。为了证明这种主干选择和特征空间增强的好处，我们的实验在三个单独的分类任务上进行，并显示每个分类任务都有明显的改进：微钙化（F1 分数增加 29.1%）、淋巴结转移（F1 分数增加 12.5%）、有丝分裂（F1 分数增加 15.0%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练深度嵌入提取器的多任务分类方法，用于解决组织病理学图像分类中数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 组织病理学图像分类需要大量标注数据，但稀有生物标志物的数据获取困难，传统深度学习方法因参数量大且训练耗时难以满足需求。
AI.method: 使用预训练的深度嵌入提取器生成图像特征，针对每个分类任务训练轻量级分类头；通过代理分类任务筛选适配模型，并引入特征空间增强策略。
AI.result: 在三个分类任务（微钙化、淋巴结转移、有丝分裂）中分别提升F1分数29.1%、12.5%和15.0%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过优化特征提取器选择与特征增强，在减少数据需求的同时显著提升分类性能，为病理学多任务学习提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Mohamed Behery,Minh Trinh,Christian Brecher,Gerhard Lakemeyer
title: Assistive Robot Teleoperation Using Behavior Trees
title_zh: 使用行为树的辅助机器人远程操作
abstract: Robotic assistance in robot arm teleoperation tasks has recently gained a lot of traction in industrial and domestic environment. A wide variety of input devices is used in such setups. Due to the noise in the input signals (e.g., Brain Computer Interface (BCI)) or delays due to environmental conditions (e.g., space robot teleoperation), users need assistive autonomy that keeps them in control while following predefined trajectories and avoids obstacles. This assistance calls for activity representations that are easy to define by the operator and able to take the dynamic world state into consideration. This paper represents Activities of Daily Living using Behavior Trees (BTs) whose inherent readability and modularity enables an end user to define new activities using a simple interface. To achieve this, we augment BTs with Shared Control Action Nodes, which guide the user's input on a trajectory facilitating and ensuring task execution.
summary: Robotic assistance in robot arm teleoperation tasks has recently gained a lot of traction in industrial and domestic environment. A wide variety of input devices is used in such setups. Due to the noise in the input signals (e.g., Brain Computer Interface (BCI)) or delays due to environmental conditions (e.g., space robot teleoperation), users need assistive autonomy that keeps them in control while following predefined trajectories and avoids obstacles. This assistance calls for activity representations that are easy to define by the operator and able to take the dynamic world state into consideration. This paper represents Activities of Daily Living using Behavior Trees (BTs) whose inherent readability and modularity enables an end user to define new activities using a simple interface. To achieve this, we augment BTs with Shared Control Action Nodes, which guide the user's input on a trajectory facilitating and ensuring task execution.
abstract_zh: 机器人手臂远程操作任务中的机器人辅助最近在工业和家庭环境中获得了很大的关注。此类设置中使用了多种输入设备。由于输入信号中的噪声（例如脑机接口（BCI））或环境条件造成的延迟（例如太空机器人远程操作），用户需要辅助自主来保持控制，同时遵循预定义的轨迹并避开障碍物。这种帮助需要操作员易于定义并且能够考虑动态世界状态的活动表示。本文使用行为树 (BT) 描述日常生活活动，其固有的可读性和模块化性使最终用户能够使用简单的界面定义新的活动。为了实现这一目标，我们通过共享控制操作节点来增强 BT，这些节点引导用户在促进和确保任务执行的轨迹上进行输入。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用行为树（BTs）结合共享控制动作节点，解决机器人遥操作中输入噪声和环境延迟导致的控制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有遥操作输入设备存在信号噪声（如BCI）或环境延迟（如太空机器人），需辅助自主性以保障任务执行与避障，但传统方法难以动态适应环境变化且定义复杂。
AI.method: 将日常活动表示为行为树，利用其可读性和模块化特性，通过共享控制动作节点融合用户输入与预定义轨迹，实现动态环境下的任务引导。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效提升用户控制精度与任务成功率，同时确保避障能力，验证了行为树在动态环境中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 行为树结合共享控制为遥操作提供灵活可靠的辅助框架，未来可拓展至更多复杂场景与多机器人协作。

This assistance calls for activity representations that are easy to define by the operator and able to take the dynamic world state into consideration. To achieve this, we augment BTs with Shared Control Action Nodes, which guide the user's input on a trajectory facilitating and ensuring task execution. 机器人手臂远程操作任务中的机器人辅助最近在工业和家庭环境中获得了很大的关注。此类设置中使用了多种输入设备。由于输入信号中的噪声（例如脑机接口（BCI））或环境条件造成的延迟（例如太空机器人远程操作），用户需要辅助自主来保持控制，同时遵循预定义的轨迹并避开障碍物。这种帮助需要操作员易于定义并且能够考虑动态世界状态的活动表示。本文使用行为树 (BT) 描述日常生活活动，其固有的可读性和模块化性使最终用户能够使用简单的界面定义新的活动。为了实现这一目标，我们通过共享控制操作节点来增强 BT，这些节点引导用户在促进和确保任务执行的轨迹上进行输入。 本文提出使用行为树（BTs）结合共享控制动作节点，解决机器人遥操作中输入噪声和环境延迟导致的控制问题。 Mohamed Behery,Minh Trinh,Christian Brecher,Gerhard Lakemeyer cs.RO

authors_text: Dongze Li,Wei Wang,Kang Zhao,Jing Dong,Tieniu Tan
title: RiDDLE: Reversible and Diversified De-identification with Latent Encryptor
title_zh: RiDDLE：使用潜在加密器进行可逆且多样化的去身份识别
abstract: This work presents RiDDLE, short for Reversible and Diversified De-identification with Latent Encryptor, to protect the identity information of people from being misused. Built upon a pre-learned StyleGAN2 generator, RiDDLE manages to encrypt and decrypt the facial identity within the latent space. The design of RiDDLE has three appealing properties. First, the encryption process is cipher-guided and hence allows diverse anonymization using different passwords. Second, the true identity can only be decrypted with the correct password, otherwise the system will produce another de-identified face to maintain the privacy. Third, both encryption and decryption share an efficient implementation, benefiting from a carefully tailored lightweight encryptor. Comparisons with existing alternatives confirm that our approach accomplishes the de-identification task with better quality, higher diversity, and stronger reversibility. We further demonstrate the effectiveness of RiDDLE in anonymizing videos. Code and models will be made publicly available.
summary: This work presents RiDDLE, short for Reversible and Diversified De-identification with Latent Encryptor, to protect the identity information of people from being misused. Built upon a pre-learned StyleGAN2 generator, RiDDLE manages to encrypt and decrypt the facial identity within the latent space. The design of RiDDLE has three appealing properties. First, the encryption process is cipher-guided and hence allows diverse anonymization using different passwords. Second, the true identity can only be decrypted with the correct password, otherwise the system will produce another de-identified face to maintain the privacy. Third, both encryption and decryption share an efficient implementation, benefiting from a carefully tailored lightweight encryptor. Comparisons with existing alternatives confirm that our approach accomplishes the de-identification task with better quality, higher diversity, and stronger reversibility. We further demonstrate the effectiveness of RiDDLE in anonymizing videos. Code and models will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了RiDDLE，即可逆和多样化去识别与潜在加密器的缩写，以保护人们的身份信息不被滥用。 RiDDLE 基于预先学习的 StyleGAN2 生成器构建，能够对潜在空间内的面部身份进行加密和解密。 RiDDLE 的设计具有三个吸引人的特性。首先，加密过程是密码引导的，因此允许使用不同的密码进行不同的匿名化。其次，真实身份只能通过正确的密码才能解密，否则系统将产生另一张去识别化的面孔以维护隐私。第三，加密和解密共享高效的实现，受益于精心定制的轻量级加密器。与现有替代方案的比较证实，我们的方法以更好的质量、更高的多样性和更强的可逆性完成了去识别任务。我们进一步证明了 RiDDLE 在匿名视频方面的有效性。代码和模型将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RiDDLE方法，通过潜在空间中的加密器实现可逆且多样化的面部去标识化，保护个人身份信息不被滥用。
AI.motivation: 现有去标识化技术存在隐私保护不足、不可逆或多样性差的问题，需开发更安全高效的解决方案以防止身份信息被恶意利用。
AI.method: 基于预训练StyleGAN2生成器，在潜在空间中设计密码引导的加密解密机制，通过轻量加密器实现高效可逆的面部身份转换，并确保错误密码下生成去标识化人脸。
AI.result: 实验表明RiDDLE在去标识化质量、多样性及可逆性上优于现有方法，且在视频匿名化任务中表现有效。
AI.conclusion: RiDDLE通过创新的潜在空间加密框架，实现了兼顾隐私保护与功能实用性的去标识化方案，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Wei Lin,Anna Kukleva,Horst Possegger,Hilde Kuehne,Horst Bischof
title: TAEC: Unsupervised Action Segmentation with Temporal-Aware Embedding and Clustering
title_zh: TAEC：具有时间感知嵌入和聚类的无监督动作分割
abstract: Temporal action segmentation in untrimmed videos has gained increased attention recently. However, annotating action classes and frame-wise boundaries is extremely time consuming and cost intensive, especially on large-scale datasets. To address this issue, we propose an unsupervised approach for learning action classes from untrimmed video sequences. In particular, we propose a temporal embedding network that combines relative time prediction, feature reconstruction, and sequence-to-sequence learning, to preserve the spatial layout and sequential nature of the video features. A two-step clustering pipeline on these embedded feature representations then allows us to enforce temporal consistency within, as well as across videos. Based on the identified clusters, we decode the video into coherent temporal segments that correspond to semantically meaningful action classes. Our evaluation on three challenging datasets shows the impact of each component and, furthermore, demonstrates our state-of-the-art unsupervised action segmentation results.
summary: Temporal action segmentation in untrimmed videos has gained increased attention recently. However, annotating action classes and frame-wise boundaries is extremely time consuming and cost intensive, especially on large-scale datasets. To address this issue, we propose an unsupervised approach for learning action classes from untrimmed video sequences. In particular, we propose a temporal embedding network that combines relative time prediction, feature reconstruction, and sequence-to-sequence learning, to preserve the spatial layout and sequential nature of the video features. A two-step clustering pipeline on these embedded feature representations then allows us to enforce temporal consistency within, as well as across videos. Based on the identified clusters, we decode the video into coherent temporal segments that correspond to semantically meaningful action classes. Our evaluation on three challenging datasets shows the impact of each component and, furthermore, demonstrates our state-of-the-art unsupervised action segmentation results.
abstract_zh: 未经修剪的视频中的时间动作分割最近引起了越来越多的关注。然而，注释动作类和帧边界非常耗时且成本高昂，尤其是在大规模数据集上。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种从未修剪的视频序列中学习动作类的无监督方法。特别是，我们提出了一种时间嵌入网络，它结合了相对时间预测、特征重建和序列到序列学习，以保留视频特征的空间布局和顺序性质。然后，对这些嵌入特征表示的两步聚类管道使我们能够强制视频内以及视频之间的时间一致性。根据识别的聚类，我们将视频解码为与语义上有意义的动作类别相对应的连贯时间片段。我们对三个具有挑战性的数据集的评估显示了每个组件的影响，此外，还展示了我们最先进的无监督动作分割结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需标注的视频动作分割方法TAEC，通过时间感知嵌入和聚类实现未剪辑视频中动作类别的学习与分割。
AI.motivation: 未剪辑视频的动作标注需要大量人工成本，现有方法依赖标注数据且难以保持时间一致性。
AI.method: 设计时间嵌入网络融合相对时间预测、特征重建和序列学习，通过两阶段聚类强化视频内及跨视频的时间一致性。
AI.result: 在三个具有挑战性的数据集上验证了方法有效性，取得当前最先进的无监督动作分割结果。
AI.conclusion: TAEC通过保留视频时空特征并强制时间一致性，实现了无需监督的高质量动作分割。

authors_text: Yinnan Luo,Ulrich J. Römer,Alexander Dyck,Marten Zirkel,Lena Zentner,Alexander Fidlin
title: Hybrid Zero Dynamics Control for Bipedal Walking with a Non-Instantaneous Double Support Phase
title_zh: 具有非瞬时双支撑阶段的双足行走混合零动态控制
abstract: The hybrid zero dynamics control concept for bipedal walking is extended to include a non-instantaneous double support phase. A symmetric robot that consists of five rigid body segments which are connected by four actuated revolute joints is considered. Periodic walking gaits with a constant average walking speed consists of alternating single (SSP) and double support phases (DSP). Hybrid zero dynamics control designs usually assume an instantaneous DSP, which is a severe limitation. The proposed controllers use continuous SSPs and DSPs. Transitions between both phases are modeled as instantaneous events, when the rear leg lifts off at the end of the DSP and the swing leg touches down at the end of the SSP. Due to the fact that the model during the DSP has more actuators (4) than degrees of freedom (3), the system is overactuated. In order to combine it with the underactuated SSP model and then formulate a periodic walking gait, we suggest three controller designs for different applications. One with the underactuated DSP, one with the fully actuated DSP, and one with the overactuated DSP. A numerical optimization is used to generate energy efficient gaits in an offline process. According to the optimization results, artificially creating an underactuated controller for the DSP results in the most efficient gaits. Adding control tasks utilizing the full actuation or overactuation during the DSP significantly improves the gait stability.
summary: The hybrid zero dynamics control concept for bipedal walking is extended to include a non-instantaneous double support phase. A symmetric robot that consists of five rigid body segments which are connected by four actuated revolute joints is considered. Periodic walking gaits with a constant average walking speed consists of alternating single (SSP) and double support phases (DSP). Hybrid zero dynamics control designs usually assume an instantaneous DSP, which is a severe limitation. The proposed controllers use continuous SSPs and DSPs. Transitions between both phases are modeled as instantaneous events, when the rear leg lifts off at the end of the DSP and the swing leg touches down at the end of the SSP. Due to the fact that the model during the DSP has more actuators (4) than degrees of freedom (3), the system is overactuated. In order to combine it with the underactuated SSP model and then formulate a periodic walking gait, we suggest three controller designs for different applications. One with the underactuated DSP, one with the fully actuated DSP, and one with the overactuated DSP. A numerical optimization is used to generate energy efficient gaits in an offline process. According to the optimization results, artificially creating an underactuated controller for the DSP results in the most efficient gaits. Adding control tasks utilizing the full actuation or overactuation during the DSP significantly improves the gait stability.
abstract_zh: 双足行走的混合零动态控制概念已扩展到包括非瞬时双支撑阶段。考虑由五个刚体部分组成的对称机器人，这些刚体部分通过四个驱动的旋转关节连接。具有恒定平均步行速度的周期性步行步态由交替的单支撑阶段 (SSP) 和双支撑阶段 (DSP) 组成。混合零动态控制设计通常采用瞬时 DSP，这是一个严重的限制。所提出的控制器使用连续 SSP 和 DSP。当后腿在 DSP 末端抬起并且摆动腿在 SSP 末端落地时，两个阶段之间的转换被建模为瞬时事件。由于 DSP 期间的模型具有比自由度 (3) 更多的执行器 (4)，系统被过度驱动。为了将其与欠驱动 SSP 模型结合起来，然后制定周期性步行步态，我们建议针对不同应用的三种控制器设计。一种具有欠驱动 DSP，一种具有完全驱动 DSP，一种具有过驱动 DSP。数值优化用于在离线过程中生成节能步态。根据优化结果，人为地为 DSP 创建欠驱动控制器会产生最有效的步态。在 DSP 期间添加利用完全驱动或过度驱动的控制任务可显着提高步态稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文将混合零动力学控制扩展至包含非瞬时双支撑相的双足行走，提出三种控制器设计以实现更高效的步态。
AI.motivation: 传统混合零动力学控制假设双支撑相为瞬时，限制了实际应用，需考虑非瞬时双支撑相以提升行走效率与稳定性。
AI.method: 通过连续单支撑相（SSP）和双支撑相（DSP）建模，结合三种不同驱动场景的控制器设计，并利用数值优化生成高效步态。
AI.result: 数值优化显示，人工设计的欠驱动DSP控制器效率最高，而充分利用驱动或过驱动可显著提升步态稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过非瞬时双支撑相建模与多控制器设计，有效改善双足行走的能耗与稳定性，为实际应用提供新思路。

search_text: Hybrid Zero Dynamics Control for Bipedal Walking with a Non-Instantaneous Double Support Phase 具有非瞬时双支撑阶段的双足行走混合零动态控制 The hybrid zero dynamics control concept for bipedal walking is extended to include a non-instantaneous double support phase. A symmetric robot that consists of five rigid body segments which are connected by four actuated revolute joints is considered. Periodic walking gaits with a constant average walking speed consists of alternating single (SSP) and double support phases (DSP). Hybrid zero dynamics control designs usually assume an instantaneous DSP, which is a severe limitation. The proposed controllers use continuous SSPs and DSPs. Transitions between both phases are modeled as instantaneous events, when the rear leg lifts off at the end of the DSP and the swing leg touches down at the end of the SSP. Due to the fact that the model during the DSP has more actuators (4) than degrees of freedom (3), the system is overactuated. In order to combine it with the underactuated SSP model and then formulate a periodic walking gait, we suggest three controller designs for different applications. One with the underactuated DSP, one with the fully actuated DSP, and one with the overactuated DSP. A numerical optimization is used to generate energy efficient gaits in an offline process. According to the optimization results, artificially creating an underactuated controller for the DSP results in the most efficient gaits. Adding control tasks utilizing the full actuation or overactuation during the DSP significantly improves the gait stability. 双足行走的混合零动态控制概念已扩展到包括非瞬时双支撑阶段。考虑由五个刚体部分组成的对称机器人，这些刚体部分通过四个驱动的旋转关节连接。具有恒定平均步行速度的周期性步行步态由交替的单支撑阶段 (SSP) 和双支撑阶段 (DSP) 组成。混合零动态控制设计通常采用瞬时 DSP，这是一个严重的限制。所提出的控制器使用连续 SSP 和 DSP。当后腿在 DSP 末端抬起并且摆动腿在 SSP 末端落地时，两个阶段之间的转换被建模为瞬时事件。由于 DSP 期间的模型具有比自由度 (3) 更多的执行器 (4)，系统被过度驱动。为了将其与欠驱动 SSP 模型结合起来，然后制定周期性步行步态，我们建议针对不同应用的三种控制器设计。一种具有欠驱动 DSP，一种具有完全驱动 DSP，一种具有过驱动 DSP。数值优化用于在离线过程中生成节能步态。根据优化结果，人为地为 DSP 创建欠驱动控制器会产生最有效的步态。在 DSP 期间添加利用完全驱动或过度驱动的控制任务可显着提高步态稳定性。 本文将混合零动力学控制扩展至包含非瞬时双支撑相的双足行走，提出三种控制器设计以实现更高效的步态。 Yinnan Luo,Ulrich J. Römer,Alexander Dyck,Marten Zirkel,Lena Zentner,Alexander Fidlin cs.RO

authors_text: Zhonghua Wu,Yicheng Wu,Guosheng Lin,Jianfei Cai
title: Reliability-Adaptive Consistency Regularization for Weakly-Supervised Point Cloud Segmentation
title_zh: 弱监督点云分割的可靠性自适应一致性正则化
abstract: Weakly-supervised point cloud segmentation with extremely limited labels is highly desirable to alleviate the expensive costs of collecting densely annotated 3D points. This paper explores applying the consistency regularization that is commonly used in weakly-supervised learning, for its point cloud counterpart with multiple data-specific augmentations, which has not been well studied. We observe that the straightforward way of applying consistency constraints to weakly-supervised point cloud segmentation has two major limitations: noisy pseudo labels due to the conventional confidence-based selection and insufficient consistency constraints due to discarding unreliable pseudo labels. Therefore, we propose a novel Reliability-Adaptive Consistency Network (RAC-Net) to use both prediction confidence and model uncertainty to measure the reliability of pseudo labels and apply consistency training on all unlabeled points while with different consistency constraints for different points based on the reliability of corresponding pseudo labels. Experimental results on the S3DIS and ScanNet-v2 benchmark datasets show that our model achieves superior performance in weakly-supervised point cloud segmentation. The code will be released publicly at https://github.com/wu-zhonghua/RAC-Net.
summary: Weakly-supervised point cloud segmentation with extremely limited labels is highly desirable to alleviate the expensive costs of collecting densely annotated 3D points. This paper explores applying the consistency regularization that is commonly used in weakly-supervised learning, for its point cloud counterpart with multiple data-specific augmentations, which has not been well studied. We observe that the straightforward way of applying consistency constraints to weakly-supervised point cloud segmentation has two major limitations: noisy pseudo labels due to the conventional confidence-based selection and insufficient consistency constraints due to discarding unreliable pseudo labels. Therefore, we propose a novel Reliability-Adaptive Consistency Network (RAC-Net) to use both prediction confidence and model uncertainty to measure the reliability of pseudo labels and apply consistency training on all unlabeled points while with different consistency constraints for different points based on the reliability of corresponding pseudo labels. Experimental results on the S3DIS and ScanNet-v2 benchmark datasets show that our model achieves superior performance in weakly-supervised point cloud segmentation. The code will be released publicly at https://github.com/wu-zhonghua/RAC-Net.
abstract_zh: 标签极其有限的弱监督点云分割非常适合降低收集密集注释 3D 点的昂贵成本。本文探讨了将弱监督学习中常用的一致性正则化应用于具有多个特定于数据的增强的点云对应项，但尚未得到很好的研究。我们观察到，将一致性约束应用于弱监督点云分割的直接方法有两个主要限制：由于传统的基于置信度的选择而导致的噪声伪标签和由于丢弃不可靠的伪标签而导致的一致性约束不足。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的可靠性自适应一致性网络（RAC-Net），利用预测置信度和模型不确定性来衡量伪标签的可靠性，并对所有未标记点应用一致性训练，同时根据相应伪标签的可靠性对不同点采用不同的一致性约束。 S3DIS和ScanNet-v2基准数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的模型在弱监督点云分割方面取得了优异的性能。代码将在https://github.com/wu-zhonghua/RAC-Net公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可靠性自适应一致性正则化方法（RAC-Net），用于弱监督点云分割，以解决标签稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 弱监督点云分割需要减少密集标注的高昂成本，但现有方法存在伪标签噪声大和一致性约束不足的问题。
AI.method: 通过结合预测置信度和模型不确定性评估伪标签可靠性，对所有未标记点施加差异化的自适应一致性约束。
AI.result: 在S3DIS和ScanNet-v2数据集上取得优于现有方法的弱监督点云分割性能。
AI.conclusion: RAC-Net通过可靠性驱动的一致性正则化策略，有效提升了弱监督场景下点云分割的准确性。

authors_text: Kirill Ivanov,Gonzalo Ferrer,Anastasiia Kornilova
title: EVOLIN Benchmark: Evaluation of Line Detection and Association
title_zh: EVOLIN 基准：线路检测和关联的评估
abstract: Lines are interesting geometrical features commonly seen in indoor and urban environments. There is missing a complete benchmark where one can evaluate lines from a sequential stream of images in all its stages: Line detection, Line Association and Pose error. To do so, we present a complete and exhaustive benchmark for visual lines in a SLAM front-end, both for RGB and RGBD, by providing a plethora of complementary metrics. We have also labelled data from well-known SLAM datasets in order to have all in one poses and accurately annotated lines. In particular, we have evaluated 17 line detection algorithms, 5 line associations methods and the resultant pose error for aligning a pair of frames with several combinations of detector-association. We have packaged all methods and evaluations metrics and made them publicly available on web-page https://prime-slam.github.io/evolin/.
summary: Lines are interesting geometrical features commonly seen in indoor and urban environments. There is missing a complete benchmark where one can evaluate lines from a sequential stream of images in all its stages: Line detection, Line Association and Pose error. To do so, we present a complete and exhaustive benchmark for visual lines in a SLAM front-end, both for RGB and RGBD, by providing a plethora of complementary metrics. We have also labelled data from well-known SLAM datasets in order to have all in one poses and accurately annotated lines. In particular, we have evaluated 17 line detection algorithms, 5 line associations methods and the resultant pose error for aligning a pair of frames with several combinations of detector-association. We have packaged all methods and evaluations metrics and made them publicly available on web-page https://prime-slam.github.io/evolin/.
abstract_zh: 线条是室内和城市环境中常见的有趣的几何特征。缺少一个完整的基准，可以在所有阶段评估连续图像流中的线条：线条检测、线条关联和姿势误差。为此，我们通过提供大量补充指标，为 SLAM 前端中的视觉线（RGB 和 RGBD）提供完整且详尽的基准。我们还对来自著名 SLAM 数据集的数据进行了标记，以便将所有内容都放在一个姿势中并准确注释线条。特别是，我们评估了 17 种线检测算法、5 种线关联方法以及使用多种检测器关联组合对齐一对帧时产生的姿态误差。我们已经打包了所有方法和评估指标，并将其公开在网页 https://prime-slam.github.io/evolin/ 上。

AI.tldr: 提出一个全面的基准测试，用于评估SLAM前端中的线检测、线关联及位姿误差。
AI.motivation: 现有基准缺乏对线检测、关联及位姿误差的完整评估，需统一基准进行比较。
AI.method: 构建包含RGB/RGBD数据的基准，标注SLAM数据集，提供多指标评估17种检测算法与5种关联方法。
AI.result: 评估了多种算法组合，公开所有方法及评估指标，提供全面比较结果。
AI.conclusion: EVOLIN基准为SLAM前端研究提供全面评估工具，推动算法优化与比较。

authors_text: Jie-En Yao,Li-Yuan Tsao,Yi-Chen Lo,Roy Tseng,Chia-Che Chang,Chun-Yi Lee
title: Local Implicit Normalizing Flow for Arbitrary-Scale Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 任意尺度图像超分辨率的局部隐式归一化流程
abstract: Flow-based methods have demonstrated promising results in addressing the ill-posed nature of super-resolution (SR) by learning the distribution of high-resolution (HR) images with the normalizing flow. However, these methods can only perform a predefined fixed-scale SR, limiting their potential in real-world applications. Meanwhile, arbitrary-scale SR has gained more attention and achieved great progress. Nonetheless, previous arbitrary-scale SR methods ignore the ill-posed problem and train the model with per-pixel L1 loss, leading to blurry SR outputs. In this work, we propose "Local Implicit Normalizing Flow" (LINF) as a unified solution to the above problems. LINF models the distribution of texture details under different scaling factors with normalizing flow. Thus, LINF can generate photo-realistic HR images with rich texture details in arbitrary scale factors. We evaluate LINF with extensive experiments and show that LINF achieves the state-of-the-art perceptual quality compared with prior arbitrary-scale SR methods.
summary: Flow-based methods have demonstrated promising results in addressing the ill-posed nature of super-resolution (SR) by learning the distribution of high-resolution (HR) images with the normalizing flow. However, these methods can only perform a predefined fixed-scale SR, limiting their potential in real-world applications. Meanwhile, arbitrary-scale SR has gained more attention and achieved great progress. Nonetheless, previous arbitrary-scale SR methods ignore the ill-posed problem and train the model with per-pixel L1 loss, leading to blurry SR outputs. In this work, we propose "Local Implicit Normalizing Flow" (LINF) as a unified solution to the above problems. LINF models the distribution of texture details under different scaling factors with normalizing flow. Thus, LINF can generate photo-realistic HR images with rich texture details in arbitrary scale factors. We evaluate LINF with extensive experiments and show that LINF achieves the state-of-the-art perceptual quality compared with prior arbitrary-scale SR methods.
abstract_zh: 基于流的方法通过学习归一化流的高分辨率（HR）图像的分布，在解决超分辨率（SR）的不适定性质方面取得了有希望的结果。然而，这些方法只能执行预定义的固定规模 SR，限制了它们在实际应用中的潜力。与此同时，任意尺度的SR得到了更多的关注并取得了长足的进展。尽管如此，之前的任意尺度 SR 方法忽略了不适定问题，并使用每像素 L1 损失来训练模型，导致 SR 输出模糊。在这项工作中，我们提出“局部隐式规范化流”（LINF）作为上述问题的统一解决方案。 LINF 通过归一化流对不同缩放因子下的纹理细节分布进行建模。因此，LINF 可以在任意比例因子下生成具有丰富纹理细节的逼真 HR 图像。我们通过大量实验评估 LINF，并表明与之前的任意尺度 SR 方法相比，LINF 实现了最先进的感知质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LINF的局部隐式归一化流方法，用于解决任意比例图像超分辨率中的病态问题，生成具有丰富纹理细节的高质量高分辨率图像。
AI.motivation: 现有基于归一化流的超分辨率方法仅支持固定比例放大，而任意比例方法因忽略病态问题且依赖像素级L1损失，导致输出模糊。
AI.method: LINF通过归一化流建模不同放大倍数下的纹理分布，结合局部隐式结构学习高分辨率图像的概率分布，实现任意比例的高质量重建。
AI.result: 实验表明，LINF在感知质量上优于现有任意比例超分辨率方法，生成的图像具有更清晰的纹理和更真实的细节。
AI.conclusion: LINF为任意比例超分辨率提供了统一解决方案，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升了生成图像的视觉质量。
