authors_text: Rohit Agarwal,Deepak Gupta,Alexander Horsch,Dilip K. Prasad
title: Aux-Drop: Handling Haphazard Inputs in Online Learning Using Auxiliary Dropouts
title_zh: Aux-Drop：使用辅助 Dropout 处理在线学习中的随意输入
comment: Accepted at Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR). Link: https://openreview.net/pdf?id=R9CgBkeZ6Z
comments: Accepted at Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR). Link: https://openreview.net/pdf?id=R9CgBkeZ6Z
abstract: Many real-world applications based on online learning produce streaming data that is haphazard in nature, i.e., contains missing features, features becoming obsolete in time, the appearance of new features at later points in time and a lack of clarity on the total number of input features. These challenges make it hard to build a learnable system for such applications, and almost no work exists in deep learning that addresses this issue. In this paper, we present Aux-Drop, an auxiliary dropout regularization strategy for online learning that handles the haphazard input features in an effective manner. Aux-Drop adapts the conventional dropout regularization scheme for the haphazard input feature space ensuring that the final output is minimally impacted by the chaotic appearance of such features. It helps to prevent the co-adaptation of especially the auxiliary and base features, as well as reduces the strong dependence of the output on any of the auxiliary inputs of the model. This helps in better learning for scenarios where certain features disappear in time or when new features are to be modelled. The efficacy of Aux-Drop has been demonstrated through extensive numerical experiments on SOTA benchmarking datasets that include Italy Power Demand, HIGGS, SUSY and multiple UCI datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/Rohit102497/Aux-Drop.
summary: Many real-world applications based on online learning produce streaming data that is haphazard in nature, i.e., contains missing features, features becoming obsolete in time, the appearance of new features at later points in time and a lack of clarity on the total number of input features. These challenges make it hard to build a learnable system for such applications, and almost no work exists in deep learning that addresses this issue. In this paper, we present Aux-Drop, an auxiliary dropout regularization strategy for online learning that handles the haphazard input features in an effective manner. Aux-Drop adapts the conventional dropout regularization scheme for the haphazard input feature space ensuring that the final output is minimally impacted by the chaotic appearance of such features. It helps to prevent the co-adaptation of especially the auxiliary and base features, as well as reduces the strong dependence of the output on any of the auxiliary inputs of the model. This helps in better learning for scenarios where certain features disappear in time or when new features are to be modelled. The efficacy of Aux-Drop has been demonstrated through extensive numerical experiments on SOTA benchmarking datasets that include Italy Power Demand, HIGGS, SUSY and multiple UCI datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/Rohit102497/Aux-Drop.
abstract_zh: 许多基于在线学习的现实世界应用程序产生的流数据本质上是随意的，即包含缺失的特征、随着时间的推移而过时的特征、稍后出现的新特征以及输入特征总数缺乏清晰度。这些挑战使得为此类应用程序构建可学习的系统变得困难，并且深度学习中几乎没有工作可以解决这个问题。在本文中，我们提出了 Aux-Drop，一种用于在线学习的辅助 dropout 正则化策略，可以有效地处理随机输入特征。 Aux-Drop 针对随机输入特征空间采用传统的 dropout 正则化方案，确保最终输出受此类特征的混乱外观的影响最小。它有助于防止特别是辅助特征和基本特征的共同适应，并减少输出对模型任何辅助输入的强烈依赖。这有助于更好地学习某些特征及时消失或要对新特征进行建模的场景。 Aux-Drop 的功效已通过对 SOTA 基准数据集（包括意大利电力需求、HIGGS、SUSY 和多个 UCI 数据集）的大量数值实验得到证明。该代码可在 https://github.com/Rohit102497/Aux-Drop 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Aux-Drop方法，通过辅助dropout策略有效处理在线学习中的杂乱输入特征问题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中的在线学习数据常包含缺失特征、过时特征、新特征出现及特征总数不确定等问题，现有深度学习方法难以有效应对这些挑战。
AI.method: 设计Aux-Drop正则化策略，通过适应性dropout机制降低辅助特征与基础特征的共适应性，并减少输出对辅助输入的依赖，以应对特征动态变化。
AI.result: 在Italy Power Demand、HIGGS、SUSY等基准数据集上的实验表明，Aux-Drop能有效提升模型在特征动态变化场景下的学习效果。
AI.conclusion: Aux-Drop通过创新的dropout机制成功解决了在线学习中杂乱输入特征的处理难题，为动态特征场景提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: P. Héas,O. Hautecoeur,R. Borde
title: 3D wind field profiles from hyperspectral sounders: revisiting optic-flow from a meteorological perspective
title_zh: 高光谱探测器的 3D 风场剖面：从气象角度重新审视光流
abstract: In this work, we present an efficient optic flow algorithm for the extraction of vertically resolved 3D atmospheric motion vector (AMV) fields from incomplete hyperspectral image data measures by infrared sounders. The model at the heart of the energy to be minimized is consistent with atmospheric dynamics, incorporating ingredients of thermodynamics, hydrostatic equilibrium and statistical turbulence. Modern optimization techniques are deployed to design a low-complexity solver for the energy minimization problem, which is non-convex, non-differentiable, high-dimensional and subject to physical constraints. In particular, taking advantage of the alternate direction of multipliers methods (ADMM), we show how to split the original high-dimensional problem into a recursion involving a set of standard and tractable optic-flow sub-problems. By comparing with the ground truth provided by the operational numerical simulation of the European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts (ECMWF), we show that the performance of the proposed method is superior to state-of-the-art optical flow algorithms in the context of real infrared atmospheric sounding interferometer (IASI) observations.
summary: In this work, we present an efficient optic flow algorithm for the extraction of vertically resolved 3D atmospheric motion vector (AMV) fields from incomplete hyperspectral image data measures by infrared sounders. The model at the heart of the energy to be minimized is consistent with atmospheric dynamics, incorporating ingredients of thermodynamics, hydrostatic equilibrium and statistical turbulence. Modern optimization techniques are deployed to design a low-complexity solver for the energy minimization problem, which is non-convex, non-differentiable, high-dimensional and subject to physical constraints. In particular, taking advantage of the alternate direction of multipliers methods (ADMM), we show how to split the original high-dimensional problem into a recursion involving a set of standard and tractable optic-flow sub-problems. By comparing with the ground truth provided by the operational numerical simulation of the European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts (ECMWF), we show that the performance of the proposed method is superior to state-of-the-art optical flow algorithms in the context of real infrared atmospheric sounding interferometer (IASI) observations.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种有效的光流算法，用于从红外探测器测量的不完整高光谱图像数据中提取垂直解析的 3D 大气运动矢量 (AMV) 场。能量最小化的核心模型与大气动力学一致，结合了热力学、流体静力平衡和统计湍流的成分。采用现代优化技术来设计能量最小化问题的低复杂度求解器，该求解器是非凸、不可微、高维且受物理约束的。特别是，利用乘子方法的替代方向（ADMM），我们展示了如何将原始高维问题分解为涉及一组标准且易于处理的光流子问题的递归。通过与欧洲中期天气预报中心（ECMWF）的业务数值模拟提供的地面实况进行比较，我们表明，在真实红外大气探测干涉仪（IASI）观测的背景下，所提出的方法的性能优于最先进的光流算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的光流算法，用于从红外高光谱探测仪的不完整数据中提取垂直解析的三维大气运动矢量场。
AI.motivation: 传统光流算法在处理高光谱声学数据时难以满足大气动力学约束，需结合热力学、静力平衡等物理规律提升三维风场反演精度。
AI.method: 基于ADMM优化方法，将非凸高维能量最小化问题分解为多个标准光流子问题，引入大气动力学约束构建物理一致性能量函数。
AI.result: 与ECMWF数值模拟结果对比显示，该方法在IASI实际观测数据中的性能优于现有光流算法，显著提升三维风场反演精度。

search_text: 3D wind field profiles from hyperspectral sounders: revisiting optic-flow from a meteorological perspective 高光谱探测器的 3D 风场剖面：从气象角度重新审视光流 In this work, we present an efficient optic flow algorithm for the extraction of vertically resolved 3D atmospheric motion vector (AMV) fields from incomplete hyperspectral image data measures by infrared sounders. The model at the heart of the energy to be minimized is consistent with atmospheric dynamics, incorporating ingredients of thermodynamics, hydrostatic equilibrium and statistical turbulence. Modern optimization techniques are deployed to design a low-complexity solver for the energy minimization problem, which is non-convex, non-differentiable, high-dimensional and subject to physical constraints. In particular, taking advantage of the alternate direction of multipliers methods (ADMM), we show how to split the original high-dimensional problem into a recursion involving a set of standard and tractable optic-flow sub-problems. By comparing with the ground truth provided by the operational numerical simulation of the European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts (ECMWF), we show that the performance of the proposed method is superior to state-of-the-art optical flow algorithms in the context of real infrared atmospheric sounding interferometer (IASI) observations. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种有效的光流算法，用于从红外探测器测量的不完整高光谱图像数据中提取垂直解析的 3D 大气运动矢量 (AMV) 场。能量最小化的核心模型与大气动力学一致，结合了热力学、流体静力平衡和统计湍流的成分。采用现代优化技术来设计能量最小化问题的低复杂度求解器，该求解器是非凸、不可微、高维且受物理约束的。特别是，利用乘子方法的替代方向（ADMM），我们展示了如何将原始高维问题分解为涉及一组标准且易于处理的光流子问题的递归。通过与欧洲中期天气预报中心（ECMWF）的业务数值模拟提供的地面实况进行比较，我们表明，在真实红外大气探测干涉仪（IASI）观测的背景下，所提出的方法的性能优于最先进的光流算法。 本文提出一种高效的光流算法，用于从红外高光谱探测仪的不完整数据中提取垂直解析的三维大气运动矢量场。 P. Héas,O. Hautecoeur,R. Borde cs.CV,eess.SP

authors_text: Yasuto Hoshi,Daisuke Miyashita,Yasuhiro Morioka,Youyang Ng,Osamu Torii,Jun Deguchi
title: Can a Frozen Pretrained Language Model be used for Zero-shot Neural Retrieval on Entity-centric Questions?
title_zh: 冻结预训练语言模型可以用于以实体为中心的问题的零样本神经检索吗？
comment: Accepted to Workshop on Knowledge Augmented Methods for Natural Language Processing, in conjunction with AAAI 2023
comments: Accepted to Workshop on Knowledge Augmented Methods for Natural Language Processing, in conjunction with AAAI 2023
abstract: Neural document retrievers, including dense passage retrieval (DPR), have outperformed classical lexical-matching retrievers, such as BM25, when fine-tuned and tested on specific question-answering datasets. However, it has been shown that the existing dense retrievers do not generalize well not only out of domain but even in domain such as Wikipedia, especially when a named entity in a question is a dominant clue for retrieval. In this paper, we propose an approach toward in-domain generalization using the embeddings generated by the frozen language model trained with the entities in the domain. By not fine-tuning, we explore the possibility that the rich knowledge contained in a pretrained language model can be used for retrieval tasks. The proposed method outperforms conventional DPRs on entity-centric questions in Wikipedia domain and achieves almost comparable performance to BM25 and state-of-the-art SPAR model. We also show that the contextualized keys lead to strong improvements compared to BM25 when the entity names consist of common words. Our results demonstrate the feasibility of the zero-shot retrieval method for entity-centric questions of Wikipedia domain, where DPR has struggled to perform.
summary: Neural document retrievers, including dense passage retrieval (DPR), have outperformed classical lexical-matching retrievers, such as BM25, when fine-tuned and tested on specific question-answering datasets. However, it has been shown that the existing dense retrievers do not generalize well not only out of domain but even in domain such as Wikipedia, especially when a named entity in a question is a dominant clue for retrieval. In this paper, we propose an approach toward in-domain generalization using the embeddings generated by the frozen language model trained with the entities in the domain. By not fine-tuning, we explore the possibility that the rich knowledge contained in a pretrained language model can be used for retrieval tasks. The proposed method outperforms conventional DPRs on entity-centric questions in Wikipedia domain and achieves almost comparable performance to BM25 and state-of-the-art SPAR model. We also show that the contextualized keys lead to strong improvements compared to BM25 when the entity names consist of common words. Our results demonstrate the feasibility of the zero-shot retrieval method for entity-centric questions of Wikipedia domain, where DPR has struggled to perform.
abstract_zh: 在特定问答数据集上进行微调和测试时，神经文档检索器（包括密集段落检索 (DPR)）的性能优于经典词汇匹配检索器（例如 BM25）。然而，事实证明，现有的密集检索器不仅在领域外，甚至在维基百科等领域也不能很好地泛化，特别是当问题中的命名实体是检索的主要线索时。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用由域中实体训练的冻结语言模型生成的嵌入来实现域内泛化的方法。通过不进行微调，我们探索了预训练语言模型中包含的丰富知识可用于检索任务的可能性。所提出的方法在维基百科领域以实体为中心的问题上优于传统的 DPR，并实现了与 BM25 和最先进的 SPAR 模型几乎相当的性能。我们还表明，当实体名称由常用词组成时，上下文化键与 BM25 相比会带来显着的改进。我们的结果证明了零样本检索方法对于维基百科领域以实体为中心的问题的可行性，而 DPR 一直在这方面表现不佳。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了使用冻结的预训练语言模型进行零样本神经检索在以实体为中心的问题上的可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有的密集型检索器在特定领域（如维基百科）中表现不佳，特别是在问题中包含命名实体时，因此需要一种无需微调即可实现领域内泛化的检索方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种方法，利用冻结的预训练语言模型生成的嵌入，通过实体信息进行检索，无需对模型进行微调。
AI.result: 该方法在维基百科领域的以实体为中心的问题上优于传统的DPR，并且表现接近BM25和最先进的SPAR模型。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，使用冻结的预训练语言模型进行零样本检索在维基百科领域以实体为中心的问题上是可行的。

authors_text: Murad Tukan,Samson Zhou,Alaa Maalouf,Daniela Rus,Vladimir Braverman,Dan Feldman
title: Provable Data Subset Selection For Efficient Neural Network Training
title_zh: 用于高效神经网络训练的可证明数据子集选择
abstract: Radial basis function neural networks (\emph{RBFNN}) are {well-known} for their capability to approximate any continuous function on a closed bounded set with arbitrary precision given enough hidden neurons. In this paper, we introduce the first algorithm to construct coresets for \emph{RBFNNs}, i.e., small weighted subsets that approximate the loss of the input data on any radial basis function network and thus approximate any function defined by an \emph{RBFNN} on the larger input data. In particular, we construct coresets for radial basis and Laplacian loss functions. We then use our coresets to obtain a provable data subset selection algorithm for training deep neural networks. Since our coresets approximate every function, they also approximate the gradient of each weight in a neural network, which is a particular function on the input. We then perform empirical evaluations on function approximation and dataset subset selection on popular network architectures and data sets, demonstrating the efficacy and accuracy of our coreset construction.
summary: Radial basis function neural networks (\emph{RBFNN}) are {well-known} for their capability to approximate any continuous function on a closed bounded set with arbitrary precision given enough hidden neurons. In this paper, we introduce the first algorithm to construct coresets for \emph{RBFNNs}, i.e., small weighted subsets that approximate the loss of the input data on any radial basis function network and thus approximate any function defined by an \emph{RBFNN} on the larger input data. In particular, we construct coresets for radial basis and Laplacian loss functions. We then use our coresets to obtain a provable data subset selection algorithm for training deep neural networks. Since our coresets approximate every function, they also approximate the gradient of each weight in a neural network, which is a particular function on the input. We then perform empirical evaluations on function approximation and dataset subset selection on popular network architectures and data sets, demonstrating the efficacy and accuracy of our coreset construction.
abstract_zh: 径向基函数神经网络（\emph{RBFNN}）因其能够在给定足够的隐藏神经元的情况下以任意精度逼近闭有界集上的任何连续函数而闻名。在本文中，我们介绍了第一个为 emph{RBFNNs} 构建核心集的算法，即小加权子集，它近似于任何径向基函数网络上输入数据的损失，从而近似于较大输入数据上由 emph{RBFNN} 定义的任何函数。特别是，我们构建了径向基和拉普拉斯损失函数的核心集。然后，我们使用我们的核心集来获得可证明的数据子集选择算法，用于训练深度神经网络。由于我们的核心集近似每个函数，因此它们也近似神经网络中每个权重的梯度，这是输入上的特定函数。然后，我们对流行网络架构和数据集的函数逼近和数据集子集选择进行实证评估，证明我们的核心集构建的有效性和准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可证明的数据子集选择算法，通过构造核集（coresets）来近似径向基函数神经网络（RBFNN）的损失函数，从而实现高效神经网络训练。
AI.motivation: RBFNN虽具强逼近能力，但需大量隐藏神经元导致计算成本高。现有方法缺乏理论保证的数据子集选择策略，限制了训练效率。
AI.method: 设计针对径向基和拉普拉斯损失函数的核集构造算法，利用核集近似损失函数及网络权重梯度，结合实证评估验证有效性。
AI.result: 在主流网络架构和数据集上验证了核集方法在函数逼近和数据子集选择任务中的准确性与效率，证明其理论保证的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出RBFNN的核集构造算法，为深度神经网络训练提供了理论支撑的高效数据子集选择方案，具有广泛的应用潜力。

result: 在主流网络架构和数据集上验证了核集方法在函数逼近和数据子集选择任务中的准确性与效率，证明其理论保证的可行性。
conclusion: 首次提出RBFNN的核集构造算法，为深度神经网络训练提供了理论支撑的高效数据子集选择方案，具有广泛的应用潜力。
search_text: Provable Data Subset Selection For Efficient Neural Network Training 用于高效神经网络训练的可证明数据子集选择 Radial basis function neural networks (\emph{RBFNN}) are {well-known} for their capability to approximate any continuous function on a closed bounded set with arbitrary precision given enough hidden neurons. In this paper, we introduce the first algorithm to construct coresets for \emph{RBFNNs}, i.e., small weighted subsets that approximate the loss of the input data on any radial basis function network and thus approximate any function defined by an \emph{RBFNN} on the larger input data. In particular, we construct coresets for radial basis and Laplacian loss functions. We then use our coresets to obtain a provable data subset selection algorithm for training deep neural networks. Since our coresets approximate every function, they also approximate the gradient of each weight in a neural network, which is a particular function on the input. We then perform empirical evaluations on function approximation and dataset subset selection on popular network architectures and data sets, demonstrating the efficacy and accuracy of our coreset construction. 径向基函数神经网络（\emph{RBFNN}）因其能够在给定足够的隐藏神经元的情况下以任意精度逼近闭有界集上的任何连续函数而闻名。在本文中，我们介绍了第一个为 emph{RBFNNs} 构建核心集的算法，即小加权子集，它近似于任何径向基函数网络上输入数据的损失，从而近似于较大输入数据上由 emph{RBFNN} 定义的任何函数。特别是，我们构建了径向基和拉普拉斯损失函数的核心集。然后，我们使用我们的核心集来获得可证明的数据子集选择算法，用于训练深度神经网络。由于我们的核心集近似每个函数，因此它们也近似神经网络中每个权重的梯度，这是输入上的特定函数。然后，我们对流行网络架构和数据集的函数逼近和数据集子集选择进行实证评估，证明我们的核心集构建的有效性和准确性。 本文提出一种可证明的数据子集选择算法，通过构造核集（coresets）来近似径向基函数神经网络（RBFNN）的损失函数，从而实现高效神经网络训练。 Murad Tukan,Samson Zhou,Alaa Maalouf,Daniela Rus,Vladimir Braverman,Dan Feldman cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Martijn Oldenhof,Adam Arany,Yves Moreau,Edward De Brouwer
title: Weakly Supervised Knowledge Transfer with Probabilistic Logical Reasoning for Object Detection
title_zh: 用于目标检测的弱监督知识转移和概率逻辑推理
abstract: Training object detection models usually requires instance-level annotations, such as the positions and labels of all objects present in each image. Such supervision is unfortunately not always available and, more often, only image-level information is provided, also known as weak supervision. Recent works have addressed this limitation by leveraging knowledge from a richly annotated domain. However, the scope of weak supervision supported by these approaches has been very restrictive, preventing them to use all available information. In this work, we propose ProbKT, a framework based on probabilistic logical reasoning that allows to train object detection models with arbitrary types of weak supervision. We empirically show on different datasets that using all available information is beneficial as our ProbKT leads to significant improvement on target domain and better generalization compared to existing baselines. We also showcase the ability of our approach to handle complex logic statements as supervision signal.
summary: Training object detection models usually requires instance-level annotations, such as the positions and labels of all objects present in each image. Such supervision is unfortunately not always available and, more often, only image-level information is provided, also known as weak supervision. Recent works have addressed this limitation by leveraging knowledge from a richly annotated domain. However, the scope of weak supervision supported by these approaches has been very restrictive, preventing them to use all available information. In this work, we propose ProbKT, a framework based on probabilistic logical reasoning that allows to train object detection models with arbitrary types of weak supervision. We empirically show on different datasets that using all available information is beneficial as our ProbKT leads to significant improvement on target domain and better generalization compared to existing baselines. We also showcase the ability of our approach to handle complex logic statements as supervision signal.
abstract_zh: 训练对象检测模型通常需要实例级注释，例如每个图像中存在的所有对象的位置和标签。不幸的是，这种监督并不总是可用，而且更常见的是，仅提供图像级信息，也称为弱监督。最近的工作通过利用来自丰富注释领域的知识解决了这一限制。然而，这些方法所支持的弱监督范围非常有限，阻碍了它们利用所有可用的信息。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ProbKT，这是一个基于概率逻辑推理的框架，允许训练具有任意类型弱监督的对象检测模型。我们在不同的数据集上凭经验表明，使用所有可用信息是有益的，因为与现有基线相比，我们的 ProbKT 可以显着改进目标领域并实现更好的泛化。我们还展示了我们的方法处理复杂逻辑语句作为监督信号的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率逻辑推理的弱监督知识迁移框架ProbKT，用于解决目标检测中实例级标注不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督目标检测方法对监督信息类型支持有限，无法充分利用所有可用信息，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 设计ProbKT框架，通过概率逻辑推理机制，实现对任意类型弱监督信号（如图像级标签、复杂逻辑规则）的有效利用。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证ProbKT相比基线方法在目标域性能和泛化能力上均有显著提升，且能有效处理复杂逻辑约束的监督信号。
AI.conclusion: ProbKT通过概率逻辑推理有效整合多样化弱监督信息，在目标检测任务中实现了更优的性能和更广的适用性。

authors_text: Ziping Zhao,Huan Wang,Haishuai Wang,Bjorn Schuller
title: hierarchical network with decoupled knowledge distillation for speech emotion recognition
title_zh: 用于语音情感识别的具有解耦知识蒸馏的分层网络
abstract: The goal of Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) is to enable computers to recognize the emotion category of a given utterance in the same way that humans do. The accuracy of SER is strongly dependent on the validity of the utterance-level representation obtained by the model. Nevertheless, the ``dark knowledge" carried by non-target classes is always ignored by previous studies. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical network, called DKDFMH, which employs decoupled knowledge distillation in a deep convolutional neural network with a fused multi-head attention mechanism. Our approach applies logit distillation to obtain higher-level semantic features from different scales of attention sets and delve into the knowledge carried by non-target classes, thus guiding the model to focus more on the differences between sentiment features. To validate the effectiveness of our model, we conducted experiments on the Interactive Emotional Dyadic Motion Capture (IEMOCAP) dataset. We achieved competitive performance, with 79.1% weighted accuracy (WA) and 77.1% unweighted accuracy (UA). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time since 2015 that logit distillation has been returned to state-of-the-art status.
summary: The goal of Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) is to enable computers to recognize the emotion category of a given utterance in the same way that humans do. The accuracy of SER is strongly dependent on the validity of the utterance-level representation obtained by the model. Nevertheless, the ``dark knowledge" carried by non-target classes is always ignored by previous studies. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical network, called DKDFMH, which employs decoupled knowledge distillation in a deep convolutional neural network with a fused multi-head attention mechanism. Our approach applies logit distillation to obtain higher-level semantic features from different scales of attention sets and delve into the knowledge carried by non-target classes, thus guiding the model to focus more on the differences between sentiment features. To validate the effectiveness of our model, we conducted experiments on the Interactive Emotional Dyadic Motion Capture (IEMOCAP) dataset. We achieved competitive performance, with 79.1% weighted accuracy (WA) and 77.1% unweighted accuracy (UA). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time since 2015 that logit distillation has been returned to state-of-the-art status.
abstract_zh: 语音情感识别（SER）的目标是使计算机能够像人类一样识别给定话语的情感类别。 SER 的准确性很大程度上取决于模型获得的话语级表示的有效性。然而，非目标类所携带的“暗知识”总是被以往的研究所忽视。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为DKDFMH的分层网络，它在具有融合多头注意力机制的深度卷积神经网络中采用解耦知识蒸馏。我们的方法应用logit蒸馏从不同尺度的注意力集中获取更高层次的语义特征，并深入研究非目标类所携带的知识，从而引导模型更多地关注情感特征之间的差异。我们在交互式情感二元运动捕捉 (IEMOCAP) 数据集上进行了实验，取得了具有竞争力的性能，加权准确度 (WA) 和未加权准确度 (UA) 为 77.1%，据我们所知，这是自 2015 年以来 Logit 蒸馏首次恢复到最先进的状态。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合解耦知识蒸馏与多头注意力机制的分层网络DKDFMH，用于提升语音情感识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究忽视了非目标类别中蕴含的'暗知识'，导致模型难以有效区分情感特征差异，影响语音情感识别性能。
AI.method: 构建包含融合多头注意力机制的深度卷积神经网络，通过解耦知识蒸馏从不同尺度注意力集提取高层语义特征，并利用非目标类别的知识指导模型学习。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP数据集上实现79.1%加权准确率和77.1%非加权准确率，使logit蒸馏方法自2015年以来首次达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用非目标类别知识与多尺度特征融合，所提方法显著提升了语音情感识别性能，验证了解耦知识蒸馏的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合解耦知识蒸馏与多头注意力机制的分层网络DKDFMH，用于提升语音情感识别的准确性。

authors_text: M. Ljubenovic,P. Guzzonato,G. Franceschin,A. Traviglia
title: Blind deblurring of hyperspectral document images
title_zh: 高光谱文档图像的盲去模糊
comment: This project has received funding from the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme under grant agreement No. 101026453. This work is published in the Lecture Notes in Computer Science book series (LNCS, volume 13373) as part of the Image Analysis and Processing, ICIAP 2022 Workshops
comments: This project has received funding from the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme under grant agreement No. 101026453. This work is published in the Lecture Notes in Computer Science book series (LNCS, volume 13373) as part of the Image Analysis and Processing, ICIAP 2022 Workshops
abstract: Most computer vision and machine learning-based approaches for historical document analysis are tailored to grayscale or RGB images and thus, mostly exploit their spatial information. Multispectral (MS) and hyperspectral (HS) images contain, next to the spatial information, much richer spectral information than RGB images (usually spreading beyond the visible spectral range) that can facilitate more effective feature extraction, more accurate classification and recognition, and thus, improved analysis. Although utilization of rich spectral information can improve historical document analysis tremendously, there are still some potential limitations of HS imagery such as camera-induced noise and blur that require a carefully designed preprocessing step. Here, we propose novel blind HS image deblurring methods tailored to document images. We exploit a low-rank property of HS images (i.e., by projecting an HS image to a lower dimensional subspace) and utilize a text tailor image prior to performing a PSF estimation and deblurring of subspace components. The preliminary results show that the proposed approach gives good results over all spectral bands, removing successfully image artefacts introduced by blur and noise and significantly increasing the number of bands that can be used in further analysis.
summary: Most computer vision and machine learning-based approaches for historical document analysis are tailored to grayscale or RGB images and thus, mostly exploit their spatial information. Multispectral (MS) and hyperspectral (HS) images contain, next to the spatial information, much richer spectral information than RGB images (usually spreading beyond the visible spectral range) that can facilitate more effective feature extraction, more accurate classification and recognition, and thus, improved analysis. Although utilization of rich spectral information can improve historical document analysis tremendously, there are still some potential limitations of HS imagery such as camera-induced noise and blur that require a carefully designed preprocessing step. Here, we propose novel blind HS image deblurring methods tailored to document images. We exploit a low-rank property of HS images (i.e., by projecting an HS image to a lower dimensional subspace) and utilize a text tailor image prior to performing a PSF estimation and deblurring of subspace components. The preliminary results show that the proposed approach gives good results over all spectral bands, removing successfully image artefacts introduced by blur and noise and significantly increasing the number of bands that can be used in further analysis.
abstract_zh: 大多数基于计算机视觉和机器学习的历史文档分析方法都是针对灰度或 RGB 图像定制的，因此主要利用其空间信息。除了空间信息之外，多光谱 (MS) 和高光谱 (HS) 图像还包含比 RGB 图像（通常超出可见光谱范围）更丰富的光谱信息，可以促进更有效的特征提取、更准确的分类和识别，从而改进分析。尽管利用丰富的光谱信息可以极大地改善历史文档分析，但 HS 图像仍然存在一些潜在的局限性，例如相机引起的噪声和模糊，需要精心设计的预处理步骤。在这里，我们提出了针对文档图像的新型盲 HS 图像去模糊方法。我们利用 HS 图像的低秩属性（即，通过将 HS 图像投影到较低维度的子空间），并在执行 PSF 估计和子空间分量去模糊之前利用文本定制图像。初步结果表明，所提出的方法在所有光谱带上都给出了良好的结果，成功地消除了由模糊和噪声引入的图像伪影，并显着增加了可用于进一步分析的波段数量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对高光谱文档图像的盲去模糊方法，通过利用低秩特性和文本先验信息，有效去除模糊和噪声，提升后续分析效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多针对RGB图像，而高光谱图像虽含丰富光谱信息，但存在相机噪声和模糊问题，需预处理以充分利用其优势。
AI.method: 通过将高光谱图像投影到低维子空间，结合文本先验信息进行点扩散函数（PSF）估计和子空间成分去模糊。
AI.result: 方法在所有光谱波段均表现良好，成功消除模糊和噪声伪影，显著增加可用于后续分析的有效波段数量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了高光谱文档图像的质量，为后续特征提取和分析提供了更可靠的依据。

authors_text: Jiayi Zhu,Bart Bolsterlee,Brian V. Y. Chow,Yang Song,Erik Meijering
title: Hybrid Dual Mean-Teacher Network With Double-Uncertainty Guidance for Semi-Supervised Segmentation of MRI Scans
title_zh: 具有双不确定性指导的混合双均值教师网络用于 MRI 扫描的半监督分割
abstract: Semi-supervised learning has made significant progress in medical image segmentation. However, existing methods primarily utilize information acquired from a single dimensionality (2D/3D), resulting in sub-optimal performance on challenging data, such as magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) scans with multiple objects and highly anisotropic resolution. To address this issue, we present a Hybrid Dual Mean-Teacher (HD-Teacher) model with hybrid, semi-supervised, and multi-task learning to achieve highly effective semi-supervised segmentation. HD-Teacher employs a 2D and a 3D mean-teacher network to produce segmentation labels and signed distance fields from the hybrid information captured in both dimensionalities. This hybrid learning mechanism allows HD-Teacher to combine the `best of both worlds', utilizing features extracted from either 2D, 3D, or both dimensions to produce outputs as it sees fit. Outputs from 2D and 3D teacher models are also dynamically combined, based on their individual uncertainty scores, into a single hybrid prediction, where the hybrid uncertainty is estimated. We then propose a hybrid regularization module to encourage both student models to produce results close to the uncertainty-weighted hybrid prediction. The hybrid uncertainty suppresses unreliable knowledge in the hybrid prediction, leaving only useful information to improve network performance further. Extensive experiments of binary and multi-class segmentation conducted on three MRI datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Code is available at https://github.com/ThisGame42/Hybrid-Teacher.
summary: Semi-supervised learning has made significant progress in medical image segmentation. However, existing methods primarily utilize information acquired from a single dimensionality (2D/3D), resulting in sub-optimal performance on challenging data, such as magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) scans with multiple objects and highly anisotropic resolution. To address this issue, we present a Hybrid Dual Mean-Teacher (HD-Teacher) model with hybrid, semi-supervised, and multi-task learning to achieve highly effective semi-supervised segmentation. HD-Teacher employs a 2D and a 3D mean-teacher network to produce segmentation labels and signed distance fields from the hybrid information captured in both dimensionalities. This hybrid learning mechanism allows HD-Teacher to combine the `best of both worlds', utilizing features extracted from either 2D, 3D, or both dimensions to produce outputs as it sees fit. Outputs from 2D and 3D teacher models are also dynamically combined, based on their individual uncertainty scores, into a single hybrid prediction, where the hybrid uncertainty is estimated. We then propose a hybrid regularization module to encourage both student models to produce results close to the uncertainty-weighted hybrid prediction. The hybrid uncertainty suppresses unreliable knowledge in the hybrid prediction, leaving only useful information to improve network performance further. Extensive experiments of binary and multi-class segmentation conducted on three MRI datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Code is available at https://github.com/ThisGame42/Hybrid-Teacher.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习在医学图像分割方面取得了重大进展。然而，现有方法主要利用从单维（2D/3D）获取的信息，导致在具有挑战性的数据上表现不佳，例如具有多个对象和高各向异性分辨率的磁共振成像（MRI）扫描。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种混合双均值教师（HD-Teacher）模型，该模型具有混合、半监督和多任务学习，以实现高效的半监督分割。 HD-Teacher 采用 2D 和 3D 平均教师网络从两个维度捕获的混合信息生成分段标签和带符号距离场。这种混合学习机制允许 HD-Teacher 结合“两全其美”，利用从 2D、3D 或两个维度提取的特征来产生它认为合适的输出。 2D 和 3D 教师模型的输出也会根据其各自的不确定性分数动态组合成单个混合预测，其中估计混合不确定性。然后，我们提出一个混合正则化模块，以鼓励两个学生模型产生接近不确定性加权混合预测的结果。混合不确定性抑制了混合预测中不可靠的知识，只留下有用的信息以进一步提高网络性能。在三个 MRI 数据集上进行的二元和多类分割的广泛实验证明了所提出框架的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/ThisGame42/Hybrid-Teacher 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合2D和3D信息的混合双均值教师网络（HD-Teacher），用于提升MRI扫描的半监督分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅利用单一维度（2D/3D）信息，难以处理包含多物体和各向异性分辨率的复杂MRI数据，导致分割性能不足。
AI.method: 通过2D和3D均值教师网络生成分割标签和符号距离场，动态融合两者输出并基于不确定性评分生成混合预测，结合混合正则化模块优化学生模型。
AI.result: 在三个MRI数据集上的二分类和多分类分割实验表明，该框架显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合维度学习与不确定性引导机制有效提升了半监督MRI分割性能，验证了框架的优越性。

authors_text: Zhiheng Liu,Ruili Feng,Kai Zhu,Yifei Zhang,Kecheng Zheng,Yu Liu,Deli Zhao,Jingren Zhou,Yang Cao
title: Cones: Concept Neurons in Diffusion Models for Customized Generation
title_zh: 锥体：用于定制生成的扩散模型中的概念神经元
abstract: Human brains respond to semantic features of presented stimuli with different neurons. It is then curious whether modern deep neural networks admit a similar behavior pattern. Specifically, this paper finds a small cluster of neurons in a diffusion model corresponding to a particular subject. We call those neurons the concept neurons. They can be identified by statistics of network gradients to a stimulation connected with the given subject. The concept neurons demonstrate magnetic properties in interpreting and manipulating generation results. Shutting them can directly yield the related subject contextualized in different scenes. Concatenating multiple clusters of concept neurons can vividly generate all related concepts in a single image. A few steps of further fine-tuning can enhance the multi-concept capability, which may be the first to manage to generate up to four different subjects in a single image. For large-scale applications, the concept neurons are environmentally friendly as we only need to store a sparse cluster of int index instead of dense float32 values of the parameters, which reduces storage consumption by 90\% compared with previous subject-driven generation methods. Extensive qualitative and quantitative studies on diverse scenarios show the superiority of our method in interpreting and manipulating diffusion models.
summary: Human brains respond to semantic features of presented stimuli with different neurons. It is then curious whether modern deep neural networks admit a similar behavior pattern. Specifically, this paper finds a small cluster of neurons in a diffusion model corresponding to a particular subject. We call those neurons the concept neurons. They can be identified by statistics of network gradients to a stimulation connected with the given subject. The concept neurons demonstrate magnetic properties in interpreting and manipulating generation results. Shutting them can directly yield the related subject contextualized in different scenes. Concatenating multiple clusters of concept neurons can vividly generate all related concepts in a single image. A few steps of further fine-tuning can enhance the multi-concept capability, which may be the first to manage to generate up to four different subjects in a single image. For large-scale applications, the concept neurons are environmentally friendly as we only need to store a sparse cluster of int index instead of dense float32 values of the parameters, which reduces storage consumption by 90\% compared with previous subject-driven generation methods. Extensive qualitative and quantitative studies on diverse scenarios show the superiority of our method in interpreting and manipulating diffusion models.
abstract_zh: 人脑通过不同的神经元对呈现的刺激的语义特征做出反应。那么，现代深度神经网络是否承认类似的行为模式就令人好奇。具体来说，本文在扩散模型中找到了与特定主题相对应的一小群神经元。我们将这些神经元称为概念神经元。它们可以通过与给定主体相关的刺激的网络梯度统计来识别。概念神经元在解释和操纵生成结果方面表现出磁性。关闭它们可以直接产生不同场景中的相关主题。连接多个概念神经元簇可以在单个图像中生动地生成所有相关概念。进一步微调的几个步骤可以增强多概念能力，这可能是第一个设法在单个图像中生成最多四个不同主题的能力。对于大规模应用，概念神经元是环保的，因为我们只需要存储稀疏的 int 索引簇，而不是密集的 float32 参数值，与以前的主题驱动生成方法相比，这减少了 90% 的存储消耗。对不同场景的广泛定性和定量研究表明我们的方法在解释和操纵扩散模型方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过识别扩散模型中的概念神经元，实现对生成内容的定制化控制。
AI.motivation: 受人类大脑对语义特征响应机制的启发，探索深度神经网络中是否存在类似的概念神经元，以实现对生成结果的精准操控。
AI.method: 通过分析网络梯度统计特性定位概念神经元，利用开关控制实现主题删除、多概念拼接及微调增强，采用稀疏索引存储降低90%存储开销。
AI.result: 成功生成包含最多四个主题的单幅图像，存储效率提升90%，定性定量实验验证方法在生成控制方面的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 概念神经元方法为扩散模型提供了高效、精准的定制化生成解决方案，兼具环境友好性与技术先进性。

search_text: Cones: Concept Neurons in Diffusion Models for Customized Generation 锥体：用于定制生成的扩散模型中的概念神经元 Human brains respond to semantic features of presented stimuli with different neurons. It is then curious whether modern deep neural networks admit a similar behavior pattern. Specifically, this paper finds a small cluster of neurons in a diffusion model corresponding to a particular subject. We call those neurons the concept neurons. They can be identified by statistics of network gradients to a stimulation connected with the given subject. The concept neurons demonstrate magnetic properties in interpreting and manipulating generation results. Shutting them can directly yield the related subject contextualized in different scenes. Concatenating multiple clusters of concept neurons can vividly generate all related concepts in a single image. A few steps of further fine-tuning can enhance the multi-concept capability, which may be the first to manage to generate up to four different subjects in a single image. For large-scale applications, the concept neurons are environmentally friendly as we only need to store a sparse cluster of int index instead of dense float32 values of the parameters, which reduces storage consumption by 90\% compared with previous subject-driven generation methods. Extensive qualitative and quantitative studies on diverse scenarios show the superiority of our method in interpreting and manipulating diffusion models. 人脑通过不同的神经元对呈现的刺激的语义特征做出反应。那么，现代深度神经网络是否承认类似的行为模式就令人好奇。具体来说，本文在扩散模型中找到了与特定主题相对应的一小群神经元。我们将这些神经元称为概念神经元。它们可以通过与给定主体相关的刺激的网络梯度统计来识别。概念神经元在解释和操纵生成结果方面表现出磁性。关闭它们可以直接产生不同场景中的相关主题。连接多个概念神经元簇可以在单个图像中生动地生成所有相关概念。进一步微调的几个步骤可以增强多概念能力，这可能是第一个设法在单个图像中生成最多四个不同主题的能力。对于大规模应用，概念神经元是环保的，因为我们只需要存储稀疏的 int 索引簇，而不是密集的 float32 参数值，与以前的主题驱动生成方法相比，这减少了 90% 的存储消耗。对不同场景的广泛定性和定量研究表明我们的方法在解释和操纵扩散模型方面的优越性。 本文提出通过识别扩散模型中的概念神经元，实现对生成内容的定制化控制。 Zhiheng Liu,Ruili Feng,Kai Zhu,Yifei Zhang,Kecheng Zheng,Yu Liu,Deli Zhao,Jingren Zhou,Yang Cao cs.CV

authors_text: Anastasiia Kornilova,Ivan Moskalenko,Timofei Pushkin,Fakhriddin Tojiboev,Rahim Tariverdizadeh,Gonzalo Ferrer
title: Dominating Set Database Selection for Visual Place Recognition
title_zh: 用于视觉位置识别的支配集数据库选择
comment: ef:2023 21st International Conference on Advanced Robotics (ICAR), Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates, 2023, pp. 473-479
comments: ef:2023 21st International Conference on Advanced Robotics (ICAR), Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates, 2023, pp. 473-479
abstract: This paper presents an approach for creating a visual place recognition (VPR) database for localization in indoor environments from RGBD scanning sequences. The proposed approach is formulated as a minimization problem in terms of dominating set algorithm for graph, constructed from spatial information, and referred as DominatingSet. Our algorithm shows better scene coverage in comparison to other methodologies that are used for database creation. Also, we demonstrate that using DominatingSet, a database size could be up to 250-1400 times smaller than the original scanning sequence while maintaining a recall rate of more than 80% on testing sequences. We evaluated our algorithm on 7-scenes and BundleFusion datasets and an additionally recorded sequence in a highly repetitive office setting. In addition, the database selection can produce weakly-supervised labels for fine-tuning neural place recognition algorithms to particular settings, improving even more their accuracy. The paper also presents a fully automated pipeline for VPR database creation from RGBD scanning sequences, as well as a set of metrics for VPR database evaluation. The code and released data are available on our web-page~ -- https://prime-slam.github.io/place-recognition-db/
summary: This paper presents an approach for creating a visual place recognition (VPR) database for localization in indoor environments from RGBD scanning sequences. The proposed approach is formulated as a minimization problem in terms of dominating set algorithm for graph, constructed from spatial information, and referred as DominatingSet. Our algorithm shows better scene coverage in comparison to other methodologies that are used for database creation. Also, we demonstrate that using DominatingSet, a database size could be up to 250-1400 times smaller than the original scanning sequence while maintaining a recall rate of more than 80% on testing sequences. We evaluated our algorithm on 7-scenes and BundleFusion datasets and an additionally recorded sequence in a highly repetitive office setting. In addition, the database selection can produce weakly-supervised labels for fine-tuning neural place recognition algorithms to particular settings, improving even more their accuracy. The paper also presents a fully automated pipeline for VPR database creation from RGBD scanning sequences, as well as a set of metrics for VPR database evaluation. The code and released data are available on our web-page~ -- https://prime-slam.github.io/place-recognition-db/
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种根据 RGBD 扫描序列创建用于室内环境定位的视觉位置识别 (VPR) 数据库的方法。所提出的方法被表述为根据图的支配集算法的最小化问题，由空间信息构造，并被称为DominateSet。与用于数据库创建的其他方法相比，我们的算法显示出更好的场景覆盖范围。此外，我们还证明，使用 DominationSet，数据库大小可以比原始扫描序列小 250-1400 倍，同时保持测试序列超过 80% 的召回率。我们在 7 个场景和 BundleFusion 数据集以及高度重复的办公室环境中额外记录的序列上评估了我们的算法。此外，数据库选择可以生成弱监督标签，用于根据特定设置微调神经位置识别算法，从而进一步提高其准确性。本文还提出了从 RGBD 扫描序列创建 VPR 数据库的全自动流程，以及一组用于 VPR 数据库评估的指标。代码和发布的数据可以在我们的网页上找到~ -- https://prime-slam.github.io/place-recognition-db/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于支配集算法的视觉地点识别数据库构建方法，通过优化关键帧选择在保证识别准确率的同时大幅缩减数据库规模。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉地点识别数据库构建方法存在存储开销大、计算效率低的问题，尤其在室内重复场景中难以平衡覆盖率与数据库规模。
AI.method: 将空间信息建模为图结构，通过支配集算法求解最小关键帧集合，结合全自动流水线与多维度评估指标实现数据库优化。
AI.result: 在7-scenes等数据集上实现数据库规模缩减250-1400倍且召回率超80%，并可通过弱监督标签提升神经网络识别精度。
AI.conclusion: 支配集算法有效解决了VPR数据库的规模与覆盖率矛盾，为室内定位提供了高效且可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Ning Liao,Xiaopeng Zhang,Min Cao,Junchi Yan
title: M-Tuning: Prompt Tuning with Mitigated Label Bias in Open-Set Scenarios
title_zh: M-Tuning：在开放场景中快速调整并减轻标签偏差
abstract: In realistic open-set scenarios where labels of a part of testing data are totally unknown, when vision-language (VL) prompt learning methods encounter inputs related to unknown classes (i.e., not seen during training), they always predict them as one of the training classes. The exhibited label bias causes difficulty in open set recognition (OSR), in which an image should be correctly predicted as one of the known classes or the unknown one. To achieve this goal, we propose a vision-language prompt tuning method with mitigated label bias (M-Tuning). It introduces open words from the WordNet to extend the range of words forming the prompt texts from only closed-set label words to more, and thus prompts are tuned in a simulated open-set scenario. Besides, inspired by the observation that classifying directly on large datasets causes a much higher false positive rate than on small datasets, we propose a Combinatorial Tuning and Testing (CTT) strategy for improving performance. CTT decomposes M-Tuning on large datasets as multiple independent group-wise tuning on fewer classes, then makes accurate and comprehensive predictions by selecting the optimal sub-prompt. Finally, given the lack of VL-based OSR baselines in the literature, especially for prompt methods, we contribute new baselines for fair comparisons. Our method achieves the best performance on datasets with various scales, and extensive ablation studies also validate its effectiveness.
summary: In realistic open-set scenarios where labels of a part of testing data are totally unknown, when vision-language (VL) prompt learning methods encounter inputs related to unknown classes (i.e., not seen during training), they always predict them as one of the training classes. The exhibited label bias causes difficulty in open set recognition (OSR), in which an image should be correctly predicted as one of the known classes or the unknown one. To achieve this goal, we propose a vision-language prompt tuning method with mitigated label bias (M-Tuning). It introduces open words from the WordNet to extend the range of words forming the prompt texts from only closed-set label words to more, and thus prompts are tuned in a simulated open-set scenario. Besides, inspired by the observation that classifying directly on large datasets causes a much higher false positive rate than on small datasets, we propose a Combinatorial Tuning and Testing (CTT) strategy for improving performance. CTT decomposes M-Tuning on large datasets as multiple independent group-wise tuning on fewer classes, then makes accurate and comprehensive predictions by selecting the optimal sub-prompt. Finally, given the lack of VL-based OSR baselines in the literature, especially for prompt methods, we contribute new baselines for fair comparisons. Our method achieves the best performance on datasets with various scales, and extensive ablation studies also validate its effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 在现实的开放集场景中，部分测试数据的标签完全未知，当视觉语言（VL）提示学习方法遇到与未知类相关的输入（即在训练期间未看到）时，它们总是将其预测为训练类之一。所表现出的标签偏差会导致开放集识别（OSR）中的困难，在开放集识别中，图像应该被正确预测为已知类别之一或未知类别之一。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种减轻标签偏差的视觉语言提示调整方法（M-Tuning）。它引入了WordNet中的开放词，将构成提示文本的单词范围从仅封闭集标签词扩展到更多，从而在模拟开放集场景中调整提示。此外，受到直接在大型数据集上分类会导致比在小数据集上分类更高的误报率的观察结果的启发，我们提出了一种组合调整和测试（CTT）策略来提高性能。 CTT 将大型数据集上的 M-Tuning 分解为较少类别上的多个独立的分组调整，然后通过选择最佳子提示来做出准确而全面的预测。最后，鉴于文献中缺乏基于 VL 的 OSR 基线，特别是对于提示方法，我们贡献了新的基线以进行公平比较。我们的方法在各种规模的数据集上实现了最佳性能，广泛的消融研究也验证了其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为M-Tuning的视觉-语言提示调优方法，旨在缓解开放集场景下的标签偏差问题，提升开放集识别（OSR）性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言提示学习方法在开放集场景中对未知类别的输入容易误判为已知类别，导致标签偏差，从而影响开放集识别的准确性。
AI.method: 引入WordNet开放词汇扩展提示文本范围，并设计组合调优与测试（CTT）策略，将大规模数据集分解为多个小规模子任务进行独立调优，最终通过选择最优子提示实现准确预测。
AI.result: 该方法在不同规模数据集上均取得最佳性能，消融实验验证了其有效性，并为开放集识别提供了新的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: M-Tuning通过缓解标签偏差和组合调优策略有效提升了开放集识别性能，为相关研究提供了新的思路和基准。

search_text: M-Tuning: Prompt Tuning with Mitigated Label Bias in Open-Set Scenarios M-Tuning：在开放场景中快速调整并减轻标签偏差 In realistic open-set scenarios where labels of a part of testing data are totally unknown, when vision-language (VL) prompt learning methods encounter inputs related to unknown classes (i.e., not seen during training), they always predict them as one of the training classes. The exhibited label bias causes difficulty in open set recognition (OSR), in which an image should be correctly predicted as one of the known classes or the unknown one. To achieve this goal, we propose a vision-language prompt tuning method with mitigated label bias (M-Tuning). It introduces open words from the WordNet to extend the range of words forming the prompt texts from only closed-set label words to more, and thus prompts are tuned in a simulated open-set scenario. Besides, inspired by the observation that classifying directly on large datasets causes a much higher false positive rate than on small datasets, we propose a Combinatorial Tuning and Testing (CTT) strategy for improving performance. CTT decomposes M-Tuning on large datasets as multiple independent group-wise tuning on fewer classes, then makes accurate and comprehensive predictions by selecting the optimal sub-prompt. Finally, given the lack of VL-based OSR baselines in the literature, especially for prompt methods, we contribute new baselines for fair comparisons. Our method achieves the best performance on datasets with various scales, and extensive ablation studies also validate its effectiveness. 在现实的开放集场景中，部分测试数据的标签完全未知，当视觉语言（VL）提示学习方法遇到与未知类相关的输入（即在训练期间未看到）时，它们总是将其预测为训练类之一。所表现出的标签偏差会导致开放集识别（OSR）中的困难，在开放集识别中，图像应该被正确预测为已知类别之一或未知类别之一。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种减轻标签偏差的视觉语言提示调整方法（M-Tuning）。它引入了WordNet中的开放词，将构成提示文本的单词范围从仅封闭集标签词扩展到更多，从而在模拟开放集场景中调整提示。此外，受到直接在大型数据集上分类会导致比在小数据集上分类更高的误报率的观察结果的启发，我们提出了一种组合调整和测试（CTT）策略来提高性能。 CTT 将大型数据集上的 M-Tuning 分解为较少类别上的多个独立的分组调整，然后通过选择最佳子提示来做出准确而全面的预测。最后，鉴于文献中缺乏基于 VL 的 OSR 基线，特别是对于提示方法，我们贡献了新的基线以进行公平比较。我们的方法在各种规模的数据集上实现了最佳性能，广泛的消融研究也验证了其有效性。 本文提出一种名为M-Tuning的视觉-语言提示调优方法，旨在缓解开放集场景下的标签偏差问题，提升开放集识别（OSR）性能。 Ning Liao,Xiaopeng Zhang,Min Cao,Junchi Yan cs.CV

authors_text: Gengwei Zhang,Liyuan Wang,Guoliang Kang,Ling Chen,Yunchao Wei
title: SLCA: Slow Learner with Classifier Alignment for Continual Learning on a Pre-trained Model
title_zh: SLCA：具有分类器对齐功能的慢速学习器，用于在预训练模型上进行持续学习
abstract: The goal of continual learning is to improve the performance of recognition models in learning sequentially arrived data. Although most existing works are established on the premise of learning from scratch, growing efforts have been devoted to incorporating the benefits of pre-training. However, how to adaptively exploit the pre-trained knowledge for each incremental task while maintaining its generalizability remains an open question. In this work, we present an extensive analysis for continual learning on a pre-trained model (CLPM), and attribute the key challenge to a progressive overfitting problem. Observing that selectively reducing the learning rate can almost resolve this issue in the representation layer, we propose a simple but extremely effective approach named Slow Learner with Classifier Alignment (SLCA), which further improves the classification layer by modeling the class-wise distributions and aligning the classification layers in a post-hoc fashion. Across a variety of scenarios, our proposal provides substantial improvements for CLPM (e.g., up to 49.76%, 50.05%, 44.69% and 40.16% on Split CIFAR-100, Split ImageNet-R, Split CUB-200 and Split Cars-196, respectively), and thus outperforms state-of-the-art approaches by a large margin. Based on such a strong baseline, critical factors and promising directions are analyzed in-depth to facilitate subsequent research. Code has been made available at: https://github.com/GengDavid/SLCA.
summary: The goal of continual learning is to improve the performance of recognition models in learning sequentially arrived data. Although most existing works are established on the premise of learning from scratch, growing efforts have been devoted to incorporating the benefits of pre-training. However, how to adaptively exploit the pre-trained knowledge for each incremental task while maintaining its generalizability remains an open question. In this work, we present an extensive analysis for continual learning on a pre-trained model (CLPM), and attribute the key challenge to a progressive overfitting problem. Observing that selectively reducing the learning rate can almost resolve this issue in the representation layer, we propose a simple but extremely effective approach named Slow Learner with Classifier Alignment (SLCA), which further improves the classification layer by modeling the class-wise distributions and aligning the classification layers in a post-hoc fashion. Across a variety of scenarios, our proposal provides substantial improvements for CLPM (e.g., up to 49.76%, 50.05%, 44.69% and 40.16% on Split CIFAR-100, Split ImageNet-R, Split CUB-200 and Split Cars-196, respectively), and thus outperforms state-of-the-art approaches by a large margin. Based on such a strong baseline, critical factors and promising directions are analyzed in-depth to facilitate subsequent research. Code has been made available at: https://github.com/GengDavid/SLCA.
abstract_zh: 持续学习的目标是提高识别模型在学习顺序到达的数据时的性能。尽管大多数现有工作都是建立在从头开始学习的前提下的，但越来越多的努力致力于融入预训练的好处。然而，如何自适应地利用每个增量任务的预训练知识，同时保持其普遍性仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们对预训练模型（CLPM）的持续学习进行了广泛的分析，并将关键挑战归因于渐进式过度拟合问题。观察到有选择地降低学习率几乎可以解决表示层中的这个问题，我们提出了一种简单但极其有效的方法，称为带有分类器对齐的慢速学习器（SLCA），该方法通过对类分布进行建模并以事后方式对齐分类层来进一步改进分类层。在各种场景中，我们的建议为 CLPM 提供了实质性改进（例如，在 Split CIFAR-100、Split ImageNet-R、Split CUB-200 和 Split Cars-196 上分别提高了 49.76%、50.05%、44.69% 和 40.16%），因此大大优于最先进的方法。基于这样一个强有力的基线，深入分析关键因素和有希望的方向，以促进后续研究。代码已在以下位置提供：https://github.com/GengDavid/SLCA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SLCA的方法，用于在预训练模型上进行持续学习，通过解决渐进过拟合问题提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法多从头训练模型，而如何有效利用预训练知识并保持模型泛化能力仍存在挑战。
AI.method: 通过逐步降低学习率缓解渐进过拟合，并采用分类层对齐策略，建模类别分布以优化分类头。
AI.result: 在Split CIFAR-100等数据集上分别提升49.76%、50.05%、44.69%和40.16%，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SLCA为预训练模型的持续学习提供了有效方案，并为后续研究指明了关键方向。

authors_text: Xiangyu Huang,Caidan Zhao,Jinghui Yu,Chenxing Gao,Zhiqiang Wu
title: Multi-level Memory-augmented Appearance-Motion Correspondence Framework for Video Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于视频异常检测的多级记忆增强外观-运动对应框架
abstract: Frame prediction based on AutoEncoder plays a significant role in unsupervised video anomaly detection. Ideally, the models trained on the normal data could generate larger prediction errors of anomalies. However, the correlation between appearance and motion information is underutilized, which makes the models lack an understanding of normal patterns. Moreover, the models do not work well due to the uncontrollable generalizability of deep AutoEncoder. To tackle these problems, we propose a multi-level memory-augmented appearance-motion correspondence framework. The latent correspondence between appearance and motion is explored via appearance-motion semantics alignment and semantics replacement training. Besides, we also introduce a Memory-Guided Suppression Module, which utilizes the difference from normal prototype features to suppress the reconstruction capacity caused by skip-connection, achieving the tradeoff between the good reconstruction of normal data and the poor reconstruction of abnormal data. Experimental results show that our framework outperforms the state-of-the-art methods, achieving AUCs of 99.6\%, 93.8\%, and 76.3\% on UCSD Ped2, CUHK Avenue, and ShanghaiTech datasets.
summary: Frame prediction based on AutoEncoder plays a significant role in unsupervised video anomaly detection. Ideally, the models trained on the normal data could generate larger prediction errors of anomalies. However, the correlation between appearance and motion information is underutilized, which makes the models lack an understanding of normal patterns. Moreover, the models do not work well due to the uncontrollable generalizability of deep AutoEncoder. To tackle these problems, we propose a multi-level memory-augmented appearance-motion correspondence framework. The latent correspondence between appearance and motion is explored via appearance-motion semantics alignment and semantics replacement training. Besides, we also introduce a Memory-Guided Suppression Module, which utilizes the difference from normal prototype features to suppress the reconstruction capacity caused by skip-connection, achieving the tradeoff between the good reconstruction of normal data and the poor reconstruction of abnormal data. Experimental results show that our framework outperforms the state-of-the-art methods, achieving AUCs of 99.6\%, 93.8\%, and 76.3\% on UCSD Ped2, CUHK Avenue, and ShanghaiTech datasets.
abstract_zh: 基于AutoEncoder的帧预测在无监督视频异常检测中发挥着重要作用。理想情况下，在正常数据上训练的模型可以产生更大的异常预测误差。然而，外观和运动信息之间的相关性没有得到充分利用，这使得模型缺乏对正常模式的理解。此外，由于深度自动编码器的不可控泛化性，模型不能很好地工作。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种多级记忆增强的外观-运动对应框架。通过外观-运动语义对齐和语义替换训练来探索外观和运动之间的潜在对应关系。此外，我们还引入了Memory-Guided Suppression Module，利用与正常原型特征的差异来抑制跳跃连接引起的重建能力，实现正常数据的良好重建和异常数据的较差重建之间的权衡。实验结果表明，我们的框架优于最先进的方法，在 UCSD Ped2、CUHK Avenue 和 ShanghaiTech 数据集上实现了 99.6%、93.8% 和 76.3% 的 AUC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多级记忆增强的外观-运动对应框架，用于视频异常检测。
AI.motivation: 基于自编码器的帧预测在无监督视频异常检测中起着重要作用，但现有模型未能充分利用外观与运动信息之间的相关性，且深度自编码器的泛化能力不可控。
AI.method: 提出了一种多级记忆增强的外观-运动对应框架，通过外观-运动语义对齐和语义替换训练探索外观与运动之间的潜在对应关系，并引入记忆引导的抑制模块，利用正常原型特征的差异来抑制由跳跃连接引起的重建能力。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该框架优于现有最先进的方法，在UCSD Ped2、CUHK Avenue和ShanghaiTech数据集上分别达到了99.6%、93.8%和76.3%的AUC值。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过有效利用外观与运动信息之间的语义关系，并引入记忆引导的抑制模块，显著提升了视频异常检测的性能。

search_text: Multi-level Memory-augmented Appearance-Motion Correspondence Framework for Video Anomaly Detection 用于视频异常检测的多级记忆增强外观-运动对应框架 Frame prediction based on AutoEncoder plays a significant role in unsupervised video anomaly detection. Ideally, the models trained on the normal data could generate larger prediction errors of anomalies. However, the correlation between appearance and motion information is underutilized, which makes the models lack an understanding of normal patterns. Moreover, the models do not work well due to the uncontrollable generalizability of deep AutoEncoder. To tackle these problems, we propose a multi-level memory-augmented appearance-motion correspondence framework. The latent correspondence between appearance and motion is explored via appearance-motion semantics alignment and semantics replacement training. Besides, we also introduce a Memory-Guided Suppression Module, which utilizes the difference from normal prototype features to suppress the reconstruction capacity caused by skip-connection, achieving the tradeoff between the good reconstruction of normal data and the poor reconstruction of abnormal data. Experimental results show that our framework outperforms the state-of-the-art methods, achieving AUCs of 99.6\%, 93.8\%, and 76.3\% on UCSD Ped2, CUHK Avenue, and ShanghaiTech datasets. 基于AutoEncoder的帧预测在无监督视频异常检测中发挥着重要作用。理想情况下，在正常数据上训练的模型可以产生更大的异常预测误差。然而，外观和运动信息之间的相关性没有得到充分利用，这使得模型缺乏对正常模式的理解。此外，由于深度自动编码器的不可控泛化性，模型不能很好地工作。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种多级记忆增强的外观-运动对应框架。通过外观-运动语义对齐和语义替换训练来探索外观和运动之间的潜在对应关系。此外，我们还引入了Memory-Guided Suppression Module，利用与正常原型特征的差异来抑制跳跃连接引起的重建能力，实现正常数据的良好重建和异常数据的较差重建之间的权衡。实验结果表明，我们的框架优于最先进的方法，在 UCSD Ped2、CUHK Avenue 和 ShanghaiTech 数据集上实现了 99.6%、93.8% 和 76.3% 的 AUC。 本文提出了一种多级记忆增强的外观-运动对应框架，用于视频异常检测。 Xiangyu Huang,Caidan Zhao,Jinghui Yu,Chenxing Gao,Zhiqiang Wu cs.CV

authors_text: Georgia Kenyon,Stephan Lau,Michael A. Chappell,Mark Jenkinson
title: Segmentation method for cerebral blood vessels from MRA using hysteresis
title_zh: 利用磁滞现象的MRA脑血管分割方法
abstract: Segmentation of cerebral blood vessels from Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is an open problem that could be solved with deep learning (DL). However, annotated data for training is often scarce. Due to the absence of open-source tools, we aim to develop a classical segmentation method that generates vessel ground truth from Magnetic Resonance Angiography for DL training of segmentation across a variety of modalities. The method combines size-specific Hessian filters, hysteresis thresholding and connected component correction. The optimal choice of processing steps was evaluated with a blinded scoring by a clinician using 24 3D images. The results show that all method steps are necessary to produce the highest (14.2/15) vessel segmentation quality score. Omitting the connected component correction caused the largest quality loss. The method, which is available on GitHub, can be used to train DL models for vessel segmentation.
summary: Segmentation of cerebral blood vessels from Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is an open problem that could be solved with deep learning (DL). However, annotated data for training is often scarce. Due to the absence of open-source tools, we aim to develop a classical segmentation method that generates vessel ground truth from Magnetic Resonance Angiography for DL training of segmentation across a variety of modalities. The method combines size-specific Hessian filters, hysteresis thresholding and connected component correction. The optimal choice of processing steps was evaluated with a blinded scoring by a clinician using 24 3D images. The results show that all method steps are necessary to produce the highest (14.2/15) vessel segmentation quality score. Omitting the connected component correction caused the largest quality loss. The method, which is available on GitHub, can be used to train DL models for vessel segmentation.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像 (MRI) 中的脑血管分割是一个悬而未决的问题，可以通过深度学习 (DL) 来解决。然而，用于训练的带注释数据通常很少。由于缺乏开源工具，我们的目标是开发一种经典的分割方法，从磁共振血管造影生成血管地面实况，用于跨多种模式的分割的深度学习训练。该方法结合了特定尺寸的 Hessian 滤波器、滞后阈值和连通分量校正。临床医生使用 24 个 3D 图像通过盲法评分来评估处理步骤的最佳选择。结果表明，所有方法步骤都是产生最高 (14.2/15) 血管分割质量分数所必需的。忽略连通分量校正会导致最大的质量损失。该方法可在 GitHub 上找到，可用于训练用于血管分割的深度学习模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于滞后阈值的脑血管分割方法，用于从磁共振血管造影（MRA）生成深度学习训练所需的血管标注数据。
AI.motivation: 脑血管分割缺乏标注数据且无开源工具，需开发经典方法生成标注以支持深度学习模型训练。
AI.method: 结合尺寸特异性Hessian滤波器、滞后阈值分割及连通组件校正，通过临床盲评验证步骤有效性。
AI.result: 所有步骤均必要，其中连通组件校正缺失导致质量下降最显著，方法已在GitHub开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效生成高质量血管标注数据，为多模态深度学习分割模型训练提供可靠工具。

authors_text: Xiangyu Huang,Caidan Zhao,Chenxing Gao,Lvdong Chen,Zhiqiang Wu
title: Synthetic Pseudo Anomalies for Unsupervised Video Anomaly Detection: A Simple yet Efficient Framework based on Masked Autoencoder
title_zh: 用于无监督视频异常检测的合成伪异常：基于屏蔽自动编码器的简单而高效的框架
abstract: Due to the limited availability of anomalous samples for training, video anomaly detection is commonly viewed as a one-class classification problem. Many prevalent methods investigate the reconstruction difference produced by AutoEncoders (AEs) under the assumption that the AEs would reconstruct the normal data well while reconstructing anomalies poorly. However, even with only normal data training, the AEs often reconstruct anomalies well, which depletes their anomaly detection performance. To alleviate this issue, we propose a simple yet efficient framework for video anomaly detection. The pseudo anomaly samples are introduced, which are synthesized from only normal data by embedding random mask tokens without extra data processing. We also propose a normalcy consistency training strategy that encourages the AEs to better learn the regular knowledge from normal and corresponding pseudo anomaly data. This way, the AEs learn more distinct reconstruction boundaries between normal and abnormal data, resulting in superior anomaly discrimination capability. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Due to the limited availability of anomalous samples for training, video anomaly detection is commonly viewed as a one-class classification problem. Many prevalent methods investigate the reconstruction difference produced by AutoEncoders (AEs) under the assumption that the AEs would reconstruct the normal data well while reconstructing anomalies poorly. However, even with only normal data training, the AEs often reconstruct anomalies well, which depletes their anomaly detection performance. To alleviate this issue, we propose a simple yet efficient framework for video anomaly detection. The pseudo anomaly samples are introduced, which are synthesized from only normal data by embedding random mask tokens without extra data processing. We also propose a normalcy consistency training strategy that encourages the AEs to better learn the regular knowledge from normal and corresponding pseudo anomaly data. This way, the AEs learn more distinct reconstruction boundaries between normal and abnormal data, resulting in superior anomaly discrimination capability. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 由于用于训练的异常样本有限，视频异常检测通常被视为一类分类问题。许多流行的方法研究自动编码器（AE）产生的重建差异，假设自动编码器可以很好地重建正常数据，而重建异常数据则很差。然而，即使只进行正常的数据训练，AE 也常常能够很好地重建异常，这会削弱它们的异常检测性能。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一个简单而有效的视频异常检测框架。引入了伪异常样本，这些样本是通过嵌入随机掩码标记仅从正常数据合成的，无需额外的数据处理。我们还提出了一种常态一致性训练策略，鼓励 AE 更好地从正常和相应的伪异常数据中学习常规知识。通过这种方式，AE 可以了解正常数据和异常数据之间更清晰的重建边界，从而获得卓越的异常辨别能力。实验结果证明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于掩码自编码器的无监督视频异常检测框架，通过合成伪异常样本提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自编码器在仅使用正常数据训练时，难以有效区分异常数据，导致重建差异无法准确检测异常。
AI.method: 引入合成伪异常样本（通过随机掩码生成），结合正常一致性训练策略，强化自编码器对正常与异常数据的重建边界学习。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在多个数据集上的有效性，显著提升了异常检测的准确率与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 合成伪异常与一致性训练策略的结合，为无监督视频异常检测提供了简单高效的解决方案。

Many prevalent methods investigate the reconstruction difference produced by AutoEncoders (AEs) under the assumption that the AEs would reconstruct the normal data well while reconstructing anomalies poorly. However, even with only normal data training, the AEs often reconstruct anomalies well, which depletes their anomaly detection performance. To alleviate this issue, we propose a simple yet efficient framework for video anomaly detection. The pseudo anomaly samples are introduced, which are synthesized from only normal data by embedding random mask tokens without extra data processing. We also propose a normalcy consistency training strategy that encourages the AEs to better learn the regular knowledge from normal and corresponding pseudo anomaly data. This way, the AEs learn more distinct reconstruction boundaries between normal and abnormal data, resulting in superior anomaly discrimination capability. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. 由于用于训练的异常样本有限，视频异常检测通常被视为一类分类问题。许多流行的方法研究自动编码器（AE）产生的重建差异，假设自动编码器可以很好地重建正常数据，而重建异常数据则很差。然而，即使只进行正常的数据训练，AE 也常常能够很好地重建异常，这会削弱它们的异常检测性能。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一个简单而有效的视频异常检测框架。引入了伪异常样本，这些样本是通过嵌入随机掩码标记仅从正常数据合成的，无需额外的数据处理。我们还提出了一种常态一致性训练策略，鼓励 AE 更好地从正常和相应的伪异常数据中学习常规知识。通过这种方式，AE 可以了解正常数据和异常数据之间更清晰的重建边界，从而获得卓越的异常辨别能力。实验结果证明了该方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于掩码自编码器的无监督视频异常检测框架，通过合成伪异常样本提升检测性能。 Xiangyu Huang,Caidan Zhao,Chenxing Gao,Lvdong Chen,Zhiqiang Wu cs.CV

authors_text: Nchongmaje Ndipenoch,Alina Miron,Zidong Wang,Yongmin Li
title: Retinal Image Segmentation with Small Datasets
title_zh: 小数据集的视网膜图像分割
abstract: Many eye diseases like Diabetic Macular Edema (DME), Age-related Macular Degeneration (AMD), and Glaucoma manifest in the retina, can cause irreversible blindness or severely impair the central version. The Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT), a 3D scan of the retina with high qualitative information about the retinal morphology, can be used to diagnose and monitor changes in the retinal anatomy. Many Deep Learning (DL) methods have shared the success of developing an automated tool to monitor pathological changes in the retina. However, the success of these methods depend mainly on large datasets. To address the challenge from very small and limited datasets, we proposed a DL architecture termed CoNet (Coherent Network) for joint segmentation of layers and fluids in retinal OCT images on very small datasets (less than a hundred training samples). The proposed model was evaluated on the publicly available Duke DME dataset consisting of 110 B-Scans from 10 patients suffering from DME. Experimental results show that the proposed model outperformed both the human experts' annotation and the current state-of-the-art architectures by a clear margin with a mean Dice Score of 88% when trained on 55 images without any data augmentation.
summary: Many eye diseases like Diabetic Macular Edema (DME), Age-related Macular Degeneration (AMD), and Glaucoma manifest in the retina, can cause irreversible blindness or severely impair the central version. The Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT), a 3D scan of the retina with high qualitative information about the retinal morphology, can be used to diagnose and monitor changes in the retinal anatomy. Many Deep Learning (DL) methods have shared the success of developing an automated tool to monitor pathological changes in the retina. However, the success of these methods depend mainly on large datasets. To address the challenge from very small and limited datasets, we proposed a DL architecture termed CoNet (Coherent Network) for joint segmentation of layers and fluids in retinal OCT images on very small datasets (less than a hundred training samples). The proposed model was evaluated on the publicly available Duke DME dataset consisting of 110 B-Scans from 10 patients suffering from DME. Experimental results show that the proposed model outperformed both the human experts' annotation and the current state-of-the-art architectures by a clear margin with a mean Dice Score of 88% when trained on 55 images without any data augmentation.
abstract_zh: 许多眼部疾病，如糖尿病性黄斑水肿 (DME)、年龄相关性黄斑变性 (AMD) 和青光眼，都表现在视网膜上，可导致不可逆性失明或严重损害中央视网膜。光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 是一种视网膜 3D 扫描，可提供有关视网膜形态的高质量信息，可用于诊断和监测视网膜解剖结构的变化。许多深度学习（DL）方法都成功开发了一种自动化工具来监测视网膜的病理变化。然而，这些方法的成功主要取决于大型数据集。为了解决非常小且有限的数据集的挑战，我们提出了一种称为 CoNet（相干网络）的深度学习架构，用于在非常小的数据集（少于一百个训练样本）上对视网膜 OCT 图像中的层和流体进行联合分割。所提出的模型在公开的 Duke DME 数据集上进行了评估，该数据集包含来自 10 名 DME 患者的 110 次 B 扫描。实验结果表明，在没有任何数据增强的情况下对 55 张图像进行训练时，所提出的模型明显优于人类专家的注释和当前最先进的架构，平均 Dice 得分为 88%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CoNet的深度学习架构，用于在小数据集上对视网膜OCT图像进行层和液体的联合分割。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法依赖大规模数据集，而实际医疗场景中常面临数据量小的挑战，需开发适用于小数据集的自动化视网膜病变监测工具。
AI.method: 设计CoNet网络架构，通过联合分割视网膜层和液体结构，在未使用数据增强的情况下，仅用55张训练图像进行模型训练。
AI.result: 在Duke DME数据集上，模型分割精度达到88%的平均Dice分数，优于人类专家标注和现有最先进方法。

search_text: Retinal Image Segmentation with Small Datasets 小数据集的视网膜图像分割 Many eye diseases like Diabetic Macular Edema (DME), Age-related Macular Degeneration (AMD), and Glaucoma manifest in the retina, can cause irreversible blindness or severely impair the central version. The Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT), a 3D scan of the retina with high qualitative information about the retinal morphology, can be used to diagnose and monitor changes in the retinal anatomy. Many Deep Learning (DL) methods have shared the success of developing an automated tool to monitor pathological changes in the retina. However, the success of these methods depend mainly on large datasets. To address the challenge from very small and limited datasets, we proposed a DL architecture termed CoNet (Coherent Network) for joint segmentation of layers and fluids in retinal OCT images on very small datasets (less than a hundred training samples). The proposed model was evaluated on the publicly available Duke DME dataset consisting of 110 B-Scans from 10 patients suffering from DME. Experimental results show that the proposed model outperformed both the human experts' annotation and the current state-of-the-art architectures by a clear margin with a mean Dice Score of 88% when trained on 55 images without any data augmentation. 许多眼部疾病，如糖尿病性黄斑水肿 (DME)、年龄相关性黄斑变性 (AMD) 和青光眼，都表现在视网膜上，可导致不可逆性失明或严重损害中央视网膜。光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 是一种视网膜 3D 扫描，可提供有关视网膜形态的高质量信息，可用于诊断和监测视网膜解剖结构的变化。许多深度学习（DL）方法都成功开发了一种自动化工具来监测视网膜的病理变化。然而，这些方法的成功主要取决于大型数据集。为了解决非常小且有限的数据集的挑战，我们提出了一种称为 CoNet（相干网络）的深度学习架构，用于在非常小的数据集（少于一百个训练样本）上对视网膜 OCT 图像中的层和流体进行联合分割。所提出的模型在公开的 Duke DME 数据集上进行了评估，该数据集包含来自 10 名 DME 患者的 110 次 B 扫描。实验结果表明，在没有任何数据增强的情况下对 55 张图像进行训练时，所提出的模型明显优于人类专家的注释和当前最先进的架构，平均 Dice 得分为 88%。 本文提出了一种名为CoNet的深度学习架构，用于在小数据集上对视网膜OCT图像进行层和液体的联合分割。 Nchongmaje Ndipenoch,Alina Miron,Zidong Wang,Yongmin Li eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Xiangyu Huang,Caidan Zhao,Zhiqiang Wu
title: Updated version: A Video Anomaly Detection Framework based on Appearance-Motion Semantics Representation Consistency
title_zh: 更新版本：基于外观-运动语义表示一致性的视频异常检测框架
comment: Accepted to ICASSP2023. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.04151
comments: Accepted to ICASSP2023. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.04151
abstract: Video anomaly detection is an essential but challenging task. The prevalent methods mainly investigate the reconstruction difference between normal and abnormal patterns but ignore the semantics consistency between appearance and motion information of behavior patterns, making the results highly dependent on the local context of frame sequences and lacking the understanding of behavior semantics. To address this issue, we propose a framework of Appearance-Motion Semantics Representation Consistency that uses the gap of appearance and motion semantic representation consistency between normal and abnormal data. The two-stream structure is designed to encode the appearance and motion information representation of normal samples, and a novel consistency loss is proposed to enhance the consistency of feature semantics so that anomalies with low consistency can be identified. Moreover, the lower consistency features of anomalies can be used to deteriorate the quality of the predicted frame, which makes anomalies easier to spot. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Video anomaly detection is an essential but challenging task. The prevalent methods mainly investigate the reconstruction difference between normal and abnormal patterns but ignore the semantics consistency between appearance and motion information of behavior patterns, making the results highly dependent on the local context of frame sequences and lacking the understanding of behavior semantics. To address this issue, we propose a framework of Appearance-Motion Semantics Representation Consistency that uses the gap of appearance and motion semantic representation consistency between normal and abnormal data. The two-stream structure is designed to encode the appearance and motion information representation of normal samples, and a novel consistency loss is proposed to enhance the consistency of feature semantics so that anomalies with low consistency can be identified. Moreover, the lower consistency features of anomalies can be used to deteriorate the quality of the predicted frame, which makes anomalies easier to spot. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 视频异常检测是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。流行的方法主要研究正常模式和异常模式之间的重建差异，而忽略了行为模式的外观和运动信息之间的语义一致性，使得结果高度依赖于帧序列的局部上下文，缺乏对行为语义的理解。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种外观-运动语义表示一致性框架，该框架利用正常数据和异常数据之间的外观和运动语义表示一致性的差距。设计双流结构对正常样本的外观和运动信息表示进行编码，并提出一种新颖的一致性损失来增强特征语义的一致性，从而可以识别低一致性的异常。此外，异常的较低一致性特征可用于降低预测帧的质量，这使得异常更容易被发现。实验结果证明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于外观-运动语义表示一致性的视频异常检测框架，旨在通过分析正常与异常数据在外观和运动语义表示上的一致性差异来提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要依赖于正常与异常模式的重建差异，忽略了行为模式中外观与运动信息的语义一致性，导致检测结果高度依赖局部上下文且缺乏对行为语义的理解。
AI.method: 设计双流结构分别编码正常样本的外观和运动信息表示，并提出新的一致性损失函数以增强特征语义一致性，利用异常数据的低一致性特征劣化预测帧质量以辅助检测。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了所提方法在视频异常检测任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入外观-运动语义表示一致性，该框架能够更准确地识别异常行为，提升了视频异常检测的性能。

authors_text: Minh-Quan Le,Tam V. Nguyen,Trung-Nghia Le,Thanh-Toan Do,Minh N. Do,Minh-Triet Tran
title: MaskDiff: Modeling Mask Distribution with Diffusion Probabilistic Model for Few-Shot Instance Segmentation
title_zh: MaskDiff：使用扩散概率模型对少镜头实例分割的掩模分布进行建模
abstract: Few-shot instance segmentation extends the few-shot learning paradigm to the instance segmentation task, which tries to segment instance objects from a query image with a few annotated examples of novel categories. Conventional approaches have attempted to address the task via prototype learning, known as point estimation. However, this mechanism depends on prototypes (\eg mean of $K-$shot) for prediction, leading to performance instability. To overcome the disadvantage of the point estimation mechanism, we propose a novel approach, dubbed MaskDiff, which models the underlying conditional distribution of a binary mask, which is conditioned on an object region and $K-$shot information. Inspired by augmentation approaches that perturb data with Gaussian noise for populating low data density regions, we model the mask distribution with a diffusion probabilistic model. We also propose to utilize classifier-free guided mask sampling to integrate category information into the binary mask generation process. Without bells and whistles, our proposed method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods on both base and novel classes of the COCO dataset while simultaneously being more stable than existing methods. The source code is available at: https://github.com/minhquanlecs/MaskDiff.
summary: Few-shot instance segmentation extends the few-shot learning paradigm to the instance segmentation task, which tries to segment instance objects from a query image with a few annotated examples of novel categories. Conventional approaches have attempted to address the task via prototype learning, known as point estimation. However, this mechanism depends on prototypes (\eg mean of $K-$shot) for prediction, leading to performance instability. To overcome the disadvantage of the point estimation mechanism, we propose a novel approach, dubbed MaskDiff, which models the underlying conditional distribution of a binary mask, which is conditioned on an object region and $K-$shot information. Inspired by augmentation approaches that perturb data with Gaussian noise for populating low data density regions, we model the mask distribution with a diffusion probabilistic model. We also propose to utilize classifier-free guided mask sampling to integrate category information into the binary mask generation process. Without bells and whistles, our proposed method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods on both base and novel classes of the COCO dataset while simultaneously being more stable than existing methods. The source code is available at: https://github.com/minhquanlecs/MaskDiff.
abstract_zh: 少样本实例分割将少样本学习范式扩展到实例分割任务，该任务尝试使用一些新类别的注释示例从查询图像中分割实例对象。传统方法试图通过原型学习（称为点估计）来解决该任务。然而，这种机制依赖于原型（\例如$K-$shot的平均值）进行预测，导致性能不稳定。为了克服点估计机制的缺点，我们提出了一种称为 MaskDiff 的新方法，它对二进制掩模的底层条件分布进行建模，该分布以对象区域和 $K-$shot 信息为条件。受到使用高斯噪声扰乱数据以填充低数据密度区域的增强方法的启发，我们使用扩散概率模型对掩模分布进行建模。我们还建议利用无分类器引导掩模采样将类别信息集成到二进制掩模生成过程中。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们提出的方法在 COCO 数据集的基础类和新类上始终优于最先进的方法，同时比现有方法更稳定。源代码位于：https://github.com/minhquanlecs/MaskDiff。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MaskDiff的方法，用于解决少样本实例分割任务，通过扩散概率模型建模二值掩码的条件分布。
AI.motivation: 传统少样本实例分割方法依赖于原型学习，存在性能不稳定的问题。为此，本文提出了一种新的方法，通过建模掩码分布来提升性能和稳定性。
AI.method: 本文采用扩散概率模型来建模二值掩码的条件分布，结合分类器无关的引导掩码采样方法，将类别信息整合到掩码生成过程中。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集的基准类和新类上，本文方法在不使用额外技巧的情况下，优于现有最先进的方法，并且比现有方法更稳定。
AI.conclusion: MaskDiff方法通过建模掩码分布，有效解决了少样本实例分割任务中的性能不稳定性问题，并在多个数据集上取得了优异的实验结果。
