search_text: MaskDiff: Modeling Mask Distribution with Diffusion Probabilistic Model for Few-Shot Instance Segmentation MaskDiff：使用扩散概率模型对少镜头实例分割的掩模分布进行建模 Few-shot instance segmentation extends the few-shot learning paradigm to the instance segmentation task, which tries to segment instance objects from a query image with a few annotated examples of novel categories. Conventional approaches have attempted to address the task via prototype learning, known as point estimation. However, this mechanism depends on prototypes (\eg mean of $K-$shot) for prediction, leading to performance instability. To overcome the disadvantage of the point estimation mechanism, we propose a novel approach, dubbed MaskDiff, which models the underlying conditional distribution of a binary mask, which is conditioned on an object region and $K-$shot information. Inspired by augmentation approaches that perturb data with Gaussian noise for populating low data density regions, we model the mask distribution with a diffusion probabilistic model. We also propose to utilize classifier-free guided mask sampling to integrate category information into the binary mask generation process. Without bells and whistles, our proposed method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods on both base and novel classes of the COCO dataset while simultaneously being more stable than existing methods. The source code is available at: https://github.com/minhquanlecs/MaskDiff. 少样本实例分割将少样本学习范式扩展到实例分割任务，该任务尝试使用一些新类别的注释示例从查询图像中分割实例对象。传统方法试图通过原型学习（称为点估计）来解决该任务。然而，这种机制依赖于原型（\例如$K-$shot的平均值）进行预测，导致性能不稳定。为了克服点估计机制的缺点，我们提出了一种称为 MaskDiff 的新方法，它对二进制掩模的底层条件分布进行建模，该分布以对象区域和 $K-$shot 信息为条件。受到使用高斯噪声扰乱数据以填充低数据密度区域的增强方法的启发，我们使用扩散概率模型对掩模分布进行建模。我们还建议利用无分类器引导掩模采样将类别信息集成到二进制掩模生成过程中。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们提出的方法在 COCO 数据集的基础类和新类上始终优于最先进的方法，同时比现有方法更稳定。源代码位于：https://github.com/minhquanlecs/MaskDiff。 本文提出了一种名为MaskDiff的方法，用于解决少样本实例分割任务，通过扩散概率模型建模二值掩码的条件分布。 Minh-Quan Le,Tam V. Nguyen,Trung-Nghia Le,Thanh-Toan Do,Minh N. Do,Minh-Triet Tran cs.CV

authors_text: Keisuke Kawano,Takuro Kutsuna,Ryoko Tokuhisa,Akihiro Nakamura,Yasushi Esaki
title: StyleDiff: Attribute Comparison Between Unlabeled Datasets in Latent Disentangled Space
title_zh: StyleDiff：潜在解缠空间中未标记数据集之间的属性比较
comment: 25 pages, 17 figures, Image and Vision Computing
comments: 25 pages, 17 figures, Image and Vision Computing
abstract: One major challenge in machine learning applications is coping with mismatches between the datasets used in the development and those obtained in real-world applications. These mismatches may lead to inaccurate predictions and errors, resulting in poor product quality and unreliable systems. In this study, we propose StyleDiff to inform developers of the differences between the two datasets for the steady development of machine learning systems. Using disentangled image spaces obtained from recently proposed generative models, StyleDiff compares the two datasets by focusing on attributes in the images and provides an easy-to-understand analysis of the differences between the datasets. The proposed StyleDiff performs in $O (d N\log N)$, where $N$ is the size of the datasets and $d$ is the number of attributes, enabling the application to large datasets. We demonstrate that StyleDiff accurately detects differences between datasets and presents them in an understandable format using, for example, driving scenes datasets.
summary: One major challenge in machine learning applications is coping with mismatches between the datasets used in the development and those obtained in real-world applications. These mismatches may lead to inaccurate predictions and errors, resulting in poor product quality and unreliable systems. In this study, we propose StyleDiff to inform developers of the differences between the two datasets for the steady development of machine learning systems. Using disentangled image spaces obtained from recently proposed generative models, StyleDiff compares the two datasets by focusing on attributes in the images and provides an easy-to-understand analysis of the differences between the datasets. The proposed StyleDiff performs in $O (d N\log N)$, where $N$ is the size of the datasets and $d$ is the number of attributes, enabling the application to large datasets. We demonstrate that StyleDiff accurately detects differences between datasets and presents them in an understandable format using, for example, driving scenes datasets.
abstract_zh: 机器学习应用程序的一项主要挑战是处理开发中使用的数据集与实际应用程序中获得的数据集之间的不匹配问题。这些不匹配可能会导致不准确的预测和错误，从而导致产品质量差和系统不可靠。在本研究中，我们提出 StyleDiff 来告知开发人员两个数据集之间的差异，以促进机器学习系统的稳定发展。使用从最近提出的生成模型获得的解缠结图像空间，StyleDiff 通过关注图像中的属性来比较两个数据集，并提供对数据集之间差异的易于理解的分析。所提出的 StyleDiff 的执行时间为 $O (d N\log N)$，其中 $N$ 是数据集的大小，$d$ 是属性的数量，从而能够应用于大型数据集。我们证明 StyleDiff 可以准确检测数据集之间的差异，并使用驾驶场景数据集等以可理解的格式呈现它们。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StyleDiff方法，通过解耦的潜在空间比较未标记数据集之间的属性差异，以解决机器学习应用中数据集不匹配的问题。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中数据集与开发阶段的数据集存在不匹配可能导致预测不准确和系统不可靠，需提供直观的差异分析工具辅助开发者。
AI.method: 利用生成模型获得的解耦图像空间，聚焦图像属性进行数据集比较，时间复杂度为O(dN log N)，支持大规模数据集分析。
AI.result: 实验表明StyleDiff能准确检测数据集差异，并通过驾驶场景数据集等示例以可理解格式呈现结果。
AI.conclusion: StyleDiff通过属性级差异分析有效识别数据集不匹配问题，为机器学习系统的稳定开发提供支持。

authors_text: Xiaogang Peng,Siyuan Mao,Zizhao Wu
title: Trajectory-Aware Body Interaction Transformer for Multi-Person Pose Forecasting
title_zh: 用于多人姿势预测的轨迹感知身体交互变压器
comment: Accepted by CVPR2023, 8 pages, 6 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2208.09224
comments: Accepted by CVPR2023, 8 pages, 6 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2208.09224
abstract: Multi-person pose forecasting remains a challenging problem, especially in modeling fine-grained human body interaction in complex crowd scenarios. Existing methods typically represent the whole pose sequence as a temporal series, yet overlook interactive influences among people based on skeletal body parts. In this paper, we propose a novel Trajectory-Aware Body Interaction Transformer (TBIFormer) for multi-person pose forecasting via effectively modeling body part interactions. Specifically, we construct a Temporal Body Partition Module that transforms all the pose sequences into a Multi-Person Body-Part sequence to retain spatial and temporal information based on body semantics. Then, we devise a Social Body Interaction Self-Attention (SBI-MSA) module, utilizing the transformed sequence to learn body part dynamics for inter- and intra-individual interactions. Furthermore, different from prior Euclidean distance-based spatial encodings, we present a novel and efficient Trajectory-Aware Relative Position Encoding for SBI-MSA to offer discriminative spatial information and additional interactive clues. On both short- and long-term horizons, we empirically evaluate our framework on CMU-Mocap, MuPoTS-3D as well as synthesized datasets (6 ~ 10 persons), and demonstrate that our method greatly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. Code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.
summary: Multi-person pose forecasting remains a challenging problem, especially in modeling fine-grained human body interaction in complex crowd scenarios. Existing methods typically represent the whole pose sequence as a temporal series, yet overlook interactive influences among people based on skeletal body parts. In this paper, we propose a novel Trajectory-Aware Body Interaction Transformer (TBIFormer) for multi-person pose forecasting via effectively modeling body part interactions. Specifically, we construct a Temporal Body Partition Module that transforms all the pose sequences into a Multi-Person Body-Part sequence to retain spatial and temporal information based on body semantics. Then, we devise a Social Body Interaction Self-Attention (SBI-MSA) module, utilizing the transformed sequence to learn body part dynamics for inter- and intra-individual interactions. Furthermore, different from prior Euclidean distance-based spatial encodings, we present a novel and efficient Trajectory-Aware Relative Position Encoding for SBI-MSA to offer discriminative spatial information and additional interactive clues. On both short- and long-term horizons, we empirically evaluate our framework on CMU-Mocap, MuPoTS-3D as well as synthesized datasets (6 ~ 10 persons), and demonstrate that our method greatly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. Code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.
abstract_zh: 多人姿势预测仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题，特别是在复杂人群场景中对细粒度人体交互进行建模时。现有方法通常将整个姿势序列表示为时间序列，但忽略了基于骨骼身体部位的人之间的交互影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的轨迹感知身体交互变压器（TBIFormer），通过有效地建模身体部位交互来预测多人姿势。具体来说，我们构建了一个时间身体分区模块，将所有姿势序列转换为多人身体部位序列，以保留基于身体语义的空间和时间信息。然后，我们设计了一个社交身体交互自注意力（SBI-MSA）模块，利用转换后的序列来学习个体间和个体内交互的身体部位动态。此外，与之前基于欧几里得距离的空间编码不同，我们为 SBI-MSA 提出了一种新颖且高效的轨迹感知相对位置编码，以提供有区别的空间信息和额外的交互线索。从短期和长期的角度来看，我们在 CMU-Mocap、MuPoTS-3D 以及合成数据集（6 ~ 10 人）上对我们的框架进行了实证评估，并证明我们的方法大大优于最先进的方法。代码将在接受后公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TBIFormer的新型轨迹感知身体交互变换器，用于多人姿态预测，通过有效建模身体部位交互来提升复杂人群场景下的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多人姿态预测时，通常将姿态序列视为时间序列，忽略了基于骨骼身体部位的人际交互影响，难以准确捕捉复杂人群中的细粒度身体交互信息。
AI.method: 构建了时间身体分区模块将姿态序列转换为多人体部位序列，并设计社交身体交互自注意力模块（SBI-MSA）学习个体间及个体内的身体部位动态，同时提出基于轨迹的相对位置编码替代传统欧几里得距离编码。
AI.result: 在CMU-Mocap、MuPoTS-3D及合成数据集（6~10人）上，无论短期还是长期预测，该方法均显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模身体部位交互与轨迹感知的空间编码，TBIFormer有效提升了多人姿态预测的准确性，为复杂场景下的行为预测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Feng He,Qi Wang,Zhifan Feng,Wenbin Jiang,Yajuan Lv,Yong zhu,Xiao Tan
title: Improving Video Retrieval by Adaptive Margin
title_zh: 通过自适应边距改进视频检索
abstract: Video retrieval is becoming increasingly important owing to the rapid emergence of videos on the Internet. The dominant paradigm for video retrieval learns video-text representations by pushing the distance between the similarity of positive pairs and that of negative pairs apart from a fixed margin. However, negative pairs used for training are sampled randomly, which indicates that the semantics between negative pairs may be related or even equivalent, while most methods still enforce dissimilar representations to decrease their similarity. This phenomenon leads to inaccurate supervision and poor performance in learning video-text representations. While most video retrieval methods overlook that phenomenon, we propose an adaptive margin changed with the distance between positive and negative pairs to solve the aforementioned issue. First, we design the calculation framework of the adaptive margin, including the method of distance measurement and the function between the distance and the margin. Then, we explore a novel implementation called "Cross-Modal Generalized Self-Distillation" (CMGSD), which can be built on the top of most video retrieval models with few modifications. Notably, CMGSD adds few computational overheads at train time and adds no computational overhead at test time. Experimental results on three widely used datasets demonstrate that the proposed method can yield significantly better performance than the corresponding backbone model, and it outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin.
summary: Video retrieval is becoming increasingly important owing to the rapid emergence of videos on the Internet. The dominant paradigm for video retrieval learns video-text representations by pushing the distance between the similarity of positive pairs and that of negative pairs apart from a fixed margin. However, negative pairs used for training are sampled randomly, which indicates that the semantics between negative pairs may be related or even equivalent, while most methods still enforce dissimilar representations to decrease their similarity. This phenomenon leads to inaccurate supervision and poor performance in learning video-text representations. While most video retrieval methods overlook that phenomenon, we propose an adaptive margin changed with the distance between positive and negative pairs to solve the aforementioned issue. First, we design the calculation framework of the adaptive margin, including the method of distance measurement and the function between the distance and the margin. Then, we explore a novel implementation called "Cross-Modal Generalized Self-Distillation" (CMGSD), which can be built on the top of most video retrieval models with few modifications. Notably, CMGSD adds few computational overheads at train time and adds no computational overhead at test time. Experimental results on three widely used datasets demonstrate that the proposed method can yield significantly better performance than the corresponding backbone model, and it outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 由于视频在互联网上的迅速出现，视频检索变得越来越重要。视频检索的主要范式通过将正对和负对的相似度之间的距离推离固定的边距来学习视频文本表示。然而，用于训练的负对是随机采样的，这表明负对之间的语义可能是相关的甚至是等效的，而大多数方法仍然强制执行不同的表示以降低它们的相似性。这种现象导致监督不准确和学习视频文本表示的性能不佳。虽然大多数视频检索方法忽视了这种现象，但我们提出了一种随着正负对之间的距离而变化的自适应边距来解决上述问题。首先，我们设计了自适应余量的计算框架，包括距离测量的方法以及距离与余量之间的函数。然后，我们探索了一种称为“跨模态广义自蒸馏”（CMGSD）的新颖实现，它可以构建在大多数视频检索模型之上，只需很少的修改。值得注意的是，CMGSD 在训练时增加了很少的计算开销，并且在测试时不增加计算开销。在三个广泛使用的数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以比相应的骨干模型产生明显更好的性能，并且大大优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应边距方法改进视频检索，通过动态调整正负样本对的边距解决负样本监督不准确的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频检索方法使用固定边距处理正负样本对，但随机采样的负样本可能语义相关或等同，强制其表示不相似会导致监督不准确，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 设计自适应边距计算框架（含距离测量方法和距离-边距函数），并提出跨模态广义自蒸馏（CMGSD）方法，在多数视频检索模型上只需少量修改即可实现，且测试时无额外计算开销。
AI.result: 在三个主流数据集上实验表明，该方法显著优于对应基线模型，并大幅超越现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 自适应边距与CMGSD有效提升视频检索性能，为视频-文本表示学习提供新思路，未来可进一步优化边距计算策略。

authors_text: Kunfeng Wang,Kaichun Zhao,Zheng You
title: Stereo Event-based Visual-Inertial Odometry
title_zh: 基于立体事件的视觉惯性里程计
abstract: Event-based cameras are new type vision sensors whose pixels work independently and respond asynchronously to brightness change with microsecond resolution, instead of providing standard intensity frames. Compared with traditional cameras, event-based cameras have low latency, no motion blur, and high dynamic range (HDR), which provide possibilities for robots to deal with some challenging scenes. We propose a visual-inertial odometry for stereo event-based cameras based on Error-State Kalman Filter (ESKF). The visual module updates the pose relies on the edge alignment of a semi-dense 3D map to a 2D image, and the IMU module updates pose by median integral. We evaluate our method on public datasets with general 6-DoF motion and compare the results against ground truth. We show that our proposed pipeline provides improved accuracy over the result of the state-of-the-art visual odometry for stereo event-based cameras, while running in real-time on a standard CPU (low-resolution cameras). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first published visual-inertial odometry for stereo event-based cameras.
summary: Event-based cameras are new type vision sensors whose pixels work independently and respond asynchronously to brightness change with microsecond resolution, instead of providing standard intensity frames. Compared with traditional cameras, event-based cameras have low latency, no motion blur, and high dynamic range (HDR), which provide possibilities for robots to deal with some challenging scenes. We propose a visual-inertial odometry for stereo event-based cameras based on Error-State Kalman Filter (ESKF). The visual module updates the pose relies on the edge alignment of a semi-dense 3D map to a 2D image, and the IMU module updates pose by median integral. We evaluate our method on public datasets with general 6-DoF motion and compare the results against ground truth. We show that our proposed pipeline provides improved accuracy over the result of the state-of-the-art visual odometry for stereo event-based cameras, while running in real-time on a standard CPU (low-resolution cameras). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first published visual-inertial odometry for stereo event-based cameras.
abstract_zh: 基于事件的相机是新型视觉传感器，其像素独立工作并以微秒分辨率异步响应亮度变化，而不是提供标准强度帧。与传统相机相比，基于事件的相机具有低延迟、无运动模糊和高动态范围（HDR）的特点，这为机器人处理一些具有挑战性的场景提供了可能。我们提出了一种基于错误状态卡尔曼滤波器（ESKF）的基于立体事件的相机的视觉惯性里程计。视觉模块依靠半密集3D地图到2D图像的边缘对齐来更新姿态，IMU模块通过中值积分更新姿态。我们在具有一般 6-DoF 运动的公共数据集上评估我们的方法，并将结果与​​地面实况进行比较。我们表明，我们提出的管道在标准 CPU（低分辨率相机）上实时运行时，与基于立体事件的相机的最先进的视觉里程计结果相比，提供了更高的准确性。据我们所知，这是第一个发布的基于立体事件相机的视觉惯性里程计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件相机的立体视觉惯性里程计方法，结合误差状态卡尔曼滤波器（ESKF）实现高精度实时定位。
AI.motivation: 事件相机具有低延迟、无运动模糊和高动态范围等优势，传统视觉惯性里程计难以有效处理其异步事件流数据，需针对性改进。
AI.method: 通过误差状态卡尔曼滤波器融合视觉模块（基于半稠密3D地图与2D图像边缘对齐）和IMU模块（中值积分算法）的更新信息，构建立体事件相机的里程计框架。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上验证表明，该方法在6自由度运动场景下较现有最优方法定位精度提升，且可在标准CPU上实时运行（低分辨率相机）。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现了针对立体事件相机的视觉惯性里程计，验证了事件相机在复杂场景下的定位潜力。

authors_text: Jingyu Li,Zhe Liu,Jinghua Hou,Dingkang Liang
title: DDS3D: Dense Pseudo-Labels with Dynamic Threshold for Semi-Supervised 3D Object Detection
title_zh: DDS3D：具有动态阈值的密集伪标签，用于半监督 3D 对象检测
comment: Accepted for publication in 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: Accepted for publication in 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: In this paper, we present a simple yet effective semi-supervised 3D object detector named DDS3D. Our main contributions have two-fold. On the one hand, different from previous works using Non-Maximal Suppression (NMS) or its variants for obtaining the sparse pseudo labels, we propose a dense pseudo-label generation strategy to get dense pseudo-labels, which can retain more potential supervision information for the student network. On the other hand, instead of traditional fixed thresholds, we propose a dynamic threshold manner to generate pseudo-labels, which can guarantee the quality and quantity of pseudo-labels during the whole training process. Benefiting from these two components, our DDS3D outperforms the state-of-the-art semi-supervised 3d object detection with mAP of 3.1% on the pedestrian and 2.1% on the cyclist under the same configuration of 1% samples. Extensive ablation studies on the KITTI dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our DDS3D. The code and models will be made publicly available at https://github.com/hust-jy/DDS3D
summary: In this paper, we present a simple yet effective semi-supervised 3D object detector named DDS3D. Our main contributions have two-fold. On the one hand, different from previous works using Non-Maximal Suppression (NMS) or its variants for obtaining the sparse pseudo labels, we propose a dense pseudo-label generation strategy to get dense pseudo-labels, which can retain more potential supervision information for the student network. On the other hand, instead of traditional fixed thresholds, we propose a dynamic threshold manner to generate pseudo-labels, which can guarantee the quality and quantity of pseudo-labels during the whole training process. Benefiting from these two components, our DDS3D outperforms the state-of-the-art semi-supervised 3d object detection with mAP of 3.1% on the pedestrian and 2.1% on the cyclist under the same configuration of 1% samples. Extensive ablation studies on the KITTI dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our DDS3D. The code and models will be made publicly available at https://github.com/hust-jy/DDS3D
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的半监督 3D 物体检测器，名为 DDS3D。我们的主要贡献有两个方面。一方面，与之前使用非极大值抑制（NMS）或其变体获取稀疏伪标签的工作不同，我们提出了一种稠密伪标签生成策略来获取稠密伪标签，这可以为学生网络保留更多潜在的监督信息。另一方面，我们提出了一种动态阈值方式来生成伪标签，而不是传统的固定阈值，可以保证整个训练过程中伪标签的质量和数量。受益于这两个组件，我们的 DDS3D 优于最先进的半监督 3D 物体检测，在 1% 样本的相同配置下，行人的 mAP 为 3.1%，骑车人的 mAP 为 2.1%。对 KITTI 数据集的广泛消融研究证明了我们的 DDS3D 的有效性。代码和模型将在 https://github.com/hust-jy/DDS3D 上公开

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DDS3D的半监督3D目标检测方法，通过密集伪标签生成和动态阈值策略提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督3D检测方法依赖稀疏伪标签（如NMS生成）和固定阈值，导致监督信息不足且伪标签质量不稳定。
AI.method: 提出密集伪标签生成策略替代NMS，并设计动态阈值机制，在训练过程中自适应调整伪标签生成标准。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上，使用1%标注样本时，行人mAP提升3.1%，骑行者mAP提升2.1%，优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: 密集伪标签与动态阈值的结合有效提升了半监督3D检测性能，方法经消融实验验证有效。

search_text: DDS3D: Dense Pseudo-Labels with Dynamic Threshold for Semi-Supervised 3D Object Detection DDS3D：具有动态阈值的密集伪标签，用于半监督 3D 对象检测 In this paper, we present a simple yet effective semi-supervised 3D object detector named DDS3D. Our main contributions have two-fold. On the one hand, different from previous works using Non-Maximal Suppression (NMS) or its variants for obtaining the sparse pseudo labels, we propose a dense pseudo-label generation strategy to get dense pseudo-labels, which can retain more potential supervision information for the student network. On the other hand, instead of traditional fixed thresholds, we propose a dynamic threshold manner to generate pseudo-labels, which can guarantee the quality and quantity of pseudo-labels during the whole training process. Benefiting from these two components, our DDS3D outperforms the state-of-the-art semi-supervised 3d object detection with mAP of 3.1% on the pedestrian and 2.1% on the cyclist under the same configuration of 1% samples. Extensive ablation studies on the KITTI dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our DDS3D. The code and models will be made publicly available at https://github.com/hust-jy/DDS3D 在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的半监督 3D 物体检测器，名为 DDS3D。我们的主要贡献有两个方面。一方面，与之前使用非极大值抑制（NMS）或其变体获取稀疏伪标签的工作不同，我们提出了一种稠密伪标签生成策略来获取稠密伪标签，这可以为学生网络保留更多潜在的监督信息。另一方面，我们提出了一种动态阈值方式来生成伪标签，而不是传统的固定阈值，可以保证整个训练过程中伪标签的质量和数量。受益于这两个组件，我们的 DDS3D 优于最先进的半监督 3D 物体检测，在 1% 样本的相同配置下，行人的 mAP 为 3.1%，骑车人的 mAP 为 2.1%。对 KITTI 数据集的广泛消融研究证明了我们的 DDS3D 的有效性。代码和模型将在 https://github.com/hust-jy/DDS3D 上公开 本文提出一种名为DDS3D的半监督3D目标检测方法，通过密集伪标签生成和动态阈值策略提升检测性能。 Jingyu Li,Zhe Liu,Jinghua Hou,Dingkang Liang cs.CV

authors_text: Mao Ye,Gregory P. Meyer,Yuning Chai,Qiang Liu
title: Efficient Transformer-based 3D Object Detection with Dynamic Token Halting
title_zh: 具有动态令牌停止功能的基于 Transformer 的高效 3D 对象检测
abstract: Balancing efficiency and accuracy is a long-standing problem for deploying deep learning models. The trade-off is even more important for real-time safety-critical systems like autonomous vehicles. In this paper, we propose an effective approach for accelerating transformer-based 3D object detectors by dynamically halting tokens at different layers depending on their contribution to the detection task. Although halting a token is a non-differentiable operation, our method allows for differentiable end-to-end learning by leveraging an equivalent differentiable forward-pass. Furthermore, our framework allows halted tokens to be reused to inform the model's predictions through a straightforward token recycling mechanism. Our method significantly improves the Pareto frontier of efficiency versus accuracy when compared with the existing approaches. By halting tokens and increasing model capacity, we are able to improve the baseline model's performance without increasing the model's latency on the Waymo Open Dataset.
summary: Balancing efficiency and accuracy is a long-standing problem for deploying deep learning models. The trade-off is even more important for real-time safety-critical systems like autonomous vehicles. In this paper, we propose an effective approach for accelerating transformer-based 3D object detectors by dynamically halting tokens at different layers depending on their contribution to the detection task. Although halting a token is a non-differentiable operation, our method allows for differentiable end-to-end learning by leveraging an equivalent differentiable forward-pass. Furthermore, our framework allows halted tokens to be reused to inform the model's predictions through a straightforward token recycling mechanism. Our method significantly improves the Pareto frontier of efficiency versus accuracy when compared with the existing approaches. By halting tokens and increasing model capacity, we are able to improve the baseline model's performance without increasing the model's latency on the Waymo Open Dataset.
abstract_zh: 平衡效率和准确性是部署深度学习模型的一个长期存在的问题。对于自动驾驶汽车等实时安全关键系统来说，这种权衡更为重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的方法，通过根据令牌对检测任务的贡献动态地停止不同层的令牌，来加速基于 Transformer 的 3D 对象检测器。尽管停止令牌是不可微的操作，但我们的方法允许通过利用等效的可微前向传递来进行可微的端到端学习。此外，我们的框架允许重新使用停止的令牌，通过简单的令牌回收机制来通知模型的预测。与现有方法相比，我们的方法显着提高了效率与准确性的帕累托前沿。通过停止代币和增加模型容量，我们能够提高基准模型的性能，而不会增加模型在 Waymo 开放数据集上的延迟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态token停止的Transformer-based 3D目标检测方法，通过在不同层动态停止贡献度低的token以提升检测效率。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在3D目标检测中存在效率与精度难以平衡的问题，尤其在自动驾驶等实时系统中需兼顾计算资源与检测性能。
AI.method: 设计动态token停止机制，在不同网络层根据token贡献度决定是否停止；通过可微分前向传递实现端到端训练，并引入token回收机制复用停止token信息。
AI.result: 在Waymo数据集上相比现有方法显著提升效率-精度帕累托前沿，模型容量增加但推理延迟未增加，检测性能优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 动态token停止与回收机制有效平衡了Transformer模型的计算效率与检测精度，为实时3D目标检测提供新思路。

authors_text: Dev Seth,Rickard Stureborg,Danish Pruthi,Bhuwan Dhingra
title: Learning the Legibility of Visual Text Perturbations
title_zh: 学习视觉文本扰动的易读性
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures. Accepted at EACL 2023 (main, long)
comments: 14 pages, 7 figures. Accepted at EACL 2023 (main, long)
abstract: Many adversarial attacks in NLP perturb inputs to produce visually similar strings ('ergo' $\rightarrow$ '$ε$rgo') which are legible to humans but degrade model performance. Although preserving legibility is a necessary condition for text perturbation, little work has been done to systematically characterize it; instead, legibility is typically loosely enforced via intuitions around the nature and extent of perturbations. Particularly, it is unclear to what extent can inputs be perturbed while preserving legibility, or how to quantify the legibility of a perturbed string. In this work, we address this gap by learning models that predict the legibility of a perturbed string, and rank candidate perturbations based on their legibility. To do so, we collect and release LEGIT, a human-annotated dataset comprising the legibility of visually perturbed text. Using this dataset, we build both text- and vision-based models which achieve up to $0.91$ F1 score in predicting whether an input is legible, and an accuracy of $0.86$ in predicting which of two given perturbations is more legible. Additionally, we discover that legible perturbations from the LEGIT dataset are more effective at lowering the performance of NLP models than best-known attack strategies, suggesting that current models may be vulnerable to a broad range of perturbations beyond what is captured by existing visual attacks. Data, code, and models are available at https://github.com/dvsth/learning-legibility-2023.
summary: Many adversarial attacks in NLP perturb inputs to produce visually similar strings ('ergo' $\rightarrow$ '$ε$rgo') which are legible to humans but degrade model performance. Although preserving legibility is a necessary condition for text perturbation, little work has been done to systematically characterize it; instead, legibility is typically loosely enforced via intuitions around the nature and extent of perturbations. Particularly, it is unclear to what extent can inputs be perturbed while preserving legibility, or how to quantify the legibility of a perturbed string. In this work, we address this gap by learning models that predict the legibility of a perturbed string, and rank candidate perturbations based on their legibility. To do so, we collect and release LEGIT, a human-annotated dataset comprising the legibility of visually perturbed text. Using this dataset, we build both text- and vision-based models which achieve up to $0.91$ F1 score in predicting whether an input is legible, and an accuracy of $0.86$ in predicting which of two given perturbations is more legible. Additionally, we discover that legible perturbations from the LEGIT dataset are more effective at lowering the performance of NLP models than best-known attack strategies, suggesting that current models may be vulnerable to a broad range of perturbations beyond what is captured by existing visual attacks. Data, code, and models are available at https://github.com/dvsth/learning-legibility-2023.
abstract_zh: NLP 中的许多对抗性攻击会扰乱输入，产生视觉上相似的字符串 ('ergo' $\rightarrow$ '$ε$rgo')，这些字符串对人类来说是可读的，但会降低模型性能。尽管保持易读性是文本扰动的必要条件，但系统地表征它的工作却很少。相反，易读性通常是通过对扰动的性质和程度的直觉来松散地强制执行的。特别是，目前尚不清楚在保持易读性的同时可以在多大程度上扰动输入，或者如何量化扰动字符串的易读性。在这项工作中，我们通过学习预测扰动字符串的易读性的模型来解决这一差距，并根据其易读性对候选扰动进行排名。为此，我们收集并发布了 LEGIT，这是一个人工注释的数据集，包含视觉上受到干扰的文本的易读性。使用该数据集，我们构建了基于文本和视觉的模型，在预测输入是否清晰时，其 F1 得分高达 0.91 美元，在预测两个给定扰动中哪一个更清晰时，准确度为 0.86 美元。此外，我们发现来自 LEGIT 数据集的明显扰动比最知名的攻击策略更能有效地降低 NLP 模型的性能，这表明当前模型可能容易受到现有视觉攻击捕获范围之外的广泛扰动的影响。数据、代码和模型可在 https://github.com/dvsth/learning-legibility-2023 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在学习并预测视觉文本扰动的可读性，通过构建数据集和模型量化扰动字符串的可读性。
AI.motivation: 现有自然语言处理领域的对抗攻击虽能生成人类可读的视觉相似字符串，但缺乏对可读性的系统性量化方法，依赖直觉判断扰动范围。
AI.method: 收集并发布人类标注的LEGIT数据集，训练基于文本和视觉的模型预测扰动字符串的可读性，并比较不同扰动的可读性排名。
AI.result: 模型在可读性预测任务中达到0.91 F1分数，在双扰动对比任务中准确率为0.86，且LEGIT数据集中的扰动比现有攻击方法更有效降低模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 当前NLP模型可能对现有视觉攻击未覆盖的广泛扰动更为脆弱，需更系统地研究可读性量化方法以提升鲁棒性。

ai_content_json.method: 收集并发布人类标注的LEGIT数据集，训练基于文本和视觉的模型预测扰动字符串的可读性，并比较不同扰动的可读性排名。
ai_content_json.result: 模型在可读性预测任务中达到0.91 F1分数，在双扰动对比任务中准确率为0.86，且LEGIT数据集中的扰动比现有攻击方法更有效降低模型性能。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 当前NLP模型可能对现有视觉攻击未覆盖的广泛扰动更为脆弱，需更系统地研究可读性量化方法以提升鲁棒性。

search_text: Learning the Legibility of Visual Text Perturbations 学习视觉文本扰动的易读性 Many adversarial attacks in NLP perturb inputs to produce visually similar strings ('ergo' $\rightarrow$ '$ε$rgo') which are legible to humans but degrade model performance. Although preserving legibility is a necessary condition for text perturbation, little work has been done to systematically characterize it; instead, legibility is typically loosely enforced via intuitions around the nature and extent of perturbations. Particularly, it is unclear to what extent can inputs be perturbed while preserving legibility, or how to quantify the legibility of a perturbed string. In this work, we address this gap by learning models that predict the legibility of a perturbed string, and rank candidate perturbations based on their legibility. To do so, we collect and release LEGIT, a human-annotated dataset comprising the legibility of visually perturbed text. Using this dataset, we build both text- and vision-based models which achieve up to $0.91$ F1 score in predicting whether an input is legible, and an accuracy of $0.86$ in predicting which of two given perturbations is more legible. Additionally, we discover that legible perturbations from the LEGIT dataset are more effective at lowering the performance of NLP models than best-known attack strategies, suggesting that current models may be vulnerable to a broad range of perturbations beyond what is captured by existing visual attacks. Data, code, and models are available at https://github.com/dvsth/learning-legibility-2023. NLP 中的许多对抗性攻击会扰乱输入，产生视觉上相似的字符串 ('ergo' $\rightarrow$ '$ε$rgo')，这些字符串对人类来说是可读的，但会降低模型性能。尽管保持易读性是文本扰动的必要条件，但系统地表征它的工作却很少。相反，易读性通常是通过对扰动的性质和程度的直觉来松散地强制执行的。特别是，目前尚不清楚在保持易读性的同时可以在多大程度上扰动输入，或者如何量化扰动字符串的易读性。在这项工作中，我们通过学习预测扰动字符串的易读性的模型来解决这一差距，并根据其易读性对候选扰动进行排名。为此，我们收集并发布了 LEGIT，这是一个人工注释的数据集，包含视觉上受到干扰的文本的易读性。使用该数据集，我们构建了基于文本和视觉的模型，在预测输入是否清晰时，其 F1 得分高达 0.91 美元，在预测两个给定扰动中哪一个更清晰时，准确度为 0.86 美元。此外，我们发现来自 LEGIT 数据集的明显扰动比最知名的攻击策略更能有效地降低 NLP 模型的性能，这表明当前模型可能容易受到现有视觉攻击捕获范围之外的广泛扰动的影响。数据、代码和模型可在 https://github.com/dvsth/learning-legibility-2023 获取。 本文旨在学习并预测视觉文本扰动的可读性，通过构建数据集和模型量化扰动字符串的可读性。 Dev Seth,Rickard Stureborg,Danish Pruthi,Bhuwan Dhingra cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Jingzhe Ma,Dingqiang Ye,Chao Fan,Shiqi Yu
title: Pedestrian Attribute Editing for Gait Recognition and Anonymization
title_zh: 用于步态识别和匿名化的行人属性编辑
abstract: As a kind of biometrics, the gait information of pedestrians has attracted widespread attention from both industry and academia since it can be acquired from long distances without the cooperation of targets. In recent literature, this line of research has brought exciting chances along with alarming challenges: On the positive side, gait recognition used for security applications such as suspect retrieval and safety checks is becoming more and more promising. On the negative side, the misuse of gait information may lead to privacy concerns, as lawbreakers can track subjects of interest using gait characteristics even under face-masked and clothes-changed scenarios. To handle this double-edged sword, we propose a gait attribute editing framework termed GaitEditor. It can perform various degrees of attribute edits on real gait sequences while maintaining the visual authenticity, respectively used for gait data augmentation and de-identification, thereby adaptively enhancing or degrading gait recognition performance according to users' intentions. Experimentally, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation under both gait recognition and anonymization protocols on three widely used gait benchmarks. Numerous results illustrate that the adaptable utilization of GaitEditor efficiently improves gait recognition performance and generates vivid visualizations with de-identification to protect human privacy. To the best of our knowledge, GaitEditor is the first framework capable of editing multiple gait attributes while simultaneously benefiting gait recognition and gait anonymization. The source code of GaitEditor will be available at https://github.com/ShiqiYu/OpenGait.
summary: As a kind of biometrics, the gait information of pedestrians has attracted widespread attention from both industry and academia since it can be acquired from long distances without the cooperation of targets. In recent literature, this line of research has brought exciting chances along with alarming challenges: On the positive side, gait recognition used for security applications such as suspect retrieval and safety checks is becoming more and more promising. On the negative side, the misuse of gait information may lead to privacy concerns, as lawbreakers can track subjects of interest using gait characteristics even under face-masked and clothes-changed scenarios. To handle this double-edged sword, we propose a gait attribute editing framework termed GaitEditor. It can perform various degrees of attribute edits on real gait sequences while maintaining the visual authenticity, respectively used for gait data augmentation and de-identification, thereby adaptively enhancing or degrading gait recognition performance according to users' intentions. Experimentally, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation under both gait recognition and anonymization protocols on three widely used gait benchmarks. Numerous results illustrate that the adaptable utilization of GaitEditor efficiently improves gait recognition performance and generates vivid visualizations with de-identification to protect human privacy. To the best of our knowledge, GaitEditor is the first framework capable of editing multiple gait attributes while simultaneously benefiting gait recognition and gait anonymization. The source code of GaitEditor will be available at https://github.com/ShiqiYu/OpenGait.
abstract_zh: 作为生物识别技术的一种，行人的步态信息由于无需目标配合即可远距离获取，受到了工业界和学术界的广泛关注。在最近的文献中，这一领域的研究带来了令人兴奋的机遇，也带来了令人担忧的挑战：从积极的一面来看，用于嫌疑人检索和安全检查等安全应用的步态识别正变得越来越有前途。不利的一面是，步态信息的滥用可能会导致隐私问题，因为即使在蒙面和换衣服的情况下，不法分子也可以利用步态特征追踪感兴趣的对象。为了处理这把双刃剑，我们提出了一个名为 GaitEditor 的步态属性编辑框架。它可以在保持视觉真实性的同时对真实步态序列进行不同程度的属性编辑，分别用于步态数据的增强和去识别，从而根据用户的意图自适应地增强或降低步态识别性能。实验上，我们在步态识别和匿名协议下对三个广泛使用的步态基准进行了综合评估。大量结果表明，GaitEditor 的适应性使用有效地提高了步态识别性能，并生成生动的可视化和去识别化以保护人类隐私。据我们所知，GaitEditor 是第一个能够编辑多个步态属性，同时有利于步态识别和步态匿名化的框架。 GaitEditor 的源代码可在 https://github.com/ShiqiYu/OpenGait 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GaitEditor的框架，用于编辑行人步态属性，以同时提升步态识别性能和实现隐私保护的匿名化处理。
AI.motivation: 步态信息在安全应用中具有重要价值，但其潜在的隐私风险（如被用于追踪目标）亟需解决。现有方法难以兼顾步态识别的准确性与隐私保护需求。
AI.method: 设计GaitEditor框架，通过编辑真实步态序列中的多属性（如服装、遮挡等），在保持视觉真实性的同时实现数据增强与去标识化处理。
AI.result: 在三个主流步态数据集上验证，GaitEditor显著提升了步态识别性能，并有效生成匿名化可视化结果，兼顾安全与隐私需求。
AI.conclusion: GaitEditor是首个同时支持多属性编辑以增强步态识别和实现匿名化的框架，为步态数据的合规应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Muqing Cao,Xinhang Xu,Shenghai Yuan,Kun Cao,Kangcheng Liu,Lihua Xie
title: DoubleBee: A Hybrid Aerial-Ground Robot with Two Active Wheels
title_zh: DoubleBee：带有两个主动轮的混合式空地机器人
abstract: We present the dynamic model and control of DoubleBee, a novel hybrid aerial-ground vehicle consisting of two propellers mounted on tilting servo motors and two motor-driven wheels. DoubleBee exploits the high energy efficiency of a bicopter configuration in aerial mode, and enjoys the low power consumption of a two-wheel self-balancing robot on the ground. Furthermore, the propeller thrusts act as additional control inputs on the ground, enabling a novel decoupled control scheme where the attitude of the robot is controlled using thrusts and the translational motion is realized using wheels. A prototype of DoubleBee is constructed using commercially available components. The power efficiency and the control performance of the robot are verified through comprehensive experiments. Challenging tasks in indoor and outdoor environments demonstrate the capability of DoubleBee to traverse unstructured environments, fly over and move under barriers, and climb steep and rough terrains.
summary: We present the dynamic model and control of DoubleBee, a novel hybrid aerial-ground vehicle consisting of two propellers mounted on tilting servo motors and two motor-driven wheels. DoubleBee exploits the high energy efficiency of a bicopter configuration in aerial mode, and enjoys the low power consumption of a two-wheel self-balancing robot on the ground. Furthermore, the propeller thrusts act as additional control inputs on the ground, enabling a novel decoupled control scheme where the attitude of the robot is controlled using thrusts and the translational motion is realized using wheels. A prototype of DoubleBee is constructed using commercially available components. The power efficiency and the control performance of the robot are verified through comprehensive experiments. Challenging tasks in indoor and outdoor environments demonstrate the capability of DoubleBee to traverse unstructured environments, fly over and move under barriers, and climb steep and rough terrains.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了 DoubleBee 的动态模型和控制，这是一种新型混合式空地飞行器，由安装在倾斜伺服电机上的两个螺旋桨和两个电机驱动轮组成。 DoubleBee利用了双旋翼飞行器配置在空中模式下的高能效，并享受了地面上两轮自平衡机器人的低功耗。此外，螺旋桨推力充当地面上的附加控制输入，从而实现了一种新颖的解耦控制方案，其中使用推力控制机器人的姿态，并使用轮子实现平移运动。 DoubleBee 的原型是使用商用组件构建的。通过综合实验验证了机器人的动力效率和控制性能。室内和室外环境中的挑战性任务展示了 DoubleBee 穿越非结构化环境、飞越障碍物和在障碍物下移动以及攀爬陡峭和崎岖地形的能力。

AI.tldr: 设计并实现一种结合空中与地面运动模式的混合型机器人DoubleBee，通过双旋翼与双轮结构实现高效能与复杂环境适应性。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机能耗高且地面机器人通过复杂地形能力有限，需开发兼具空中飞行与地面移动优势的混合机器人以提升环境适应性。
AI.method: 采用双旋翼倾斜伺服电机与双驱动轮结构，利用螺旋桨推力实现姿态控制，轮子实现平移运动，并通过商业组件构建原型进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验验证了DoubleBee的高功率效率与控制性能，成功完成室内外复杂环境任务，包括障碍穿越、陡坡攀爬等。
AI.conclusion: DoubleBee通过融合空中与地面控制优势，证明了混合型机器人在复杂环境中的可行性，为未来多模态机器人设计提供新思路。

method: 采用双旋翼倾斜伺服电机与双驱动轮结构，利用螺旋桨推力实现姿态控制，轮子实现平移运动，并通过商业组件构建原型进行实验验证。
result: 实验验证了DoubleBee的高功率效率与控制性能，成功完成室内外复杂环境任务，包括障碍穿越、陡坡攀爬等。
conclusion: DoubleBee通过融合空中与地面控制优势，证明了混合型机器人在复杂环境中的可行性，为未来多模态机器人设计提供新思路。
search_text: DoubleBee: A Hybrid Aerial-Ground Robot with Two Active Wheels DoubleBee：带有两个主动轮的混合式空地机器人 We present the dynamic model and control of DoubleBee, a novel hybrid aerial-ground vehicle consisting of two propellers mounted on tilting servo motors and two motor-driven wheels. DoubleBee exploits the high energy efficiency of a bicopter configuration in aerial mode, and enjoys the low power consumption of a two-wheel self-balancing robot on the ground. Furthermore, the propeller thrusts act as additional control inputs on the ground, enabling a novel decoupled control scheme where the attitude of the robot is controlled using thrusts and the translational motion is realized using wheels. A prototype of DoubleBee is constructed using commercially available components. The power efficiency and the control performance of the robot are verified through comprehensive experiments. Challenging tasks in indoor and outdoor environments demonstrate the capability of DoubleBee to traverse unstructured environments, fly over and move under barriers, and climb steep and rough terrains. 我们介绍了 DoubleBee 的动态模型和控制，这是一种新型混合式空地飞行器，由安装在倾斜伺服电机上的两个螺旋桨和两个电机驱动轮组成。 DoubleBee利用了双旋翼飞行器配置在空中模式下的高能效，并享受了地面上两轮自平衡机器人的低功耗。此外，螺旋桨推力充当地面上的附加控制输入，从而实现了一种新颖的解耦控制方案，其中使用推力控制机器人的姿态，并使用轮子实现平移运动。 DoubleBee 的原型是使用商用组件构建的。通过综合实验验证了机器人的动力效率和控制性能。室内和室外环境中的挑战性任务展示了 DoubleBee 穿越非结构化环境、飞越障碍物和在障碍物下移动以及攀爬陡峭和崎岖地形的能力。 设计并实现一种结合空中与地面运动模式的混合型机器人DoubleBee，通过双旋翼与双轮结构实现高效能与复杂环境适应性。 Muqing Cao,Xinhang Xu,Shenghai Yuan,Kun Cao,Kangcheng Liu,Lihua Xie cs.RO

authors_text: Yaohui Zhu,Linhu Liu,Jiang Tian
title: Learn More for Food Recognition via Progressive Self-Distillation
title_zh: 了解有关通过渐进式自蒸馏进行食物识别的更多信息
abstract: Food recognition has a wide range of applications, such as health-aware recommendation and self-service restaurants. Most previous methods of food recognition firstly locate informative regions in some weakly-supervised manners and then aggregate their features. However, location errors of informative regions limit the effectiveness of these methods to some extent. Instead of locating multiple regions, we propose a Progressive Self-Distillation (PSD) method, which progressively enhances the ability of network to mine more details for food recognition. The training of PSD simultaneously contains multiple self-distillations, in which a teacher network and a student network share the same embedding network. Since the student network receives a modified image from its teacher network by masking some informative regions, the teacher network outputs stronger semantic representations than the student network. Guided by such teacher network with stronger semantics, the student network is encouraged to mine more useful regions from the modified image by enhancing its own ability. The ability of the teacher network is also enhanced with the shared embedding network. By using progressive training, the teacher network incrementally improves its ability to mine more discriminative regions. In inference phase, only the teacher network is used without the help of the student network. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method and state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Food recognition has a wide range of applications, such as health-aware recommendation and self-service restaurants. Most previous methods of food recognition firstly locate informative regions in some weakly-supervised manners and then aggregate their features. However, location errors of informative regions limit the effectiveness of these methods to some extent. Instead of locating multiple regions, we propose a Progressive Self-Distillation (PSD) method, which progressively enhances the ability of network to mine more details for food recognition. The training of PSD simultaneously contains multiple self-distillations, in which a teacher network and a student network share the same embedding network. Since the student network receives a modified image from its teacher network by masking some informative regions, the teacher network outputs stronger semantic representations than the student network. Guided by such teacher network with stronger semantics, the student network is encouraged to mine more useful regions from the modified image by enhancing its own ability. The ability of the teacher network is also enhanced with the shared embedding network. By using progressive training, the teacher network incrementally improves its ability to mine more discriminative regions. In inference phase, only the teacher network is used without the help of the student network. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method and state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 食物识别有着广泛的应用，比如健康推荐、自助餐厅等。以前的大多数食物识别方法首先以某种弱监督的方式定位信息区域，然后聚合它们的特征。然而，信息区域的定位误差在一定程度上限制了这些方法的有效性。我们提出了一种渐进式自蒸馏（PSD）方法，而不是定位多个区域，该方法逐步增强网络挖掘更多食物识别细节的能力。 PSD的训练同时包含多个自蒸馏，其中教师网络和学生网络共享相同的嵌入网络。由于学生网络通过屏蔽一些信息区域从教师网络接收修改后的图像，因此教师网络输出比学生网络更强的语义表示。在这种具有更强语义的教师网络的引导下，鼓励学生网络通过增强自身能力从修改后的图像中挖掘更多有用的区域。共享嵌入网络也增强了教师网络的能力。通过使用渐进式训练，教师网络逐渐提高了挖掘更具辨别力的区域的能力。在推理阶段，仅使用教师网络，而无需学生网络的帮助。对三个数据集的广泛实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性和最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出渐进式自蒸馏（PSD）方法，通过教师网络与学生网络的协同训练提升食物识别的细节挖掘能力。
AI.motivation: 传统食物识别方法依赖弱监督定位信息区域，但定位误差限制了特征聚合效果，亟需提升网络对细节信息的挖掘能力。
AI.method: 构建共享嵌入网络的教师-学生架构，教师网络通过屏蔽部分区域生成修改图像，引导学生网络逐步增强对关键区域的感知能力，实现多阶段自蒸馏训练。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上验证了PSD方法的有效性，取得了当前最优的识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 渐进式自蒸馏机制能有效提升食物识别模型的细节感知能力，为弱监督场景下的视觉任务提供新思路。

authors_text: Jan Hendrik Metzen,Robin Hutmacher,N. Grace Hua,Valentyn Boreiko,Dan Zhang
title: Identification of Systematic Errors of Image Classifiers on Rare Subgroups
title_zh: 稀有子群图像分类器系统误差的识别
abstract: Despite excellent average-case performance of many image classifiers, their performance can substantially deteriorate on semantically coherent subgroups of the data that were under-represented in the training data. These systematic errors can impact both fairness for demographic minority groups as well as robustness and safety under domain shift. A major challenge is to identify such subgroups with subpar performance when the subgroups are not annotated and their occurrence is very rare. We leverage recent advances in text-to-image models and search in the space of textual descriptions of subgroups ("prompts") for subgroups where the target model has low performance on the prompt-conditioned synthesized data. To tackle the exponentially growing number of subgroups, we employ combinatorial testing. We denote this procedure as PromptAttack as it can be interpreted as an adversarial attack in a prompt space. We study subgroup coverage and identifiability with PromptAttack in a controlled setting and find that it identifies systematic errors with high accuracy. Thereupon, we apply PromptAttack to ImageNet classifiers and identify novel systematic errors on rare subgroups.
summary: Despite excellent average-case performance of many image classifiers, their performance can substantially deteriorate on semantically coherent subgroups of the data that were under-represented in the training data. These systematic errors can impact both fairness for demographic minority groups as well as robustness and safety under domain shift. A major challenge is to identify such subgroups with subpar performance when the subgroups are not annotated and their occurrence is very rare. We leverage recent advances in text-to-image models and search in the space of textual descriptions of subgroups ("prompts") for subgroups where the target model has low performance on the prompt-conditioned synthesized data. To tackle the exponentially growing number of subgroups, we employ combinatorial testing. We denote this procedure as PromptAttack as it can be interpreted as an adversarial attack in a prompt space. We study subgroup coverage and identifiability with PromptAttack in a controlled setting and find that it identifies systematic errors with high accuracy. Thereupon, we apply PromptAttack to ImageNet classifiers and identify novel systematic errors on rare subgroups.
abstract_zh: 尽管许多图像分类器具有出色的平均情况性能，但在训练数据中代表性不足的语义连贯数据子组上，它们的性能可能会大幅恶化。这些系统性错误可能会影响人口少数群体的公平性以及领域转移下的稳健性和安全性。一个主要的挑战是当子组没有注释并且它们的出现非常罕见时，识别出性能低于标准的子组。我们利用文本到图像模型的最新进展，并在子组（“提示”）的文本描述空间中搜索目标模型在提示条件合成数据上性能较低的子组。为了解决子组数量呈指数增长的问题，我们采用组合测试。我们将此过程表示为 PromptAttack，因为它可以解释为提示空间中的对抗性攻击。我们在受控环境中使用 PromptAttack 研究子组覆盖率和可识别性，发现它可以高精度识别系统错误。于是，我们将 PromptAttack 应用于 ImageNet 分类器，并识别罕见子组上的新系统错误。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PromptAttack的方法，用于识别图像分类器在罕见子群体上的系统性误差。
AI.motivation: 现有图像分类器在平均表现优异的情况下，可能在训练数据中代表性不足的语义连贯子群体上出现性能下降，影响公平性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 利用文本到图像模型生成子群体描述（prompt），通过组合测试在合成数据上筛选模型表现不佳的子群体。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类器上成功识别出新型系统性误差，验证了PromptAttack的高准确性。
AI.conclusion: PromptAttack能有效检测分类器在罕见子群体上的系统性误差，为提升模型公平性与鲁棒性提供新方法。

ai_content.conclusion: PromptAttack能有效检测分类器在罕见子群体上的系统性误差，为提升模型公平性与鲁棒性提供新方法。

authors_text: Tian-Xing Xu,Yuan-Chen Guo,Yu-Kun Lai,Song-Hai Zhang
title: MBPTrack: Improving 3D Point Cloud Tracking with Memory Networks and Box Priors
title_zh: MBPTrack：使用内存网络和盒子先验改进 3D 点云跟踪
abstract: 3D single object tracking has been a crucial problem for decades with numerous applications such as autonomous driving. Despite its wide-ranging use, this task remains challenging due to the significant appearance variation caused by occlusion and size differences among tracked targets. To address these issues, we present MBPTrack, which adopts a Memory mechanism to utilize past information and formulates localization in a coarse-to-fine scheme using Box Priors given in the first frame. Specifically, past frames with targetness masks serve as an external memory, and a transformer-based module propagates tracked target cues from the memory to the current frame. To precisely localize objects of all sizes, MBPTrack first predicts the target center via Hough voting. By leveraging box priors given in the first frame, we adaptively sample reference points around the target center that roughly cover the target of different sizes. Then, we obtain dense feature maps by aggregating point features into the reference points, where localization can be performed more effectively. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MBPTrack achieves state-of-the-art performance on KITTI, nuScenes and Waymo Open Dataset, while running at 50 FPS on a single RTX3090 GPU.
summary: 3D single object tracking has been a crucial problem for decades with numerous applications such as autonomous driving. Despite its wide-ranging use, this task remains challenging due to the significant appearance variation caused by occlusion and size differences among tracked targets. To address these issues, we present MBPTrack, which adopts a Memory mechanism to utilize past information and formulates localization in a coarse-to-fine scheme using Box Priors given in the first frame. Specifically, past frames with targetness masks serve as an external memory, and a transformer-based module propagates tracked target cues from the memory to the current frame. To precisely localize objects of all sizes, MBPTrack first predicts the target center via Hough voting. By leveraging box priors given in the first frame, we adaptively sample reference points around the target center that roughly cover the target of different sizes. Then, we obtain dense feature maps by aggregating point features into the reference points, where localization can be performed more effectively. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MBPTrack achieves state-of-the-art performance on KITTI, nuScenes and Waymo Open Dataset, while running at 50 FPS on a single RTX3090 GPU.
abstract_zh: 几十年来，3D 单目标跟踪一直是自动驾驶等众多应用中的一个关键问题。尽管其用途广泛，但由于跟踪目标之间的遮挡和尺寸差异导致显着的外观变化，该任务仍然具有挑战性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 MBPTrack，它采用记忆机制来利用过去的信息，并使用第一帧中给出的框先验以从粗到细的方案制定定位。具体来说，具有目标掩码的过去帧充当外部存储器，并且基于变压器的模块将跟踪的目标线索从存储器传播到当前帧。为了精确定位各种尺寸的物体，MBPTrack 首先通过霍夫投票来预测目标中心。通过利用第一帧中给出的框先验，我们自适应地对目标中心周围的参考点进行采样，这些参考点大致覆盖了不同尺寸的目标。然后，我们通过将点特征聚合到参考点来获得密集的特征图，可以更有效地进行定位。大量实验表明，MBPTrack 在 KITTI、nuScenes 和 Waymo 开放数据集上实现了最先进的性能，同时在单个 RTX3090 GPU 上以 50 FPS 运行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MBPTrack方法，通过记忆网络和框先验提升3D点云跟踪性能，解决遮挡和尺寸差异导致的外观变化问题。
AI.motivation: 3D单目标跟踪在自动驾驶等领域至关重要，但现有方法因目标遮挡和尺寸差异导致的外观变化而效果受限，需更有效的跟踪策略。
AI.method: MBPTrack采用记忆机制存储历史帧目标掩码，通过Transformer模块传播跟踪线索至当前帧。首先利用Hough投票预测目标中心，结合首帧框先验采样多尺寸参考点，聚合点云特征实现精准定位。
AI.result: 在KITTI、nuScenes和Waymo Open Dataset数据集上达到SOTA性能，单RTX3090 GPU实时运行速度达50 FPS。
AI.conclusion: MBPTrack通过融合记忆网络与框先验机制，有效应对3D点云跟踪中的遮挡和尺寸变化挑战，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: MBPTrack: Improving 3D Point Cloud Tracking with Memory Networks and Box Priors MBPTrack：使用内存网络和盒子先验改进 3D 点云跟踪 3D single object tracking has been a crucial problem for decades with numerous applications such as autonomous driving. Despite its wide-ranging use, this task remains challenging due to the significant appearance variation caused by occlusion and size differences among tracked targets. To address these issues, we present MBPTrack, which adopts a Memory mechanism to utilize past information and formulates localization in a coarse-to-fine scheme using Box Priors given in the first frame. Specifically, past frames with targetness masks serve as an external memory, and a transformer-based module propagates tracked target cues from the memory to the current frame. To precisely localize objects of all sizes, MBPTrack first predicts the target center via Hough voting. By leveraging box priors given in the first frame, we adaptively sample reference points around the target center that roughly cover the target of different sizes. Then, we obtain dense feature maps by aggregating point features into the reference points, where localization can be performed more effectively. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MBPTrack achieves state-of-the-art performance on KITTI, nuScenes and Waymo Open Dataset, while running at 50 FPS on a single RTX3090 GPU. 几十年来，3D 单目标跟踪一直是自动驾驶等众多应用中的一个关键问题。尽管其用途广泛，但由于跟踪目标之间的遮挡和尺寸差异导致显着的外观变化，该任务仍然具有挑战性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 MBPTrack，它采用记忆机制来利用过去的信息，并使用第一帧中给出的框先验以从粗到细的方案制定定位。具体来说，具有目标掩码的过去帧充当外部存储器，并且基于变压器的模块将跟踪的目标线索从存储器传播到当前帧。为了精确定位各种尺寸的物体，MBPTrack 首先通过霍夫投票来预测目标中心。通过利用第一帧中给出的框先验，我们自适应地对目标中心周围的参考点进行采样，这些参考点大致覆盖了不同尺寸的目标。然后，我们通过将点特征聚合到参考点来获得密集的特征图，可以更有效地进行定位。大量实验表明，MBPTrack 在 KITTI、nuScenes 和 Waymo 开放数据集上实现了最先进的性能，同时在单个 RTX3090 GPU 上以 50 FPS 运行。 本文提出MBPTrack方法，通过记忆网络和框先验提升3D点云跟踪性能，解决遮挡和尺寸差异导致的外观变化问题。 Tian-Xing Xu,Yuan-Chen Guo,Yu-Kun Lai,Song-Hai Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Yuwei Zhang,Chih-Hui Ho,Nuno Vasconcelos
title: Toward Unsupervised Realistic Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 走向无监督的现实视觉问答
comment: Yuwei Zhang and Chih-Hui Ho contributed equally to this work
comments: Yuwei Zhang and Chih-Hui Ho contributed equally to this work
abstract: The problem of realistic VQA (RVQA), where a model has to reject unanswerable questions (UQs) and answer answerable ones (AQs), is studied. We first point out 2 drawbacks in current RVQA research, where (1) datasets contain too many unchallenging UQs and (2) a large number of annotated UQs are required for training. To resolve the first drawback, we propose a new testing dataset, RGQA, which combines AQs from an existing VQA dataset with around 29K human-annotated UQs. These UQs consist of both fine-grained and coarse-grained image-question pairs generated with 2 approaches: CLIP-based and Perturbation-based. To address the second drawback, we introduce an unsupervised training approach. This combines pseudo UQs obtained by randomly pairing images and questions, with an RoI Mixup procedure to generate more fine-grained pseudo UQs, and model ensembling to regularize model confidence. Experiments show that using pseudo UQs significantly outperforms RVQA baselines. RoI Mixup and model ensembling further increase the gain. Finally, human evaluation reveals a performance gap between humans and models, showing that more RVQA research is needed.
summary: The problem of realistic VQA (RVQA), where a model has to reject unanswerable questions (UQs) and answer answerable ones (AQs), is studied. We first point out 2 drawbacks in current RVQA research, where (1) datasets contain too many unchallenging UQs and (2) a large number of annotated UQs are required for training. To resolve the first drawback, we propose a new testing dataset, RGQA, which combines AQs from an existing VQA dataset with around 29K human-annotated UQs. These UQs consist of both fine-grained and coarse-grained image-question pairs generated with 2 approaches: CLIP-based and Perturbation-based. To address the second drawback, we introduce an unsupervised training approach. This combines pseudo UQs obtained by randomly pairing images and questions, with an RoI Mixup procedure to generate more fine-grained pseudo UQs, and model ensembling to regularize model confidence. Experiments show that using pseudo UQs significantly outperforms RVQA baselines. RoI Mixup and model ensembling further increase the gain. Finally, human evaluation reveals a performance gap between humans and models, showing that more RVQA research is needed.
abstract_zh: 研究了现实 VQA (RVQA) 问题，其中模型必须拒绝无法回答的问题 (UQ) 并回答可回答的问题 (AQ)。我们首先指出当前 RVQA 研究的 2 个缺点，其中（1）数据集包含太多没有挑战性的 UQ；（2）训练需要大量带注释的 UQ。为了解决第一个缺点，我们提出了一个新的测试数据集 RGQA，它将现有 VQA 数据集中的 AQ 与大约 29K 人工注释的 UQ 结合起来。这些 UQ 包含通过两种方法生成的细粒度和粗粒度图像问题对：基于 CLIP 和基于扰动。为了解决第二个缺点，我们引入了无监督训练方法。这将通过随机配对图像和问题获得的伪 UQ 与 RoI Mixup 过程相结合，以生成更细粒度的伪 UQ，并通过模型集成来正则化模型置信度。实验表明，使用伪 UQ 的性能显着优于 RVQA 基线。 RoI Mixup 和模型集成进一步增加了增益。最后，人类评估揭示了人类和模型之间的性能差距，表明需要更多的 RVQA 研究。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过无监督方法提升现实视觉问答（RVQA）模型的性能，使其能有效区分并回答可回答问题，同时拒绝不可回答问题。
AI.motivation: 现有RVQA研究存在两方面不足：数据集中不可回答问题（UQs）过于简单，且训练需大量标注UQs，限制了模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出新测试数据集RGQA（含29K人工标注UQs）及无监督训练方法，包括伪UQs生成、RoI Mixup增强细粒度伪UQs、模型集成以正则化置信度。
AI.result: 实验表明伪UQs显著优于基线方法，RoI Mixup与模型集成进一步提升效果；人类评估显示模型性能仍与人类存在差距。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法虽有效，但模型与人类能力仍有差距，需持续探索更优的RVQA解决方案。

authors_text: Marc Goerigk,Romain Guillaume,Adam Kasperski,Paweł Zieliński
title: Robust optimization with belief functions
title_zh: 使用置信函数进行鲁棒优化
abstract: In this paper, an optimization problem with uncertain objective function coefficients is considered. The uncertainty is specified by providing a discrete scenario set, containing possible realizations of the objective function coefficients. The concept of belief function in the traditional and possibilistic setting is applied to define a set of admissible probability distributions over the scenario set. The generalized Hurwicz criterion is then used to compute a solution. In this paper, the complexity of the resulting problem is explored. Some exact and approximation methods of solving it are proposed.
summary: In this paper, an optimization problem with uncertain objective function coefficients is considered. The uncertainty is specified by providing a discrete scenario set, containing possible realizations of the objective function coefficients. The concept of belief function in the traditional and possibilistic setting is applied to define a set of admissible probability distributions over the scenario set. The generalized Hurwicz criterion is then used to compute a solution. In this paper, the complexity of the resulting problem is explored. Some exact and approximation methods of solving it are proposed.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑目标函数系数不确定的优化问题。通过提供离散场景集来指定不确定性，其中包含目标函数系数的可能实现。应用传统概率设置中的置信函数概念来定义场景集上的一组可接受的概率分布。然后使用广义 Hurwicz 准则来计算解。在本文中，探讨了由此产生的问题的复杂性。提出了一些精确和近似的求解方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在目标函数系数不确定的情况下，利用信念函数和广义Hurwicz准则进行鲁棒优化，并探讨了问题的求解复杂性及方法。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法难以有效处理不确定性，需通过鲁棒优化框架确保解在多种可能场景下的可靠性。
AI.method: 基于信念函数定义场景集的概率分布，结合广义Hurwicz准则构建优化模型，并提出精确与近似求解算法。
AI.result: 分析了问题的计算复杂性，设计了针对该模型的求解方法，验证了其在处理不确定性优化中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 信念函数与Hurwicz准则的结合为不确定优化提供了新思路，所提方法能够在复杂场景下实现鲁棒解的求取。

search_text: Robust optimization with belief functions 使用置信函数进行鲁棒优化 In this paper, an optimization problem with uncertain objective function coefficients is considered. The uncertainty is specified by providing a discrete scenario set, containing possible realizations of the objective function coefficients. The concept of belief function in the traditional and possibilistic setting is applied to define a set of admissible probability distributions over the scenario set. The generalized Hurwicz criterion is then used to compute a solution. In this paper, the complexity of the resulting problem is explored. Some exact and approximation methods of solving it are proposed. 本文考虑目标函数系数不确定的优化问题。通过提供离散场景集来指定不确定性，其中包含目标函数系数的可能实现。应用传统概率设置中的置信函数概念来定义场景集上的一组可接受的概率分布。然后使用广义 Hurwicz 准则来计算解。在本文中，探讨了由此产生的问题的复杂性。提出了一些精确和近似的求解方法。 本文研究了在目标函数系数不确定的情况下，利用信念函数和广义Hurwicz准则进行鲁棒优化，并探讨了问题的求解复杂性及方法。 Marc Goerigk,Romain Guillaume,Adam Kasperski,Paweł Zieliński cs.DS,math.OC

authors_text: Jinfeng Wang,Sifan Song,Jionglong Su,S. Kevin Zhou
title: Distortion-Disentangled Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 扭曲解开对比学习
abstract: Self-supervised learning is well known for its remarkable performance in representation learning and various downstream computer vision tasks. Recently, Positive-pair-Only Contrastive Learning (POCL) has achieved reliable performance without the need to construct positive-negative training sets. It reduces memory requirements by lessening the dependency on the batch size. The POCL method typically uses a single loss function to extract the distortion invariant representation (DIR) which describes the proximity of positive-pair representations affected by different distortions. This loss function implicitly enables the model to filter out or ignore the distortion variant representation (DVR) affected by different distortions. However, existing POCL methods do not explicitly enforce the disentanglement and exploitation of the actually valuable DVR. In addition, these POCL methods have been observed to be sensitive to augmentation strategies. To address these limitations, we propose a novel POCL framework named Distortion-Disentangled Contrastive Learning (DDCL) and a Distortion-Disentangled Loss (DDL). Our approach is the first to explicitly disentangle and exploit the DVR inside the model and feature stream to improve the overall representation utilization efficiency, robustness and representation ability. Experiments carried out demonstrate the superiority of our framework to Barlow Twins and Simsiam in terms of convergence, representation quality, and robustness on several benchmark datasets.
summary: Self-supervised learning is well known for its remarkable performance in representation learning and various downstream computer vision tasks. Recently, Positive-pair-Only Contrastive Learning (POCL) has achieved reliable performance without the need to construct positive-negative training sets. It reduces memory requirements by lessening the dependency on the batch size. The POCL method typically uses a single loss function to extract the distortion invariant representation (DIR) which describes the proximity of positive-pair representations affected by different distortions. This loss function implicitly enables the model to filter out or ignore the distortion variant representation (DVR) affected by different distortions. However, existing POCL methods do not explicitly enforce the disentanglement and exploitation of the actually valuable DVR. In addition, these POCL methods have been observed to be sensitive to augmentation strategies. To address these limitations, we propose a novel POCL framework named Distortion-Disentangled Contrastive Learning (DDCL) and a Distortion-Disentangled Loss (DDL). Our approach is the first to explicitly disentangle and exploit the DVR inside the model and feature stream to improve the overall representation utilization efficiency, robustness and representation ability. Experiments carried out demonstrate the superiority of our framework to Barlow Twins and Simsiam in terms of convergence, representation quality, and robustness on several benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习以其在表示学习和各种下游计算机视觉任务中的出色表现而闻名。最近，仅正对对比学习（POCL）已经取得了可靠的性能，而无需构建正负训练集。它通过减少对批量大小的依赖来减少内存需求。 POCL 方法通常使用单个损失函数来提取失真不变表示（DIR），它描述受不同失真影响的正对表示的接近度。该损失函数隐式地使模型能够过滤或忽略受不同失真影响的失真变量表示（DVR）。然而，现有的 POCL 方法并没有明确强制对实际有价值的 DVR 进行分离和利用。此外，这些 POCL 方法已被观察到对增强策略敏感。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种新颖的 POCL 框架，名为失真解缠对比学习（DDCL）和失真解缠损失（DDL）。我们的方法是第一个明确地解开和利用模型和特征流内部的 DVR 的方法，以提高整体表示利用效率、鲁棒性和表示能力。进行的实验证明了我们的框架在收敛性、表示质量和几个基准数据集的鲁棒性方面优于 Barlow Twins 和 Simsiam。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Distortion-Disentangled Contrastive Learning (DDCL)的新框架和Distortion-Disentangled Loss (DDL)损失函数，旨在改进现有正样本对对比学习方法在去噪和表示学习中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有正样本对对比学习方法（POCL）无法显式分离和利用受不同失真影响的扭曲可变表示（DVR），且对数据增强策略敏感，导致表示效率和鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 设计DDCL框架和DDL损失函数，首次在模型和特征流中显式分离并利用DVR，通过解耦失真不变表示（DIR）与DVR，提升表示利用率和模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，DDCL在多个基准数据集上优于Barlow Twins和SimSiam，表现出更优的收敛性、表示质量和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DDCL通过显式解耦和利用DVR，有效提升了表示学习的效率与鲁棒性，为对比学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Kento Kawaharazuka,Yoshiki Obinata,Naoaki Kanazawa,Kei Okada,Masayuki Inaba
title: VQA-based Robotic State Recognition Optimized with Genetic Algorithm
title_zh: 基于 VQA 的遗传算法优化机器人状态识别
abstract: State recognition of objects and environment in robots has been conducted in various ways. In most cases, this is executed by processing point clouds, learning images with annotations, and using specialized sensors. In contrast, in this study, we propose a state recognition method that applies Visual Question Answering (VQA) in a Pre-Trained Vision-Language Model (PTVLM) trained from a large-scale dataset. By using VQA, it is possible to intuitively describe robotic state recognition in the spoken language. On the other hand, there are various possible ways to ask about the same event, and the performance of state recognition differs depending on the question. Therefore, in order to improve the performance of state recognition using VQA, we search for an appropriate combination of questions using a genetic algorithm. We show that our system can recognize not only the open/closed of a refrigerator door and the on/off of a display, but also the open/closed of a transparent door and the state of water, which have been difficult to recognize.
summary: State recognition of objects and environment in robots has been conducted in various ways. In most cases, this is executed by processing point clouds, learning images with annotations, and using specialized sensors. In contrast, in this study, we propose a state recognition method that applies Visual Question Answering (VQA) in a Pre-Trained Vision-Language Model (PTVLM) trained from a large-scale dataset. By using VQA, it is possible to intuitively describe robotic state recognition in the spoken language. On the other hand, there are various possible ways to ask about the same event, and the performance of state recognition differs depending on the question. Therefore, in order to improve the performance of state recognition using VQA, we search for an appropriate combination of questions using a genetic algorithm. We show that our system can recognize not only the open/closed of a refrigerator door and the on/off of a display, but also the open/closed of a transparent door and the state of water, which have been difficult to recognize.
abstract_zh: 机器人中的物体和环境的状态识别已经以多种方式进行。在大多数情况下，这是通过处理点云、学习带有注释的图像以及使用专用传感器来执行的。相比之下，在本研究中，我们提出了一种状态识别方法，该方法将视觉问答（VQA）应用于从大规模数据集训练的预训练视觉语言模型（PTVLM）中。通过使用VQA，可以用口语直观地描述机器人状态识别。另一方面，询问同一事件有多种可能的方式，并且状态识别的性能根据问题的不同而不同。因此，为了提高使用 VQA 的状态识别性能，我们使用遗传算法搜索适当的问题组合。我们表明，我们的系统不仅可以识别冰箱门的打开/关闭和显示器的开/关，还可以识别透明门的打开/关闭和水的状态，而这些都是难以识别的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉问答（VQA）和遗传算法优化的机器人状态识别方法，通过自然语言描述环境状态并优化问题组合提升识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人状态识别依赖复杂传感器和标注数据，而VQA能用自然语言直观描述状态，但问题表述方式差异影响识别效果，需优化问题选择。
AI.method: 利用预训练视觉语言模型（PTVLM）的VQA能力，结合遗传算法搜索最优问题组合，以提升对开放/关闭状态及透明物体等复杂场景的识别准确率。
AI.result: 系统成功识别冰箱门、显示器开关、透明门状态及水的状态，解决了传统方法难以处理的透明物体和液体状态识别问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过遗传算法优化问题组合，VQA在机器人状态识别中表现出色，验证了该方法在复杂场景下的有效性与潜力。

On the other hand, there are various possible ways to ask about the same event, and the performance of state recognition differs depending on the question. Therefore, in order to improve the performance of state recognition using VQA, we search for an appropriate combination of questions using a genetic algorithm. We show that our system can recognize not only the open/closed of a refrigerator door and the on/off of a display, but also the open/closed of a transparent door and the state of water, which have been difficult to recognize. 机器人中的物体和环境的状态识别已经以多种方式进行。在大多数情况下，这是通过处理点云、学习带有注释的图像以及使用专用传感器来执行的。相比之下，在本研究中，我们提出了一种状态识别方法，该方法将视觉问答（VQA）应用于从大规模数据集训练的预训练视觉语言模型（PTVLM）中。通过使用VQA，可以用口语直观地描述机器人状态识别。另一方面，询问同一事件有多种可能的方式，并且状态识别的性能根据问题的不同而不同。因此，为了提高使用 VQA 的状态识别性能，我们使用遗传算法搜索适当的问题组合。我们表明，我们的系统不仅可以识别冰箱门的打开/关闭和显示器的开/关，还可以识别透明门的打开/关闭和水的状态，而这些都是难以识别的。 本文提出一种基于视觉问答（VQA）和遗传算法优化的机器人状态识别方法，通过自然语言描述环境状态并优化问题组合提升识别性能。 Kento Kawaharazuka,Yoshiki Obinata,Naoaki Kanazawa,Kei Okada,Masayuki Inaba cs.RO

authors_text: Junjie Hu,Chenyou Fan,Liguang Zhou,Qing Gao,Honghai Liu,Tin Lun Lam
title: Lifelong-MonoDepth: Lifelong Learning for Multi-Domain Monocular Metric Depth Estimation
title_zh: Lifelong-MonoDepth：多域单目度量深度估计的终身学习
abstract: With the rapid advancements in autonomous driving and robot navigation, there is a growing demand for lifelong learning models capable of estimating metric (absolute) depth. Lifelong learning approaches potentially offer significant cost savings in terms of model training, data storage, and collection. However, the quality of RGB images and depth maps is sensor-dependent, and depth maps in the real world exhibit domain-specific characteristics, leading to variations in depth ranges. These challenges limit existing methods to lifelong learning scenarios with small domain gaps and relative depth map estimation. To facilitate lifelong metric depth learning, we identify three crucial technical challenges that require attention: i) developing a model capable of addressing the depth scale variation through scale-aware depth learning, ii) devising an effective learning strategy to handle significant domain gaps, and iii) creating an automated solution for domain-aware depth inference in practical applications. Based on the aforementioned considerations, in this paper, we present i) a lightweight multi-head framework that effectively tackles the depth scale imbalance, ii) an uncertainty-aware lifelong learning solution that adeptly handles significant domain gaps, and iii) an online domain-specific predictor selection method for real-time inference. Through extensive numerical studies, we show that the proposed method can achieve good efficiency, stability, and plasticity, leading the benchmarks by 8% to 15%.
summary: With the rapid advancements in autonomous driving and robot navigation, there is a growing demand for lifelong learning models capable of estimating metric (absolute) depth. Lifelong learning approaches potentially offer significant cost savings in terms of model training, data storage, and collection. However, the quality of RGB images and depth maps is sensor-dependent, and depth maps in the real world exhibit domain-specific characteristics, leading to variations in depth ranges. These challenges limit existing methods to lifelong learning scenarios with small domain gaps and relative depth map estimation. To facilitate lifelong metric depth learning, we identify three crucial technical challenges that require attention: i) developing a model capable of addressing the depth scale variation through scale-aware depth learning, ii) devising an effective learning strategy to handle significant domain gaps, and iii) creating an automated solution for domain-aware depth inference in practical applications. Based on the aforementioned considerations, in this paper, we present i) a lightweight multi-head framework that effectively tackles the depth scale imbalance, ii) an uncertainty-aware lifelong learning solution that adeptly handles significant domain gaps, and iii) an online domain-specific predictor selection method for real-time inference. Through extensive numerical studies, we show that the proposed method can achieve good efficiency, stability, and plasticity, leading the benchmarks by 8% to 15%.
abstract_zh: 随着自动驾驶和机器人导航的快速发展，对能够估计公制（绝对）深度的终身学习模型的需求不断增长。终身学习方法可能会在模型训练、数据存储和收集方面显着节省成本。然而，RGB 图像和深度图的质量取决于传感器，并且现实世界中的深度图表现出特定于域的特征，导致深度范围的变化。这些挑战将现有方法限制为具有小域间隙和相对深度图估计的终身学习场景。为了促进终身度量深度学习，我们确定了需要关注的三个关键技术挑战：i）开发能够通过尺度感知深度学习解决深度尺度变化的模型，ii）设计有效的学习策略来处理重大领域差距，以及iii）为实际应用中的领域感知深度推理创建自动化解决方案。基于上述考虑，在本文中，我们提出了i）一种有效解决深度尺度不平衡的轻量级多头框架，ii）一种能够熟练处理重大领域差距的不确定性感知终身学习解决方案，以及iii）一种用于实时推理的在线特定领域预测器选择方法。通过大量的数值研究，我们表明所提出的方法可以实现良好的效率、稳定性和可塑性，领先基准8%至15%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Lifelong-MonoDepth模型，解决多领域单目视觉深度估计中的终身学习问题，实现跨域场景下的绝对深度预测。
AI.motivation: 现有深度估计方法受限于领域差异和深度尺度变化，难以满足自动驾驶等场景的持续学习需求，需开发适应多领域且无需重复训练的模型。
AI.method: 设计轻量多头框架应对深度尺度失衡，引入不确定性感知学习策略处理领域差异，并提出在线领域预测器选择方法实现实时推理。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，该方法在效率、稳定性及可塑性指标上超越现有方法8%-15%，有效应对显著领域差异场景。
AI.conclusion: 通过解决深度尺度适配、领域差异处理和实时推理三大挑战，本文方法为多领域终身深度学习提供了高效可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Mude Hui,Zhizheng Zhang,Xiaoyi Zhang,Wenxuan Xie,Yuwang Wang,Yan Lu
title: Unifying Layout Generation with a Decoupled Diffusion Model
title_zh: 使用解耦扩散模型统一布局生成
abstract: Layout generation aims to synthesize realistic graphic scenes consisting of elements with different attributes including category, size, position, and between-element relation. It is a crucial task for reducing the burden on heavy-duty graphic design works for formatted scenes, e.g., publications, documents, and user interfaces (UIs). Diverse application scenarios impose a big challenge in unifying various layout generation subtasks, including conditional and unconditional generation. In this paper, we propose a Layout Diffusion Generative Model (LDGM) to achieve such unification with a single decoupled diffusion model. LDGM views a layout of arbitrary missing or coarse element attributes as an intermediate diffusion status from a completed layout. Since different attributes have their individual semantics and characteristics, we propose to decouple the diffusion processes for them to improve the diversity of training samples and learn the reverse process jointly to exploit global-scope contexts for facilitating generation. As a result, our LDGM can generate layouts either from scratch or conditional on arbitrary available attributes. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate our proposed LDGM outperforms existing layout generation models in both functionality and performance.
summary: Layout generation aims to synthesize realistic graphic scenes consisting of elements with different attributes including category, size, position, and between-element relation. It is a crucial task for reducing the burden on heavy-duty graphic design works for formatted scenes, e.g., publications, documents, and user interfaces (UIs). Diverse application scenarios impose a big challenge in unifying various layout generation subtasks, including conditional and unconditional generation. In this paper, we propose a Layout Diffusion Generative Model (LDGM) to achieve such unification with a single decoupled diffusion model. LDGM views a layout of arbitrary missing or coarse element attributes as an intermediate diffusion status from a completed layout. Since different attributes have their individual semantics and characteristics, we propose to decouple the diffusion processes for them to improve the diversity of training samples and learn the reverse process jointly to exploit global-scope contexts for facilitating generation. As a result, our LDGM can generate layouts either from scratch or conditional on arbitrary available attributes. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate our proposed LDGM outperforms existing layout generation models in both functionality and performance.
abstract_zh: 布局生成旨在合成由具有不同属性（包括类别、大小、位置和元素间关系）的元素组成的逼真图形场景。这是减轻格式化场景（例如出版物、文档和用户界面（UI））的重型图形设计工作负担的一项关键任务。多样化的应用场景给统一各种布局生成子任务（包括条件和无条件生成）带来了巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种布局扩散生成模型（LDGM），以通过单个解耦扩散模型实现这种统一。 LDGM 将任意缺失或粗糙元素属性的布局视为完整布局的中间扩散状态。由于不同的属性有其各自的语义和特征，因此我们建议将它们的扩散过程解耦，以提高训练样本的多样性，并共同学习反向过程，以利用全局范围的上下文来促进生成。因此，我们的 LDGM 可以从头开始生成布局，也可以根据任意可用属性生成布局。广泛的定性和定量实验表明，我们提出的 LDGM 在功能和性能方面都优于现有的布局生成模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种解耦扩散生成模型（LDGM），用于统一生成具有不同属性的图形布局，解决格式化场景（如出版物、UI设计）中布局生成的多样化需求。
AI.motivation: 现有布局生成方法难以统一处理条件生成与无条件生成等子任务，且难以应对元素属性缺失或粗粒度的复杂场景。
AI.method: 将布局视为从完整布局到缺失属性的中间扩散状态，解耦不同属性（类别、尺寸、位置等）的扩散过程，并联合学习反向过程以利用全局上下文信息。
AI.result: 在多项定性和定量实验中，LDGM在功能性和性能上均优于现有布局生成模型，可从零生成或基于任意属性条件生成布局。
AI.conclusion: LDGM通过解耦扩散机制有效统一了布局生成任务，提升了生成多样性与全局一致性，为格式化场景的自动化设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Wenrui Liu,Hong Chang,Bingpeng Ma,Shiguang Shan,Xilin Chen
title: Diversity-Measurable Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 多样性可测量异常检测
abstract: Reconstruction-based anomaly detection models achieve their purpose by suppressing the generalization ability for anomaly. However, diverse normal patterns are consequently not well reconstructed as well. Although some efforts have been made to alleviate this problem by modeling sample diversity, they suffer from shortcut learning due to undesired transmission of abnormal information. In this paper, to better handle the tradeoff problem, we propose Diversity-Measurable Anomaly Detection (DMAD) framework to enhance reconstruction diversity while avoid the undesired generalization on anomalies. To this end, we design Pyramid Deformation Module (PDM), which models diverse normals and measures the severity of anomaly by estimating multi-scale deformation fields from reconstructed reference to original input. Integrated with an information compression module, PDM essentially decouples deformation from prototypical embedding and makes the final anomaly score more reliable. Experimental results on both surveillance videos and industrial images demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. In addition, DMAD works equally well in front of contaminated data and anomaly-like normal samples.
summary: Reconstruction-based anomaly detection models achieve their purpose by suppressing the generalization ability for anomaly. However, diverse normal patterns are consequently not well reconstructed as well. Although some efforts have been made to alleviate this problem by modeling sample diversity, they suffer from shortcut learning due to undesired transmission of abnormal information. In this paper, to better handle the tradeoff problem, we propose Diversity-Measurable Anomaly Detection (DMAD) framework to enhance reconstruction diversity while avoid the undesired generalization on anomalies. To this end, we design Pyramid Deformation Module (PDM), which models diverse normals and measures the severity of anomaly by estimating multi-scale deformation fields from reconstructed reference to original input. Integrated with an information compression module, PDM essentially decouples deformation from prototypical embedding and makes the final anomaly score more reliable. Experimental results on both surveillance videos and industrial images demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. In addition, DMAD works equally well in front of contaminated data and anomaly-like normal samples.
abstract_zh: 基于重构的异常检测模型通过抑制异常的泛化能力来达到目的。然而，不同的正常模式也因此没有得到很好的重建。尽管已经做出了一些努力通过对样本多样性进行建模来缓解这个问题，但由于异常信息的不期望的传输，它们受到了捷径学习的困扰。在本文中，为了更好地处理权衡问题，我们提出了多样性可测量异常检测（DMAD）框架来增强重建多样性，同时避免异常泛化。为此，我们设计了金字塔变形模块（PDM），它通过从重建参考到原始输入估计多尺度变形场来对不同的法线进行建模并测量异常的严重性。 PDM 与信息压缩模块集成，本质上将变形与原型嵌入解耦，并使最终的异常评分更加可靠。监控视频和工业图像的实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性。此外，DMAD 在处理受污染数据和类似异常的正常样本时同样表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可度量多样性的异常检测框架（DMAD），通过增强重建多样性并避免对异常的不良泛化，解决现有方法在正常模式重建与异常抑制间的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有重建型异常检测模型因抑制异常泛化能力，导致正常模式多样性重建不足；虽有方法尝试建模多样性，但存在异常信息传递导致的快捷学习问题。
AI.method: 设计金字塔变形模块（PDM）与信息压缩模块，通过多尺度变形场估计异常严重程度，解耦变形与原型嵌入以提升异常评分可靠性。
AI.result: 在监控视频与工业图像数据集上验证有效性，且在受污染数据与类似异常的正常样本中表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: DMAD框架有效平衡了正常多样性重建与异常抑制，提升了异常检测的鲁棒性与可靠性。
