authors_text: Karthik Gajulapalli,Alexander Golovnev,Satyajeet Nagargoje,Sidhant Saraogi
title: Range Avoidance for Constant-Depth Circuits: Hardness and Algorithms
title_zh: 恒定深度电路的范围回避：硬度和算法
abstract: Range Avoidance (AVOID) is a total search problem where, given a Boolean circuit $C\colon\{0,1\}^n\to\{0,1\}^m$, $m>n$, the task is to find a $y\in\{0,1\}^m$ outside the range of $C$. For an integer $k\geq 2$, $\mathrm{NC}^0_k$-AVOID is a special case of AVOID where each output bit of $C$ depends on at most $k$ input bits. While there is a very natural randomized algorithm for AVOID, a deterministic algorithm for the problem would have many interesting consequences. Ren, Santhanam, and Wang (FOCS 2022) and Guruswami, Lyu, and Wang (RANDOM 2022) proved that explicit constructions of functions of high formula complexity, rigid matrices, and optimal linear codes, reduce to $\mathrm{NC}^0_4$-AVOID, thus establishing conditional hardness of the $\mathrm{NC}^0_4$-AVOID problem. On the other hand, $\mathrm{NC}^0_2$-AVOID admits polynomial-time algorithms, leaving the question about the complexity of $\mathrm{NC}^0_3$-AVOID open. We give the first reduction of an explicit construction question to $\mathrm{NC}^0_3$-AVOID. Specifically, we prove that a polynomial-time algorithm (with an $\mathrm{NP}$ oracle) for $\mathrm{NC}^0_3$-AVOID for the case of $m=n+n^{2/3}$ would imply an explicit construction of a rigid matrix, and, thus, a super-linear lower bound on the size of log-depth circuits. We also give deterministic polynomial-time algorithms for all $\mathrm{NC}^0_k$-AVOID problems for $m\geq n^{k-1}/\log(n)$. Prior work required an $\mathrm{NP}$ oracle, and required larger stretch, $m \geq n^{k-1}$.
summary: Range Avoidance (AVOID) is a total search problem where, given a Boolean circuit $C\colon\{0,1\}^n\to\{0,1\}^m$, $m>n$, the task is to find a $y\in\{0,1\}^m$ outside the range of $C$. For an integer $k\geq 2$, $\mathrm{NC}^0_k$-AVOID is a special case of AVOID where each output bit of $C$ depends on at most $k$ input bits. While there is a very natural randomized algorithm for AVOID, a deterministic algorithm for the problem would have many interesting consequences. Ren, Santhanam, and Wang (FOCS 2022) and Guruswami, Lyu, and Wang (RANDOM 2022) proved that explicit constructions of functions of high formula complexity, rigid matrices, and optimal linear codes, reduce to $\mathrm{NC}^0_4$-AVOID, thus establishing conditional hardness of the $\mathrm{NC}^0_4$-AVOID problem. On the other hand, $\mathrm{NC}^0_2$-AVOID admits polynomial-time algorithms, leaving the question about the complexity of $\mathrm{NC}^0_3$-AVOID open. We give the first reduction of an explicit construction question to $\mathrm{NC}^0_3$-AVOID. Specifically, we prove that a polynomial-time algorithm (with an $\mathrm{NP}$ oracle) for $\mathrm{NC}^0_3$-AVOID for the case of $m=n+n^{2/3}$ would imply an explicit construction of a rigid matrix, and, thus, a super-linear lower bound on the size of log-depth circuits. We also give deterministic polynomial-time algorithms for all $\mathrm{NC}^0_k$-AVOID problems for $m\geq n^{k-1}/\log(n)$. Prior work required an $\mathrm{NP}$ oracle, and required larger stretch, $m \geq n^{k-1}$.
abstract_zh: 范围回避 (AVOID) 是一个总搜索问题，其中给定布尔电路 $C\colon\{0,1\}^n\to\{0,1\}^m$，$m>n$，任务是找到 $C$ 范围之外的 $y\in\{0,1\}^m$。对于整数 $k\geq 2$，$\mathrm{NC}^0_k$-AVOID 是 AVOID 的特殊情况，其中 $C$ 的每个输出位最多取决于 $k$ 个输入位。虽然 AVOID 有一种非常自然的随机算法，但解决该问题的确定性算法会产生许多有趣的结果。 Ren、Santhanam 和 Wang (FOCS 2022) 以及 Guruswami、Lyu 和 Wang (RANDOM 2022) 证明，高公式复杂性、刚性矩阵和最优线性代码的函数的显式构造可简化为 $\mathrm{NC}^0_4$-AVOID，从而建立 $\mathrm{NC}^0_4$-AVOID 问题的条件硬度。另一方面，$\mathrm{NC}^0_2$-AVOID 承认多项式时间算法，从而留下了关于 $\mathrm{NC}^0_3$-AVOID 复杂性的问题。我们将显式构造问题的第一次简化为 $\mathrm{NC}^0_3$-AVOID。具体来说，我们证明了 $\mathrm{NC}^0_3$-AVOID 的多项式时间算法（使用 $\mathrm{NP}$ 预言）对于 $m=n+n^{2/3}$ 的情况意味着刚性矩阵的显式构造，因此，对数深度电路的大小具有超线性下界。我们还给出了所有 $\mathrm{NC}^0_k$ 的确定性多项式时间算法 - 避免 $m\geq n^{k-1}/\log(n)$ 的问题。之前的工作需要 $\mathrm{NP}$ 预言机，并且需要更大的拉伸 $m \geq n^{k-1}$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了范围规避问题（AVOID）在常数深度电路中的复杂性，特别是针对NC⁰₃-AVOID问题的算法与构造性结果。
AI.motivation: 范围规避问题与计算复杂性理论中的显式构造问题（如刚性矩阵、线性码）密切相关，解决其复杂性可推动电路下界等核心问题的进展。
AI.method: 通过将显式构造问题归约到NC⁰₃-AVOID，结合确定性算法设计，分析不同输入输出规模下问题的可解性。
AI.result: 证明NC⁰₃-AVOID的多项式时间算法（带NP预言机）可构造刚性矩阵并推导对数深度电路的超线性下界；提出适用于更大输出规模的确定性算法。
AI.conclusion: NC⁰₃-AVOID处于显式构造与电路复杂性理论的关键位置，其算法进展可能带来突破性成果，而当前方法已覆盖更广参数范围。

authors_text: Benedict Quartey,Ankit Shah,George Konidaris
title: Exploiting Contextual Structure to Generate Useful Auxiliary Tasks
title_zh: 利用上下文结构生成有用的辅助任务
abstract: Reinforcement learning requires interaction with an environment, which is expensive for robots. This constraint necessitates approaches that work with limited environmental interaction by maximizing the reuse of previous experiences. We propose an approach that maximizes experience reuse while learning to solve a given task by generating and simultaneously learning useful auxiliary tasks. To generate these tasks, we construct an abstract temporal logic representation of the given task and leverage large language models to generate context-aware object embeddings that facilitate object replacements. Counterfactual reasoning and off-policy methods allow us to simultaneously learn these auxiliary tasks while solving the given target task. We combine these insights into a novel framework for multitask reinforcement learning and experimentally show that our generated auxiliary tasks share similar underlying exploration requirements as the given task, thereby maximizing the utility of directed exploration. Our approach allows agents to automatically learn additional useful policies without extra environment interaction.
summary: Reinforcement learning requires interaction with an environment, which is expensive for robots. This constraint necessitates approaches that work with limited environmental interaction by maximizing the reuse of previous experiences. We propose an approach that maximizes experience reuse while learning to solve a given task by generating and simultaneously learning useful auxiliary tasks. To generate these tasks, we construct an abstract temporal logic representation of the given task and leverage large language models to generate context-aware object embeddings that facilitate object replacements. Counterfactual reasoning and off-policy methods allow us to simultaneously learn these auxiliary tasks while solving the given target task. We combine these insights into a novel framework for multitask reinforcement learning and experimentally show that our generated auxiliary tasks share similar underlying exploration requirements as the given task, thereby maximizing the utility of directed exploration. Our approach allows agents to automatically learn additional useful policies without extra environment interaction.
abstract_zh: 强化学习需要与环境交互，这对于机器人来说代价高昂。这种限制需要通过最大限度地重用以前的经验来在有限的环境相互作用下发挥作用。我们提出了一种方法，可以最大限度地重用经验，同时通过生成并同时学习有用的辅助任务来学习解决给定的任务。为了生成这些任务，我们构建了给定任务的抽象时态逻辑表示，并利用大型语言模型来生成上下文感知的对象嵌入，以促进对象替换。反事实推理和离策略方法使我们能够在解决给定的目标任务的同时同时学习这些辅助任务。我们将这些见解结合到一个新的多任务强化学习框架中，并通过实验表明，我们生成的辅助任务与给定任务具有相似的潜在探索要求，从而最大限度地提高了定向探索的效用。我们的方法允许代理自动学习额外的有用策略，而无需额外的环境交互。

AI.result: 实验表明生成的辅助任务与目标任务具有相似探索需求，显著提升定向探索效率且无需额外环境交互。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了多任务强化学习中辅助任务的自动生成，有效提升了策略学习效率与经验复用率。

search_text: Exploiting Contextual Structure to Generate Useful Auxiliary Tasks 利用上下文结构生成有用的辅助任务 Reinforcement learning requires interaction with an environment, which is expensive for robots. This constraint necessitates approaches that work with limited environmental interaction by maximizing the reuse of previous experiences. We propose an approach that maximizes experience reuse while learning to solve a given task by generating and simultaneously learning useful auxiliary tasks. To generate these tasks, we construct an abstract temporal logic representation of the given task and leverage large language models to generate context-aware object embeddings that facilitate object replacements. Counterfactual reasoning and off-policy methods allow us to simultaneously learn these auxiliary tasks while solving the given target task. We combine these insights into a novel framework for multitask reinforcement learning and experimentally show that our generated auxiliary tasks share similar underlying exploration requirements as the given task, thereby maximizing the utility of directed exploration. Our approach allows agents to automatically learn additional useful policies without extra environment interaction. 强化学习需要与环境交互，这对于机器人来说代价高昂。这种限制需要通过最大限度地重用以前的经验来在有限的环境相互作用下发挥作用。我们提出了一种方法，可以最大限度地重用经验，同时通过生成并同时学习有用的辅助任务来学习解决给定的任务。为了生成这些任务，我们构建了给定任务的抽象时态逻辑表示，并利用大型语言模型来生成上下文感知的对象嵌入，以促进对象替换。反事实推理和离策略方法使我们能够在解决给定的目标任务的同时同时学习这些辅助任务。我们将这些见解结合到一个新的多任务强化学习框架中，并通过实验表明，我们生成的辅助任务与给定任务具有相似的潜在探索要求，从而最大限度地提高了定向探索的效用。我们的方法允许代理自动学习额外的有用策略，而无需额外的环境交互。 本文提出一种通过生成上下文感知的辅助任务来提升强化学习效率的方法，减少机器人与环境交互的成本。 Benedict Quartey,Ankit Shah,George Konidaris cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: AprilPyone MaungMaung,Hitoshi Kiya
title: Generative Model-Based Attack on Learnable Image Encryption for Privacy-Preserving Deep Learning
title_zh: 针对隐私保护深度学习的可学习图像加密的基于生成模型的攻击
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2209.07953
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2209.07953
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel generative model-based attack on learnable image encryption methods proposed for privacy-preserving deep learning. Various learnable encryption methods have been studied to protect the sensitive visual information of plain images, and some of them have been investigated to be robust enough against all existing attacks. However, previous attacks on image encryption focus only on traditional cryptanalytic attacks or reverse translation models, so these attacks cannot recover any visual information if a block-scrambling encryption step, which effectively destroys global information, is applied. Accordingly, in this paper, generative models are explored to evaluate whether such models can restore sensitive visual information from encrypted images for the first time. We first point out that encrypted images have some similarity with plain images in the embedding space. By taking advantage of leaked information from encrypted images, we propose a guided generative model as an attack on learnable image encryption to recover personally identifiable visual information. We implement the proposed attack in two ways by utilizing two state-of-the-art generative models: a StyleGAN-based model and latent diffusion-based one. Experiments were carried out on the CelebA-HQ and ImageNet datasets. Results show that images reconstructed by the proposed method have perceptual similarities to plain images.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel generative model-based attack on learnable image encryption methods proposed for privacy-preserving deep learning. Various learnable encryption methods have been studied to protect the sensitive visual information of plain images, and some of them have been investigated to be robust enough against all existing attacks. However, previous attacks on image encryption focus only on traditional cryptanalytic attacks or reverse translation models, so these attacks cannot recover any visual information if a block-scrambling encryption step, which effectively destroys global information, is applied. Accordingly, in this paper, generative models are explored to evaluate whether such models can restore sensitive visual information from encrypted images for the first time. We first point out that encrypted images have some similarity with plain images in the embedding space. By taking advantage of leaked information from encrypted images, we propose a guided generative model as an attack on learnable image encryption to recover personally identifiable visual information. We implement the proposed attack in two ways by utilizing two state-of-the-art generative models: a StyleGAN-based model and latent diffusion-based one. Experiments were carried out on the CelebA-HQ and ImageNet datasets. Results show that images reconstructed by the proposed method have perceptual similarities to plain images.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种针对可学习图像加密方法的新颖的基于生成模型的攻击，该方法是为隐私保护深度学习而提出的。人们已经研究了各种可学习的加密方法来保护普通图像的敏感视觉信息，其中一些方法已被研究为足以抵御所有现有的攻击。然而，以前对图像加密的攻击仅集中于传统的密码分析攻击或逆向翻译模型，因此如果应用有效破坏全局信息的块置乱加密步骤，这些攻击将无法恢复任何视觉信息。因此，本文探讨了生成模型，以评估此类模型是否能够首次从加密图像中恢复敏感的视觉信息。我们首先指出加密图像与嵌入空间中的纯图像具有一定的相似性。通过利用加密图像中泄露的信息，我们提出了一种引导生成模型，作为对可学习图像加密的攻击，以恢复个人可识别的视觉信息。我们利用两种最先进的生成模型以两种方式实施所提出的攻击：基于 StyleGAN 的模型和基于潜在扩散的模型。在 CelebA-HQ 和 ImageNet 数据集上进行了实验。结果表明，该方法重建的图像与普通图像具有感知相似性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成模型的新型攻击方法，针对隐私保护深度学习中的可学习图像加密技术，旨在从加密图像中恢复敏感视觉信息。
AI.motivation: 现有图像加密方法在应用块混淆加密步骤后，传统密码分析或反向翻译模型无法恢复视觉信息，亟需探索新型攻击手段以评估加密方案的安全性。
AI.method: 利用生成模型（StyleGAN和潜在扩散模型）在嵌入空间中加密图像与原始图像的相似性，构建引导式生成模型，通过泄露的加密信息恢复可识别视觉内容。
AI.result: 在CelebA-HQ和ImageNet数据集上的实验表明，该方法重建的图像与原始图像具有感知相似性，验证了攻击有效性。
AI.conclusion: 生成模型可突破块混淆加密的防护，揭示当前可学习图像加密技术在隐私保护上的潜在漏洞。
